[{"Name":"Robyn M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEMC6Yd2G10vZeAli0gdz4vb72JXW5-rGZMmiPgVceuoZ5bOA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love California Cosmetic Institute and will not go anywhere else. Alena is seriously the best! She fixed my forehead and made it look smooth and then she started me on laser hair removal and it’s the best thing I’ve ever done!! My upper lip has no hair now. It’s the best! Alena is gentle and gives you good advice, but isn’t pushy at all. California Cosmetics is my one-stop shop for Botox and skin care. They do it all! Dina gave me the best hydrofacial of my life and Marilyn (the owner) is the most kind, helpful person!! She also does an amazing job at Botox!! I cannot say enough good things about CCI and will not go anywhere else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"NAHLA SALAHELDIN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYDgvx_rnfG8Do5mfzbBnkDVpN55JB8FyGIde8CbfBWMmK2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I couldn’t be happier with my experience at California Cosmetics Medical Institute! From the moment I walk in, I’m always greeted with warmth and professionalism. The entire team is wonderful, and the environment is so clean, calm, and welcoming — I genuinely look forward to every visit.
A special and heartfelt thank-you to Alena, who has truly made all the difference in my skincare journey. From day one, she took the time to assess my skin, listen to my concerns, and create a personalized treatment plan just for me. We started with chemical peels to prepare and refresh my skin, and then moved on to Pico laser treatments — and the results have been amazing!
My skin is noticeably brighter, smoother, and more even. Years of pigmentation and texture issues have started to fade, and for the first time, I feel confident going out without makeup. Alena’s care, attention to detail, and genuine passion for what she does really shine through. She always makes me feel informed, comfortable, and in the best hands.
If you’re thinking about improving your skin or starting a treatment plan, I can’t recommend California Cosmetics Medical Institute — and especially Alena — enough. She’s the absolute best, and I’m so grateful I found her!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lynette Colletta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXr0atxLRv-40TU2dF7lb9ahjFKEWPxf8m_C3oqbnClVCDXmKE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been a client of California Cosmetic Medical Institute for nearly 20 years and always have a wonderful experience! Marylynn does amazing work, and Alena, Jenna, and Deana each bring their own special talents and care. The team is professional, friendly, and the prices are very reasonable. I always leave feeling refreshed and happy with my results!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"L C gmail","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkQUbV2DO54KHsYOdc-8PHqTtvn_5st5ki2C5a1RGxsqHU5SuO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had a CO2 laser treatment with Phoebe, and I can honestly say she is phenomenal! From start to finish, she explained every single step in detail, making the process so easy and putting me completely at ease.

Phoebe’s knowledge and expertise are unmatched. In the skin industry, I know firsthand that going to the right provider is absolutely critical—this is not a treatment you want done by someone without in-depth training. Many spas and doctors’ offices have lasers, but that doesn’t mean every provider truly knows how to use them safely and effectively.

Phoebe is the real deal—highly trained, extremely skilled, and with a clear passion for what she does. My results have exceeded my expectations, and I couldn’t be happier!

If you’re considering a CO2 laser treatment, I highly, highly recommend going to Phoebe. She truly knows her craft and will ensure you get the best possible outcome.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tracy Vandenbroeke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmt_ZRCH45105DlfhUrBSezHm8EJXPyg7d-pep0X2Ec5-ogIg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Marylyn is hands down the best injector I’ve ever experienced. I recommend CCMI to anyone who asks","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenny Taing","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjXy9SC0xVNCk4PrWYJrNbfxeax4qyqlBMsnYFnNCrwFplEA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jenna is very nice and excellent at what she does. We decided to go forward with a laser treatment, particularly for sunspots, and she was great at explaining each step of the process. She was very thoughtful about my facial hair as well, asking what spots to preserve/avoid.

After her treatment, my skin legitimately looks years younger. Would happily recommend her services to anyone interested!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Johanna Matos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwV_SuaEtOMLCcKPXiYiKPcKAONH_LeguEUTnPqJT4HL-gcH8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Dr. Kian Karimi at the Kian Institute of Aesthetics. His diligence, compassion, and attention to detail made our daughter Isabella’s rhinoplasty experience exceptional. From start to finish, Dr. Karimi was always available to answer questions, truly listened to our concerns, and continues to personally follow up on her care.

Sherry and Michaela were equally outstanding, ensuring that both preoperative and postoperative care were seamless and exceeded our expectations. As parents, we felt informed, supported, and confident every step of the way. We are incredibly grateful for the entire team and their dedication to excellence.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deborah Shieh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUICdrN7PMnS6p4XV08oz0GBzT_IF6lBeYJmn7F1CGQ-ziSa3IeJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an incredible experience with such detail oriented and authentic staff. I’m not very well-versed in the aesthetics world so I went in with a bunch of ideas and got to work with Lauren. She was amazingly knowledgeable and able to explain everything to me in layman’s terms. She was able to lay out some options with plans for possible future treatments. I really appreciate it all of her input and her patience with all my questions.
Previously, I had a bad experience with neurotoxins and wasn’t sure if I wanted to try it again. I didn’t find it to be effective on the line I have running between my inner eyes. Lauren explained the importance of placement and she did an amazing job. Over the last 2 to 3 months, I have seen that line fade to almost nothing now! I also got microneedling done with exosomes. I got a lot of compliments on my skin a week later when I was fully healed. Overall, it was an amazing experience and I look forward to going back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Supriya V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYCMyZYpOgX3nazlavPYRuuhamTHzzw7L0SH8w2dKMXBZz-6s=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had only the best experience with Kian Aesthetic Institute. Dr Karimi and his team are just excellent! I love the front desk staff as well as the team that manages the billing! Always polite and always make me feel welcome! They will kindly move my appointments and always make exceptions when reasonable which I appreciate so much given my work requires me to constantly travel. Want to particularly call out Cindy who I’ve worked with consistently for the last 3 years! Cindy is an elite injector and physician assistant and highly skilled! I’m a nervous person until I trust someone and Cindy has been so great I can trust her with my eyes closed! She has never pushed for me to do anything I’ve not been comfortable with and instead works with the aesthetic I prefer. If you’re getting Morpheus 8 or XERF Cindy is your girl! She knows the settings well and knows where to use what setting without melting your fat where you actually need it!! Her skill with sculptra and other injectables is beautiful! It’s precise, smooth and I trust her with my eyes closed! In fact I don’t pay any attention once she’s started her work on me! And end up looking gorgeous! Her philosophy of not changing who I am,
but enhancing what I have and delaying the onset of aging (my goal) is what I love! Her work with threads is truly elite! What I love is she and other assistants get rigorous training from Dr Karimi himself so if you cannot get on Dr Karimi’s calendar for any reason, I would trust Cindy to give me the same results! I will continue to go back to Cindy and Dr Karimi all the time!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jess","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0Y09UQDtrIEMOaUgtr-cYl7Q-eGtWydjhsWzqxn5gEAoN4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been going to Lauren for botox/dysport for about 2 years now and she is the best! She is very knowledgeable about various treatment options so I trust her suggestions. She always listens to my concerns and adjusts the treatments as needed. Lauren really pays attention to how certain muscles move on my face and tailors the injections to create a balanced look. I could not be happier!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLu5ZBQf_EWlw0owSE9OQcmzIzlaP1upTrrMzPzRKQVOQm4TQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had been wanting to get a rhinoplasty for awhile. I got a septorhinoplasty with Dr. Karimi in November last year, and healing was a breeze, I was never in any pain throughout the entire process.

I chose Dr. Karimi because he is double board certified and his work is very natural.
Dr. Karimi and his team made sure I had their numbers so that I could always reach out with any questions or concerns after surgery. Dr. Karimi has a very friendly, calm and warm demeanor that puts your mind at ease. I’m alot more confident in my nose than I was before and very happy with the natural looking results.

I also got fillers and Botox with Sharon. She is probably one of the warmest people I’ve ever met, I felt very comfortable with her. I only wish I lived closer to LA so that I could see her more often.

Thank you to the entire team for making my experience effortless! 🤎","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karin Wonderling","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLB7DU6JheYUgMxNYnbiWOS2bJfVenxe1NhWL1X76sshAnyDw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I couldn’t be happier with my experience at this practice. From the moment I walked in for my aesthetic treatment - I was met with professionalism, expertise, and genuine care from Dr. Karimi, Elizabeth (who was also one of my providers), Sharon, and the entire team, including Leo, Colton, and Destiny.

Both Dr. Karimi and Elizabeth are incredibly skilled, precise, and detail-oriented. Their approach is thoughtful and artistic, and you can truly tell they are perfectionists, which is exactly what you want when it comes to aesthetic treatments. Every procedure was thoroughly explained, personalized to my goals, and performed with the highest level of care.

What really stood out was how friendly, welcoming, and attentive everyone was throughout the entire experience. From check-in to post-treatment, the staff made me feel comfortable, informed, and genuinely cared for. The environment is warm, professional, and never rushed.

This practice truly represents the best of the aesthetic industry — combining advanced expertise, excellent communication, and a team that takes pride in delivering beautiful, natural-looking results. I left feeling confident, refreshed, and extremely happy with my outcome.

I highly recommend Dr. Karimi, Elizabeth, and the entire team to anyone looking for top-tier aesthetic care from people who are knowledgeable, kind, and committed to excellence.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I've had more laser/ Morpheus/ microneedling at different clinics than I can even count. Zero results for my acne scars. I had ONE Agnes/Pico laser treatment at Cleopatra, and my skin has vastly improved on every level: texture, plumpness, glow, fine lines, lift. My acne scars are now much less dark and deep.They know what they're doing there. They even refused to put filler in my lips at my consultation: good sign! Anyone who refuses money has integrity. Nurse Cho is a genius.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nadine Hlus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLR-sCDpumhjDc0LD5Y32ffP_W_kCjKGyGEAOsri9dXi18ZYA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been going to Cleopatra for three years now and I love how much my skin improved over the years. I see Nurse Cho for my Botox and honestly, I couldn’t be more thrilled with my results. My skin looks so fresh and youthful — I’ve never gotten so many compliments! It’s boosted my confidence in the best way.

This has truly been one of the happiest investments I’ve made for myself. If you’re thinking about enhancing your skin’s health and appearance, I couldn’t recommend Cleopatra and Nurse Cho more. They’re simply the best!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lET62WIoHDwbGp1q3XCCMhbUY1PZEYsRJ4WgerzR4k3IxPyQmLARknZIGz4PHhWPCz0ig1SzYU-vjSnSFpNbQAbWu8NVK25f71lVKnkv31IFEC9MKUvBc8bhNIwL0rpDkcwdh54TU7x2K0c","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQ7jUj_-ANoA8jNDNhqVAV6tAjvpZLSyphOH51Y3bbTwl6MZd73aKPwC7G_oxlQW6kzNkvFJ101J2v3gsuLJK19VMpV0Zq6gxjABGHgoMi4XCYNqKavAXXIIz-yU7CTgQdlDLJelYYOF1it"],"When":"2025-7-1"},{"Name":"Danielle Yuhan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJB-yaEZw9jdp-ioUWOxTx0fBmdY-N20F4xLKGtwEl9clnoJVM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cleopatra Medical has truly been the best experience and is my now go-to. They recommend the best options for what you need and have been the only place I’ve achieved the results I’ve wanted. They are honest with you and tell you if you don’t need something or should get something else instead. Everyone who works there is so kind and thoughtful and makes me feel comfortable to be around. Their facilities are also very clean and professional and all the products they use are legitimate and name-brand. I highly recommend Cleopatra to anyone looking for a place to get treatments!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julia Jung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYNt0ub6RHaRsgGmVM0Uqgl4dSJuVc2GbW16jGgT_C2X0oXjOq=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I don't normally leave reviews, but I genuinely want this place to be known more so that more people like me can have a chance at clear skin.

I had clear skin up until I went to high school, then I've had worsening flares of both small whiteheads, blackheads, large painful under-the-skin cyst acne that would travel along my temples, cheeks, nose, chin, you name it. Over 10 years of cheap+expensive skin care, laser treatments, topical cream, prescription antibiotics, I was ready to give up until I found Cleopatra Clinic.

The entire staff (Doctor who did a short consultation via video call, nurses, counselor, and receptionist) are extremely professional, lind, and approachable. They recommended me to have the Agnes laser treatment with 2 follow up facials. The price was very reasonable (some places I've been to asks for 4 times the amount), and do not worry if you think "cheaper = less quality". I've only done 2 Agnes laser treatments, and look at my before and after photos!! There has never been a time when my skin felt smooth with no bumps. Those who have acne are so used to feeling and seeing the bumps when washing your face. Now every time I wash my face it feels soo smooth!! Agnes really works and you never get acne on the areas that have recurring acne.

The nurses who did my treatments are amazing. They are so meticulous with their precision skills, and explains to me all the steps as they go. They also go above and beyond what is in your treatment program, tailoring to your specific needs! You will understand what I mean once you meet them. They truly care for you and work to give you better skin.

I will continue to visit Cleo to now remove my acne marks and improve overall skin! This is *the* place to go for any skin concerns.
I truly, highly recommend all acne people to visit.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESYfvuwB9x-crh5Ewl-c4-DsUOsrpvlf_DSZ9HeqTLbpGTS46IjLvxjB1udvxGYvAnV2FQclMooyKJ-WRUakjTx8neDDplqd4RCifNgfRF8vYKaRkDLgRKBrDTivnfkiow4QaQ","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESEERchv6LF_tWnFcn0FRBHXX8ssX6pGe1zuAPO-8rbY9Oh0e6r_rIEjOxw1B2xLsagTWnZPPgh4ncBsyTQ6_5DQgIdpe3W14vteFlFIFLdxqHgQV3potnINWGT2hsH7NkzBXIxnQ","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQ-0oRX8FEq_RB_IVK3_glXJOSAOold7MREesiBDVa4odxanYxvN4v1L0qcSikScWxCLDpS8q0E73gfPBfvqfay75uDoGTeBcwKC3Pacaen5VVPZiwLEumkYli1VvwHj6HxSpVH","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQsKnVsrrCEvVjJmWNrduUrVkjQ9V8K_9lAIM10fg8Zuk1VAa-gX-H1jq8FJ7O3hXTARult7by52UVu4GHa02KubuI0tl_rQqxl_V0K-KLAnrZGNxWWsA_xOEl--NVkKmRFZN-r9w","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESnjAdWtYnL7u4Kra4YmcbT1_z9s2iF-acuf7_doQLjnXcl2wuq22ytLN0OfjDHFT0ZGlGjg3DTuxAPt4Gu35iPa4ZdDtQpjaWLlT-Vqhd9X3FzCbgRhr781nTRuhhe5A7D7SXE","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQ8su7m0YNzzGA7SjQaPYaDDNr_pPGun3TmBN9Hkuu4bh1F21n8JuNSeqTXKLsL6lYyXXuF2MkPNoR281b16lf08GaiwgDFEA_n7maLnZgRavAe2G54djNWPq8gi1rHgUcwjimx"],"When":"2025-2-13"},{"Name":"Alexandra Seeman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0TWIAi0riOtQ7m7RURhfbPmVE9p9b38bL6rvWTqTAGggpdH_zUA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chloe and her team were so kind and thorough in explaining my options. The pricing is extremely fair and the facility is super clean. Will definitely be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Chiu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPyiYefWx6RJ6jsS5_YTKbzm5x_vXUTp9gsFYPJFOQzi32hE5a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had issues with texture and redness under my chin, persistent acne scars that won’t fade, and some fat under my chin, so I went to 3 med spas in Koreatown to see what I’d get recommended. I chose Cleopatra because the package prices and recommended treatments were great. Unlike other establishments where they have multiple treatments of the same thing, what I was recommended were single treatments paired with something else. Ex: Pixel 8 + Agnes. This made the cost better for me. Chloe sometimes tosses in some other perks, like free facial or very high quality serum.

I appreciate Chloe’s honesty. I originally wanted Sculptura for my cheeks bc another clinic recommended it, but she told me they stopped using it on patients bc the microplastic seed that’s injected in Scultura ends up staying in you for life, and she’s seen negative long term consequences from it. Instead, she recommended Ultherapy plus a small amount of filler in the cheeks afterwards, and I love that plan.

So far, I’ve done one round of Pixel 8, Agnes, PRP, and Ultherapy. The nurses are amazing!! All of them do these treatments multiple times every day for 10+ years, so they’re highly skilled.

I highly recommend doing Ultherapy at Cleopatra. They properly numbed my face with numbing cream, had me take a Tylenol and advil, and gave me a machine to distract myself with during the treatment. Anyone who has done Ultherapy knows that it HURTS. I have high pain tolerance and this is 10/10 pain. But their pain management is so good that it’s a 2-5/10!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Swetha K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKStdVDLkdr3I970w4GHEkp1dozuBl87o_yY8GWLgCjadIqjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I struggled with acne scars on my face for years, and honestly, it was something I had begun to believe would never improve. I had tried countless treatments and even underwent a CO2 laser procedure before, but unfortunately I saw little to no change in my skin. That experience left me feeling discouraged and dejected.

Everything changed when I had my CO2 laser treatment with RN Jasmine last November.

From the beginning, Jasmine demonstrated an exceptional level of skill, knowledge, and care. CO2 laser treatments require extremely precise settings and depth — especially for melanin-rich, South Asian skin tones like mine, where the risk of complications can be higher if not performed correctly. Jasmine understood this deeply and tailored the treatment perfectly for my skin.

The results have honestly been life-changing. I have seen at least a 50–60% improvement in my acne scars — something I had never achieved despite years of treatments. For the first time, I felt real hope as my skin continued to improve month after month.

I waited patiently to make sure the results were lasting, and I can confidently say that the improvements are permanent and genuine. Beyond the physical transformation, Jasmine helped restore confidence that I had slowly lost because of my acne scarring.

I am incredibly grateful to Jasmine for her expertise, precision, and compassion. She truly made a difference not just in my skin, but in how I feel about myself. From the moment I walked in, I was greeted by the sweetest and most welcoming staff. The reception team was wonderful—professional, friendly, and truly made me feel comfortable and cared for from start to finish. The clinic itself is absolutely beautiful, clean, and calming, which instantly put me at ease.

I want to give a huge shout-out to Katie, who was nothing short of phenomenal. She is incredibly knowledgeable, professional, and so warm and friendly. She explained everything clearly, answered every question with confidence and patience, and made me feel safe and comfortable during every step of the process. I honestly couldn’t have asked for better care.

I also want to highlight Rocio, who was just as amazing—knowledgeable, friendly, and genuinely attentive. Both she and Katie went above and beyond to make sure I felt informed, supported, and relaxed. Their kindness and expertise made such a difference in my experience.

And of course, my surgeon, Dr. Rizvi, did an absolutely beautiful job on my breast augmentation with implants. I am beyond thrilled with my results—they look stunning, natural, and exactly what I hoped for. His skill, professionalism, and artistry are truly exceptional, and I’m so grateful for the care and precision he put into my procedure.

Overall, this clinic exceeded every expectation I had. The staff, the environment, the care, and the results were all amazing. I couldn’t be happier and would recommend them wholeheartedly to anyone considering aesthetic services. 💕","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cheyenne Love","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKD7zApdZz1ArTi49ROgPLx-ZyZPe452AGz5DCwxF6Y8hEZUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"***Five-Star Experience with Dr. Rizvi and the West Empire Surgery Team***

I recently needed to have a ruptured implant replaced and, after extensive research, I narrowed my options down to three surgeons, including one I had previously used for facial work, a very prominent Beverly Hills doctor. Ultimately, I chose Dr. Rizvi at West Empire Surgery, and I’m so glad I did. From the very first consultation, I appreciated his calm, easygoing energy and his refreshingly pragmatic approach. Unlike another surgeon I met with, Dr. Rizvi actually talked me out of an unnecessary additional procedure that would have caused more scarring with very little aesthetic benefit. That kind of honesty and integrity instantly earned my trust.

The entire team at West Empire was warm, attentive, and genuinely caring, from the front desk to the surgical staff. Their compassion went a long way in easing my initial anxiety. I was also able to get scheduled relatively quickly, and my surgery went smoothly without a single complication. Recovery was surprisingly comfortable, I didn’t even need to take the prescribed pain medication, which was such a pleasant surprise.
Because I have some sensitivities to certain medical adhesives and products, my healing process required extra monitoring. The team at West Empire went above and beyond to ensure everything stayed on track. Having gone through a similar reaction with my previous Beverly Hills surgeon, I can honestly say the difference in aftercare was night and day. Dr. Rizvi and his staff were consistently engaged, supportive, and invested in achieving the best possible outcome, something that truly sets them apart.

Now that I’m fully healed, I can confidently say I’m happier than ever with my results, even more so than with my original implants. The outcome feels natural, balanced, and perfectly suited to my frame.

A heartfelt thank-you to Dr. Rizvi, the West Empire Surgery team, and a special shout-out to Katie Donhauser, who was an absolute joy to consult with,  knowledgeable, kind, and incredibly reassuring every step of the way.

If you’re looking for a surgeon who combines exceptional skill with integrity and genuine care, I can’t recommend Dr. Rizvi and West Empire highly enough. They’ve truly earned my trust and deepest gratitude.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Farington Meza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIfHgoK4ijgulyCqWd-2fbGr2a4FcC8EjmtyMjwCX_UErgiAg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited Dr. Katie because I was having trouble closing my hands. I’m obsessed with her work and highly recommend her to anyone looking for amazing results!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"dalia azizi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDnemn4Cp0clSwB2riN2-7KezH8Pp1Ji88iAg7ZqBpmjqykw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had such an amazing experience at West Empire Aesthetics. From beginning to end, Hannah was incredibly helpful and thorough and she took the time to explain everything clearly, set realistic expectations, and gave me a very thoughtful post-treatment protocol.

I had a DEKA CO₂ laser on my face, a CoolPeel on my neck, and VBeam at another appointment, and I was so happy with my results. After the CO₂, my skin felt noticeably tighter, my pores looked significantly smaller, and overall my skin texture looked more refined. I truly can’t wait to go back for another session.

I also have to say this was hands down the best Botox I’ve ever had. Hannah is extremely skilled, precise, and intentional with her work. You can tell she’s both knowledgeable and highly experienced. I trust her completely, which is not something I say lightly. The prices are also amazing and unbeatable for LA area.

I would highly recommend Hannah to anyone looking to reach their aesthetic goals. She’s amazing at what she does!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jasmine Golbari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVj6VjIcwLd_zUu9a1a56J_uAuRNdVNw9gT9k03rUucmJBPmV1n3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such an amazing experience here! The office is so beautiful, clean, and inviting. Injector Hannah is truly amazing all around, she really took her time explaining all of the different options with me to make me feel comfortable before making any decisions. I also love how she really valued my opinion to make sure we got the results I was looking for. The front desk staff were also very friendly and nice! I really enjoyed coming here and will definitely be back - especially with Hannah!! So so happy with my results!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amanda Crum","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXU7BQ0JAjXJDMv9oKy2dgR2PrPUkgG5oRU4cH3zh3FRUzmlAU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"West Empire Aesthetics is hands down one of my favorite med spas in LA—and that’s saying a lot because I’ve tried many. The biggest reason I keep coming back is Hannah, PA. She is the provider I trust completely for all of my aesthetic needs.

I’ve had multiple treatments with Hannah, including PRP microneedling, PRP under the eyes, CO2 Cool laser, and Botox, and I’ve been consistently happy with my results every single time. She has an incredible eye for aesthetics and truly understands how to create natural, beautiful outcomes.

What really sets Hannah apart is her communication and bedside manner. She is always checking in, following up after treatments, and making sure everything is healing well and that I’m fully satisfied. She makes you feel genuinely cared for—like a true professional who also treats you like a friend.

Hannah is honest, knowledgeable, and never pushes unnecessary treatments. She only recommends what she truly believes will help you achieve the results you’re looking for, which makes her someone I trust completely. Her professionalism and attention to detail are unmatched.

The office itself is clean, beautiful, and the front desk staff are kind and welcoming. West Empire Aesthetics offers an impressive range of services, I’m genuinely excited to continue more treatments with Hannah. I’ve even brought my mom here—and it’s now one of her favorite med spas as well.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leili Hashemi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwCuNEfQmAy1R0I7C7fyH37ZZsaIdPcB7PkitY79KU5bLFSg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just got my lips done by Sabrina and I am literally OBSESSED. I was so nervous at first because I’ve never had lip filler before, but she made me feel completely comfortable from the second I walked in. She explained everything in detail, answered all of my questions, and really listened to what I wanted.
The results are even better than I imagined — soft, natural, and perfectly balanced. She enhanced my lips without making them look overdone, which was exactly what I was hoping for. The whole process was smooth, and I felt like I was in such good hands the entire time.
If you’re even thinking about getting your lips done, go to Sabrina. She is talented, gentle, and truly cares about her clients. I will 100% be going back 🤍✨","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"K Shamis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUenRm_9HDDWrTroh-k5tAMvVlOv4QQd-YbK38hhEtrPbX_2YBH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Stretching to 4 starts only because of the nice receptionist and a good deal on Groupon. And, well, the job done. The aesthetician who did my laser was not rude, but I felt very unwelcome. I was instructed to wash my face, and she saw I have hair that's long enough to get in the way, and I needed a hair tie. I didn't know they had any, so I asked for a pen (you can tuck your hair in a bun with a pen, it's easy), and that's when she gave me a hair tie. Why wouldn't you offer it in the first place, if you have them for this exact purpose? I felt tension the entire time. I am very sensitive when it comes to energy and emotions. And that kind of vibe made me feel uncomfortable. And unwelcome. She didn't apply any numbing cream, so I had to endure the entire procedure in full effect. When they were instructing me before my appointment, they warned me not to use tretinoin or vitamin C, but nobody told me I was not supposed to take Omega-3. And I take it daily. Because it's good for your skin. Duh! And when I got there for my appointment, THAT'S when they asked me what medications/supplements I'm on, and apparently some of the ones I take make my skin more sensitive. Why wouldn't you tell me all of this BEFORE? Sloppy experience. But I got a good deal on Groupon, and I got the result I needed. No instructions on how to take care of my skin after the procedure were provided. That made me feel very uncared for. But the receptionist was nice.
It wasn't bad, but it should have been better. If it was, I would consider coming back for additional services, but as it is, I will not.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"diana lemus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUX5a_QhFRK6QK4O60GzkAXma8VkiLaVII9dUGf0tYAgSNrEbvL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my second time back at Latina Med Spa. My first visit was for lipo, BBL, and breast augmentation, and I loved my results as well as the care I received at the surgical center. That’s why I decided to return for a rhinoplasty. Even though it was with a different doctor, after doing my research I felt confident that I would be in good hands and I was right! My rhinoplasty was the easiest recovery I’ve ever experienced, with little to almost no pain, and my results are amazing. I am beyond pleased with the outcome and the overall care I received. I will most likely be returning again for another procedure in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kayleen Aquino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZcuFp_UxvyffSTVqLosdUlJTut5vC0TnG4ucz5dxhkNxxp5M=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had chin liposuction and buccal fat removal in September 2025 at Latina Med Spa. Unfortunately, my experience has been very disappointing both medically and in terms of results.

Prior to surgery, I mainly met with a coordinator and did not receive a thorough evaluation from the physician regarding whether I was a good candidate, realistic expectations, or whether additional procedures (such as chin projection considerations) might be necessary. Looking back, I feel proper medical assessment and expectation setting was lacking.

A few days after surgery, I developed severe and worsening pain. I contacted the office and was instructed to come in urgently. When I arrived, there was no medical provider present, only a coordinator examined me, despite the level of pain I was experiencing. I was told to return days later.

The pain became so severe that I went to the hospital, where a nurse practitioner suspected a hematoma. This was later confirmed by the surgeon. Although the pain eventually resolved, I am now over four months post-op and see no visible improvement in my chin or facial contour. My family and friends also confirm there has been no noticeable change.

Additionally, there were no routine follow-up appointments scheduled or initiated by the clinic after surgery.

I invested significant savings into this procedure and feel let down by the lack of appropriate medical follow-up and the absence of results. I hope the clinic takes accountability and improves patient care and communication going forward.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKW0dB-z6Nnpj_G4rRu7lH9pBNwCNVxjXZReuEmXpLvy6NRt4c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The worst customer service ever Bianca" the coordinator " Never reached out !!
I rarely leave reviews, but the customer service here was honestly one of the worst experiences I’ve had. From the moment I reached out, I felt ignored and brushed off. No one seemed interested in actually helping or even listening. Every question I asked was met with attitude, short answers, or zero effort to provide a solution.

I wasn’t expecting perfection, but basic professionalism would’ve been nice. Instead, I was left waiting, transferred around, and treated like an inconvenience. By the end, I still didn’t get the help I needed.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Alex Menez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLfaIYToJlJh4YLjl1oYk9HLyDhj49EPZu3dX1vP-XvpInrK0U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"PA Krishna Patel is my "go to" for dermatology needs. I live far from the Schweiger Clinic, but I won't go to any other. Ms Patel is friendly but very capable. She asks pertinent questions and examines/looks at the affected skin. And she gives the right medication. She must be busy, though, because it's not easy to get an appointment.  However, when one is a longtime patient, like I am, you can tell the scheduler so and you would be fit in.
Or you can ask for a video visit. Anyway, it is worth waiting for Ms. PATEL.
Her Assistant, Mariah, is also very capable. Her smile is very expensive, though, still you can be sure she sends the right prescribed medication s to your right pharmacy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chelsey Ciasulli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJf6g-YZT8tgryUdnpQXptnSqDLi1yx2MjSdKLBdL1qEzu1pA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beyond pleased with my experience here. From the front desk, to the MA, to the dermatologist himself. Daisy at the front desk was so sweet & I could not recommend Dr Blumenstrauch more. He is very knowledgeable, kind, he listens and is collaborative with care. The world really needs more doctors like him! I found him from reviews online and needed to do so myself because he is truly amazing. The only negative reviews I saw were wait times. I personally only waited a short time to be seen but having been to multiple dermatologists and getting sub par care at best, I would have waited hours to see Dr B knowing I am well cared for. He is well worth any wait! I am so happy to have found a dermatologist I trust! Thank you :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diani Lo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXZpk5gSnI-u0GIO_34sQqNje1BFZRwQtkO8zPw_2ySNaq0A6-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you are looking for compassionate dermatology care, I strongly suggest going somewhere else.

My experience at Schweiger Dermatology Group with Julia Kwan and her team was extremely disappointing. The front desk staff did not greet or acknowledge patients, yet were quick to collect co-pays, which immediately set a cold and transactional tone. I also waited over 30 minutes past my appointment time only to have a rushed visit that lasted about 10 minutes.

During intake, the assistant repeatedly responded to my medical concerns with “that’s going to cost you more,” instead of explaining the process or addressing what I was actually asking. It felt dismissive and uncomfortable.

When Dr. Kwan entered, the appointment felt hurried and impersonal. My concerns were brushed aside, and I left feeling unheard, unsupported, and with absolutely zero resolution to the issues I came in for. Patients deserve clear communication, empathy, and professionalism, and unfortunately that was not my experience here.

I hope management takes feedback like this seriously because the culture reflected during my visit needs significant improvement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenny H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCXgOImQj29g2w2ghLr-f5lsdEjp5yJp--VqId_ueHY7rQVLIYUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We have been going to this place for a year.  In that time, they have been acquired by the Schweiger Dermatology Group and the service has severely declined.  When you call them, it is impossible to reach a live person.  Instead, you have to talk to an AI assistant.  My daughter needed a refill of her acne medication, so I called yesterday.  When the AI assistant asked me what I needed, I said “refill request,” and the AI assistant said that I had asked to cancel my next appointment and canceled that appointment.  I immediately said “customer service,” but even then, I couldn’t reach a live person and was transferred to a voicemail that said I should leave a detailed message that would be returned.  It has now been over 24 hours and no one has called me back.  My daughter is still missing her medication and we no longer have an appointment, so we will be taking our business elsewhere.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Teresa Mendez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLY6JtcX6DEwnKNFpbPUrPSVfEoMlqrDIJ3oQ3fojYtHPvM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"while i have no complaints about the service provided i have big issues with their billing.  they are trying to defraud me out of $50 & the billing department (including their escalations division) is impossible to deal with.  they keep making up reasons for this fake $50 charge.  i have submitted a complaint with the BBB & i refuse to get ripped off by this mega corporation.  look up schweiger dermatology group (they own this practice).  they are multi office & they have tons of complaints regarding false charges/double billing.  do NOT go here if you value honesty.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3cJAnbyQnHmTJ0W3fYYDSwX5E6I7GKWsVIBcojQF2Dmevdg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"TERRIBLE!! DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY!! DO NOT SEE JULIA KWAN!
My pcp wanted me to get a whole body skin check due to family history of skin cancer, I am pregnant and had a few spots of concern to look at. I made a list of 9 spots and was seen by Julia Kwan. She was very rude, inappropriate and rushed me. After 5 minutes of being in the office she asked me to hurry because she had other patients to get to. She said they typically only look at 2-3 areas of concern each appointment. I told her I was never told that when making my appointment and I paid a $70 co pay for her time and let her know she had only been in the office for 5 minutes. She did not take my concern seriously. There is a spot on my face she said could “potentially be pre-cancerous or a scab” and asked if I’ve picked it. I said no and all she recommended was to keep it lotioned for 2 weeks and if the scab doesn’t fall off then it could be pre-cancerous. NO HELP! What a waste of time and money. I do not normally write bad reviews but felt compelled to do so to hopefully save others time and money.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ifrah Sheesfarooqui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1I98TQWDU2aGvzK3EOJsV-XEsKuDQgfoOsxopORT2FcYFBv7qmA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've had a pleasant experience here for my daughter. The staff form the front desk to the nurses and the PAs have all been very kind and helpful. The PA Melissa was great, but she recently moved and we saw Krishna who was also exceptional. She was so patient and kind with my daughter and made her feel comfortable! Would highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Swetka Yu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFcN8snrcuxR0bPKwvr7TDJRzRSSRmfGOsQaebu3ZnjbeaOQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a relief to know that a bump on Michael’s skin was not dangerous! Dr. Chan was quick and efficient  and was able to give options for treatment. Photo show Michael with his guide dog, Devo.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER3BTvhzLJgceSu03HPs5DDHNIMEUXladi_znbz-sZIUnu1jSgyou6MJYq7PoT0NDgovAChnQMI_jiiljFM15iHYxDa269vDMf_ySZ4QOhrhDWc4Jcnj6hxVS0EyL5RcUr4AfiX"],"When":"2025-5-1"}]

[{"Name":"Angelica Rivera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiucL5BML8Kxw9Qtp_cZVY_2OC9xa3FALR3H11hJiFEzQWMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Presille has been my injector for over a year now - each experience is top tier. I completely trust her because she continues to amaze me with her keen eye for balance and enhancing what’s already there (instead of overdoing anything.)

She figures out which products work best for me, especially to smooth stubborn lines between my brows. We found the perfect combination of tox and filler over time ... the results are flawless. Lines softened, volume restored in the right places, everything subtly lifted.

I genuinely feel like I look 10 years younger , and still completely like myself. Just refreshed, confident, and glowing. If you want natural results that make people drop compliments left and right, she’s your girl!! 💉✨💖🫶","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sherrie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2CwZfM1vZovSl14ohfp-iABEs8Q5K8PgSUa9XjtN0TuwdzN0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had an extremely positive experience with Dr. Rivkin’s office. I’ve been using tirzepatide for one month, and the results have been great so far. While I know weight-loss injections and medications can come with side effects, I personally haven’t had any at all.

The shots also include B12, which has given me a noticeable boost in energy, a great added benefit.

Thank you to Dr. Rivkin and the entire team for helping me finally shed those few extra pounds that felt impossible to lose. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hope Schwing","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcyAjbfiup3RzwvZVc4oBoHExiu2e05itL71kQ5JT5_aRZPPot=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been going here for years, before I lived in LA, when I lived in LA, and now after I’ve moved out of state again. I literally don’t want to go anywhere else because Rivkin aesthetics is genuinely the best. Especially Natalie, she is so so patient with me and always eases my stress and takes the time to be sure I’m comfortable. They make procedures as painless and relaxed as possible. Also, their scar treatment (I got a breast reduction and have some intense scarring) is AMAZING! It works. 100%. My scars are almost gone, which I didn’t even know was possible. I went in for Botox, filler removal and scar treatment yesterday, and my face is so snatched already. Couldn’t recommend this place enough. Love you Rivkin Aesthetics!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mojdeh Tabibian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW53CvJ-9Yje_B_cHw-9mR2qfbr-zJHtQnjKqAOIA7nCzSLXmQr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sepi is absolutely incredible! She explained every step, checked in constantly, and made sure the entire process was truly painless and relaxing.

My brows have never looked this good. She shaped them so beautifully that they honestly frame my face better than I ever imagined. I felt calm, taken care of, and completely confident in her hands.

I’m obsessed with the results and couldn’t be happier. If you’re considering microblading, Sepi is the one. Highly, highly recommend! 💖✨","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERYeX5AG-85nfgT_m0an6GV00mLC3wFQKWaQw8yom7ndm7da1pR_qvL8XqKk3BSWx3gR-2INfvyyeL0G_4dfGjakZcoq_erPnpNY6_N9fatNQPPKOy7ikdZepk2FylpA5O2YR000bB16oxA"],"When":"2025-11-23"},{"Name":"Alissa I.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhwmVfKEfBHEYCGDndLmu7ly6OHpZn0uOE_gsdZgLNU1Qvnd8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the most amazing experience with Dr. Kong and the rest of their friendly staff! You can tell this is a trustworthy team who knows what they’re doing. Should also note that everyone working here looks natural so that’s a HUGE green flag! This was my first ever time getting any work done (I’m in my early 20’s).

She listened to what was bothering me (my smile lines) and insisted to not do too much to keep my face natural. We ended up not even using a full syringe of filler, just minimal amounts.

I’m so happy with my results and I already feel more confident. She didn’t push on more services on me which I really appreciated!

You also get amazing views of LA and are greeted by the sweetest doggies :)

Parking is easy in their own parking garage. Remember to ask the front desk for parking vouchers.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lET-PHNvbnPQ8kOOZw4DZZfyYRaVYixPb5kFoK3k_gSv23v3NGUJdZytNTtaS9DBK2lHCHgEVLbJP0-fvxLtGJxXaItUnpx62P1IJRPNo7dfvupUdlpJUc_1TH_pS9kvAFoyKend","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESrqPikcUsRjVDt15acBhvPHkEGw_noQbf1EZVAc5SAJOBXFMtZfOYbZpNsqgK3NHP_ej-Xeze_y4EaU_8b2dMkDmSK55WzTuBoLCSRQp35rz6Vr2I36BGzIasC5IlV__gRRq-W2w"],"When":"2024-7-4"},{"Name":"Neda Arab","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0GDSoj7qn3EqarnOyPMUh00hYCkmYvngXe2p-metcmknQkTY0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I  went to Sepi at RIVKIN Aesthetics over a year ago to get my eyebrows microbladed, and I still absolutely love my results. They are very professional, friendly and wonderful to work with. I look forward to every appointment I have with them, I just love them both!  I am very grateful for all they’ve done for me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessica Houle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAddi86POC-MtIK7xpen_OvvKSdr3nR2Ftup6WqboRRxkQVyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough incredible things about my experience with Dr. Mo and the entire team at CSI. I underwent a breast augmentation and lift, something I had been considering for approximately eight years. During that time, I attended eight different consultations, always feeling that something was missing. I work in healthcare, and I’ve learned to trust my gut—and my gut kept telling me to keep looking.
While in Palm Desert visiting family, I came across CSI. I did only minimal research before booking a consultation, but I was immediately drawn to the clinic. From the moment I walked in, I felt comfortable—and after my consult, that feeling was completely validated.
The front staff, the atmosphere of the clinic, and Dr. Mo himself were exactly what I had been searching for all these years. The environment is warm, professional, and calming—never rushed, never impersonal.
A special mention must go to Aja, my coordinator. She is truly top-notch: understanding, responsive, compassionate, and an absolute pleasure to work with. From start to finish, she made the entire process seamless and reassuring. Every single person I interacted with at CSI was sincere, genuine, and deeply caring—and that matters more than words can express.
This was my first-ever surgery, which made the decision incredibly important to me on a personal level. I was fully prepared to keep searching until I found the perfect fit, and CSI was exactly that.
About a week into recovery, I found myself getting a bit stir-crazy—I’m a very active person and not used to slowing down. I half-jokingly asked if they could give me a “project” to focus on—skin care, anything. Aja immediately stepped in and arranged for a wonderful woman from their team to meet with me. She took the time to go over my skin in detail, created a personalized skincare routine, answered all of my questions, and completely shifted my mindset during recovery.
As someone who runs her own company and is constantly on the go, I realized I rarely stop to truly take care of myself. That appointment was unexpectedly grounding. I left the office feeling excited, motivated, and genuinely looking forward to caring for my skin—something I hadn’t prioritized before. It was such a thoughtful, above-and-beyond touch that truly speaks to how much this clinic cares about the whole person, not just the procedure.
I am now 8 days post-op, and I am absolutely in love—with my healing, my results, and the entire experience. One of the most important factors for me was that I did not want large implants. I am a small person, and at nearly every other consultation I attended, I was told they would not go below 400cc—something I knew was not right for my body or my vision. Dr. Mo listened. He respected my wishes. He never tried to sway me, upsell me, or override what I knew was best for myself.
That level of respect, skill, and artistry is rare.
If you are considering breast surgery—or any procedure—and want a surgeon and team who truly listen, care, and deliver exceptional results, I cannot recommend Dr. Mo and CSI highly enough. This experience exceeded every expectation I had, and I am so grateful I trusted my instincts and found them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cathy Briggs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4RBr-AEKgR59DC18bmapy4Maf9ZZoO4RCgYTbXDrYL74ypg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had breast augmentation done by Dr mo in April of 2025. I had massive infections and physical deformations. After three months of wound care and deformed results, Dr Mohammed Zakhire offered to repeat the surgery in July of 2025. The day after surgery I showed signs of more post op infections. They became so horrific that I had four more months of wound care. Three of those months were at EMC’s Wou nd Care Center where the wound care specialist Dr told me that Dr Mohammed Zakhireh’s blaming patients for massive deformations and disfigurements and infections on their own failure to eat the required amount of daily protein postop was “BS”. I found a new Dr who repaired one breast last month and said it was about the worst she’d ever seen. She will repair the second one in another complex surgery this month. I sincerely believe the operating room equipment at CSI is contaminated with deadly infections. Save yourself. Steer clear,","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cecilia Hamilton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcPAMBbNRrrN_9wnRw_3epXygAK3U8tVbw9W7_1RFCIOfidkE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"With the plethora of med spas and cosmetic surgery clinics in this area, CSI stands out. Unlike others it is not ostentatious but rather focused on quality of the beautification care provided. It is there too that nestled as a rather well kept secret, Adrienne Bloom ( Bloom Aesthetics) delivers her magical touch in every single care she delivers, from lasers to fillers to botox and beyond . Adrienne is incredibly gifted and generous in the way she delivers her talents. It also comes with a hefty dose of lightheartedness and humor!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan Lucht","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIqEzsAnpT0bb-Fi8rqSgYIce7O1AbJSNnwJW3Bnp9YKzJXN6FMw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been seeing Adrienne for a couple of years now and have had various treatments. She is the BEST of the best! The results are always amazing!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Their nurse burned my tattoo due to improper handling of the equipment they use as of march 2026 . They tried to shift the blame on me saying i moved when they were holding my leg . The machine they use sends cool air, which is actually great and makes the treatment a lot less painful than gel-based alternatives, but only if handled properly . Honestly i recommend looking for a different location.avoid this one like the plague ( thats my personal opinion)

When I raised the issue, they offered to refund my session which is insulting and doesnt cover any of the on going cost to treat the burn or seeing a proper dermatologist .

Once that happen you cant re tattoo right away you have to wait 6 month to a year to re tattoo so i have to walk around with a damaged tattoo until the skin heal fully properly. This is PERMANT DAMAGE which affect my body and my line of work .

Seeing how its been handled so poorly i was thinking of doing plastic surgery there but not anymore and i wont be recommending this place to anyone near me either .

This place needs to be more professional and must implement proper protocols to protect clients' tattoos. I hope management takes this seriously so this does not happen to anyone else. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Parkerpearl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKYaPp2tp585keQHXgXJQhxfc-j67rDBTsTOXl3yJ-Pn-_4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have dealt with several hiccups with UCLA Health over the years, but I am ending all ties especially with UCLA Health and would urge others to do the same if they want to receive safe, timely, quality care and not risk expensive corrective procedures. I was refused by several urgent care centers and primary care to get my facial stitches removed and since UCLA Santa Monica ER did these stitches, I tried calling UCLA Plastic Surgery a week in advance to inquire about getting an appointment or else a referral to where I might be able to get my case addressed. Nobody ever got back to to me in the turnaround times given, so I had to make several repeat calls. Each subsequent time I was told that my inquiries were documented and forwarded, but I never got a response. Lo and behold, the stitches I needed removed were poorly done and I need restitching by a plastic surgeon. Because I was refused care by UCLA Plastic Surgery and just totally blown off, I had to find a private practice that does not have the resources to provide me the same level of care I could expect from a large institution, it has been impossible to get my medical records (if any were even properly kept) without hefty fees, and I am now dealing with  an aftermath of bad scarring.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsG3repFdehWnFW080y8TzElOiPYM6f4QsI5Nf3O7rAujgRw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I was curious about cosmetic plastic surgery prices and sent them an email asking for a price range to see if it was affordable. I view this as a normal request--they are selling a service and I am a potential buyer of that service. Strangely --and unlike any other plastic surgeon in Los Angeles--they want you to PAY for a consultation before they will reveal prices, which is such a scam! DONT FALL FOR IT","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Conall Arora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUm29cvAE330wHUqx-5a_NlXaImFrbTd3obAD0sCiiTVFEaEv1IgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The front desk staff and Dr. Andrew L. Da Lio were amazing and took great care of me. I had an accident and had bit through my tongue splitting it.

I was not sure whether it needed surgery and what type of doctor to go to. I called several ENT doctors, and all them could not see me. I also was not sure if Urgent Care could handle this.

I was nearby UCLA anyway and walked up to the front desk and told her my situation.

She spoke to the manager, and to Dr Da Lio who said they would see me right away and let me know if I needed surgery or not. Even this consult was a huge benefit.

In the room, Dr Da Lio was straightforward and caring. He and his medical assistant decided that the bite was severe enough to require 5 stitches to heal better. He did it right there on the spot and my tongue is healing very well.

I am so thankful that his staff worked to accommodated me -- I wasn't even a patient of UCLA. I'm even more thankful that Dr. Da Lio is so skilled and helped put my tongue back together.

Thank you","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sharon Brady","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJPVSC2YTesaSbe10IrHvfypkTP8GPfsyDw8bsVmfPY-khquw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Seems weird posting a review on Google, but what the hell. Alex is very easy to talk to, takes the time to answer questions, and really focuses on getting the details right.

What I appreciate most is the level of care he puts into the work. You can tell he genuinely wants the results to look natural and for his clients to feel good about the outcome. He takes his time and makes sure everything blends well instead of trying to rush through it.

Overall I’m really happy with my experience and would definitely recommend Alex and Scalp Tech SMP to anyone thinking about scalp micropigmentation.

If you’re considering SMP and doing your research like I did, Alex is definitely someone worth talking to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Minh Dinh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPb3Itwi7pPGLnk8PLgqrr8x3D9HnpuIJGCKKzsiKYVs2Srv3lfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just got Scalp Micropigmentation done and I honestly couldn’t be happier with the experience and the results. Alex from Scalp Tech SMP did an amazing job with his skill, attention to detail, and professionalism really show in his work. From the consultation to the procedure, everything felt comfortable and reassuring.

The results look incredibly natural, and for the first time in a long while, I feel confident again. I would recommend Dr. Salazar and his team 10 times over. Pre-surgery I was rethinking my size after the first consultation and Dr. Salazar met with me again to talk about a better fit and he explained everything with patience and I felt excited going into surgery. His professionalism and confidence the morning of my surgery kept me calm and relaxed. Then post-surgery his team, Jocelyn and Juliana, were a phone call or text away the whole time during recovery. They were very caring and answered any questions I had. I am so happy I chose them and would not change anything. Also my girls are beautiful!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lauren Couper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLrqARnRlReypKrAl2lyvnanftOwnG_V0dEpV-9bTEvFr37Cw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Swistun is truly one of the kindest physicians I have ever met. He listened attentively and gave me ample time to ask every single question I had prepared for my consultation. I spent one hour with his medical assistant, Kayla, and two full hours with Dr. Swistun—at no point did I feel rushed or dismissed. He was extremely thorough and explained everything in clear, easy-to-understand medical language.

He took the time to show me numerous before-and-after photos of patients who had undergone the implant removal procedure I was considering, which helped me realistically visualize my potential results. He also thoughtfully compared my body type to past patients with similar builds and explained what my results would most closely resemble. His calm, confident approach made me feel completely comfortable and reassured about the procedure.

By coincidence, my hairdresser connected me with one of her clients who had previously seen Dr. Swistun for breast implant explantation. She was incredibly kind and spoke very highly of him, sharing that she had even referred several friends to his care. After speaking with her, I felt confident that Dr. Swistun was the right physician for me.

I have had consultations with other physicians, and none came close to the level of thoroughness, time, detail, knowledge, confidence, or quality of before-and-after results that Dr. Swistun provided. I wholeheartedly recommend Dr. Swistun to anyone considering breast explant surgery.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maggie Curtis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPvOINsxcHm-S_Z6uUzEA_dOtHh30hR8AfO2Hv60xsPdQQ2JRL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a breast augmentation with Dr. Salazar earlier this month, and I can’t recommend him enough. This was my first cosmetic procedure, so I was definitely nervous going in, but the moment I walked into LJCSC for my consultation, all of those nerves disappeared. Dr. Salazar and his team are incredibly kind and helpful. I am already in love with my results!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J.C. Z.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL3mfnSMROoLYLhAnUqlUXSQ9Ps-alTsWV1viWrkAI0pfpmhA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was in contact with the clinic regarding a revision surgery I was interested in having with Dr. Swistun. The entire process—from patient onboarding to communication and surgical planning—went incredibly smoothly. My patient care coordinator, Karina, was highly engaged, very responsive, and extremely competent. Unfortunately, due to recent complications I had in Europe, I was not able to undergo this particular surgery in the US. However, I am still very impressed by the professionalism of the clinic, and if I ever consider having surgery abroad, it will certainly be with La Jolla Cosmetic.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Molly ODell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaXzDgO7HMk33wHSPfI8VHTbDd8YTEe3HmBHw0UOd3ZP0wtV0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Absolutely the Best Surgeon and Team You Could Ever Ask For!

My experience with Dr. Salazar and his entire team was truly exceptional from start to finish. What began as what we thought would be a routine implant exchange quickly turned into a much more complex procedure — Dr. Salazar discovered a ruptured implant and a perforated capsule that required extra care, time, and expertise. He handled everything with absolute precision, professionalism, and compassion. His calm confidence made me feel completely safe and cared for, even when things became more complicated than expected.

The level of attention and support I received from his nurse Jocelyn and nurse Michelle was beyond anything I could have imagined. Jocelyn was there with me through every step — explaining everything clearly, easing my nerves, and making me feel genuinely cared for. Michelle went above and beyond during my post-op care, administering IV treatments when I needed them most and ensuring my recovery stayed on track. Their kindness and dedication never went unnoticed.

And I can’t say enough wonderful things about Ruth, who was such an integral part of my post-care experience. She was patient, attentive, and made me feel like more than just a patient — she made me feel like family. Every single person in Dr. Salazar’s office operates with such heart and professionalism.

Even though my procedures are now complete, I can honestly say I’ll miss seeing everyone in the office. The entire staff made me feel so comfortable, supported, and loved throughout my entire journey. It’s rare to find a medical team that combines such incredible skill with such genuine care and warmth.

If you’re looking for a plastic surgeon in San Diego who is not only talented and meticulous but also compassionate and deeply committed to his patients’ well-being, Dr. Salazar is the one. I would recommend him and his team to anyone — they truly set the standard for what patient care should look like","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daysie M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjUReqX6blSkxmnt8w0X-36ZNurLH8gVqLD25sJe7Xugv0Qzuh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience at La Jolla Cosmetic Surgery Center has been phenomenal.
The office administration was respectful, welcoming. Karina was professionally amazing at coordinating and patient with my needs.
Everything ran so smoothly between me and the wonderful nurses and assistants.
Dr. Salazar was the best. An exceptional listener, demonstrated his plan of action and executed iconically.
I am so delighted with my results!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maddie Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWt2nI-bbYwraOBU9Z1ekRh7_mw7aklLJm6v2n4tVqBWjVwjk_I=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the best experience with Dr. Salazar & his team. I went in not knowing what to expect (and pretty nervous) & from the consultation, to pre-op, surgery, and after care everything was incredible. I left every appointment feeling very confident and well taken care of. I couldn’t have asked for better results in addition, way better than I even imagined. Could not recommend them enough!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"amanda leigh schwartz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvWq_7diPdRsKtlQ5HugegtoYNj6PnCUTsgbw4PbiGC85ff-pU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had three surgeries with Dr. Swistun, and I truly can’t say enough wonderful things about him! I’m a 47-year-old mom, and from the very first consultation, I knew I was in great hands. Dr. Swistun was incredibly thorough, taking so much time to go over every detail with me. His meticulous approach is exactly why I chose him after meeting with three other surgeons—none of them compared.

I originally had naturally larger breasts (34E at around 110 lbs), and after nursing for a year, they became uncomfortably heavy—too much for jogging or even chasing my son around without two bras! I decided to have a breast reduction and lift, and now I’m a small C. I’m absolutely obsessed with the results.

A few months later, I returned for a reverse upper tummy tuck to remove a small layer of fat under my breasts—again, I loved the outcome. Most recently, I had some stubborn back fat addressed (no amount of exercise was helping), along with a bit of skin tightening and a small amount of lipo on my abdomen. Once again, the results are fantastic.

Not only is Dr. Swistun incredibly skilled, but
he and his entire team—Kayla and everyone—are so kind, professional, and genuinely care about your end results. I truly could not be happier!","Images":null,"When":""}]

This experience has been nothing short of extraordinary, and I can confidently say the entire team goes above and beyond in every aspect of patient care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sydney Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-91MCtlPw-hnnb-1lGdF_djykJRiwi5-f4bO-md-ntL0GjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you are seeing this and want liposuction ... RUN. I sent an email to the office a week ago asking for my medical records so I could move forward with a revision surgery but I still have not heard back. They responded same day every other time I've emailed in last 7 months...

Rather than write a full review, I will copy and paste my email. I think that's more than fair

Some background is important... I came in to get my saddlebags lipo suctioned but was up sold into full inner out lipo and knee lipo... which I have never heard of and end up being the worst result of all. I made I clear I like my curves and just wanted the saddlebags gone. So much fat was taken I have irregularities on every part of my legs/ thighs. Anyways... here it is

"Dear Lauren and Dr Francis,

I am formally requesting a copy of all my medical and surgical records related to the procedure I underwent in February of this year.

I want to be transparent about my decision to not to return for the offered revision. During my last visit, I felt extremely uncomfortable due to the way I was treated and spoken to by Dr Francis. I was honestly shocked
at the way I was yelled at, to the point of tears, and it has taken me some time to fully process this and communicate my decision. I was sobbing in his office with zero care.

Because of that experience, I do not feel comfortable continuing care at your clinic, and question the competency and trustworthiness of Dr Francis. Please provide my records ASAP so I can move forward with alternative care.

I was yelled at that I was wrong, told that this is how knees/legs are suppose to look and told "I don't think you'll ever be happy" because I questioned my results. For months I internalized this and thought I might be overreacting, but after consulting many friends and surgeons , I realize I was undeniably botched by Dr Francis and he is too stubborn and inexperienced to admit his faults and provide solutions.

I've attached some photos of my results for reference. Please note that these are important due to your questionable editing practices.
The photo of me from behind is after I came to get my saddlebags removed....  Please provide my medical records as soon as possible so I can move forward with my revision."","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shawnee Stevens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIX0iUGg9oM2iOf-Q3Wbty348e_XY1zasDrLmJqO6KSXaEhtg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was referred to this business by a mutual friend. From my first consultation to my post-surgical appointments I was confident that they could handle anything! They took the time to discuss options and desired results and taking their recommendations for sizing, shape, and post-operative care made for a much smoother transition and overall healing. I feel much more like myself and couldn't be happier with the medical team, Dr. Chasan and my overall experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Orianna Graham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJICS-ghPCZb5M90Va1gyS1nQgUFTi_nVv2Tgril-BehYYSrA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience for my rhinoplasty consultation. I went to four other consultations and have had surgery in the past, and I can honestly say you won’t find a better, more honest doctor. You won’t find a more better genuine team than them !!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Destiny Reynaga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1DXwUIAitTOK0MCl9G7GoskbTu6P-QH9mYL4_f1zQ5MuKtt58ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a breast augmentation done, the consultation with the surgeon went great. He was very informative, showed pictures, and gave his recommendations. Along with showing similar before/afters so you could have a better idea of what to expect. Surgery day went by so fast! Everyone was friendly and welcoming! Any rescheduling was also done easily, no hassle or issues. I hope to get my TT here as well sometime in the near future! I am extremely happy with my size/look/process. I look very natural and their is no discomfort. I was able to go back to limited living life just a few days after. Obviously no heavy lifting but light work was a breeze. I was still able to go to college/and do my art classes with no pain or problem!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"sonia villa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmHHzUlk54_9EDDmQfamf1l3icZwOPgem1iaNI3IyrlZbDPJ4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great job by Dr DSouza and his team! From initial consultation to bedside manner and follow ups everyone involved was kind, knowledgeable, and patient with the countless questions I had!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angela Young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQibF0KMyxFVeGjmfQJuJBrD18zU3x2i60ZOtjOtbzZJUN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Take away - Go for it! Trust the process and Dr. D'Souza and his staff :)
Tummy Tuck/Breast Lift/Hernia & Muscle Repair
Age 50 - Female - 5'6 & 128lb (before and after) - 10 weeks post op
I waited a bit to make this review to get through some of the stages in recovery. This is an invasive surgical procedure not to be taken lightly and I am happy to report it has been a journey well worth it. Thank you to everyone at Iconic Plastic Surgery 😊
I was always relatively fit after having 3 natural childbirths and each breast fed. I had an umbilical hernia that trained my brain not to work my stomach/core until I realized the diastasis had become so bad I couldn't fix it alone if I tried. Surgery was never a thought. It just wasn't in my vocabulary and seemed like an unnecessary expense when young and entrenched in building our family/life. I was thin and in shape so why make a fuss? As time went on (decades) age (gravity) took some toll and I began having back issues that turned into PT and semiannual sacroiliac injections. One day I thought, what if I had hernia and muscle repair? Maybe it will improve my back, my core, my posture, my pain, and my mushy belly?! What if I could get my core to work WITH me and match the rest of me (lol)? What if I could gain the core strength needed when backpacking (without pain) and wear cute dresses or a swimsuit without an odd, shaped pooch looking like a chronic "food baby"?  So, the mission began....
I talked to people, ran searches, went down some rabbit holes and quickly narrowed my options. I scheduled a consultation with Dr. D'Souza based on the transparency of his work through his Instagram videos, gallery, his reviews, his schooling, and his location. I also received a nod of approval from another highly respected PS in the area. I did not want to travel to foreign lands or a mid-west state to save $. I wanted quality work from someone I could trust at a fair price locally and that is exactly what I got.
Dr. D'Souza and his staff were all professional, kind, caring, and thorough. From consulting to pre surgery and surgery to post op appts, I was treated respectfully and listened to throughout the entire process.
PROCESS (big word here) - Doctor explained this and patiently took me through it over the last several months. If I got ahead of myself with unreasonable expectations he slowed me down. My results were great!! My recovery on perfect course. He reminded me I only have one chance to heal correctly the first time. Don't overdo it with muscle repair. He gave clear instructions and NEVER encouraged buying tons of extra unnecessary items. Note to self- remove 20+ items from Amazon cart - don't need it and will have to store, sell, or chuck when done.
Surgery - The surgical facility in La Jolla is very nice, very sterile, and his nurse and anesthesiologist were awesome! My husband was super impressed by the team as well.
Post op - I met with the doctor several times over the following weeks. He addressed all questions/concerns and told me exactly what to expect in the next week(s) to follow. This also gave him the opportunity to gage my healing and be proactive if need be.
Did I mention his work is meticulous and my results are amazing?
If you are looking for a double board-certified plastic surgeon that is not only a brainiac with amazing schooling, but also has a keen artistic eye/hand, and a kind/soothing bedside manner, then look no further. I took a leap of faith to do something huge for myself and I was so glad I did.
So happy I am trusting the process, had great experience and results, and I truly hope you do too :)","Images":null,"When":""}]
