They have made my experience so smooth from beginning to end. I couldn't be happier with my results and my choice to go with North Coast Plastic Surgery. His staff explained the pre and post op procedure very well, they were also really good and patient about answering my questions even outside of my appointment. I would call and they would pick up the phone right away and answered any questions I had. Because of the knowledge of his staff, I was ready to go into my surgery without a doubt.

I love that Dr. Park explained every process to me from beginning to end. He explained the expectations for every step prior to my surgery and I am very pleased with my experience and results. I was very comfortable through out my time with Dr. Park and his team.

I definitely appreciate the whole North Coast staff to the fullest. They are amazing and will definitely recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tanya Carter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhFve7_gRecNugNgit-nTpjwOtsAHChjbg9gyjPODIqWxvtls=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I deeply regret seeing Dr Park for a scar revision procedure on my face. I had a superficial scar that should’ve been very easy to correct. However, I now have a considerably worse and irreparable scar as a result of his work.

I was awake during the procedure, so I was fully aware of what he was doing and it didn’t seem right at all. He was extremely aggressive and it seemed like he was doing a different procedure than the one I asked for. Based on the amount of pain I was in and how nasty the incisions looked afterwards, I knew immediately that something went wrong.

He later offered me some filler to even out the area, but it provided minimal improvement. The real issue was the damage he did to the area and the haphazard suturing. He didn’t treat my face with care and I’m saddened and angry every time I look in the mirror. It should’ve been such a simple procedure, and I could’ve gone anywhere else.

Lastly, and the primary reason I felt compelled to provide a review, is because his attitude when I questioned why he did the procedure the way he did, turned really unpleasant. He got defensive on the phone, and in-person even his body language turned unprofessional.

It was a huge waste of money, but I would’ve gladly paid even more money for a good outcome. Dr Park damaged my face, and I can’t undo that.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sasha Mead","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIG42VpOLyvpkorc7tcIIimKT07jcAYHV5UtzMYe5jA6SKG8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot recommend Dr. Park and his staff enough! I am 6 mo post op and so beyond thrilled with the results of my breast augmentation. Everything looks so natural - his work is beautiful. Dr. Park is such a skilled surgeon and runs a very honest and genuine practice. I’ve started comparing the care I get everywhere to how this practice cares about its patients. When I was looking for a surgeon I wanted someone who was highly skilled, but also genuine and honest. The marketing and phoniness of other surgeons in the San Diego area turned me off. I left my consult knowing everything I needed to know to make an informed decision and felt so comfortable in his care. He cares so much about his patients and their wellbeing. I also felt like he communicated very clearly the difference of various implants and how to recover properly to prevent any issues. The office staff were so kind and thorough, helping ensure I was completely prepared for surgery and post op (never ever felt rushed, confused, or brushed off - they are all amazing). If you are looking for a BA look no further, Dr. Park is the guy!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lety Peña","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBCOz33AglNOTPWdFzCEbLYisINxp7An_kyWV2zfBDCwVU3g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent experience!

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Danielle Bacon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBeovztJO7FrP3jERosfB3FilzpWyPMb24fxpn_xBsJqiMMX9cGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I had an upper and lower blepharoplasty with Dr. Shoemann, and unfortunately, I regret my decision—especially the upper blepharoplasty.

Originally, I went in only interested in a lower bleph. During my consultation, I was told my eyelids were uneven and was encouraged to also do an upper blepharoplasty. Being in a plastic surgery office at 31 years old, I think it’s easy to start questioning yourself and your appearance. Of course, no one wants “uneven” eyelids, so I agreed—despite not feeling that I truly needed it.

Looking back, I wish I had trusted my gut. I loved my face before. Now, a year and a half later, I still feel sad and disconnected from how I look. I don’t fully recognize myself, and that’s been emotionally really hard. I went in feeling confident and pretty, and left feeling like I needed to be “fixed”—when I honestly didn’t.

Another thing that stuck with me was the way the consultation felt. I never felt reassured or affirmed—just analyzed. It made me feel more insecure rather than supported.

This isn’t written out of anger, but out of honesty. If you’re considering cosmetic surgery, especially when you don’t feel a strong need for it, please really sit with that decision. You can’t undo it, and the emotional impact is real.

I wish I had chosen differently.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erica Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXan9h-sNzP32ki3pnvzpIUPsFATSsB3n_dxT2xU1xzlPtpgeL9UQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I sent my mom for a Diamond Glow facial - she loved it! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Todd Behringer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLm1A5b_hQ_wg1FANQoxe6hS4OP40HqP0lrce5TqnhYwqW7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience from walk in, to walk out! The whole team concept is what makes Dr Karam’s business model work, and I say business, in a positive manner, because this type of structure and organization is whats necessary for precision and excellence everyone has come to expect from the vertical restore procedure. From pre-op coordinator Antonio Gonzalez to post op team Kasie and Chianti, as well as private 24 hour post op nursing care provided Keshia Chapman, RN, the patient is well prioritized as the star of the show! I could not imagine having a better outcome anywhere else, I feel so fortunate to have been recommended to Amir Karam, MD, by another former satisfied client, and I’m confident his practice will continue to be an industry leader for years to come.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"lauren ilacqua","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLylzxtyNY4ZWX3VT72izu_7iHrX2wXiZeZU_BnsInR5HcWdw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am incredibly impressed with my entire experience at Carmel Valley Plastic Surgery. From the moment I walk in, I'm greeted warmly by Jake and Morningstar - their customer service and positive attitude are truly unmatched. Anthony, the patient coordinator, has been outstanding. When I made a scheduling mistake; Anthony & Jake personally ensured everything was sorted out seamlessly.

Tonia’s skill, her up-to-date knowledge, and her technique as an aesthetic RN are the best I've encountered, exactly what I was looking for. The office's philosophy of helping patients achieve beautiful, natural results while preserving the integrity and health of their skin and features is why I booked my first appointment and why I keep coming back every few months. All of the staff go above and beyond. I can't say enough good things about this place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francine Peters","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZzgGxifefTOUgHvxi9xdscNKql5I-cxKEjysI5iUHco7sMG6v=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I regret to share my deeply disappointing experiences with Dr. Karam over multiple procedures spanning several years. My journey began in 2020 with a fat transfer to address facial hollowing. Despite initial promises, the results quickly faded, leaving me with no noticeable improvement. I was told from staff and Dr. Karam that results would improve over time. Two years later, I saw no positive changes at all. Upon asking for another fat transfer, I was declined as he said he does not do revisions (although it says he does in the contract). My results not only did not get any better, they got worse.

Because I was so unhappy with the results, I considered a vertical restore to fix the issues with the lower half of my face, and upper and lower bleph to help with my eyes. It was not until I asked about doing a different procedure that I was able to talk to Dr. Karam again. Makes sense...if I'm paying more money, he will meet with me. He ended up telling me that he was no longer doing fat transfer without a vertical restore because the results weren't good. If the results were not good, then he should have offered to do a fat transfer again. He did not.

In 2022, I underwent a vertical restore procedure and blepharoplasty. Unfortunately, these interventions also failed to meet expectations. My eyes now appear worse than before, with increased droopiness and wrinkles. A subsequent consultation with an eyelid specialist revealed that Dr. Karam's work was subpar, irreparable, and that he is a surgeon who consistently does revisions for Dr. Karam's sloppy work.

Throughout this process, I've faced significant challenges in obtaining adequate follow-up care. Post-operative appointments were with nurses, not Dr. Karam himself. When I asked to meet with Dr. Karam, the response I always got was that he is "in surgery" and cannot meet. He is so busy doing so many surgeries that he does not have the time for any post-op care at all which is completely NEGLIGENT. My attempts to schedule reviews via phone and email with the doctor have been repeatedly unsuccessful, leaving me feeling dismissed and unheard.

After paying for your procedure, you are nothing but a number and you will be treated as such. It's like the DMV of plastic surgery.I will never be doing a procedure with Dr. Karam ever again. I caution potential patients to look beyond his exciting social media presence and large following, and carefully research patient outcomes. His popularity on social media does not make him the best doctor. His prices reflect his popularity, not his work. In my experience, the high costs associated with Dr. Karam's procedures did not translate to any results or attentive aftercare.

After four years and multiple surgeries, I deeply regret my decision to pursue treatment with this practice.To those considering cosmetic procedures, I strongly advise thorough research and skepticism of overwhelmingly positive reviews. My hope in sharing this experience is to prevent others from enduring extreme disappointment, no results, and financial loss.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laughing Monkey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_pLoOZxAezHLR1yBmeRp72W7agW7CcWwwD0i5fo6iQWhF52PEVg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pleasant enough fellow, but do not be guided by this. He should not be a plastic surgeon. Unfortunately, he created a condition of cobra neck because he aggressively removed too much fat under my chin.  Something he recommended I do in addition to a face lift. This is very hard to correct thus I am left with it.  I look older than I did prior to the facelift and the area looks simply odd. In general, his work distorted my appearance rather than enhance it.  I no longer looked like myself and not in a good way.

I thought I had vetted him enough but how can a non-surgeon really know? He covers his tracks to ensure those who have had problems will not surface. He simply lacks the skill and eye for a good result.  His marketing is deceptive. I have seen other patients of his, and they don't look great.  Either they look "done" or it looks like nothing was done without improvement.

It has been hard to look in the mirror since the procedure some years ago. It is especially difficult to see video of my face in action.  Having him work on my face is one of my biggest regrets in my life.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J S Fitness","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtvf_3mZKcgYrk0XmHpHrizavRAuHXkP5OnARwrAYAtdObnfr3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Karam is a great plastic surgeon in San Diego. He's cool confident and well-informed. His staff is very friendly and always smiling. They were really knows what he is doing and has very wonderful bedside manner. I wasn't even nervous at all for surgery. My surgery completed without any problem. I really impressed from Dr. Karam and his staff.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ben Crawford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7UTpjOXOeBcZrVtsSa7Tt7Mc30W1sA6Y0VEyu-3nEkgtiKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Karam is a fantastic surgeon who consistently produces the highest-quality results with the least amount of discomfort or disruption to one's life!  Those are the reasons I sought Dr. Karam and he more than rewarded our faith in him!  That his staff, certainly including Taylor, was always incredibly patient, caring and easy to work with far exceeded our expectations!  Simply, we could not be happier with my results and what we have experienced with Dr. Karam and his staff!  Dr. Karam and his outstanding staff are the absolute best!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ali Valiahdi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxRyi1SvYG7M26VjSYVorUqwZZ9yCVUdJXYJDjQTtpIE3UiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Carmel Valley Facial Plastic surgery is by far the best! Dr.Karam is very professional and knows what he's doing. His staff is also very comforting and kind which is such a breathe of fresh air. My brother and I both got rhinoplasty with Dr.Karam and before we stopped by his office, we went to at least 10 different plastic surgeons and as soon as we made an appointment with this team we knew they were the obvious choice. We're both beyond thankful for choosing Dr.Karam as our surgeon because he has such an exceptional eye for what will fit your face and bring out your features. They will work with everyone and are not like the other plastic surgeons that just say what you want to hear instead, he gives it to you straight with his expert opinion. Getting surgery or anything done is a big deal and they made it go so smooth, fast, and to top it off after our surgery they sent us two bouquets of flowers and chocolate to our house which was so unexpected and truly shows you how different they are and how much they truly care for their patients. I can't say it enough, if you're trying to get anything done on your face be smart and go with Carmel Valley Facial Plastic Surgery . They never disappoint and we've been to so many different doctors and no one compares to Dr.Karam and his amazing staff!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Audrey Jackel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIGZoTXuQGiYQpD0LE2NJDFMvE1uP5vztlhsHVG-QL5CrH8rA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t say enough about Dr Karam!!!! He is an incredibly gifted surgeon and a true artist who pays attention to every detail.  His extensive experience and background along with his gentle, caring and personable demeanor is why I wouldn’t go to any other surgeon.  Dr. Karam is simply the best!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Cathy Bucalo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8v_hmskvGOPfG5pF91zP1LwYpBhSzAFfluJ2oQAhSA3zBew=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The investment in my appearance has always been a priority.  I continue to work, and that being said looking my best has been important and keeping the results real are equally as important.
Over the years I have met many plastic surgeons.  I can honestly say that the flawless integrity component,  Dr. Moradi is the  only one far surpasses the typical breed of surgeons. .  He greats you with how can I help you, not you need to do this.  He is kind and genuinely cares about his patients.  He is modest in his approach no one leaves  looking like they have been in anyway overdone.  I have many friends that see this fine surgeon and would never abandoned this level of artistry .  His staff are as invested and concerned as Dr. Moradi is with the perfect outcome.  I have seen his generosity as he pours everything into each visit.  True story one of my associates travel from the East Coast to see this Dr.

Her attention to detail and making sure I’m comfortable and informed throughout my  procedure is something I never experienced with other clinics…. I been in different country’s like Germany Italy France but no one was great as she is .. they were good don’t give me wrong but Tatyana is really the best …I highly recommend her and I am more then happy with my results. I love her 😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amine Nabi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQ947RlfVDyWrWXFeWoumYpl2SN9cxgvxWexfQ4EKgdthP3AoqHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough wonderful things about Moradi MD and my experience there. From the moment you walk in, the facility feels absolutely luxurious. It truly feels like you are stepping into a high-end Beverly Hills office. Stunning, elegant, and incredibly welcoming.

Dr. Moradi himself is exceptional. He is kind, calm, extremely knowledgeable, and takes the time to make you feel completely at ease. You can immediately tell you are in the hands of someone who truly masters his craft. While I was there, I could see patients coming in and out, and everyone genuinely looked happy and excited to be there. That says a lot.

The staff is absolutely amazing. They feel less like coworkers and more like a close-knit family or a group of tight friends who truly enjoy working together. That kind of atmosphere does not happen by accident. It clearly reflects the strong, respectful, and positive culture Dr. Moradi has created. Every single visit made me feel welcomed, remembered, and cared for.

My blepharoplasty procedure was completely painless, and my recovery has been going very smoothly. I am already seeing major positive changes in my face, and the results look natural and refined. What truly sets this practice apart is the follow-up care. You never feel like you are just another patient or that the transaction ends once the procedure is done. I have already had two follow-up visits, the most recent one included a facial massage, and I have another follow-up scheduled in three months. That level of care makes a huge difference.

I am incredibly grateful to have discovered Dr. Moradi, his upscale and stunning office, and his absolutely wonderful, friendly, and attentive staff. This place exceeds expectations on every level, and I would recommend Moradi MD without hesitation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sara F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsoj_QlEgocayWrRE2ejdRKbebzJN67DoUjdH1Ys2DN0ByFWwo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Moradi MD is an entire team of talent.  Dr Moradi is hands down the best pastic surgeon in San Diego County.  His assistant Cynthia is my #1 cheerleader, super-competant and efficient.  I agree with all of the positive reviews here, 100%.  Tatiana does the best botox and lip fillers (“lips by Tatiana” is an actual thing).  Becca does amazing treatments and you can count on her honest advice.   The front office staff is cheerful, super friendly and warm.  And the Queen of Facials is Tiana, who gives the best, customized, thorough, blissful facials I have ever had.   The team has given me life-changing treatments and procedures, and Tiana’s work is the frosting on the cake of my renewed, youthful skin.  I love this place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jamye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLx9-NtoC1lOU62zHOJIWrvvO2LD3BODihxW6lKCxS8pZRpaPs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is the best!! The staff is amazing and Dr. Moradi made the process so smooth and gentle. It was my first time receiving botox and I was a nervous wreck. Cynthia and Dr.Moradi eased my fear and I returned again for my check up and everything looks and feels amazing!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kim Reynolds","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWq3sTbL_WmtWaS-fy3IJheW04HPQfwrN6aCkT4yeFK_ruenXh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been a patient of Dr. Moradi’s for years, and I cannot recommend him highly enough. He truly cares about the Oceanside/Carlsbad community and the families within it. If you want a surgeon who is as kind as he is talented, Dr. Moradi is the only choice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"VitalVay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIBiHBzZ54oeL59c7G_OKnspmTFjz6T-26TLeEZrcM0KV55A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time getting Acne Extractions and it was amazing. U won't regret it","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lillie Donner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3ED-K0ReatsGhYt8WsGzD4CgwwQ_ff4wVls2tjdHXU7FicDg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Ekstrum and Replenish RX are a true gem. I highly recommend Dr Esktrom, for any Botox or otherwise, he is a gem!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kerri Tremblay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXr2fY4kZnDL8GbZdlo79QqxGcNNcL9Lt9eeMiYj0pfZoSCBc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I know of someone who started coming here and has been raving to me about how great it is.. and being I have been on the fence about having something done about this forehead of mine for about 2 years now, I decided to take the leap and let me tell you I'm so glad I did.

I will definitely be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amber Dev","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9z4bg3QhhNDyAsPXFPVgfpHhPJpHta_E5BLC29ttlh8T7xs3n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love everyone in this office. [{"Name":"Theresa Sobosan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLILXah6YLedIISTm06jYttdrk4ud9XiFhAexwDhFDlEEyUuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was up in Solvang on a girls trip vacation when my sister got hurt. I googled the closest hospital and we headed over there. I have to say it was a fantastic experience from start to finish. Everyone from the security guard to the Dr. Were fantastic. It's always difficult being in an area that your not familiar with and ending up at a hospital. It was a busy night, but they kept us informed and made sure we had anything needed to keep us comfortable. All the fellow patients were nice as well. The staff was the best and Dr. Gerhardt was fantastic. Now I know where to go in the area if we ever need a hospital again. Thanks for such great service and making us feel comfortable. We appreciate you all.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D Fisher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPSBl_YRfFt0RatXOynkJO9Mt5GrS3AAV5casevdvZc6qSlA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Used to be a full service hospital. My family  & I had surgeries there. I gave birth there. No more! It's basically a transfer station. Lots of tests available there, but all but minimal care patients are transferred to Santa Barbara. The Valley is growing, we need back our real hospital!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ESMERALDA DIEGO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1eUun6F6AZgOg3SHooNePLb7p-g2GnmDgmVwbW6A7_xvJeVbx0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing service, amazing Dr Del Rosso, I broke my wrist and they gave me incredible attention to detail and no wait. It was nothing I've experienced in any hospital.
Nurses are all kind and helpful and compassionate. Treatment with dignity kindreds and respect. They explained the whole process great and lived up to it. Thank you SYVCH","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richard Gamboa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAWFjum5Ngqlkg3ybTMLfjng3MMJ6RArCS7FVy9yXBA4FGwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I were hiking she slipped and broke her wrist and dislocated it. We got there and intake Andrew was organized friendly and timely we got in super fast We were able to see a Dr. Del Rosso and his staff Alexis and Christine McKenzie and Janus and X-ray tech were all compassionate, understanding and fast. They helped her get out of pain and rest her wrist and line up the broken bone. They wrapped it well and we came home to see a specialist. His advice and medical attention was tip top and all involved were awesome. What a blessing. Amazing service in and out","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carrie Ransome","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjwdBxU7Hcmwl0122E9yW9LkoRgNwlHYlD6RNtcqABr8GK1mlfaw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I received the best care and attention you could ask for and I didn't even know there was a hospital in Santa Ynez.  From the security gentleman who was right there when we pulled up offering assistance to the triage department who were kind and super efficient I was blown away with the kindness and care.  Then once in a room it just got better.  My nurse was helpful and super caring to the 2 attending Drs in which their knowledge and experience showed and made me feel so cared for and in good hands.  The radiology techs were top notch and super informative with tests I have had before yet never have been given the proper information like this.  Hoping I don't need an emergency room or hospital in the near future but for sure feel safe knowing they are there to help.  Great place!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Hawkins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUPXQh3JRuu-9U_Opvuziog-mokMp-aTQnQOtF0l0rtuvDgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This hospital is one of the best hospitals. The physicians, nurses, techs, etc, are very knowledgeable and very caring. Thank you so much, SYVC!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linsey H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_qhygsrjQlxnCdoThQrcFfYsPVK9Dvv9AQGtfR45QnEKtk92gXA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The receptionist was kind, the male nurse too. Dr.Pelletier was fantastic. My daughter had nursemaids elbow (in a lot of pain) and he swiftly corrected it and she was fine within minutes. He is definitely pediatric-friendly. We so appreciated how he presented himself to our daughter, bubbly and compassionate. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beau Schmidt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyC0I-Xoa6gH9gwLOT23WE5RII_7zE1C619flw4B_uwbk5RVQH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"***Update*** from previous 1 star. Cottage hospital ended up reaching out and making it right by reducing the invoice.

We also had another experience with my son when he had a respiratory issue. We had a completely different staff and had a completely different experience. They treated us so well and gave us timely service.

Old review: We brought my sick son in to get some care and they set us in awaiting room for 2 1/2 hours. At 11:30 at night we decided to leave because it was late and they weren’t giving us any kind of timeline or info. We figured our son’s rest was going to be better at home. Felt a bit like the twilight zone. We left without seeing anyone or receiving any medical attention. When we left, we checked out with the clerk, and she said that we did not need give any information. We just got sent a. $830 bill after insurance paid the majority. Prime example of the American healthcare system.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Bea Dones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5TgwvwmhdabuyZULqeS60WEvmVcm5aZQhYxlYP8fH522xn_X_GQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you need care do not go here. The receptionist is extremely rude and not efficient at all. They messed up lab orders 4 times. You will NEVER see a doctor, but only a nurse practitioner. The nurse will go to Medline (internet) and read directly from the website. Nobody follows on test results, people are clueless about follow ups. My mother was in the waiting room for her "appointment" for over 50 minutes to see the nurse in 4 minutes to get a referral.
The staff is unapologetic, you will NEVER see the "doctor", and you will never receive good care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mariah Munroe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVawOoEJVUWR3jkkVT7nIaajub4iCPfTJDWM67CSZuoTBFvlBX8-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The quality of care from this clinic has gone down hill since the change in ownership. They're nearly impossible to get a hold of. I've been trying to get a prescription fixed for over 6wks with no resolution. They also kept my drivers license for several days and didn't reach out to me. If I hadn't remembered that I never got it back after they took it to make a copy, I don't know if they ever would've contacted me about it since I don't even get a call back after leaving several voicemails. Their hours are also unclear and inconvenient, only open Tuesday-Thursday.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Allee Gette","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqeKFcus7dWSQp8TR0fF94RPTcegCMRbh1DvURYxVulEacprdy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Please don’t misunderstand this review: there are some excellent people who work here and provide excellent care (though I don’t know if they’re still employed there).

This center was recently taken over by a new doctor, and the whole place is chaotic and very understaffed.

I had to get my regular prescription refilled, so the new doctor had me come in, presumably to establish care, etc. The appointment seemed fine, though it started very late, and I was told that my prescription would be filled for the month.

The next day, I check with the pharmacy to see if I can pick up my meds: nothing was sent in.

So, I call them a few times before leaving a message. I don’t hear back.

I call them multiple times for a week straight, trying to make contact to see what’s happened to my medication, and no one ever gets back to me. They answered the phone ONCE, a full week later, and promised to tell the doctor to send in the prescription. I couldn’t go in person because of work, so I just had to hope she’d follow through.

He still hasn’t sent it in, over two weeks later.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bunny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKvIQG-5_rs2yV5YD7kTzWdWJwE7Ac61JYBU3aj9Z5Mp0j8mA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"You cannot reach them at all when you call. I am seriously ill and it has taken months yo get a call back and it only happened after my insurance couldn't contact them either and gave them a strike. Ignore the recent positive reviews those are paid for or fake. There is no way way people are receiving quality care here. Seek care elsewhere or your health may face the consequences of rapidly declining.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Benji Ibarra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNYJBwOROwxbKv36iMhTZv_o57FJOTibj7sohNfYL2YzOwPboOmg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"New ownership with no owner. They never answer any calls. I one went in person and waited 5 minutes in the lobby and nobody ever came out to help me. The service is pretty much non existent here now. Go elsewhere!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"angela lozano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiJ02yY8clVNj-c0NJbsmUKgQTRF8BuuytVADF8hkO2fTqGFmZ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst doctors office ever. Her approach is thoughtful, science-based, and deeply respectful of each woman’s individual needs and life path. I love that she treats root causes, not just symptoms, and always offers options and education so I can make informed decisions.

Be sure to book the 90-minute session so she can tackle your problem areas!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Orkide Houston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVte84IWVzbb9xvcdhZgOXVjiKosWtEBoOnUTVdsb8ZfwxtILZH=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kathryn is the best acupuncturist/massage therapist I’ve been to, hands down. On occasions I will also schedule a facial with her to bring back the “glow” in my skin.  She has 40+ years of experience practicing acupuncture and massage, and it shows.  Plus she’s just elegant and poised, and really nice to talk to.  Go see Kathryn, she’s great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"LORI PETERMAN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUmbee33zcZFsSmJCasgvxmHtzWJ2H5NE5_FaICuxkf4DiTGUY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely the best facial ever. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nancy Aguirre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIaG5ZlGoEZ8ZNmTKnzT__rx1Tw1oeAmIRHYmxgdhEqO2fHjs5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Not impressed in any way. I give them a ZERO! First, they don't answer the phone - which is understandable when they are busy/answering other calls, etc. but their message tells you to leave a message with your name, phone number & date of birth & they will call you back asap, you kind of hold them at their word & when they are able to, they will call you back. Well, I did this. I called for my husband who needed a hand surgeon & he was driving so I called them & left a message. I gave them both my name & phone number as well as my husbands name, phone number & date of birth. I explained that I was calling for him as he was driving & needed a hand surgeon. I said that they could either call me back or call him directly for whatever information needed to schedule an appointment for him to see someone. Did anyone care enough to call me back? NO. Did anyone care enough to call my husband? NO. So, I don't understand why, in their message, they tell potential clients that they will return their call. That was a total lie. Do they not want clients? Do they not want referrals? Do they think they are so good that they don't have to respect other people? It's rude & I cannot ever consider them for any future needs. And I will not recommend them to anyone. I was actually giving them the benefit of the doubt because they had positive reviews, but many years ago, I was on Work. Comp. & Dr. Behrman performed surgery on my right elbow. He lied about a few things which were later proven to be lies. Plus he messed up my elbow so badly I had to go to a different surgeon to have another surgery to fix it. He performed so badly that he was removed from being on the list of doctors the Workman's Comp. would recommend to people. They kicked him out! So, for me, that says enough about how much they care about their clients. It is very disappointing to know & experience how poorly some doctors behave.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"sarah verma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSSrbkGqhSvqtcWdc02_zLjz2S8jj0HSLx1ubOfMcgretDnci9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't say enough good things about Cynthia at the front desk of Associated Hand Surgeons. She has been outstanding in following up on my referral, keeping me informed every step of the way. I never had to chase her down for updates—she was always on top of it. Cynthia is polite, reassuring, and truly goes above and beyond. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hailey Vuong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5PrgWOYTsAV-D2BybTGlYgcrn6IuBQb8b0D__emSDeHR5xuIU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Bherman and his associates are top notch with their care. He is definitely worth the wait no matter how busy he gets. His front desk receptionists are very sweet and kind. I feel like a VIP member when I come check in. Cynthia is genuine and always offers a nice chat with me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"William Rippy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKTLeNBOrXDgwbOVFTd8YpoBUZ7Rk8wvEsq6jVDYA_jXZQWcIs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Behrman has to be one of the best, if not the best, hand surgeon on the earth.

I had a right thumb joint reconstruction..27 years of damage from UPS (as a driver) with additional trauma from a 120 lb metal rod slamming into the right hand.

Dr. Behrman told me I'd need 6 weeks of physical therapy after 6 weeks in the cast....but when the cast came off....

The thumb was like new.. No therapy required.

Strength and mobility at 100%.

He's THE BEST!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fred Aiken","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfpgD3P0OefYod0ViMSRwLAmd8n-GwZHLeYzc0dQhYjmBlVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Ruth, his PA Erica, and his entire staff, from reception to surgery is a model for how a medical practice should be run.  Dr. Ruth has done hand surgery  on me twice and my wife once.  We both achieved excellent results.  I can easily highly recommend Associated Hand Surgeons and Dr. Ruth.  Any negative review regarding them is bogus in my opinion.  I have always received top notch care!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Campbell Gabriel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ9tIJvFCDx2zffs6jrRzH0lovLds7GsqX93I93JnybOV12Rg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just can't say enough good things about Dr. Behrman and his friendly staff.  I had all but lost the use of both hands, and needed thumb replacement surgeries for each.  Recovery was painful, and required a fair amount of Physical Therapy, but I knew this would be the case going into each surgery.  Now, three years later, I think of this good man every time I peel an orange or grate Parmesan cheese or move heavy paving stones.  What a tremendous gift he gave to me -- the complete use of my (once crippled) hands at the not-so-tender age of 66!  Knowing what I know now, I can't believe I waited so long to have my thumbs repaired.  Thank you so much, Dr. Behrman!  You gave me my life back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ERIKA G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5zLFY1rhWzz6LlmPtHcGTwM_DqWHRtPG8iW1oxVumywyD3bMR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Behrman is absolutely the BEST hand surgeon anywhere! In 2005, he repaired my left hand after a serious painful tendon tear, and my hand is still "as good as new". In 2015, I was sent to a hand surgeon with Sansum Clinic for repair of my right thumb joint. That surgeon completely screwed up my hand, leaving me with debilitating pain and very limited use of my dominant hand. I went back to Dr. Behrman, who had to perform extensive correction of the botched surgery done by the Sansum physician. I have long since fully recovered with virtually complete use of my right hand again. Dr. Behman has also performed two hand surgeries on my adult son. The first was to repair a tendon injury to his left hand almost 2 decades ago, and the second surgery a few years ago was due to arthritis damage. At this point in time, we are both planning to see Dr. Behrman again for new, unrelated issues. I have complete confidence in him and would not consider seeing any other surgeon for my hand/arm problems. I cannot recommend him highly enough!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"William MacReynolds","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlNB7ZgGGPPJr1749mxdK5cTdQSwE09BAV89WeTzayWVvwvg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The Doctor seemed fine...The issue lies completely with the schedule person, Vicky. I was approved for Surgery by my primary and my cardiologist. On Feb 18th Dr. Ruth recommended surgery and I still have not had anything scheduled. I was told in March the latest hold up was the doctor would be out till the 6th...its now the 20th and I still have not heard anything","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Michael Trafton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJWjpHhZDe4jwLbgTc3HMQ3xEBzWLoFaE25_3GdkfzFlWSWfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I am deeply disturbed by the sales practices at this store. My elderly mother was targeted while she was alone, and the situation was handled in a way that felt exploitative and unethical. She is recently widowed and has been showing signs of dementia, making her especially vulnerable. Rather than exercising care or sensitivity, staff used intense, high-pressure sales tactics and continued pushing even after she expressed hesitation and concerns about cost.
This was not respectful customer service — it was taking advantage of someone in a fragile position. Businesses have a responsibility to act with integrity, particularly when dealing with elderly customers. I strongly urge others to be cautious. No family should have to worry about their loved ones being pressured or taken advantage of while simply shopping. I strongly urge anyone — especially seniors, caregivers, and families — to stay far away from this store. Protect yourself and your loved ones by taking your business elsewhere.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Trafton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK54bTSpfJPkihUYlDLPC3AQ3kMajfZyjrE8D9ec3S1PcJTJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have never experienced sales tactics as aggressive and predatory as I did at this store. The staff use extreme high-pressure techniques designed to wear people down rather than help them make informed decisions. What was presented as a simple demonstration quickly turned into relentless pushing, refusing to take “no” for an answer.
What is most disturbing is how they target elderly customers and vulnerable individuals, applying pressure until people feel intimidated or overwhelmed. This is not customer service — it is manipulation. No one should feel cornered, anxious, or coerced into spending money, especially on overpriced products.
I strongly caution others, particularly seniors and those shopping alone, to avoid this store. Businesses should operate with transparency and respect — not intimidation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer Horta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiAZIZqODni58bKtPLakxT6NuHRGttiFFTKsvYzy8gGGobbSNCHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I was in salvang in December and I got pressured
To get a special 5000 facial treatment if I bought this exspensive under eye tightening cream. They did a sample on me and I thought it worked. I set an appointment for the face treatment. Before I went back I decided to look at reviews thank god I did. I see there’s scammers that work at this shop. Shame on these people. Be careful of this shop if ever in salvang","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jamie Otte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9pTKteTu6YAamigKIrvSKY4TLOZzTNB5ZS_1wyn_8UAuK_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The overpriced bathbomb I bought smelled nothing like lavender in fact is smelled like literal cleaning products and chemicals. I don’t think they use real herbs and essential oils. Not to mention most the stuff in there is so weird. Like I don’t need some stinky soap with a plastic rubber duck in it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stefanie Garber","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWbS76lIq1uX81MWVdFkKWC1_EWkB5mFMmBnl2R0Vw8jeelCE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My aunt was fully taken advantage of by this business on 2/21/26. Stay away from this company they are scammers and take advantage of the elderly. Rude and disrespectful when asked for a refund.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Neda Mandegaran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWe7pkhiigBU-FxY4Vu0Xhz8k7693832UBatanVh9SEl5cF55oH3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Beautiful shop, nice looking and smelling products
Cons: probably the worst salesperson I have ever seen: I asked for any soap that was beneficial to “skin”. She showed me non-soap, industrial products in the middle of the store instead all those soaps and mentioned that none of the soaps were for “face”, but only for body. I emphasized that I was not looking for skincare for my face but any soap that had good ingredients for skin and she replied that none of the soaps had any specific ingredient and the whole store was around the look of the soap rather than application and benefit!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESaDdRv9t4ALTVHVU5w4ddPjdwt4FckORRwtisxa-oxP5ejWsjmbwiDMODfaFYD4yro0qTLOYq7Rjvk5pruq_bS6eTJcJvjDoRnXYwKdKYj9xeLyn4MnnHLWX5k0HKIxH7ABEonPQ","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETmd8jZR_nPJ7ggQOX1Vt9ZcJNMXDUk5giRd8OMMZtvYt4drVj-EqAJuo4eeyGGvMylQW_9WQnODIZUb7HA-9FDTlULBVqznkkliNjfcmiXkJVWuznuc9F-36K-AKwx76VWPYjK"],"When":"2024-3-7"},{"Name":"Bryana Kappadakunnel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLs-UtsZcfRVc3DdMCo8DjTvF_525jzKeeop3vLTD3mVeO58Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I left Skinderella yesterday feeling happy that I got a “deal” on some apparently amazing eye cream called “Celestolite Estrella Age-Revive Treatment.” The very aggressive salesman told me that it retailed at $2k, but he could get it down to me for $399 “because [he] made some sales today and had ‘points’ to lower the price.” He included an eye serum and an eye cream “as a free gift.” On Amazon, this exact same “eye treatment” is being sold for $69.99. I think it is horrific that Skinderella, a seemingly boutique shop in a lovely village of family-owned businesses would scam hard-working families out of their money during the holiday season. Truly horrible. I will never return despite their promise that they will honor “the same price” I paid yesterday in 2.5 years. They refused to take my name or information to honor such a claim, so I think the BBB should be made aware of their predatory business practices.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gerry Sawrey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKE1XkqncGHlZiq2kPlz1n7UPKbNN3eTMNPMzUTtBqtDA6ZKqhh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Today I had an almost identical experience to the reviewer that said she felt trapped after taking a sample of skin cream. My husband was with me and Rocco even pushed the product on him. I was told it would cost $300 but eventually he lowered the price to $150. A female "treatment specialist" joined in and talked about a $6,000 price for some other treatment. We finally were able to get away. I hope the Chamber of Commerece and The Better Business Bureau investigate this business. This was a deliberate attempt to scam the elderly.  There are other stores where you can find the cute, bright soaps like they have on display that give this store an inviting look. My experience left a bad taste in my mouth not only for this store, but for the entire town.
Walk on by and fast!  Buyer beware!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Her office is extremely professional and well designed. and her bedside manner is just what you need when you’re not feeling your best—compassionate and kind.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Heidi Grant-Starr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcET2mXbHKnsd11lzfHPepgcJNW1Vhq71M1qpX1Ox4FTI3EDkRMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kristi is a talented healer and very good at what she does. She has helped me recover from sports injuries, heal from sickness and also helped me process and overcome grief of a loved one with her treatments. She has an amazing ability to diagnose ailments quickly and provide immediate relief. I highly recommend her. She has skills!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angie SYV","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5XxTxh4FYNXr44HyqkcL6ZUCGp7gJt7V6ka6FFSJoB7kZHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am a Santa Ynez Valley resident and have been lucky enough to benefit from Kristi’s incredible care for over ten years now. She has been my primary care specialist in treating a number of incredibly painful conditions including sciatica, rotator cuff issues, pinched nerves in my back (that traveled down my right arm), meniscus tear, regular stress/anxiety that has led to sleep issues… you name it. And no, I am not a total mess – I am a normal adult in her late 40’s that is going through all the usual trauma that comes with an active life! However, let me be clear: I do not ‘enjoy’ needles or acupuncture – but I continue to see Kristi because she has worked through and resolved every issue I have had. She is extremely knowledgeable, patient, kind, thorough, empathetic, professional and efficient. She is a great listener, keeps excellent notes on my conditions and is always positive and quick to respond when I have questions or concerns. I still don’t like acupuncture. But I REALLY do not like being in pain and having my life disrupted by physical issues. So, Kristi Hundt will forever be on my speed dial and I will consult her for any future ailment she will allow me to throw her direction. By the way, she has a truly lovely new office in Solvang. Quite pleasant and convenient. ~ A.W.J.","Images":null,"When":""}]

She is so compassionate, patient & thorough. She’s the first doctor to go over my lab work thoroughly during a routine physical, she takes her time to hear out my concerns and provide solutions. I never feel rushed in my appointments, which is a big deal to me and very hard to find in the medical world.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deni Overton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUW8L60fu1INHifrqQZjRdb2YPH57WsDE2GFROBeGVlEfg_zH4B=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I waited over 6 months to get an appointment with Dr. Akers, which I don’t have a big problem with; however, I was disappointed by the outcome because she was highly recommended by a close friend.  Granted, if Naturopathic medicine was covered by insurance and they could order the tests I need—I would have ZERO need to see a conventional medicine doctor.  Unfortunately, because of a current condition, I need to have an ultrasound every 6 months to monitor it and that must be ordered by a conventional doctor.  Dr. Akers is not willing to do that unless I follow “standard of care”.
I was informed by her that she is ranked according to how compliant her patients are, so it became obvious that she is more concerned about her ranking at Sansum than providing a minimal amount of care for a non-compliant patient such as me.  Take the pill, get the shot, have it cut out…just don’t try to heal your body an alternative way or you are noncompliant.
I am very much a proponent of natural healing whenever possible. I do not need any prescription drugs at the age of 72, but I have also been willing to drastically change my diet and lifestyle in order to accomplish this.  When I was not willing to do all the convention testing she wanted me to do…or take drugs for conditions that are reasonably controlled by a clean diet, exercise and supplement, I was told that she would not be interested in having me as a patient.  I was also cautioned about taking non-FDA approved supplements because they could be harmful to my liver and kidney health.  I happen to take very high-quality supplements and trust the companies I buy them from.  When you look at how many truly harmful substances the FDA allows in our food, I am thankful that my supplements aren’t regulated by that entity!
All this said, I was fine with knowing that she was not the doctor for me and I will stay with my current PCP who doesn’t have a problem with ordering my twice yearly ultrasounds even though she would prefer that I am more compliant also.  But, the reason for this review comes from the “Visit Summary” she wrote that not only tried to make me look like a quack, but flat-out lied in more than one case, as follows:
•	She put in quotes that I said “traditional medicine will kill you”.  I absolutely did not say that.  The closest my words came to that was when I asked her why there is no recognition on the part of traditional medicine that their “cures” don’t always work either and mentioned that my daughter-in-law was basically treated to death by conventional treatments…which is true.
•	Then, under Physical Exam, she talked about the condition of my abdomen and extremities—both of which she did not even look at or touch.
So, if you are the kind of person who does not question a doctor’s authority and you do not do your own research, Dr. Akers is probably a great fit.  She seems very nice, even if not completely truthful, and probably is the best doctor ever for that type of patient.  That isn’t me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hayley Hawthorne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrVWON1vaktwI1J1PCrOyQvpXA7AIswxEK1BoPhbe7rrt2Tw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are lucky to have Dr. Akers in the valley. She is a great doctor and genuinely cares. My mom has her for a doctor as well and she thinks she is great too!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Malia Duran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjon7185Dwvte0tZgAcN6sCX24hxzs7jhSSN4F7O3Onyo5byOgzg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best doctors I have ever had. user_reviews: [{"Name":"NahNee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1ozTV71In37krEKg1Be-BP0Uf_BRNLzwaT5l1pK04NqxjqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"II would gladly double the amount of stars if I could. The post-pandemic world of medicine has left many of us devastated, myself included. I had nearly lost hope in seeking further medical care. As someone grappling with complex health issues, compounded by the profound loss of my caregiver and spouse, the journey has been incredibly challenging. I felt completely defeated by the previous medical team assigned to me in the neighboring county, where referrals seemed meaningless, and I often couldn't reach them by phone.\nHowever, this experience was transformed when I found my current PCP. They are caring, kind, and thorough—truly a breath of fresh air. Remarkably, I received referrals by 7 AM the day after our first meeting, a testament to their commitment to understanding my case. This office went above and beyond, and I cannot stress enough how crucial that support has been. Everything went smoothly and they allowed me to wait in the room for a while until I started to feel a little better. I was completely exhausted and miserable since I had been dealing with this migraine for about eight hours. The kind thoughtful words of the all female staff were extremely appreciated. I fully trusted in them to make me feel better and they did!  I rested for another hour in a nearby motel room. I have been getting treatments there for 6 years now, and they have truly turned back the hands of time. I have had several treatments including Botox, Dysport, RF Microneedling and Sculptra, to name a few, and the results have been incredible.

Not only do I feel more confident, but I genuinely look at least 5-7 years younger than my age, people telling me that I look so much younger than they thought. My skin has never looked better - smoother, firmer, and so much healthier overall. I constantly get compliments on how amazing my skin looks.

Dr. Z is incredibly knowledgeable, skilled, and truly has an eye for natural looking results. I trust him completely with my face, which is something I don't take lightly. I never feel overdone - just refreshed and more youthful like my younger self. The entire experience from consultation to treatement is professional, comfortable, and personalized. I have never felt pressured to do too much or more services. He even tells me if he doesn't think I need something that I am interested in getting. They offer a membership, which I have and really like. I use my memebership discount  along with specials that are offered periodcally and it makes it more affordable.

After my experience here, I honestly wouldn't go anywhere else, and I haven't for the last 6 years. If you are considering cosmetic treatments  that look  natural and beautiful , I highly recommend Dr. Zadeh.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert De Cagna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcr4Vhz_jJtGNtxI12jEbVcIozjK583pnyy0-kCB24EDjr-Xk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Z and his staff are genuinely amazing. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Beth Lippman Anschultz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbyK6tWGFFCdtHo_d7uIeI2Bodbl5WObP9Y1IUMs8YnFiJCA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stumbled upon this place looking for a new esthetician. I bought a package and started with this. I always schedule with Tina because she’s so friendly and personable. And their laser works! After a few months, she brought to my attention VI peel which she mentioned was safe for Rosacea. I have to say after 3 peels there is a visible improvement with my skin texture and skin tone. What I like about The Skin Agency is you are not sold a procedure to be sold a procedure. If it is not the right treatment, you will be told so and recommendations made for what is. Check out the Skin Agency and ask for Rina. She’s amazing! [{"Name":"Rosa Venturoli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIL94yeYi55Nctsu4ydW2dcA8lpnA7A7CxDj0IEF_9h6TpgaQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been going to this dental office for over three years now, and the experience has consistently been excellent. The staff is always friendly, professional, and welcoming. One thing I really appreciate is how organized they are — their text message reminders have been a lifesaver with my busy schedule, especially the ones they send when you’re overdue for an annual checkup. It’s a small detail, but it really shows how much they care about keeping patients on track.

The office itself is easy to find with plenty of accessible parking, and it’s always clean and well-maintained. I also love the thoughtful touch of the little freebies they offer — travel-size floss, toothpaste, and toothbrushes. They come in handy more often than you’d think, especially when traveling.

At my most recent visit, I had an especially positive experience with the dentist. When I asked about numbing cream (something I’ve needed in the past), she confidently explained her gentle and strategic approach and reassured me that it likely wouldn’t be necessary. She was absolutely right — for the first time, I didn’t need any numbing at all. I really appreciated how much care and attention she put into the treatment, and even took time to consider my overall wellness, like gut health, which not every provider takes into account.

Overall, I’m very happy with the level of care and service I’ve consistently received here. [{"Name":"Armin Müller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX23GtillBYAY21K0RaEmfrUO9Dtb8zYqv98LpWEYZrXIUV94WH=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ill be honest—I was skeptical about getting any kind of cosmetic treatment. As a guy, I never really considered skin procedures, but after hearing about Morpheus8 and how it could tighten my skin and improve texture without surgery, I decided to give it a shot.

I booked my appointment at a well-rated clinic in LA, and the staff was really professional. They explained everything, from how the microneedling and radiofrequency work to the downtime I should expect. The treatment itself wasn’t exactly painless, but it was manageable. They applied a numbing cream, which helped, but I still felt some heat and pressure. It wasn’t unbearable—just a bit uncomfortable.

Right after the session, my face was red and slightly swollen, kind of like a sunburn. By the next day, the redness calmed down, and over the next couple of weeks, I started noticing real changes. My skin felt firmer, the fine lines around my eyes and forehead softened, and even some old acne scars looked less visible.

What I liked most was that the results looked natural. No one asked if I had “something done,” but I got comments like, “You look well-rested” or “Your skin looks good.” That’s exactly what I wanted—improvements without it being obvious.

Overall, Morpheus8 was worth it. If you're a guy in LA thinking about improving your skin without looking like you had work done, I’d definitely recommend it. Just make sure to go to a reputable provider, and don’t expect overnight results—it gets better over time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tina Edwards","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGp_HzuRfwaLaC0CikTzrT5efSgP6NGtI3aXFrjLsGrwwh4U8w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The team here is fantastic, and I'm very happy with the way I've been taken care of. I have gone to other places and regardless of where you go to-skin care is not cheap, but the prices are worth it for your skin in the long run. At 25, I look like I am 18-19 years old because of the many skincare routines I got at this location. Dr. Conger did an additional procedure to remove any remaining cancer. After that, he did reconstructive surgery to fill the void that was left.  It entailed a skin graft and extensive repair work. Since then, he did one additional repair procedure and I have returned for two additional check-ups.
Dr. Conger is extremely professional, patient, and sincerely cares for his patients.  He always greets patients with a smile and truly seems to care about their well-being.
I am extremely impressed with my results, especially considering the amount of reconstructive work that he had to do considering the size of the void that was left after the initial surgery for the cancer removal.
Also, his staff members are great. Professional, kind, and caring.
I would highly recommend him to anyone who is need of his specialized skills.

The office staff are the best.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elizabeth Nobles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJODCg7sg1RM8iR25YXA-lWp4fVI9EtnOZpgrE7ccEFgMSudw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you are terrified going to see a dentist, and even if you aren’t, Bridgeport Aesthetic Dentistry is the place to go.

I wanted to improve my smile by having 12 front teeth capped because I lost my enamel due to grinding.  I wanted this, but was terrified for such an undertaking.

I made an appointment to see what would be involved and I knew for sure that if I was brave enough to do it, Dr. Salmassian would be my dentist.  He was so calming and the pictures of his work were beautiful.

I came in about a week later to the kindest dental assistant I had ever met.  Kathy was my cheerleader who kept my spirits up and calmed me down when I was afraid.  And, Dr. Salmassian was so compassionate and patient.  I probably would have quit halfway through if it wasn’t for them.

My teeth are beautiful! Dr. Salmassian gave me exactly what I dreamed of.  He and Kathy have changed my life.  I am so thankful for them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Toma Nua","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTDKrtEi6gp2qH37pH1LZLEIFpwb5MIt83tAc9tb7PZvjXhc6q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Doctors and staff are always very friendly and competent at their jobs. Fashioned teeth scaling vs the water scaling.  I explained my preference and she happily accommodated my request.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rebecca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI88roVJ7qmGLeNrvHIbO7S1Su6riZr9bboJE_cRvGGhdIesQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I’ve waited a long time to write this review hoping I’d “get over it” and because Dr. Sal and his staff are very kind. I truly think that intent was good, but definite room for improvement.

I had bonding done on my top teeth, and Dr. Sal told me he needed to “file down a bump” (exact words) on my bottom tooth so the bonding wouldn’t chip. He assured me I wouldn’t even notice. What he actually filed was the natural point of my lower canine. As someone whose bottom teeth are very visible when I smile, this completely changed the look of my mouth. Because I also had canine substitution on the top, this left me with only one true canine in my entire mouth, making my smile asymmetrical.

The change was permanent, cosmetic, and made without fully explaining the long-term consequences. I wish I had been given all the information so I could make an informed choice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"lucinda starr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHXJK8C64UkoP3Qr76gI-r6zGYOgbcxAO7Nv9aa3PApUqhHw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Genius work. But was assured by Dr. Sal’s care and professionalism.

People who know about the work are stunned. People who don’t just see a beautiful smile.  I feel So confident about the health of my teeth and look of my face! Plus the office and staff are wonderful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"julie alfaro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwNNWPjOHYs0ItfJ4nzCMmINdTVVpux6lV3FXVDqV7nQLSyIN2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The quality of care and perfectionism by all staff members, can not be matched. [{"Name":"Michelle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIW-YjwS3QVjHvBkmNz-6GBkHDqktWFDVOcYxVrUQtSD_KKuw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I could not be happier with my results. I love Rochelle and the girls, they are very caring and worked so diligently for hours to remove every wrinkle and melasma spot on my face and neck.  I cannot believe my side by side before and after photos. My friends say I look like a walking Photoshop filter. 😀  The skin around my eyes is so much tighter that my eyes look bigger, my lip lines are gone, the wrinkles around my ears are gone. She was even able to remove a scar on my neck from a surgery I had a few years back. My husband says I looked like the girl he married 24 years ago. This has easily taken 10, possibly 15 years, off my face. I could not recommend Rochelle and the faries highly enough. I have done several CO2 laser and several Morpheus8 treatments in the past, and nothing has ever shown these type of results. It’s truly unbelievable. I can see why they call it a Fibroblast facelift.  Rochelle has been so amazing during my aftercare, checking in with me, being available for me, and doing extra little TLC treatments at no charge. She is very generous with her time and extremely talented.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQc6kbYLyBJr9QP4IUvzt9wOvwwNvxuO4i7ZVGOsmSxjM1_35ZY4pHts9oImRLC7ElPAbmg5sONGarcISaWL-koCjfQEZatjUAvXVeKRbWGMyBTCQdO71Lb489V53yoqArkMgtggnk2JoSF","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQiJFxswTNQKuuDEtAGtTskTgnjhSd-UVl1Sh3wJMz0R8GEjJjngu1TD4mClWA-_sLSiDy_CQwWnud4dH1O78UWyGbTSP8fuaWBHmT_5P_aJ3h6ICj-fo0Jtw2ZU8hpL7SXk9y3p94m68w","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERmkVZk8vWMCRLVcA3UhXh2poK6SkI9ZhAhEwd1GalDd4nlRGir75CT5mx4h-2JW__h1bR1b-y2K8_m_GHYfqttKmeGirENy92Awd5T0I90TTPz1JSYo_ixr2-0hd3IWS9bBehtT2Ve00LD","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETCdX9Oddchv8Y0P7VxLbO466HiYM2cPXFwZ_BsMfj3Ejd49U18ORdqneCLkcBYRJ-j1xAm_wt-TYZqiem12s7DGxsqQ0TjqOREcvcGqYAVn99fFnZpdI93ShTm3YPXRW9B-pqsS9n7-3zb","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERsvZ2atXJ8GfQqN-yBg5i_cPLOyDNuUT4xv_FCr-_Us_IYdvTFdhqdVLUjC8nCzoth_YYXF0Wr7jxwchBwGqwiMq-mfqZ7cZE9WIMFXdUhrw3-Lbx1mxvpozO04ghLIJG6XbhA5pmZaTAA"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Gera Stigler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjoUXE5GVSlgtL70YCsuxHNnz-Iv5bUB18hnGoRz7q_WbrHg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Where do I even begin? I am beyond happy with my results. I didn’t event want to smile anymore because my skin looked very wrinkly and dry and spotty.

I’ve actually done Fibroblast in the past and didn’t see great results and also my upper eyelids had little holes from the previous procedure, so I was hesitant at first. I found Rochelle on Google, gave her a call, and we were able to schedule my appointment right away.

I had my full face and neck done back in July, and I consistently get compliments on my skin. I have friends telling me I look 16! I’m 40 years old, and after having my daughter about three years ago, my skin really went downhill. It became extremely dry, very wrinkly, and I developed red spots that wouldn’t go away. I also had a lot of sun damage from my 20s—back when my friends and I used coconut oil to get a better tan instead of sunscreen.
After having my baby, I tried everything, but my skin just wasn’t cooperating. I also had under-eye filler done about six years ago. It looked good at first, but then it became lumpy. I had it dissolved, and afterward my under-eye area looked even more wrinkly. My skin was a complete mess until I met Rochelle. She fixed all my skin issues and even got rid of the little holes on my eyelids from the previous Fibroblast procedure that wasn’t done right. It really matters who you go to and the technique.

Rochelle thoroughly went over the procedure with me and got me scheduled right away. Since I did my entire face and neck, it was a full-day procedure, but for the incredible results you get, it was absolutely worth it. Rochelle and her assistants were so kind, and you can truly tell that Rochelle genuinely cares about her work and her clients. She uses different techniques and patterns to ensure every wrinkle is addressed and that your face looks symmetrical. That alone really impressed me.

I have never received so many compliments on my skin, and I’ve never felt this confident. After the procedure, Rochelle sent me home with a complete aftercare kit—from a visor to creams—along with a detailed day-by-day care plan. She checked in on me every single day, and I had to send daily photos. I felt completely comfortable and confident knowing I was in the hands of someone who truly knows what they’re doing and genuinely cares.

I can’t thank you enough, Rochelle, for the amazing work you’ve done. I have recommended you to literally everyone I know. I don’t want a bunch of unnatural procedures that change the way my face looks, and Fibroblast is the only treatment I’ve done where I’ve seen real results without altering my natural appearance.

The healing process does take time, but it is absolutely worth it—and worth every penny. Compared to how much I have spent in the past on skin procedures that only lasted a few months and barely did anything, Fibroblast is so worth the money, especially since it lasts for years.

My skin looks flawless. My pores are gone, the wrinkles are gone, the sun damage is gone, the melasma is gone. I honestly haven’t seen my skin look this good since I was in my 20s.
I absolutely love my results and would highly recommend Rochelle and her team to anyone looking for a natural alternative to all the unnatural treatments out there. I promise you will not regret it. The results are amazing.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQBDuLTBhEQnwQhJkmffOh7K_hoYrHAxujwuSaF145X725vIPkcHD9dqVy81NMr-fwvbmEWVMagimNCSMqbljKJ_Wo3HeRcwJZXfKTjSwp4R8aTbEeVdP0lBhT7S4U9VorEebla7fLgNu-e","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lES1MBjrLIHVMJCPez-5hHTZNS3XZByHiVHhRX9cKmqVuq2vToKAyhCthKtg9QUQDZV8vPwgg_q_ZVfmEiqvEKj-jrdIvB-Q6BFBp-FzZhenqpy3vougIZbjTRIEBrAW5io3O4RVgqnVktY2","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESUVD4zFdJt8CTqOgnlyDqCO49wIRM6H2-9S5btxGROVBNXkQMBW6nJiGeKXqCY1oL3V3BUmZajgdX_-A6eT8OTgGnyxIr6Ea_M0uRoH0KeIqSnItju01umQrN63XVa7p9bRT5k5z9hDXxb","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETE6im4JTsndkJ2rVL3DXLhx_XMR6bTdoftoErmfLnsqzlU6E4vwSKwF3PjZlMRZRCsQqgLjweCKFk_EXApajuVjsD0qUixG6tOO8O08qg5KMTqQJCmkvNKNV0wRvxY0a9uiwyh6ZmMkzc9","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETdahgnjX8Ok-MpQZTumnMlZE_X6M5JjMnVpEqVexW8lsESFMS1IOYLfDGJBp5nVPpOTeaSr-wOG61qqxwCr8co3L8wrjkDbsH9AcpOtq_oWf9OeA_b7cHDeZArIPfK4NvaQPBtm1ndsqD6","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERbHvM6ychRo_poXbYeNRLdl1ZGLrPXQ2fAShd6NOiXzC6-ltmSZqhYSlZ6_5ZgArky8ha2JFZNoYPAoyy-tyYyCXF3kpMyynM38B0WiGMHUxs6g9sVVSqD-QsGoEckl6NDmaBeWgtZNDE","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERBcv5Imc8Ivc1UWoCcC5LvnunJfSM93s39HMmApuhGsGRrFZsSJcyhP8eXSNMS12tx08w7ou7OUKX1HQ3Xq4HX2wnQ7RgY3CW-7JuMY8xvZgJddCoGq1B64OtWKEY8oqAp3HLUiOL1IjSy","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQ9WCOWtSe-REMiPa-xgOEv2ELioZCotELeWizoszCow1tcjm5jIEU2vRbUtdZRcmv8fVFn6bwjw3h7oGJBx2fErq95GYZDVOFh6V2vf82i5D75ePF90Ps2mWM-O1FQcZtmZ0pDHD2ypyo","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETpX7N_tUV-NNLcjrQQ6mZArr_QBetjGFC-7lrz-H4sZRWLl9_VVtI8eINAWupxkldnoBCRQ_kxpw5YSsDCz6TYGqqWjxW_xO8KOSto7gOi03OKfvP4CFVP8bwsPel3Gh9Fpb0dAgg5e1g","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETlVy9NmS-vnssqoN65RBlG-qtP6TXu1iDk37txHTh-hO8hrJ1T3_xVUsShBAhxOfJC691byIKkvIpwvTDTFT7ZPZIW_GSGWCdDc_Jw637AHpNpn0gHc3Fqhrx9Apkw1vgMiYUuHCrbaGU5"],"When":"2026-1-9"},{"Name":"Jacqui Paris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLeUa-EvT1xR1dAfXwfFHsEeoFNBzG8LWHj46RG8Y2xASb_Hw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the beginning Rochelle has been transparent, insightful, pragmatic yet absolutely kind. My mom (73 y/o) and I decided to partake in this adventure together. From our initial 3-way phone consult which included photo examples and pricing with different pay options, to the first day in studio nervously seated for (before) photos, to our time in her chair, Rochelle (and her lovely team: Alexis, Auri, and Jackie) have been so supportive and inspiring. Each of the ladies were able to empathize with the struggles we women all face at one point or another; openly sharing their experiences, feelings and successes with Fibroblast treatment.
Since my early 20s I’ve struggled with acne, always yearning to be one of those beauties who doesn’t NEED makeup to feel good about my appearance. After my one-and-done Fibroblast treatment, I am able to see and feel the results I never thought were possible. I am 46 years old and can no longer easily  locate the scars on my face! It’s like I’m walking around with a filter on, but it’s MY OWN smooth, supple, glowing skin!
Rochelle and her team have literally washed away 10-15 years of wrinkles, scarring and hyperpigmentation. The jowls that come with our Fabulous Forties - GONE! The large pores resulting from years of makeup use and ignorant skincare - GONE! Years of stress and wear working several jobs as a single mother - GONE! I am finally prioritizing self-love and daily self-care. I am so grateful to these ladies for providing a much
-needed, affordable, supportive and successful service that I wasn’t even aware existed less than a year ago.
My 13 y/o daughter comments multiple times a week how pretty I am, and I absolutely feel it!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQpAwXqBbWN846idyJCYImzaFK992HEXSi6zc9TmVeyXYwWfqVdNriP8BA11oKltx9cZf4o_hJHXNTPv7ssZN1HMW06ngu33RUm6iHgNKSQDVgDa0ZQptjy4NYLpFXgWqGT-rjANW7pOaGX"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Dianna Menard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjJePUe9crXFMdZak_Z4RIaB0iQD3DysSWmU2w6sdvdQ-BLn4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I began my journey with Rochelle about 3 years ago and she has single handedly changed my life for the better after only one treatment. I was a very insecure woman with terrible scars from teenage into adult acne my whole life. I’m 36 now so I was also having early signs of aging due to smoking for 15 years prior and since I’d quit and received some money I decided to try and turn my life around from not being able to look in the mirror to walking out confidently every single day without makeup that’s exactly what happened! Rochelle changed my whole life around and if it weren’t for her I might not have made it through the darkest days of insecurities getting the best of me. I even got a nose job which needed correction due to asymmetry issues and she fixed that too!! I will never recommend anyone to go anywhere else for any other treatment because fibroblast does it all you just need an artist like her to do it perfectly. Everyday people think I’m in my early 20s and compliment me on my features, I have never known this kind of confidence! She is forever my angel and skin fairy and I couldn’t be more grateful!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQSvxR_IUZ9MK1L1zEO0xvBDx9IzmCE8913Dmdr6D-7DP27OIO0gFLsdWbdtIuYGteO1cOamqRQjfzrPtJj13LT8yJ4FONMVJfelrJ4chE3QOJPjAj3c8opNY7UbVoO2fPj_RrHMNPAbgI","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEShX3RsBqiWmXVPwQ6GaC0u2fkst7brdmuyTNcoF5iN1lM-n3PKX3iLzyC8aeTXxZYRgHqngNN6WAbhvXyWZxSTlrd62yBM33vT7z2TX2vc8ZF1O_gCK1TsuHTtkRVS5mhkZSbh7YtUHcKO"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Kate G.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMbkI71Ylabx2f224P9brMuCUOVRt9Vho8pi4Y7-zW7gHw29M=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The results have been amazing from my cool jet series and fibroblast full face. I had 11s, lines around my lips and eyes forming (I am 37 and post 2 kids) and just was feeling like I needed to feel fresh and didn't want to do fillers or botox. I have a friend that said that she has been getting Botox since her 20s and her skin looks still so much older than mine somehow. Everyone tells me I look like I did in my 20s. I definitely think fibroblast can wind back the clock 5-10 years!

If you have a low pain tolerance let Rochelle know in advance so she can offer additional pain alleviation or bring in extra hands because I did find the experience painful and was appreciative that there was extra help to try and move things along much faster. Healing took about 12 days for all scabbing to fall off my face so I would recommend planning to hole up for at least a full week. No gain and it's definitely true for this - but honestly the payoff was worth it and I love that is a natural option.

I look even hotter now!! Thanks Rochelle and co <3","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"T M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJoAZfpi-rSGxWMRRqbhD0JuklJkqDnWES_oTmhfgZXPEbaJw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found Rochelle on YouTube and was fascinated by the results so much that after a consultation I ended up booking.
