I will continue to recommend her to everyone :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lori B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLN6wcOkTG83kunRWEJtbOR2ZlW5Kil-ZdU1k-TRj9l8QQwbw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience with Dr. Emma Ryan. She immediately makes you feel comfortable and at ease because she is such a warm and kind person. Dr. Ryan is very patient and thorough when addressing any questions or concerns you may have. I underwent a lower dermolipectomy and liposuction on my lower and upper abdomen, and I'm so happy with the results. She is a highly professional and skillful surgeon, and her follow-up care is amazing. I also would like to share how great Paulina was with my lymphatic drainage massages. I would definitely recommend Inland Cosmetic Surgery to my family and friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pierre J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWt5KehBdyjSVkZWhXzQ8X1oPRdkVnguM0D3QDW4x7mQEZTXT40=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I initially visited the office with the intention of exploring surgical options for reducing abdominal fat. I understand that there is a initial consultation fee of $250. Dr. Ryan provided excellent care and addressed all my inquiries. During the consultation, I was presented with the option of receiving semaglutide injections, which I ultimately chose. The dosage started at a low level for the first 4 weeks, during which I did not notice any significant changes. It was explained that the dosage and cost would increase after this initial period, which I agreed to without any issues.

The process of receiving injections involves weekly visits where measurements and vitals are taken. I was unsure why measurements were taken with clothing on, as it may not accurately reflect progress.

During my last appointment, I arrived on time for an 8:30am which I asked for due to a prior engagement, but encountered a delay due to a staff meeting that was scheduled that morning by their manager. This caused frustration as there was no one available to check me in or take my vitals promptly where I waited for almost 45 minutes. When I was finally checked in I discussed my concerns with one of the Dr’s and manager. Once I received my dose, I went back to reception to schedule another appointment for the following week and pay the next 4 weeks of my dosage, it was revealed that there would be an additional $250 consultation fee for each dosage increase, which was not communicated to me beforehand. Despite the unexpected fee, I proceeded with payment of $750.00. Keep in mind it would have been $500.00. Prior to this incident I encountered another issue with the manager which I won’t discuss here.

Reflecting on my experiences, I have decided to discontinue my future appointments at Inland Cosmetic Surgery Center. This decision was based on the lack of professionalism I encountered, despite the excellent care provided by the medical team and especially Sabrina whom showed great care and was friendly during each visit. It is regrettable that such issues led to the loss of a potential client and the option for surgery in the future.

Upon reviewing the feedback section on the company website, I noticed that my review, which did not receive a perfect score, was not displayed. This observation raises concerns about the transparency of the review process and the possibility that only five-star reviews are being showcased. I encourage you to assess the situation and come to your own conclusions.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Dulce McMillon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLstHdMCLSDpnzSVR81q3yo-gcFhg0qYIz8BdP3V1LIHaSL02q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you Dr. Kim and her wonderful staff for a great experience! From the moment I walked in the entire staff was very welcoming and Dr. Kim was very thorough about what to expect during and after the surgery. I had an explant done 3 months ago and I’m very happy with the results. After receiving a lymphatic massage the therapist mentioned how well done the incisions were and how well I was healing. Having surgery is always a little scary but Dr. Kim makes you feel safe and empowered with knowledge before taking the leap. So happy I did 🙏🏼","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amanda Walter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKWTtwwXAIyjEuiFnnY0-zbZcuuP1RRoEQKjwOAJ27nREqpng=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Yu & Team,

My journey started in November of 2024 when I called in and spoke to Nicki.
She was an absolute delight to speak with and was very helpful. My desire was to have my 20 year old implants removed and a breast lift done. Following our conversation, a consultation appointment was schedule with Dr. Yu. Thank you so very much Nicki!

Fatima, the beautiful receptionist who greets me in the Redlands office thank you for being so sweet and kind. You made my first visit very comforting. And til this day, your warm greeting is so pleasant. Thank you!

When I met with Dr. Yu I knew she was the one for me! I cannot express in words just how awesome she was with me (and still is)! She is very professional and calming. She is reassuring and patient; and answered all my questions thoughtfully. I knew in my heart moving forward in my journey was meant to be with her.

Sandra, thank you for being wonderful and taking the time to explain what to expect on surgery day, the medication list and all pre-op instructions. Thank you!

We began this journey of mine with the implant deflation; which was a procedure I didn’t even know existed until Dr. Yu explained it to me. What an experience! She removed the saline from my implants prior to surgery. This allowed me the opportunity to see my body without the volume of the implant, as well as, allowed my body to readjust prior to surgery. My surgery was scheduled. The removal of the empty implant shell and breast lift would be completed.

My surgery day arrived. I was absolutely ready and excited to have the procedure completed. I arrived at the surgery center and was greeted by my wonderful nurse, Trista who provided the utmost care and comfort to me. Thank you!
Then I met April, my anesthesiologist who was very thorough in explaining everything to me. Thank you!
I didn’t get to met Ervin, my doctor’s amazing scrub tech because I was under the sleepy care of my anesthesiologist but thank you and your hands. Thank you!

To all involved, my sincerest thank you to each and every one of you who were involved in my procedure. You are all truly an amazing team!

I am approximately 3 weeks post op and couldn’t be more satisfied with my results! Dr. Yu and her team are absolutely amazing! I would 100 percent recommend Dr. Yu and her team if you are considering any kind of plastic surgery!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tammy Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6kF93N8O0F-VPx54H9TwMEj5Bs7e1NvvNCNw7Lasv2PZwOac=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the most wonderful experience with Dr Kim and her staff. They are the most caring, understanding and professional people I have dealt with in a long time. Dr Kim was very attentive and listened to exactly want I wanted my final results to be and she crushed it. I’m thrilled with my results and can’t believe how easy my healing process has been. Explained that "this is not what we are about" and told me she would refund me in the form of a check and explained it would be ready in a few days. I contacted her on the 16th and was told the manager was out of town on vacation and my check was in a lock box and was not accessible and to call back on the 19th. I did. Was told it would be ready Tuesday the 24th but I could call back today (Monday). I was told today that it wouldn't be ready until "probably Wednesday." I'm clearly irritated at this point and demanded an exact date, to which I was told that it was conveniently ready and I could come pick it up.
But y'all, the best part is that the check was printed April 6th 2022. Probably just wanted me to remove my initial review and kept MY money as leverage. But in all honesty I wouldn't be surprised if the check bounced. This is by far the sketchiest experience I've ever had with any business.

I had to get a second surgery where his partner came and drained from the exact places I was complaining about the whole time. I would post pictures but I dont want to be traumatized again. Now 7 months later I need physical therapy do to the sores caused by the second surgery, Pain is still there, I can feel it in my bones. Had he took care of me when I first started complaining about the pain and fevers I would not have gotten the second surgery nor had an infection spread through my blood stream. [{"Name":"Stevanie Telaumbanua","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzo08V1PpJAUmrJd37v3G_HTom1EdfX70xRN9WHOgEze-eVDaR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a breast augmentation with dr. Grace Yu, MD and couldn’t be happier with my result.

From the very beginning, she made me feel confident, comfortable, and cared for. I am beyond grateful for her dedication and expertise, and I will always appreciate the beautiful work she has done. He has a way of making you feel at ease at all times.  He is very knowledgeable and always answered all of my questions, making sure I was well informed.  The doctor also communicated all of the options and the outcome expected.  He was also available anytime I had further questions.  I am thrilled with the results of my surgery.  This has been such an uplifting experience!  If you are looking for a plastic surgeon who really listens to your goals, explains each step clearly, along with being kind and compassionate, I would recommend Dr. Mohiuddin!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janet Paden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIdoYkO7oEcgQEgiTrtdg6SyY-kOIHmJ8LSq420l-Nz05TcAA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Yu is amazing!  From the very first consultation visit she made me feel very comfortable, making sure every question was answered, and asking many questions about what my goals were with the Breast Reduction Surgery.  Dr. Yu took the time to understand my goals and make sure I felt comfortable with the process.  She also made sure to inform me I should make sure I was getting a lot of protein both pre and post op for optimal healing.

The recovery went smoothly, and the results have exceeded my expectations — I feel lighter and more confident. The scars are healing beautifully and the overall shape and proportion look completely natural.

If you’re considering breast surgery, I highly recommend Dr. Yu .  She is a highly skilled surgeon and a truly kind and compassionate person. My only regret is that I didn’t do this sooner :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chloe Sheffield","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVr2AsRnbOEUSby5zpWjb3qaisNPYv2jGjWEYyGl3V6zUBacKc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wanted to write this review for two reasons: to express my gratitude for Dr. Kim and to share my experience with others who may be going through what I did.

During childbirth, I experienced a significant labial tear that was never sutured and therefore never healed properly. Prior to my procedure, I spent about two years researching and never came across anyone online who had experienced the same vertical split that I did, so I was unsure if a labiaplasty would even be successful given the circumstances.

From the first consultation to the final post-op check, Dr. Kim was phenomenal. She made me feel comfortable and cared for from start to finish.

As for the procedure itself, it was surprisingly quick and far easier than I expected.
Dr. Kim explained each step beforehand, answered all my questions, and checked in with me throughout the process so I always felt safe. The entire surgery was very precise and gentle. I went home the same day with clear instructions, and even the first night was much more manageable than I had feared.

Recovery was smooth with minimal pain, which I was incredibly relieved about.

I am now fully healed from the labiaplasty Dr. Kim performed back in December of 2023. Today, I feel completely back to normal, even better than before I gave birth to my son. Not in a dramatic way, but in an honest way: Dr. Kim truly changed my life.

If you are considering a labiaplasty, I would highly recommend her.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashley Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIEj1aI8oRZKD9LjCp2SpSztPUz58JHvVCTQzcpw0pwgtRj2Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. M is by far the best doctor EVER!!! I wouldn’t go anywhere else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnYhG8tf-gygABMgybzrixhLSVK2ub8DWRNB8oJ4TaOUFe7A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For years, I felt embarrassed each time I saw myself in a mirror.  After I turned 50, I finally decided it was worth it to take action and invest in myself in a way that would improve my self-confidence.  I am SO glad I did!  From my very first appointment with Dr. Yoonah Kim, I saw that she was kind, thoughtful, personable, respectful, knowledgeable, detail-oriented and gifted.  The results of my facelift and eyelid bleph are amazing, and I am so pleased!  I can't get over the difference in how I feel! Absolutely WORTH IT! I recommend anyone struggling with self-consciousness because of facial appearance to request a consult with Dr. Kim and go for it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aurora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISM_cFhpFWyDaCpALzMAzUJr_hs2XUkXu9cYZj_m2GD2UnNw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My entire experience with Dr. Yu and every other member of the staff was phenomenal. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Anita Escobedo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsJANoqVCtkXbKAXfP-vYLFTtlHmE30b-aBeY3N5RSp4KQ0g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately I am very disappointed in my breast lift results. I went to him to look better but left looking worse. Dr. Park claimed to be a specialist in breast reconstruction but clearly he was not. I got necrosis of the nipple which should never have happened, he left areola tissue behind in my vertical incision and the breasts bottomed out within one year.

When the surgery was over I woke up crying in pain and they didn't care, they also left me in a compression bra that was loose. I was surprised because I have had 2 surgeries before with other doctors in Newport beach and Beverly hills. There I was taken such good care of. But not this time. He charged me the same fee (17k) as a top notch place would but did not deliver the results he promised.

I feel he and his team were negligent in a number of ways. I spent many sleepless nights worried if I was going to lose a nipple, it was mentally traumatizing. I'm a little over a year out from the procedure and am searching for a doctor to correct the bad job he did. Do NOT choose him for this procedure. He lacks the artistry, the care and the precision you would hope for in a surgeon.

You will find that he has many review sites because he has so many bad ones. If you dig a little you will find them. Unfortunately I was too late and didn't do enough research before choosing him.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jeannette Page","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqGLxUhTNC60NnYwia6lYM9U409-OQwRnfj7M8HWrlATUUjuYC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Park and his whole office are amazing. I absolutely could not recommend them more!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deserie Sandoval","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVloBJPCbrwhf55JaH02e3Z9TfRAmqByfIL4lfQ3uYZLjcNxnRJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Was excited to get my breast done and went in and felt comfortable with dr Park
Once I got them done I was doing the massaging and everything he recommended
I always felt on one of my breast something wasn't right but since im not a doctor or ever had them done I wasn't 100% a few years after I went in and discussed that I felt one looked different then the other and he had let me know that I had capsular contracture and spoke with one of his assistance but whispering in a way
She came in and acted somewhat nervous so it made me think like ok weird I asked what they can do to fix it and she had said 8 grand or more when I didnt even pay that for both originally
And so I and asked them for my paper work/ agreement and terms sheet i signed and they said they had to go storage to get them
So I called back and nothing
This business obviously is all about money and not about their patients well being","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elisha Towles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRFMYiusa7IwkZYSWJQnLX29AvPUq1f-r79tq29qafP67d4dft=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After years of contemplating options on my own, I decided to consult with Dr. Park. He listened carefully and addressed every one of my concerns in my consultation and gave me all options available. I scheduled two procedures quickly and couldn't be happier with my results! I'm 6 weeks post-op and have recommended Dr. Park, Face N Body to several of my family and friends. I just had a doctor appointment yesterday and the doctor said I looked amazing! When I told her I had some procedures done, she was extremely impressed with the quality and care of the work done by Dr. Park! Thank you for giving me confidence and making the process so seamless!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"sheli tuzzolino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXiTdjm6Fi6e2SCgx5vZVw_apElB7el3iEe-C1Z_rVrhOwB-wWzBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Staff is friendly and helpful and available for all questions. I felt very comfortable there and would recommend Dr Parks for all procedures, he truly listens to what you want and does his best to provide that.
I am finally confident in a bathing suit and so happy with my results.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESbxaxVhIuWA4zkoScFpqu8yccPGhB2m9pl48hr1Xmj9MgOGtHzciehl9QeIzO_rnKs9kjf6mWIOHfuvE9lb-MQGpU6WvRzkc8p7GVUBS5rxSaArFKh-PnO9jvunTe4w2Gsu2pW"],"When":"2023-7-11"},{"Name":"Suzanne Blackmon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWful-tyjeKMvedMAHMZm6frqHO61odzvU3VRMnCl65MvoRYTGy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It has been 3 months since I had my breast implants removed with Dr Park and I am so happy with the results. Dr Park was not my surgeon when I had my breast augmentation 10 years ago, but  he was great at advising me on what the outcomes could be with different procedures. His honesty and the fact that he respected my choice to not get new implants is why I felt he was the right choice. He and his team are great and I felt comfortable the entire time.
Side note. In the ten years I had my implants I didn’t think that I had any signs of breast implant illness. After my surgery to remove implants I had night sweats for weeks, I know this wasn’t a reaction to anesthesia because I’ve never experienced that after any other surgery. I believe my body was detoxing because implants were out. I loved having my implants but honestly I don’t miss them. Dr Park did a great job with my procedure, gave me real expectations and I am happy with outcome.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amy Etienne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2mAE87iVi_KXg2JAHX5SwwsPmF-1S_291ccFBdC9_elD6PQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been a patient here for about three years now. Everyone is so patient, and caring through the entire process. No matter what you go to this office for, you will be taken care of!! Not all surgeons are miracle workers, Dr Park is. I have my dream body and I am so thankful for everything his office has done along the way. 10 out of 10!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandra Buffington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgYPke6qWQOJhB2OxcEcb-KR27MqO6YgV2Hpgw-6g7IUbictSYFw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I shopped around before my surgery for a about 3 months.

Thank you all for treating me to the best quality care I have ever experienced.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Norma Barton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKu3XlJ8NaF-T8kEPqpfETHxkxiFr9HA6FzYV26KUgtekAxSw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had my breast implants removed and a breast lift with the physician Bennett. She was so nice, polite, and thorough with so much information before my surgery. After I paid the deposit for my surgery, I should have known not to get my surgeries done with her. She gave me her number just in case I had any questions before and after my surgery. I had a couple of questions before my surgery and she was on it with responding to my text messages or calling me. After my surgery I called the office and it was on a Wednesday or\nThursday , when she has surgeries. Nobody told me to call physician Bennett if I had any concerns in the days of her surgery. I called the office because I had a concern in regards to my breasts hurting and to ask her if she could prescribe me another prescription. I figured I had an infection. The person I spoke to at the front told me to call her. I told her I didn’t want to out of courtesy because she was having to do surgeries on that day. I asked the person that I spoke at the front desk if she can relate the message to physician Bennett  and let her know that I was probably going to need more antibiotic because I thought I had an infection. Physician never called me. I called back like two days after. And that week they didn’t have anymore appointments for me to go see her until the following week. I went in the following week and I told one of her employees that I was upset because I never got a call back from the physician. I would definitely encourage anyone considering any plastic surgery to meet with him as he us a true artist.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Tinoosh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIvR1dM3lR7yb3nHnDIpkuUDaELlNhpG0umxbvScU72YX23CI4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"******Attention anyone considering cosmetic plastic surgery procedures*** You can finally relax and stop searching. Once you have meet Dr. Mowlavi you will understand immediately why that is the best choice you ever made.

Dr. Mowlavi was not first, last, or only surgeon I consulted. Nor was he the least expensive. But he was the one I chose & there was no other Dr I'm willing to trust my body to.

After many months of research, consultations, and researching several doctor’s backgrounds I chose Dr. Mowlavi to perform my procedures. I was very impressed with his experience, background, accreditations as well as the fact that he not only is the best in his field but other doctors actually come to him to learn how to perform the procedures Doc Mowlavi has perfected to patent-worthy results.

Right from the start this team surpasses any concept you have of professionalism and direct personal consideration. The staff knows what they are doing and work so well together. Kyle knows who you are and your special details without ever checking your chart. He will help you get scheduled and in to see the Doc pronto. This is a very organized practice. They respect your time as we patients always respect theirs.

Dr. Mowlavi was completely attentive to me and listened to my concerns and goals. He concentrated on me directly, listening and paying absolute attention without any distraction and provided his accomplished, knowledgeable feedback while we charted my course.

Dr. Mowlavi made me feel like I was his only patient although that is the furthest from the truth. He always stopped in every appointment I had to be sure I had no questions or concerns.

I have had other cosmetic procedures in the past (3x) and the Mowlavi Team’s detailed personal attention is unsurpassed & I never once have I EVER received this kind of POST-OP attention.

Dr. Mowlavi owns his own state of the art latest equipment and is able to perform his procedures at his own surgery center which is more advanced than any surgery center or hospital I have been to.

On that note, I know it can be overwhelming once you realize the cost of these procedures. But wait for it…..I have not told you about Claudia yet! OMG OMG OMG this woman is amazing. She handles the paperwork and is a wealth of knowledge when it comes to knowing a myriad of sources for you to arrange financing for your procedures. She will also go over personally explaining everything you need to know including things you never expected you would need to know (and send same home in writing for you to refer to later)…She provides the most detailed instructions for you to prepare in advance, what to expect, how to eat, what to do leading up to your surgery as well as what to do/expect/how to prepare for DAY OF as well as the days and weeks following your procedures.

Claudia blew me away in that she gave me SO SO much time and attention accommodating my frantically busy schedule. I really thought it would be impossible for me to find the time to figure out the financing and take the time for appointments and my procedures but Kyle and Claudia literally operated like my own personal assistants!!!!!

Once you have undergone your procedure they are not done with you yet. Dr. Mowlavi sees you the very next day following your procedure and Claudia will have already arranged for Teresa to reach out to you prior to your surgery to schedule your post-op therapeutic massages which are extremely important to acclimate your body and the sessions also allow for the medical team to closely monitor your healing during the recovery process (you can expect Dr. Mowlavi to check in on you during these sessions as well). You will know immediately you are in great hands with Teresa. She is certified in not only Massage Therapy but also Lymphedema Therapy and is gentle, kind, thoughtful, considerate (super beautiful) but firm and purposeful. Bar none, Teresa has the most AMAZING hands that will ever touch your body!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marya Carroll","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJPQTcsSUy6sXSJU9ynFWWptp6vkMQXd_6DwS4fD0cqvuc9SA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Mowlavi is amazing!!!!! After a triplet pregnancy plus 2 other single pregnancies  this mommy needed help with her breasts and tummy! After having consultations with 5 different well know surgeons in OC, my consultation with Dr. Mowlavi was a breath of fresh air! He listened and took his time explaining everything to me. My mommy makeover was what we decided on. We decided on a full tummy tuck as well as a breast lift and reduction. My breast reduction was tricky, due to the fact I only had one implant that was done 15 years ago.  Dr. Mowlavi was confident he would remove the implant and make both breasts the same size.   Natural look and something that would look proportioned to my body and Dr. Mowlavi was confident that he would do the best to fit what I wanted. The morning of surgery was also great! The surgical staff were very comforting and after surgery James was always available to answer our questions. The front office staff is very helpful and friendly on my followup visits.  My breast are still setting in and I already love them.  My tummy is so nice and flat, looking forward to wearing a bikini again after all these years. I have recommended Dr. Mowlavi to my family and friends already.
A huge thanks to Dr. Mowlavi for giving me my confidence back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A torres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSjFE60P1HS6ovdXhk_HSN7im7_-I1JPcj_5sjrQgFmLuQ8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at Dr. Mowlavi's office. James was very helpful in checking up on me and my needs post-surgery. Dr. Mowlavi himself was very knowledgeable and knew exactly what I needed without me even telling him. I knew he was the right doctor for me from RealSelf and Instagram -- both were very helpful in confirming Dr. Mowlavi was the surgeon for me. Claudia was also very helpful in helping me with the financial aspects of the surgery. Theresa's massages were also awesome! The wait times were also very reasonable, and recovery was faster than expected!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shannon Urieta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIC4WNcp3bZ6JnbME88VLwnbvrUCCOMuSFQFPUTFwC-lwb_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Mowlavi and his team are amazing. Tanielle is very accommodating when it comes to scheduling or rescheduling appointments, which I really appreciate. Overall, I feel confident in both the results I am seeing and the level of customer service they provide. I would absolutely recommend them!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jaz L.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSXKpmcH8StRjd6b9Cd6uwCqCnWnErQcKyHWcoSBmLdmCQsuvK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I did NOT have a good experience here! I've had laser tattoo removal on my eyebrows done before, but this was my first time trying this place. The girl that did my laser removal (Crystal) was not friendly and very rude. I've never been to a laser removal place that didn't offer the client an ice pack or a stress ball. They had that cold air blowing machine, but when I asked if they use any sort of numbing prior, she just said no and moved onto the laser removal process. I also think she used too high/strong of a wavelength setting because my eyebrows had a lot of bleeding and even appeared to have burns afterwards! I've had 4 laser removal sessions done BEFORE, at other places, and this has NEVER happened. Usually, my eyebrows would be pink and sensitive for a few hours after the removal session, but I never had this type of bleeding/burns/scabbing afterwards, that lasted for DAYS! It was so painful! I decided to try this place because it was more affordable, but after this experience, no thank you. I'd rather spend a couple more $$$ and get better service and results. Won't be coming back here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lyric","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKy8n7FDjcOJtspHW1XufJqlEJWDIeyLzP20CCW9dig74tqNSE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've now been here several times and SoCal Body Institute is great. :) It's only my second experience with a laser hair removal place, but it was really nice. The area is a bit sketchy, I won't lie, but the institute is secure, clean, and pleasant.

I will definitely be going back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leonardo Orona","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMdEOfUlD7Z31d5Q7HhbRlsWufiYsMlCn2dNO1cr05TAASyoPM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I went there because of bags and dark rings around my eyes. I made sure to let him know that my left eye had a bigger bag on it, then did my right eye.he  assured me  This would not be a problem. After the procedure, I now have a smaller bag under my left eye, and my right eye has no bag under it   Again, I still have the same problem I went in with.

Annalea","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Niti Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMKC1Kb-OlVkWAWosS6iKgKX4s7J0cK5F5GSj-nGhjW30Itv5pGw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Meticulous with detail. [{"Name":"Gladys Diaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVn1PrD9q2LTp_AYT5pKk1FW0X81opgfXERcRSZZ6l4fxCtklS8oQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Salcedo is truly an amazing plastic surgeon. From the very first consultation, he was kind, understanding, and completely honest about what to expect. He takes the time to listen to your concerns and makes you feel comfortable and confident in your decision.

My VASER lipo results look so natural, enhanced but never overdone. He has an incredible eye for detail and really focuses on sculpting in a way that complements your body naturally.

What stands out the most is that he genuinely cares about his patients. If there are ever any concerns or issues after your treatment, he makes sure to address them and will not stop until you are happy with your results. That level of commitment and integrity is rare.

I highly recommend Dr. Salcedo to anyone looking for natural and beautiful results with a surgeon who truly cares.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emily Eddins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmVPiinif4wg3xiDaxI_kdvu8dNYsg-d7MR5z4uvih5bgXdvKO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The entire experience here is amazing! After becoming a mom, I wanted to feel like me again—and he and his team made that possible. My mommy makeover results are absolutely beautiful. The scars are so smooth they’re almost invisible, and I finally feel confident and comfortable in my own body.

What truly sets them apart is the care. The post-operative support was incredible—kind, patient, and genuinely compassionate. I never felt alone during my recovery. This experience wasn’t just about surgery; it was about healing, confidence, and loving myself again. I am forever grateful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hillary O'Connell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK__QEcMNoPEe7uQgh-ibmDxZG9Yqru4gRRqL-66TYcBiDuGe6J=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an incredible experience with Dr. Salcedo and his team. I came in for a breast augmentation to downsize my previous implants, and from start to finish, the entire process was seamless. His staff is warm, attentive, and made me feel completely taken care of every step of the way.

My recovery was smooth, I healed beautifully, and I genuinely couldn’t be happier with my results. Dr. Salcedo listened to exactly what I wanted and delivered even better than I expected.

I absolutely love my outcome and would 10/10 recommend him to anyone considering surgery. Truly an exceptional experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tyrone Justice","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLN2whfm1wMtHeoVFH19NXtfovUl-Y0XgALc4En2pMHCgSswA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an amazing experience! My wife recently had her mommy makeover with Dr. Samuel Salcedo at The Plastics Doc, and we are beyond thrilled with everything about it. From the first consultation, Dr. Salcedo was outstanding, he listened carefully to our concerns, explained the entire process clearly and patiently, and made us both feel completely confident and cared for. His calm, professional demeanor really put us at ease.

The surgery went perfectly, and the results are incredible. She looks and feels like herself again, but even more confident and beautiful. Seeing her so happy has been the best part for me. Actually her boobs are the best part, she looks twenty again.
For the procedure, we appreciated that Dr. Salcedo only works with board-certified anesthesiologists, something not all docs do. We also loved the belly button design we chose for her tummy tuck, it turned out perfectly natural and flattering.

The entire staff was wonderful. They were kind, attentive, and always ready to help with any questions or concerns. They made the whole journey smooth and stress-free.

They have this secure app with protected before-and-after photos, and the best part was being able to message questions 24/7 and always get a quick, real human response. That was a huge comfort during those first few weeks post-op.
If you’re considering a mommy makeover, or some other thing, I can’t recommend Dr. Salcedo and his team highly enough. Exceptional surgeon, caring staff, and life-changing results. Thank you so much!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arija","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKucLuk3xnv18QqdfOQC2s2HuZymtLw9-fHDMuR_vSCyOaXfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing experience with Dr Salcedo! I got a breast augmentation back in October and Dr Salcedo made me feel so comfortable and at ease. I was very nervous but Dr Salcedo and his whole staff were amazing. I had very specific inspo photos that I wanted to look like and I couldn’t be happier with the results! He listened to everything I wanted and gave me the breast augmentation of my dreams!! I’m soooo incredibly happy and definitely recommend The Plastics Doc!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natalie marsillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVnVKC_5v8QpcVHtWLW4z6JjXWU_OuWW6Mw2AcITbOKpJVrBfw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had a brachioplasty with Dr. Salcedo and I could not be happier with both my experience and my results. From the very first consultation, Dr. Salcedo took the time to listen to my concerns, answer every question, and walk me through what to expect before, during, and after surgery. I never felt rushed or like “just another patient.”

Surgery day was smooth and comforting the entire team was kind, and reassuring.

Now that I’m further along in recovery, I’m so grateful I made this decision. My arms look amazing, my scars are healing beautifully, and I finally feel confident in ways I haven’t in years. If you’re considering brachioplasty or any cosmetic surgery, I truly cannot recommend Dr. Salcedo and their team enough!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"taylor settles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFHalFWVY8qzGX_NjRsmusTVExoG8rch7Zvpue1vWUuBjGrA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommend
Dr. Salcedo and the entire team were amazing from start to finish. Kind, professional, and truly caring. The surgery went perfectly, results exceeded my expectations, and recovery has been smooth and quick. Follow up care has been excellent. I felt supported every step of the way!
Came in with full intentions of getting an augmentation and a lift. After my 6 week post op we have decided that as of right now a lift is not needed. My breast have settled perfectly. I would most definitely be coming back for any further procedures needed in the future.

Thank you for everything!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Haley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLt7qe9Rkvza3k4Yoi_DTlvc2xzXNbh2Zy8W4cpjRxhSA-lSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"First off, Dr. Apodaca and all the staff in his office are extremely nice and welcoming. Over a year ago, I met with him for a breast reduction consultation. I was 20 years old at the time and wore a 32DD. My breasts were asymmetrical, pendulous, and looked very disproportionate on my 5'3\" frame. We discussed my desired cup size, which was an A/B. He informed me an A cup would be hard to accomplish but a B cup was a very reasonable and possible goal. I am a student so he worked with me on the price, which I really appreciated and contributed significantly to my choice of him performing the procedure. I scheduled my surgery and had the reduction done a few weeks later. Initially my breast were not as small as I had expected and the left side was boxy, but I was reassured that they would shrink down to a rounder B cup, C at the most, as the swelling went down. He also said that if I was still unhappy with them after they fully healed, he would perform a revision at a discounted price. It has been a year since my initial surgery and I wear a 32D. My left breast is still boxy and rubs on my sternum, causing irritation. Today, I went back and saw Dr. Apodaca for a one-year follow up to address my concerns. Unfortunately, he no longer performs surgery and is unable to do the revision himself. When I spoke with the office about possibly getting reimbursed for a portion of the procedure due to the fact that I now have to find a different plastic surgeon who certainly is not going to perform a revision at a discounted rate, they said that Dr. Apodaca would do no such thing as he did everything he promised. I understand that healing is unpredictable but I would not have gotten the procedure done had it been expressed that I would only be one cup size smaller. Disappointed with the outcome of my procedure and how my concerns have been addressed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rocio Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwcvx6T-tfSuDy06iUGNrT8i8N9BphCUJmqCCKAK4lp9rUcA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I LOVE this place. Got lucky with a same day appointment for lip fillers. Judy was amazing and very friendly, once I walked in she knew who I was and was quick to help. She was super sweet as well and the other lady (who I didn’t get her name) but she was very lovely too. She was the one who assisted the doctor in injecting my fillers. I didn’t get doctor’s name, but he was great, made the process quick and as painless as possible. Not to mention my lips look so damn GOOD 😭 I don’t usually leave reviews but I found this place that was cheap and affordable, left my lips looking amazing, and on top of that had great service. The doctor Kim will never show up and never do his job he hides behind a phone and tells the receptionist to answer the clients. My hand didn’t heal right because they refused to give me a new splint. None of their staff know how to read and see that I am 30 they thought I was 18! They will allow you to go through worse things to take advantage of your insurance and wallet!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETQ8OG2GyAtzlRxJflc8RoKZ7ZuNipjGKpm_xX4gKtwD_9J6kF3O4FsPzPqwE-KYx7WZbnHfgTuxyhz4-wj5NF9nV_zGaOAmHAcUba80cYpaHaYBP5dCgIoeiSx-U1bFDVaNYrP5rPoCY9N"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"nilcri massey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGdcUnUdDE1lKU3C1jgBSzv-nBXRS5qSKVzmd6D-xsATYjnkt6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Subject: Concern Regarding Surgery Cancellation Refund Process and Unprofessional Interaction

Dear Loma Linda University Medical Center Leadership,

I am writing as a deeply concerned and disappointed patient family member regarding the handling of my husband’s surgery cancellation and refund request, and an interaction we had with your staff that I feel needs to be brought to your attention.

On June 12, 2025, I sent an email to Jonevan Galvan, the surgery scheduler in the Plastic Surgery Department, to follow up on my husband’s refund. My husband was scheduled for another procedure, but after his previous surgery where he experienced a life-threatening blood clot, we made the difficult decision to cancel any further surgeries. As his wife, I will not risk his life again, and I trust you understand the gravity of that decision.

Jonevan provided a billing department phone number in her email, which I called immediately—with my husband present as a witness—only to be told there was no pending refund in their system. This was deeply frustrating, as we’ve been waiting for weeks after notifying your department of the cancellation.

In my email, I expressed that I was disappointed—not with Jonevan personally, but with the overall delay and lack of clarity regarding the refund process. To my surprise and concern, Jonevan later called my husband and told him she was offended by my message. I want to be clear: my disappointment was not directed at her as an individual, but at the lack of communication and the burden this situation has placed on our family.

We are already under significant emotional and financial stress following my husband’s serious post-surgical complications. To be met with defensiveness instead of empathy is disheartening. What we need is transparency, timely action, and compassion—values I believe Loma Linda stands for.

I hope this message reaches someone who can review our case and assist with resolving this matter swiftly and professionally. My only goal is to ensure no other patient or family member goes through this kind of experience.

Sincerely,
Mr Michael Massey and MrsNilcri Massey","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Curtis Anderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocInvqtAtswUXHXIAXrZalif_-ynVxBHTbJMqTipaI7Ny5M3FA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you don't mind waiting over an hour after your appointment, then this is the place for you. To my understanding, sometimes the doctor needs to rush over to the ER to handle special needs emergencies. That's fine, but the admin needs to communicate with their patients that their appointment may be delayed for this reason. Instead, they act like they could less if you're there or not and don't apologize whatsoever.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joe Tate","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5QRX-Zfoj87LVphD3M8HKO-K1hbQdHMSMbG6XyBCdfuoDQN8d=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Holzmer and the whole staff at The Plastic Surgeons of Loma Linda University are amazing.
From start to finish I felt like I was in the hands of  real pros.

Anyone who is considering this place, and this Dr., look no further, you are in good hands.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deep thought Deep breath","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRvVUrNixCyqxxdqJLHdSIgUfw-o7mB4raWhRw9OoD1iKTzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Big Will!!!!!! [{"Name":"Jenny Lozano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITK0re2w_F3sTVVaD4f39wvmqH_-o-1F9ktjAnJrEPHFzDpw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was a little nervous and didn't know what to expect. Nancy explained every step and made me feel comfortable. I loved how gentle she was and she made me feel like I was a celebrity. My skin has never felt so soft and looked radiant. Everyone should have a facial it makes you feel good and you can't wait to go back for more.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tammy kruzick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJnggOmXObcb_LIuu7crVzw3v9aMiAtGo552lq_-skQf0Q7Igv=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is my story and I’m only sharing because I hope I can help someone else . One month after getting my Allergan textured implants (which ended up getting recalled in 2019) but Dr. Mosier told me he didn't have to tell me ) so 12 years ago they were put in and within one month i had joint pain, inflammation, rash and some other symptoms that came and went away. This was my second set of breast implants with him the first were saline and i never had problems so i wasn’t thinking it was the implants. The joint pain would come and go over the years but go away for months at a time but got stronger over this last year. I was told i had Rheumatoid Arthritis 1 year after implants were put in but like many of my coworkers and friends some with implants some without it seemed we were all being diagnosed with some sort of autoimmune. Over the last 12 months everything got worse i would get rashes around my chest, hair loss, dry scalp, eye discharge, sob, anxiety, inflammation, and more  I of course went to doctors and was always told different things. I am 53 so menopause seems to work for everything. I am an RN so nothing was adding up. After I learned about BII on fb and instagrams and listening to literally hundreds of stories i knew so i decided to take a chance and I am 10 days post explant and the morning i woke up from my surgery it was all gone, i could finally breathe without the weight on my chest and no joint pain. I had 15 symptoms of BII and they are all gone. I have nothing against breast implants but i do have a problem with recalled breast implants that your Doc won't tell you about. Now 3 years after this (Sept 2025) Kara with Aestheticare just text me and told me these implants cause BIA-ALCL a rare form of lymphoma and to give them a call. This is morally wrong. I went to Dr. Newman in Murrieta who is amazing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nancy Guerrero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0MdgmHnqnbWUyJKM0jB7tK-cQWethEV0XYwUJk1mgZM_Bn48=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is my second surgery with Dr. Moser. First time was for breast augmentation. This time for breast lift with implant revision. The staff were all very sweet especially Shelley , the anesthesiologist. Dr Moser was great. Explained everything in detail pre-operative and again right before surgery. I'm very happy with my experience at Aestheticare.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"leah bolosan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhfAiwPAV-gEPSn18MpzthdFsI2hRGudKEQ2nlgNnlFnu2J0CN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Moser and the team over at the office in San Juan Capistrano are absolutely wonderful. I have had 2 surgeries at Aestheticare. Dr. Moser is very polite and helpful about making sure you are comfortable. His honesty really helped me make different decisions about what I wanted. I have no problem going back to him for future procedures. Very fast and efficient. Knowing that him and his team have my best interest is very important! I highly recommend his services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxazyErvQLx2kxBBH6JWJX9LwdefifAruXdM8UIl5pDRh-gYo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Moser is a really pleasant guy who genuinely cares about his patients. I was nervous about my procedure (implant removal and cleaning out of silicone and new implants).  Results are amazing and the post op care has been great. Highly recommend him. Awesome caring staff too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Coach Cloake","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9_9TD5Z-8IKKBwriCBHdqF37q1_78PTtbNbnPvfBD6NW6CCRl=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Moser performed liposuction on my love handles and upper and lower abs about a month ago. I have to say that I have been very impressed! First, his price was extremely reasonable, up to $2000 less than what I had been quoted elsewhere. Second, he did an excellent job. I am still "moderately" swollen (I'll have more complete results in 6-8 weeks) but am really pleased with the effort that he put in and can see the results shaping up. Even with the swelling my love handles are much improved and I can see a difference in the bulk in my lower abs. Best part is that he offers a lifetime warranty on the work he does, so even if I need a revision (and I don't think I will), I'd only have to pay for the anesthesiologist (if he was needed).

Dr. Moser is very professional, friendly and straightforward. I am really glad that I chose him!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dahlia Martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCjhIrDNvTlSaXjh1fO1oEU4T6wpaEPOmTPmGG5HpvJbUtsI4Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had surgery done with Dr. Moser in 2011 I had such a wonderful experience.
And now had surgery again 2020, and he delivered.
I love his breast implants work. Very natural looking and I have several compliments","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kimberly Maaele","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0WHJN_zl1u_9npdGpfWdGTToO_-6T16ABjbeq6kyhn4049Lg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Dr. Moser is rude, expensive, and his office smells like an old folks home. Procedure: Lower facelift and neck lift with full face Co2 laser. Nov 2025.

Dr Brian K Machida expertly turned back the clock twenty years and checked all four boxes of my search criteria:
Double board certified with a facial plastic surgery-only practice and decades of experience. ( Dr. M has performed over 6,000 cases.) Specializes in deep plane vertical technique via local anesthesia. Affordable pricing. Consistent stellar reviews.

The bonuses:
Dr Machida is exquisitely professional, caring, attentive, present, available, trustworthy, invites questions, is generous of spirit, and is a good teacher.

AND his helpful supportive team share his values. Bertha, Norma, and Sharon are delightful warm caring souls who guide and support at every step. Excellent clear printed home-care instructions. Terrific follow-up care.

I am beyond grateful to Dr Machida and the STC team for uplifting my appearance and boosting my mood. At age 74, for the past four years, I was sad daily whenever seeing my sagging face in a mirror or in a photo. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Tracy Hunter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsn6Cj-OzPh16PqIl_aUh6MdOoCzy_H17uc1RP73xU44TQo9UW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is my pleasure to submit my review for Dr. Carl Askren and his Team! I always look forward to my visits. I am a Bakersfield resident and I would not go anywhere  else! Every staff member I have met are exceptional! I’ve been a patient of Dr Askren’s for just over a year now and chose him based on two referrals and his 30 plus years of experience! He has an amazing bedside manner, and an unexpected gift of humor. He listened to my concerns and corrected my issues.  As a former breast cancer patient, he offered me options to correct my radiated breast that had not been  suggested before from my prior Plastic Surgeon. In the past year I have lost 85 pounds. He was able to use the loose skin under my arms to pull forward in an effort to remove  radiation burns from my right breast,  while doing a complete reconstruction of both breasts after my post cancer surgery of 2021. He is an amazing artist and a genius at what he does. Six months later I trusted him to give me a tummy tuck. I am now 4 weeks post op and I feel amazing. I still have a drain tube that he checks weekly. He gave me the waist that I asked for and he got rid of my belly and a C-section scar that I’ve had for so many years as a result of a  tubal pregnancy in my early 30s. He removed that  scar and gave me a flat tummy. I feel like a new woman at 69 years old. (It’s my new 49) I am retired and feel like my life just began! Thank you Dr Askren for making me so happy!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JL M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCM4ruWHR9dzBglRZNe3YCPDtWuYGQFKhSjcqCwfPO8LG6XPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Zuniga is great! I appreciate a doctor that will go over the good outcomes and possible bad outcomes. I am one of those who like detail and that is what you get. All the team members have been friendly and professional.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"elaine baum","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqUaFVM9x-fsZp_PgjU0up2IxOruS8TXeNDaUUT6a0HuecVr9W=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I liked it thank the entire staff. Everybody is so nice and professional. My surgery went fantastic. It looks perfect. I’d like to thank the doctor. He knows who he is. You are fantastic and thank you from the bottom of my heart. I appreciate you, Elaine Baum.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Allen K.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRwEqX0BOiCL_dW1LCE8cIE4k61klFx1uyjj233_drYigsZrZ9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Zuniga is very knowledgeable and caring surgeon. He spend enough time with his patients during each visit and he makes sure to answer all the questions patient may have. His office staff are very nice, professional and welcoming. They deserve 6 stars!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Serena Thomason","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_I_zyROF7WMDjgCcOou--B2yLKW7ZSepAwh24WdQCjtMsmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I paid for 150$ For an Estimate waited too months  for the appointment When I finally had it, they never gave me my estimate paper work or a price A. I’ve been calling for the last month. No one gets back to you. I don’t know if they’re being discriminated based on the way I look. But at this point, this is ridiculous and I have to leave a review and drive over there just to get my estimate I paid for it","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Salazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVO76ZvqcYL6WWLCW4PE7CEFOId5gc-gQeb8gS3XZTSukfTy0Re=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had my explant w/ Dr. Stephen Zuniga. He was polite, to the point. He didn't try to sell me on unnecessary surgery, lifts, or fat transfers. I just wanted my implants out. Now I'm healthy, light, and feeling great. My results are fantastic, my body really bounced back after having 400cc silicone, under muscle for 16+ years. The surgery went without a hitch. Excellent doctor, suport staff, and facilities. Highly recommend. 10 out of 10!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Debbie Engel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLwLIKDE4O35_98k_ez-ZsQ0y7kvJKqhlFeWc4yD_Q-Ws0UjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Always a great experience.  Friendly staff.  Dr Askren is very caring and does amazing work!  He is good about explaining everything.  I feel well taken care of and would recommend to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"XXMISSY","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPQGGr6OGVTVlLy3X1q0ZHNqIQKDIw-KcRk7CntfWAFvnb1Osz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had my breast reduction  in may of 2021. Im almost 8 months post op today.\nThe entire process with dr Zuniga and his staff was amazing. Everyone throughout this entire experience was so kind. Every single appointment was great. My appointments had to be rescheduled a few times but we were right in the beginning of the pandemic so I totally understood. The ladies at the front desk always called to keep me in loop and let me know of my upcoming appointment date. I really appreciated that. I thought I would have to wait a long time for my consultation because of the pandemic but before I knew it my surgery was scheduled faster than I could’ve imagined. Dr. Zuniga listened to everything I had to say. He answered every question and he was also very realistic about my results. I had concerns with possible scarring on African American skin. My healing has been amazing. I feel amazing. My breast look amazing. This was the best decision I could every make for myself and in choosing the Aesthetic plastic surgery pavilion. Dr. Zuniga truly changed my life. I hope to return for a tummy tuck very soon !! Thank you Dr. Zuniga and thank you to your amazing staff I am forever grateful!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nicole Z.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5ZkJFgaPIHFeLh783eGfjGfGkxZTF9_w47oE9cRIv9qT80Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have moved a lot during my life so I have experienced many Drs offices. This was one of the worst.
The person at the front desk was one of the most unwelcoming people I have ever met, and she was like that with every patient I saw her with. She constantly seemed like everyone was inconveniencing her. The PA was friendly and nice.
The Dr I had my appointment with was nice too but it seemed like she was being chased, the way she rushed through the appointment. I came for a full skin check up and she didn’t even look at my whole body.
I had to have something removed. She gave me no options at to what could be done, it was so fast while 3 people stared at that fairly intimate spot. I was never asked if I was ok with not just her but someone shadowing her and her male PA being in the room while I was only in my underwear. There were other things she barely looked at and just rushed through. Really disappointed after this appointment.
When I asked the front desk for a list of pricing for the esthetician (cause I was told to ask), she said I can only schedule an appointment for $75 with her to discuss it. To get a list of pricing!?

Can absolutely not recommend this place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Allene Henderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMWkBmgJd_QyeXeZj40nkhKS4rJ-erIxKViy1bx6SU-5OyI7c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible, horrible experience.
It took 8 months to schedule a skin cancer screening appointment because they kept canceling my appointments due to staff change and whatnot.
I drove over an hour get to San Jose and by the time I was able to get to the appointment the doctor took 5 minutes to scan my body. Making irrelevant jokes and conversation while “scanning” my body. It felt extremely rushed and like he barely looked at my skin. I had to ask questions as he was trying to leave the room to bring up marks and areas of concern.
He told me I didn’t need to do body checks at this age even though I’m 32 and skin cancer runs in my family. Saying that I didn’t need to do another body scan in at least 2 years and that even that’s not necessary. I don’t think this is right.
I felt completely disregarded, uncared for.
To make matters worse, I got slapped with a $600 bill because the appointment got rescheduled so many times that my insurance changed at the end and wasn’t even covered by them anymore. Total scam.
I recommend going somewhere else where doctors don’t rush to see you and treat you more professionally.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandra Sheppard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVXSfqU_wSiaoq_ToAW7IH-hDX7IMpbUn7Ni7YnmvCsRe8wQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The front desk person who checked me in was not welcoming. She asked my name and for my cards but never looked at me. I watched her do this with everyone she checked in. When giving me the iPad to fill out forms she just assumed I would know how to use it and it glitched but I chose to ask someone else for help.
The nurse and Joe Gorelick were wonderful! The nurse was friendly while asking me questions and informative as to wound care. Joe was also friendly and efficient. I would have liked to have him explain what he was doing as I was surprised when he gave me the numbing shot and wasn’t sure what he was doing to the thing on my back! I will see Joe again in a month.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Familia BurrolaGomez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4zjJLf2UF607VA2OUfdbUPXwjwooHf9ro4K05GzDySDrZ78M=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My wife and I had a very disappointing experience at this location. We waited over a month for our appointment, only to be told upon arrival (15 minutes early) that they had overbooked and we could not be seen by the doctor we had specifically scheduled with.

After explaining that we both had taken time off work (non-PTO) for this visit, they eventually spoke with the doctor and told us we could be seen at 10:00 AM—1 hour and 15 minutes after we arrived. In reality, we were finally seen 2 hours after our original appointment time.

To make things worse, while our insurance was billed $600 each (a total of $1,200), we were only with the doctor for about 15 minutes total—together. Our final out-of-pocket balance was $36 each, but the overall billed amount reflects how overvalued and inefficient the experience was. At that rate, the office effectively charges $80 per minute—easily 50 times what an average tech worker in the Bay Area earns per minute.

The doctor herself was professional, accurate, and apologetic—the issue was clearly not her fault, but rather poor management and disorganized scheduling practices. When we asked to speak with a manager, no one ever showed up to explain or apologize. The front desk staff even mentioned that their online appointment system “is messed up.”

Additionally, the exam rooms are very small and located in an old Los Gatos building, making the space feel cramped and claustrophobic, which only added to the discomfort of an already frustrating visit.

Overall, this location feels overrated, disorganized, and poorly managed. The doctor deserves better support staff—and patients deserve a more respectful, transparent, and professionally managed experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Venessa Gilbride","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJPYgwvyOIyH-VisxN_I0F4N0ay2r11THlxpdCIO_K6QreRMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"When you call, you speak to AI agents. I had a simple question about pricing and a consultation and was transferred to a person who likely works in another country and could not answer my questions. They were going to transfer me again.

I decided to call another practice in town and spoke to a lovely human who answered everything clearly. I am now booked for my procedure with their office.

Sorry, but when it comes to medical care, even elective procedures, speaking to a real person who actually works inside the office is still the level of service I expect. I am so sad the Skin Institute is no longer. I was a patient there for many years.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ronald Duette","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLVnQ3M7tPlzwIHhRKCmJqWtbtbHkjzeNAioW5_0M1fEDuGyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On my very 1st visit to this dermatology office my primary doctors staff referred me to Dr Morales, I must say this young lady & her assistant impressed me so well, I had to tell one of my friends in Los Gatos that they need to come to this dermatologist as they can over afford their bill, I have her my only card I had, she said she is definitely coming I told her let me know how you like Dr Morales & for her to share the address to Dr Morales when they need a dermatologist & I told my youngest daughter of my experience as. I just want to say, Dr Morales & her assistant patti truly are tops in their fields of dermatology Dr Morales honesty was impeccable, Dr Morales, gave me even sample of exactly what I could use to help my situation & told me their are other treatments if the 1st don’t work . How ever I hope the 1st will work but aleady I know there is other things I can try only if needed, Dr Morales did not just jump to the the strongest solution 1st & her honesty alone was everything to me so good luck to beating this dermatologist & her assistant, Please keep winning young ladies. May God keep both of you in his hands for life .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Prateek Jain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYJ7UKmPLlo3kRDuzroqydw9eL-9bccd6WhpKPWRSHt5NWqrF_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I visited California Skin Institute in October 2023 for a routine issue. Nearly two years later, in October 2025, I suddenly received a bill for $30, which arrived only after the company was acquired.

When I contacted their billing department, I was told the delay was because my insurance supposedly took two years to process the claim, which I find very hard to believe. When I asked for documentation or any record of correspondence with the insurance company, I was told that it was not their responsibility to provide that information and that I would need to contact my insurance on my own.

This puts patients in a frustrating position, especially when the bill shows up years later with little explanation. If you go in for a routine visit, be aware that you may not get much follow-up care, but you might get a bill years down the line.

It also felt uncomfortable that their payment system repeatedly pushes bank account payments, along with an audio message discouraging credit card use by implying it won’t help with medical debt issues. The overall experience felt more focused on collections than patient care.

I would strongly recommend asking detailed billing questions upfront and keeping thorough records if you choose to visit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pernell Wint","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5GxYf9YvSB02RncK_KgLvjhdkHUkwQOysNLl6naFQ4oNck9CK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My visit in October was not a good experience. I felt very rushed and was not able to properly share the concerns for which I went. They seem to know it all and did not give me the space to say much. I was also prescribed something that did not help. I called back to get some assistance for follow up. I was promised a call back which I did not get. When I was leaving, I was told that there was no charge. Two months later, December, I got a bill collector company calling for me to pay a bill. I got a bill in the mail a day later. I called in the day after and paid it. I am very disappointed with this office for the service rendered.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"HJ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0IjskifzyyyUIFg2hJ10IOjqRh9t7Wja2RmaJsKxN1Gy_8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Kamakshi Zeidler is truly the best! I feel incredibly lucky and grateful to have her as my doctor. From my very first consultation through all of my follow-ups, she and her team have been absolutely amazing in guiding and caring for me throughout the entire journey.

Dr. Z really took the time to understand what I wanted from my tummy tuck, and the results exceeded my expectations. Her surgical skill is incredible. Thank you Sis!! xoxo","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paige W.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ5yPeWxUB2Z4fNfzdld0i5oNAub9x3ouBZBzDwzlBH7ZndQiM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I’ve had great experiences here in the past and would recommend Illuminate overall. However they’ve recently become much stricter on their policies and will turn you away if you’re nursing or have had dental work recently despite you giving informed consent. I was recently turned away at my appointment for Botox after I disclosed that I’m currently nursing, despite my consent to the procedure and having a plan in place to feed my child with other methods for the next week or two. Though how I choose to feed my child, of course, should be my own decision.

Given the litigious nature of healthcare in the US, I understand why some businesses take a conservative approach. I know some clinics will simply have the patient sign a waiver and offer more flexibility or a consult with a doctor, which I offered to do, but unfortunately they still turned me away.

Ultimately, I respect a clinic’s right to set their policies, but I also believe patients should be trusted to make informed decisions about their bodies—especially when the evidence doesn’t justify blanket restrictions.

I also want to note that this policy wasn’t clearly communicated in advance. It wasn’t mentioned during my good faith exam, despite me noting that I was on prenatal vitamins. It only came up after the nurse saw a photo of my baby on my phone background.

There is no conclusive evidence that Botox poses a risk to nursing infants, so it feels inappropriate to be telling women what they can or cannot do with their bodies. Again, I had a plan in place to feed my child for the next week or two with my freezer stash, and was being appropriately cautious about it. Just something to be aware of if you’re a new mom coming here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Archer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJl7oCmXqCPVFciU7xFvQEAQe-p04-RfNJHNMznoVqShekIBg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been going to Rachel for while now, and she is simply the BEST!  She's incredibly knowledgeable and detail-oriented in everything she does.  I also appreciate that she really strives for the most natural looking results - honestly have had complete strangers come up to me saying how nice my lips look (hydrated, plump, etc.) and not once has anyone assumed it's filler! She's very thorough and will spend extra time if needed ensuring that you are completely satisfied before leaving.  If there's a minor detail to find - she'll find it!  I appreciate the customer service she provides during my appointments as well - it's always so comfortable, inviting and fun!  Cannot recommend going to her enough!","Images":null,"When":""}]

After sending my logo for mock-ups, I was told it didn’t meet their standards, yet no effort was made to offer a proper solution. When I simplified the logo per their request, they turned around and tried to charge me again for what they called a “new” project—despite already paying $200 upfront for their services.

Instead of addressing the issues and making it right, they refused to adjust the designs without more fees. Worse, they have a strict no-refund policy, leaving me stuck with results I wasn’t happy with and no way to recoup my investment.

Any reputable company should prioritize customer satisfaction and be flexible enough to correct their mistakes without charging their clients extra. It’s clear that DR.HC Cosmetic Lab is more interested in taking your money than delivering quality results.

Dr. Liu and staff

Karina Rico","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diane Stember Richards","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFitISc9_m_6URlQ9UYdjSy26D02kM6VnLd26ROAuua8iPEeWZJg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t say enough about Dr Jerome Liu.

He is very scientific in his approach which was reassuring to me.

His communication throughout the whole process was incredible. He called me, himself, multiple times throughout the weeks leading up to the surgery.

I continue to be so impressed with his kindness, talent and bedside manner. I would urge anyone to go meet with him.

I am so happy with my results!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandra Tang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgEFN4LiY0h-KI2DC4JdD8_m3F_ho1sUERRrutio6HyZsvlWNj=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had two other consultations before seeing Dr. Liu and as discouraging as though appointments were, it showed me what I didn't want in a doctor and his office. [{"Name":"Ann H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6pgaUHNTH7oGxaQeqKraWel9l-J_AIM23-uZxRkFx6kbxUGk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This review is long overdue.

As I got older, I became more self-conscious and insecure about my double chin. It simply wouldn’t go away, even after losing weight following the birth of my child several years ago. After debating for a long time about what to do, I finally decided to start searching for a plastic surgeon in the Bay Area.

I consulted with four doctors in total, with Dr. Eric Li being the last. Unlike my previous consultations, which all felt rushed, Dr. Li took the time to truly listen, understand my concerns, and discuss my goals. He recommended submental liposuction, a minimally invasive procedure with little downtime. What really stood out was his unique suggestion to use the fat from under my chin and transfer it to my chin for better balance and definition, rather than opting for a chin implant, which I didn’t even think about when I started this journey.

The procedure went incredibly smoothly, and my recovery was complication-free. Now, three months post-op, I couldn’t be happier with my results. I feel more confident, happier, and like my old self again all thanks to Dr. Li.

I highly recommend Dr. Li if you’re looking for an extremely skilled surgeon in the Bay Area. He’s attentive, knowledgeable, and always striving to learn modern techniques so he can provide the most up-to-date care for his patients. The ladies in his office are amazing too! Kind, attentive, and incredibly helpful especially nurse Sunshine.

I will definitely be returning to Dr. Li and the CA Aesthetics team for any future cosmetic procedures.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwUdX_EIA78jKhlNJp2nn4xQz3SCD5dV_MCkSSNvQIV5DR8KU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of undergoing a procedure with Dr. Li, and I couldn't be happier with the entire experience. After obtaining quotes from three reputable plastic surgeons, I found Dr. Li's proposal to be the most comprehensive, and promising the best aesthetic results. His attention to detail and commitment to achieving excellence set him apart. I was impressed by the welcoming atmosphere of his practice and the professionalism of his staff. Communication with Dr. Li and his staff was excellent. Dr. Li himself was incredibly thorough in addressing my questions and concerns, ensuring I was well-prepared and comfortable with the process. The results exceeded my expectations, and I am absolutely thrilled with the outcome. Without a doubt, I would choose Dr. Li again for any future procedures.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"leanna vu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXdC-Ervb0VROLxpuILzdlr3_d0gqz6z1VvYTJBHwtCp3HJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"my friend's little sister got a breast augmentation from Dr. Li and told me she loved her doctor.

i only did one consult which was dr. li and immediately booked a surgical date. i didn't do any research beforehand and when it was close to the surgical date i was a little nervous; however, the results came out amazing! he did everything i wanted which was to make my breast look even, have natural results, and have a closer cleavage.

i'm about 6 weeks post opp and i get compliments from my friends all the time! they say it looks really natural and full, and how my breasts look like twins and not sisters.

overall, i have a really good experience with Dr. Li and will recommend him to all of my friends. the team is super accommodating and nice too","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Prabhjot Kaur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8uZIGBUeC0OoB2RxQkX0dyNYdnRj7oIN5Ak7CWAiSwk51Nck=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing microneedling experience with Nurse Cindy. She is incredibly professional, meticulous, and truly detail-oriented. From the very beginning to the end of the appointment, she made the entire experience feel seamless and comfortable.

Cindy took the time to make sure I was fully numb and at ease before starting, which I really appreciated. She explained each step thoroughly, answered all of my questions, and made me feel completely confident in her care. Her attention to detail and calm, reassuring presence really set her apart.

She also provided clear, thoughtful post-care instructions and made sure I understood exactly how to care for my skin and what to expect before my next session.
