The additional risks & ordeal of an extra procedure makes it really important to get everything thing right the FIRST TIME.

My first reconstruction was done by a surgeon who was competent, but ignored my requests for compact implants, giving me ones that were too large and heavy for my body frame. If I could do it over again, I would fight harder to obliterate all the obstacles that prevented me from having Dr. Li work on my initial reconstruction.

Dr. Li helped develop several workable options to replace, tighten & lift, to address my concerns. He also exercised good judgment to make additional improvements to enhance the aesthetics. I was very happy with the process and the results are good.

Dr. Li is a rare professional who possess the creativity & technical expertise that allow him to achieve superlative aesthetic standards.

I wish Dr. Li had done the 1st reconstruction.  There would have had been more material to deploy & the results could have been even better.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jacob A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK52ZdZT6Ou4_ix7p0rzXHYjG_DDQR6WwrjJtz2zsaQHlpIQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had great consultation experience with Dr. Li. I am looking forward to scheduling my procedures with CA Aesthetics!

I came in with TMJ pain, and she was able to help me relieve some of the symptoms. As it was my first time, we discussed being conservative with treatment to gauge progress. I look forward to booking with her again in hopes of finding more TMJ relief.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hannah Marie Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKY1MCDW2qgefF9HbuaRSVFh3iKQPs81EQ9OBtd_zQLHzqVqw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been a client at Illuminate Skin for about 2 years now. I’ve had the pleasure of being treated by Rachel Pavone dozens of times now. She’s done a variety of facial filler for me as well as my Botox and laser skin treatments. What I love about Rachel is how careful and intentional she is with her clients. She doesn’t fix a problem by recklessly putting endless amounts of filler in my face, she instead assesses me and creates a plan to give me the most natural yet effective results. I know that when I see her she’s going to come up with a game plan that not only fixes the problem temporarily but will give the most long lasting success. She’s suggested skin lasers such as BBL & Moxi lasering to fix concerns that I’ve had, and the results have been immaculate.

I’ve never had one single complaint about something Rachel has done for me, and like I mentioned I’ve seen her on many different occasions for a variety of different treatments. She truly is one of the most consistent aesthetic nurses out there and works with integrity.

Additionally the entire team, including reception, has always been the most kind and attentive. Kelly Setoguchi is also spectacular and has helped assess me for different treatments as well and I feel the utmost trust with her judgement too. I’m so happy to be a client of Illuminate and I look forward to continuing treatments with them!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joanna Thangaraj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNpcVIuilPTdf2vVWuv4brs6c0L2tOMnoNLMLGycxmA2nhSJuKug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lauryn is absolutely amazing! Illuminate blends the relaxation with science, which makes a truly special experience. Lauryn's warm smile and genuine passion for skin care puts me at ease. She delved into my skin's unique story, concerns, and desired outcome. Then, like an artist with a canvas, she crafted a personalized hydrafacial specifically for me.

Lauryn's expert hands worked their magic, transforming each step – cleansing, exfoliation, medical treatments, LED therapy, and repaired my damaged skin barrier.

The results? Illuminate is an understatement! My skin was noticeably brighter, smoother, and soothed – a healthy glow that outlasted the appointment itself. But the most significant change was deeper. My skin barrier, which had been previously compromised, felt stronger and healthier thanks to Lauryn's expertise.

Lauryn's magic goes beyond the immediate, though. She's a true skin whisperer! She doesn't just treat, she educates and empowers, sharing personalized product recommendations and tips tailored to my unique needs. Plus, she's always a message away for any questions or concerns, which is a rare and valuable thing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iman Mojadidi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKC4HWTWzCnm5Ct9oSsXUDjvqg2pOiaFxth-JyCKOB4hLzKEw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I don’t have the greatest skin so trust me when I say I’ve probably recieved hundreds of facials and have gone to countless aestheticians. Lauryn is so sweet, gentle with your skin, and actually takes her time with each step of the process. I live in Hayward and drive all the way to San Jose to see her so that says a lot. 10/10 recommend her to everyone I know who’s looking to take their skin to the next level!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Juan Bravo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPMuBI1csYksBEpyxBvh7vSGHYM5zFgwQx9srDaiMm-S0Livuy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I spent over a month researching and trying to find the right doctor to treat my gynecomastia. After narrowing it down, I chose Dr. Steven Bates at Reveal Plastic Surgery because everything I saw gave me confidence. My consultation went well, and the staff was friendly and welcoming. The surgery itself was successful, and for that I am grateful.

Unfortunately, my experience after surgery has been deeply disappointing.

My first post-op appointment was rescheduled by the office. I understood that things happen and didn’t think much of it. My second follow-up appointment was also rescheduled. Again, I tried to be patient.

The final follow-up was scheduled a full month in advance for December 29 2025. I never received a call or text to cancel or reschedule. I showed up to the office only to be told by the receptionist that the doctor was not in that day. No one had notified me.

As a patient who trusted this practice and invested my hard-earned money, that moment felt incredibly discouraging. Aftercare is just as important as the surgery itself. When communication stops and follow-ups fall through, it makes you feel unvalued and forgotten.

What concerns me even more is that since December, neither the front desk nor the doctor has reached out to reschedule or offer an apology. That lack of accountability and basic communication has left a lasting impression.

I went into this experience feeling hopeful and confident. I’m sharing this because post-surgical care and respect for patients’ time truly matter. I hope this feedback encourages improvements in how patients are treated after their procedures.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jackie Aguilar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKvZKeTmKnfHaM-qgvSgtQB95dBBsZUss5Hs7IQjInNX0AtRwJ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am 3 weeks s/p Breast Aug with Dr Bates, I am in love with my results and pleasantly surprised with how easy my recovery has been. Given what the service costs and the care I received, I cannot recommend this office.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I was very nervous, but Dr. Maan and his team took the time to answer all my questions and made me feel like a priority. My recovery was much faster than I anticipated, and I am absolutely thrilled with the results. If you are looking for a skilled surgeon with a kind bedside manner, look no further.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marcela Zamora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwTLgyoRPUPWgcWl5bkcGf5oMWGijZ1KLWTUwQTr4EkPKDfu_O0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Maan is a talented plastic surgeon; he is relatable, knowledgeable and detail oriented. He listens to your concerns, responds to questions in a manner one can comprehend by removing medical jargon. He's readily available and is caring as well as empathetic to your specific need and/or situation. The practice staff- Hahn and Audrey are sweethearts who problem solve in real time. They respond promptly when urgent matters arise. Together,  Dr. Maan, Hahn and Audrey make for an excellent team. I could not have asked for a better team!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Helen Alcantar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxGHDOyOPWie-xan8YOcIWWKvwbPB90iGJIuT4Hj3RK9V9yt8e=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"DR Maan is The Man!!!
My case was rather intricate but not for Dr Maan who has a determination that is seen in his work and demeanor. I am grateful our paths crossed and because of Dr Maan I wil have a better quality of life being able to breathe so much better and regardless of what he had to work with he still improved aesthetically which at this point seemed impossible to me!!! If Dr Maan could help me I know he can help you. My case was complete reconstruction over many Dr's past work I am truly happy and grateful! I highly recommend The Man DR Zeshaan Maan 💯","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leah Tovar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKYYOQXU01x2RG9_HK32w1-Kf_yVi6ubIJN6bMPnuuVFl5jpA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m now three months post-op from my Liposuction 360, fat transfer, and J- Plasma skin tightening, and I am genuinely thrilled with my results. From the very beginning, the process was smooth, professional, and reassuring. Dr.Maan explained everything clearly, answered all my questions, and made sure I felt confident every step of the way.

My results at this stage are better than I ever imagined—sculpted, natural, and exactly what I hoped for. The healing process matched what was explained to me, and the follow-up care has been exceptional. I feel so much more confident, and I’m incredibly grateful for the skill and attentiveness of Dr. Maan and his team. Highly recommend to anyone considering these procedures!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elinor Rivera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRNxCdjjCOUuNiA4jLOQqJhnpWSVWnIfiZvj1TOA2IhxavVm9-Vw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Maan is exceptionally attuned to making clients feel seen, safe, and respected. It is clear that his approach to working with people comes from a place of integrity, authenticity, and a passion for helping individuals feel like the best version of themselves. He possesses a remarkable ability in translating a patient's vision into precise, natural-looking results that enhance inherent beauty.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJus0s_vy2ZseYlz14seE49lRfCGKXkj0NIOuV5hWZdUQamJA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I did a revision rhinoplasty with Dr Mann. I had surgery before with an ENT doctor who didn't completely get the job done right. I still had a bit of a deviated septum and I wasn't able to  breath 100% through one nostril. I also didn't like how one side of my nose now looked larger than the other side. So I came across Dr. Mann and finally made the decision to try again with getting this done correctly. It's now almost 6 months since I had my surgery and I'm feeling alot better. Dr Mann was able to fully correct the septum and also center my nose. I am still healing, but that's just the process for any rhinoplasty especially when it's a revision. I am happy I made this decision. I wish I would've just came to Dr. Mann and had it done all together the first time. He definitely is attentive and pays attention to the details of your needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alaris Cruzes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjNh3hCumMNPZAjxh68r5wVphPCWinEscfufrOfequbSnynQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came here to get a rhinoplasty and I am in LOVE with my new nose. It's everything I asked for it to be. I already liked some features of my nose before the surgery and wanted to keep it pretty natural looking and fix the breathing issues and asymmetry leading to those problems and Dr. Maan did just that. The consultation and pre op appointments were very informative and detailed, and they answered any and all questions I had. The office is beautiful and the receptionists are the kindest. I had a closed preservation rhinoplasty. I felt zero pain during the whole recovery and the recovery itself was speedy and smooth. I have a toddler at home and I was able to resume my motherly activities pretty much like normal starting the day after surgery. I was scared prior to the surgery since I've never had a surgery before but I felt really comfortable, assured, and taken care of in the hands of Dr. Maan and his team. Im 3 weeks post op today and am totally obsessed with my nose. I am beyond excited to see how much better it'll look once the rest of the swelling goes down but it's perfection. I 100% recommend Dr. Maan for your surgeries. His work is art.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Izetta Kennedy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpdanyRF5D3imfVlnFSl9k02_0SCN1RFLJqGPpjR4rPDr0RQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Maan did reconstruction surgery on my breast after my lumpectomy. When I first consulted with Dr Maan he was very calm and reassuring.  He listened to me and could sense my fears and concerns. He answered all my questions thoroughly and gave suggestions and advice.
I am very pleased with the results of my surgery.  He did an amazing job. I would highly recommend Dr Maan   Audrey was also very helpful in arranging appointments and assisting with the process.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Rang Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIN__6mB21lItutZ0O7Pvuq2K5-kmuLQbr2d8XgvrhgRMfNfw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"visited Yona Skin Clinic after reading the Google reviews.
The space is cozy, clean, and perfect for receiving personalized one-on-one care.
I received a HydraFacial combined with a relaxing massage, and I fell into a deep sleep for the entire hour and a half. My skin looked very clean afterward, and the glow lasted for three days.
I think I will definitely become a regular customer.
The only downside is that there is only one massage bed, so I can’t visit with a friend at the same time, which is a little disappointing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL07P93El9W6qFYHBwkULRpE0K19rWOV_iXlSGr9q51Biyyiw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been searching for a Korean skincare specialist for a long time after my previous aesthetician retired.  After several years of mediocre experiences, I was so excited to discover Yeona.  I love her massages!  They feel amazing, but more importantly they visibly lift and de-puff my face.  What I appreciate most is how she customizes every treatment based on what my skin needs that day. I always leave feeling like the treatment was designed specifically for me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Younja Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKiHU8pcRzjcW0rKNrMzCdpDeJTKJ98aWPcd27W-B8iuWx8BQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Through a longtime friend and regular client of Yeona, I had the chance to try her Water Glow Skin Facial at the spa I used to go to.
It completely changed my perspective on facials, and I purchased a 10session package on the spot.
The 10session package comes with many benefits, including three neck treatments.
I’m so happy to have discovered Yeona.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Polly Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSJluKOf9ne2V49jJfAKjtqXzYP2Ff0mbEB_Qmyu1Wyd5A1g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would highly recommend a facial with Yeona!  She is professional and gives one of the best facial massages I have ever gotten.  She also uses high tech machines from Korea.  My skin still felt plump and hydrated the next day so I will be getting going back regularly to Yeona.  The space is clean and the entire experience was very pleasant and relaxing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rachel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJIDkMDB__zpiLl1Z5j_AjpkjAek3qBwYEM8jGiR2tW1dAmBg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I usually travel to Korea once or twice a year to maintain anti-aging and lifting treatments (Ultherapy and Thermage FLX). Because of a stressful job, the effects tend to fade about five months after I return.

I wasn’t able to visit Korea this past December, and over time I noticed increased facial puffiness/swelling, tired and droopy appearance. I’ve generally been skeptical of medispas and skincare clinics outside of Korea. I decided to visit Yeona after she was highly recommended by my mom.

After receiving RF and ultrasound lifting treatments using the Ultherma device, I was genuinely impressed! The results were immediately noticeable—my face looked de-puffed, tightened, and rejuvenated, very comparable to the expensive lifting laser treatments I usually receive in Korea. My face felt a little heated afterwards but fine to a point where I managed to go on a first date.

Yeona delivers real results, and I’m SO glad to have found a place I can trust when I need results and can't make it to Korea. If you’re skeptical, I highly recommend giving it a try and seeing the results for yourself.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"POP POP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSnnkBjD8AazsHWdScs22z-hg9SauK8Syn9tfpdUePG-BLMA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The moment I receive skincare from Yeona, I find myself completely relaxed.
With her scalp, chest, and neck massage, all my stress just melts away.
When I wake up, my skin feels lifted, radiant, and deeply hydrated.
She uses only the highest quality Korean skincare products, which are gentle even on my sensitive skin.
Every treatment is offered at a very reasonable price, and you even get a premium massage and HydraFacial all in one session.
Yeona takes such meticulous and thoughtful care of my skin.
I absolutely have no regrets thank you so much, Yeona!😍👍","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grace Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIOu1keH127czXzlmI09ILHR90CwiTf_su7Gto4cApIh4i3uxXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been getting HydraFacial and acne treatments at Yeona Skin Shop, and the results have been amazing. My skin has become clearer, brighter, and much smoother soooo much that I’ve been happily recommending this place to people around me.
I especially love the Water Glow Ultrasound and tightening treatments, which leave my skin feeling firm and refreshed after every session. I also purchased the 10session package, which includes three complimentary neck treatments and one lifting radio frequency session such a great value.
Every treatment is done with so much care and professionalism. I always feel relaxed and well taken care of here. Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSaoe3VZ36WWkD60QRkASVZBDQotq3qZD_tQzfl1pR6d7BTg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"**Yeona is amazing!** I had a hydrofacial with a vitamin C treatment, and my skin felt incredibly clean, smooth, and glowing right after. She also did a facial massage that had an instant slimming and lifting effect — I was honestly surprised at how noticeable the difference was!

Yeona is super professional, gentle, and really takes her time to make sure you’re comfortable throughout the whole treatment. The whole experience was relaxing and left my skin looking and feeling refreshed.

Highly recommend booking with Yeona if you're looking for real results and a bit of pampering. I’ll definitely be coming back!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Norman Vallance","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9RQUABM6FUOkS-HsqlIDmFSFyE3QHxPP2-GrBnT4a0twZstir=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My results from Dr. Diep are very disappointing. The transplanted hair was very sparsely placed and the hairline itself looks like it was done by a robot as it was placed in a completely rigid straight line. There's a very obvious difference between my transplanted hair and my natural hair and as a result my hair looks completely unnatural. I've learned how to style my hair in ways that can somewhat hide the problems, but I'm always conscious of the wind and how greasy my hair is getting because it will make clear the facade I have to keep up.

If the poor technique was the only issue it would be one thing. However my whole experience was wrought with red flags I wouldn't be truly aware of until I was already deep into the process. To start, the hairline was not discussed until just before the operation. Dr. Diep draws out the hairline with a thick sharpie that's hard to tell where exactly the hairline is meant to be. He then drew out additional area on the sides of my head he wanted to add that I believe would have looked terrible given the sparse hair placement he ended up doing. Not to mention that he gains more payment for transplanting more hairs. Late in the operation I woke up while being worked on and began moving around uncontrollably while drugged. The assistant told me stop moving but I responded strangely due to my drugged state and didn't stop moving. I heard Dr. Diep tell everyone that they'll just end it there and stopped any more work on me. I wonder if more work would have been done on my hairline to make it look less straight had this not occurred. And I worry that I was charged for hairs taken out of the back of my head that were not placed back onto the front. Unfortunately I will never know.

What makes this worse is that Dr. Diep then sends an additional bill after your initial payment if he has to take out more hairs than is estimated. I got an additional bill of roughly $2000 a few months after the surgery that I was told to pay. There is no way of knowing the validity of this bill, you simply have to accept it. And I don't even know if these additional hairs were placed back onto my head due to the early ending of the surgery.

There was a follow-up meeting months later after the surgery where he checks the results. By this point I had already learned how to style my hair to hide the failures in his work. I brought up these issues and he dismissed them away and mostly just seemed disappointed that I did not give permission on his forms for him to film the results and put up on YouTube.

He will have this post removed saying my complaints are not coming from a verified source and that this is just being made up. I'm too ashamed to put fully identifiable information out here. I don't want people I know to potentially see this. I would simply say to look somewhere else that isn't so hasty and arbitrary with their process. I still feel scammed by this and know I would need another surgery to fix his mistakes.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERSK2mZlwPDDM1906pCzriOPvzhv2j9sWKRLhrn9acKDflBiFjB13583OCISgJ2h79p5Eq1Yjac7S4N4uqPkUsS4UWSp-VPo9aVrfN1VEci8-0Fnwy9ViYqBesYzeHILkGsVoGvm4mu7zx3","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQV2Qeg5u3yiGyAqKcR-2jDW8KYRLdjebC35yTFsI2Y8JS02RcE59Omf_IhsrcyCB2D4BRD89sEnyMg27BPQmPeAZRJxdUGtEPHJb4C1E-G0eRfRrcHyZF3RzndJ9zafuQEJY8d7JCAbCaq","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESAikEN72lYYfPhGnLSKhc5bJm1lxOpTAaGO__piSjUR5LXNKy6c9ZDXk2ectovwDw4-sQmS5vQf5zqCTgL7XVEoqp62Dy6936pHFVMJBfJngQ_yOFr6tV38-YC9wwcPmszxYW8ErdT2Zw","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESrisWFZdsVafRitNA8h5AoH7qVHM5UjdllKDrvEVKyIblm0IuaN6mfYALYGgQFk_nQd8c3JqnwsERmoMubFUnPAHRVwQa0HdbQGFeY7fkLEWV1HCOTxxWLYWEl09-bdveAF9I5y2mCmfKM"],"When":"2026-3-4"},{"Name":"Zantetsu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrKs4X6l_cyqLmdrQuTJgLEgEVdlkBAZl6_Ox4Q8aAhFxTYunx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's been over a year since my hair transplant with Dr. Diep and the results have been very good.  I had a FUT operation with about 3,800 grafts.  My hairline is natural and full and looks great.  An added bonus is that because the hair that was taken from the back had not greyed yet, my hairline became noticeably browner as the grafted hairs mixed in with my grey.  It was like a free permanent hair dye came along with the transplanted hairs!

I was fortunate in that I had almost no "ugly duckling" period, my grafts did not fall out, but grew (slowly at first, then more rapidly) the entire time and by month three post-surgery my hairline was full.  Dr. Diep had given me an "A-cell" shot which may have helped with this.

The improvement in my hairline improved my self-confidence immensely.  I felt confident enough to do things I was too embarrassed to do previously, and my life has literally changed tremendously for the better as a result.

I do have to be honest here and say that while the procedure itself was fairly easy to endure, mostly because I was knocked out for most of it, recovery was painful and difficult.  A very large suture along the back of one's head takes a long time to heal and for several weeks I had a very hard time sleeping or feeling comfortable.  So do not undertake this procedure without realizing that you will have to sacrifice some comfort and that there will be downtime while you recover.  However, all of that feels like a distant memory now, a year later, when that short period of discomfort has led to a lifetime of improved hairline.  Well worth it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniel Leitner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyCtnuVVxZKwRX7_I6MyLadFare-yWG4BeUAV58xpPk1xzD4ff3w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Diep truly changed my life. After doing tons of research and seeing countless before-and-after photos from other clinics, I knew I wanted the best — and that’s exactly what I got. His artistry, precision, and attention to natural detail are on another level.

From the consultation to the recovery process, Dr. Diep and his team made everything seamless and comfortable. You can tell he genuinely cares about his patients and takes pride in delivering world-class results.

I couldn’t be happier with my hairline and density — it looks completely natural and has restored my confidence in a way I can’t even describe. If you’re considering a hair transplant, stop searching. Dr. Diep is hands down the best in the hair transplant world. 10/10, highly recommend.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETgj7YhXXey8ZQn9ByNKkO1r6HR9NdIa6iTsP6GCkHSGVItTqirzIPRbm56R1Zdg-ob0yjc0dJiCTQFxxb7q_LyOU-c43TflPZLo-ndINL4ckeH6LsIFPWjHNY8ugzjDKvmZjI48rqTmarI","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQFpIYs1YGEvpVA8EYpXmHBmAnBD5qdD671FO-_UT_5uqpBMDIucHbB1ZWQVgXybbARxP8QVwm8kAdCPGXelMzCg24fceFs-2Z84vmUQ0CDPsn6wwKhzM8G_QWh2tAD6MPS2aCeUZDRMlJT","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER4OZ7I2xef8p_CK_rrNqxktG8t7xxhziStqnLaEacu2JZF0w4pGowyySQvHWluMFHOjwQua6D_8_SxuREyjt_gd9Ry0kw7YjiL3wJ87cVmH6yMrRiFnuPc_FRIpDBumQ9Qdc_BmcQaBPl2","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETt3XTTWCFT97pmLPDCfgoMoyuWqh6-id9MBreXaKQotiveAF-A2NkDdZYOO3tLwKCVmeQrpRX1W6CnBTxiTXM52lRtPWgFGD46wS3BXylNbW3E3fQTunlZBJ38IzTU4xV7DcsgC4Bkhmi0"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"George Gutierrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ96uAgQ6QbIvEZpvGRaiv37FB3vMAZSZaRd0q2ELavMlxNjw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Diep has done a phenomenal job! I’m so happy!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESECM2fJ4qHT28wWDWhCWn-xl2hn0SuJ9nzB3feu-r9cNZ56Dv7ppuCMSqbIBiGq42c8HZrax166VUJAveCKmInwYgEzoK0hT_DgNvOoJZRxSrMkFLQziePvlCgrjcm1Kn7fAwQ","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESWjyoZiLmQE4zKFIi9WgiZMtpwE4g1HsstRiNB-CDxWoOqA61-JhZ2ZmDo6yDzHLTHRso0vtwAWCOxOLdIWYITz_YL-sdj_XKaJ9DwiuQJ4E90Ak872UVv8V3ELOW5Gf-8S7rU","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER6PLfV9T2t2DPeHUVIN_Lz-xBw8lW968HLSCjlHd9eLpVx6RMHOSr5Mp3T2qNevEsfmBVJ4SAHIfqD8e0gvuhiKewdw7Rjk7KWGxjFgPgZnxhXyiqI8kiQDrdISgtaCMEfNxc","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERONlTMtQv9_YGuP8QlgLJ_YycvV70nbI5Z69G4YWEPyNPO8JEme6wtN73d3RAxABGuRHPkfC3MzoreYZOhTCF26XemFmDKvb8Los5sujV1jhTtX_X8VEJHXM4cDQRvCLLKVoHKtw","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER58oa6sRyMfiabeLQBSzGSEJ2ZqsNgkoJ9VbOWsBa1huAN5mBYMUmD4ix9AbLb5kNdc08FF6Ucyn3Idsv7EwfLnA4zNXvnv7WaYQReYKmM-THhZZFEPZgqk2VBhe-F3GQDP6Gn"],"When":"2022-12-27"},{"Name":"12Hatcher23","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXExB3nRpD43D7C8A1sxaP59uW34tcyKJrWqgS9zeCg6UJtItxP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I watched Dr Diep’s videos for a couple of years, I am so glad I choose he and his staff to do my procedure, I could not happier. No one even noticed that I had an hair transplant. Surprisingly, it appears to make you a bit younger, by not having so much forehead.  Dr.Deip also make some outstanding suggestions to go above and beyond my expectations. I could not thank him enough. On my 12th month follow up appointment, we collaborated on even more of enhancement to my much satisfied results, so I will do a second procedure soon.  The look I wanted would’ve required a second procedure anyway, based on the number of grafts needed. I cannot thank Dr Diep enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Harrison L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYV0eSAzl97AuyJVja7d6hjBpeb6kckRksArALRH5Sqzqrhg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I first noticed my hair loss shortly after graduating college. It was not very dramatic in the beginning, so I dismissed it. However, as time progressed, it became worse and worse. My crown and vertex lost so much density that I felt and looked 10 years older; I was only 25 at the time. Hair means something different from one individual to the next. For me, it felt like I was losing a part of myself (quite literally, I suppose) and my identity and confidence took a hit. I thought I was doomed to suffer this fate, being dealt a losing hand in terms of the genetic lottery, until I stumbled upon hair transplant videos on YouTube. I fell down a rabbit hole, and thus began my hair transplant journey. I scoured the internet – forums, reviews, reddit, you name it – for potential doctors that I felt comfortable with. After all, this was going to be a big investment.
Fast forward, and I eventually decided on Dr. Diep. This was due to several reasons. Firstly, he was one of the few doctors who had posted videos of his work before surgery, 6 months post-surgery, and 12 months-post surgery. If they say pictures are worth a thousand words, then videos are like full blown novels. Secondly, Dr. Diep seemed to have worked with a wide variety of hair types in his YouTube videos – Caucasians, African Americans, Asians, Hispanics; this was a definite plus. I am Asian myself, so my hair is thinner, and it was very important to me that the hair transplant doctor knew how to work with my hair type. I finally took the plunge and scheduled a consultation. I was classified as having a Norwood 3A hair loss pattern. Much to my surprise, he was fully booked and the earliest date they could squeeze me in was April of next year! I was a bit bummed, but I guess all good things are worth the wait.
During my time leading up to the surgery date, I corresponded with the office regarding paperwork, payments, and any general questions. For the most part it was fine, a bit disorganized at times, but nothing major. It was mostly repeated questionnaires or notifications, but hey over communicating is better than under communicating right?
So, on the big day, I arrived for my 2,500 FUE procedure bright and early. The office was clean and tidy, and the receptionist was very warm. She had me fill out any remaining paperwork and asked me to select my lunch option from restaurants nearby, which was quite unexpected since it was on the house. After a short wait, I met with Dr. Diep to go over the procedure details. He had excellent bed-side manners and was very thorough. He took the time to listen to my concerns and made it a point to ask what was most important to me when drawing up the lines for where to place my transplanted hair follicles. After I took my pre-op medication, we started the procedure. I was partially sedated but still semi-conscious. Dr. Diep personally extracted all my hair follicles (which I read is the most important part), and continuously monitored my pain level throughout. If I started to feel pain, he would reapply the local anesthesia. We took a break for lunch, and in the afternoon, several technicians implanted the extracted hair follicles per Dr. Diep’s design. After wrapping up, the office gave very specific post-op care instructions and sent me home with some meds, gauze, liner pads, and a hat to cover up my scalp. Overall, I was very satisfied with my experience and even more so with the results. I highly recommend Dr. Diep to anyone who has been thinking about doing a hair transplant but is on the fence; it changed my life. I can go on and on, but it is mush easier to just show the results.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETq-J4kEkLvcBdDOQnaZKy9T6aepoOOEVmLeYjZErnEczXYzleFZIHeYOg079qzNyHMH1PHoKdVXrz0IUg5BFFgC2ZOTkrpNsZbYyZyhTC0aKj07C8z1Ksu4ADlYu910UEgklciPw","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQdeg56MfbJtDSkD1jf-NH6O21lEvjKCOpIXyVbEqb3ZE78JZBPbMUEcoDsFVVKC2rg4nU_C_sw3EpDqdyJljubXIT2drjA-S01P40s9WBbekL1j6zNxI0OVjKspUsnQZlpcfCs","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESgwtX0s8oT5Jicnf1rKUEIXKLBbIWeFjDwCA78W89aZJ4BCRPUeE3A_THgQ5xY7mSFtLhfJbKhcQl_mW3yoHzSKzj0N3TprC0N1tNVng9m58CHDJF3lbhz2JTZ2ludlrG9Y77v","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESZ8ZdXdzkvaIo_hL9Slr9zRRMeHoqaSLWMQuTVTCjawmJHt-gmtgwndLyIj0tbWQZW5c0S2PALyivCgKPt-4JXABcZKaeu9rIpIf7U-SVc5Br0lxoPj3P9WwP5DupELn8VKTAF","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQOZO2eJa6yolXa7p_LCXmgJ_XuTm-dWS1bcFANiRbUNP0l-DM0E0ZXfgX-E3RmZxOZ-9eekgHWMg4-iejNIJh6NlnF3sCuDvCnGSYlZy7f3tLWCPPJzxLKg52awOrIQoLUASw9yA","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERopSyUiYZwqIUkoGCb8UC8al1sKrIxra3E6bnyG1Wg22yMmNXDlKpTJYORd8RkNXFMErIyCTnilPWdqyW5zECIi4isU5CXOuVhM5yOrcpXWL0EH5Cd1q4v0BXnl6Jb1b4bQICg","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERU7paS8aYlHkXJv7sPC9EFH7WZJNCy5_2wBz_UFKlqexmUh1egkXvYyMBgw2PSLsHFcTxV2bX9fo55MF8ISgjvCPPmPtkMPAgMr1T25YoA9w7IJ-3yb0PNzTNQXH3KIyHyuxF5IQ","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESIaKNOhN6ShGZwLMSjswkfkklUBtSLp_gr01sHueJ1wGZ3iJx_S8NtIlgrDA_cUl9QYokuf5gcVfwWsgRQPLDsAw5pjcyEfRWsbIphCneENCHBjx0yeAUQqSRCppPuqNRSpFhF","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESL0UTwZxUcUfr_eWFJaIvJ8YKfrN7KTQ2HOjmTMv0pAbkiwMfk5ggyDpSt4fvpkahs2rtDVeqr6wjyDDGiouWptmqWM9Y86LQVfon5hxJEecx7AlqSJyCcMtU_9pQoD432ASxlwQ","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQTVw8wMOoz2uIC6ek-v_OhxZs1Q1MCgi-T37iD6E5gmJk_n9-j5m7DqPrdkDNRlwgUgqM9tdrQBpvQgJQ_4B94txqa5Q6WuXvpon-ruX5tXks-6hUaRjIR-kKHMUIATB2EToc"],"When":"2020-7-15"},{"Name":"Emily","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJIf-5kgK-T5fTQ8IYV6ssHrB2GuWtxL1vbQdfBfRX5GfZc-w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Less than three years after my procedure, the outline of my transplant has a flattering, natural shape, and the transplanted hair has been growing reasonably well. However, just behind the immediate hairline—particularly in the center front and temple areas—there are several sparse patches, each about 1.5 square inches in size, where the scalp remains clearly visible. These thin areas make the scalp noticeable and force me to "comb over" the gaps, which limits how I can style or part my hair.

This outcome is especially disappointing considering I paid for additional grafts beyond what was originally agreed upon. While the doctor and surgical team provided a decent foundation, the lack of density in key areas still gives an undeniable appearance of ongoing hair loss. As a result, I will now need to seek a second procedure elsewhere to properly address these issues.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Kathy McCabe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAAm2p1gE9MkF1dVs3UR8MC4oNR1x2ubgaN0-tNtv5kY_WsXs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Mohandas is a lovely person, and her office is inviting and comfortable.  The microneedling procedure was painless thanks to the numbing cream they apply beforehand, and I have had no issues after the treatment two treatments I have had thus far.  Add that to the friendly and professional staff in the office, and you have a provider who you can feel safe going to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Libbey Blumberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4k--JNmikG_AXx6auDW9Tr7BGSx3KchhPTB37WJXLA6zO1Wov=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This was one of the worst experiences I have ever had with a medspa or aesthetic dermatologist.

Over the years, I have occasionally used Groupon to discover new doctors and estheticians, and I have always been treated professionally and kindly. Unfortunately, that was not the case here. From the very beginning, the reception staff spoke in a curt, cold, and borderline rude manner over the phone. When I arrived at the office, the environment itself felt shabby, poorly lit, and unwelcoming.

I was again greeted in a dismissive way and escorted to the treatment room. Despite specifically requesting numbing cream prior to Botox injections, none was provided. The injections were extremely painful, and I immediately felt that a minimal amount of product was being used. I expressed concern during the procedure, but I was simply told not to worry.

In addition, when I tried to discuss other services I was genuinely interested in—such as facial peels and laser treatments—the doctor showed little interest in answering my questions or providing information. The consultation felt rushed and dismissive.

Most disappointing of all, after enduring the discomfort of the injections, the Botox had absolutely no effect. There was no improvement whatsoever. It was a complete waste of my time, money, and energy. It's shame because annually I spend anywhere from $2000.00 to $5000.00 on skin procedures. Dr. Mohandas has missed out on obtaining any future business from me and any referrals I may provide.

The overall experience, from the front desk to the provider, it felt rude, uncaring, and callous. I would not return and would not recommend this practice to others seeking professional, attentive care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jocelyn Whitney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwAW6n_DnwPAmZ4TEpvff9982e8s5O6kfYZuhxrr8thDuLqwc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was really happy with my experience. Dr. Mohandas is very thorough and explains the procedure very well and answered my questions. Please note you are getting a doctor here not a technician. I highly recommend and will be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aderval Barros","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUICysPFZyxjIahNaVO-x_ZSUcTWnMnqmO16wnj5tO3oyCLVN21=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had consistently excellent experiences at Dr. Mohandas MedSpa. The pricing is very reasonable, and the staff ensures each visit is quick yet thorough. I highly recommend Dr. Mohandas MedSpa for anyone seeking exceptional service and great results.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"fitnetta Kraja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3IMn2_sfC6FaIAr6X2BaC7pJLrcEFAhVPjJp-GYgvI0-z0qIdag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"i started coming to this office about a year and a half ago for a facial laser - it was an awesome experience and then came in for botox, Dr. Mohandas is extremely knowledgeable, careful and accurate with her injections. I did feel like Dr. Soohoo was good at what she does, empathetic, and actually listened showed she cared.

I found Dr. Clark to be extremely impersonal and unprofessional. She actually opened someone else's file and starting talking to my daughter about the wrong meds. We were charged $100 missed appointment fee because they scheduled an in person visit instead of our normal virtual visit. They keep saying they will refund but haven't yet. I message and text regularly and rarely get responses.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Colleen Robbins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVEjJ7MBhmUACGIBlNc3Kg21Lub7mmSi_UqDtTpoM7p-TCYQnoN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Life changing, in short. I've been through quite a journey with Dr. Castillo and his colleagues. From hormones to pelvic floor reconstruction to skin treatments (and more), I have run the gamut.

Dr. Castillo is one of the most informed and always curious doctors I have ever met. He is absolutely doing what he was meant to do. He is kind, thoughtful, engaged and very proactive. He's never in a rush and has supported my health overall, not just in what his focus is. He has changed my life in ways I never thought possible.

Remy is such a fountain of knowledge. She is present and takes all the time you need to explain not just hormones, but how all of the lab results are connected and why it's a whole solution, not just individual things to address. She is absolutely a hormone nerd and is passionate about what she does.

Dr. Doo is incredibly kind and always engaged and helpful. She listens well and always has tangible ways to improve things. She is super personable and easy going. I've only seen her a couple of times, but I really like her.

Carlos! A total gem. Absolutely a skin expert, he is deeply knowledgeable and really invested in helping people improve their skin. I had him do a couple of treatments and the difference is absolutely amazing. I know I see it, but when other people see it, you know it's a profound difference.

The office overall has a clear top down quality. Dr. Castillo hires people like him, passionate about what they are doing and invested in improving the quality of life for people. The offices (I've been to both a number of times) are clean and inviting, all of the staff is helpful and responsive. The experience of going there is a big part of it, it's inviting and comfortable and very welcoming.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kari Abe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPfcXnBM71zPd8XIbo5OleoWD2bkm5RBewcpo7r86DDwUcyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you have been diagnosed with prolapse and told that immediate surgery is your only option, I strongly encourage you to seek a second opinion from Dr. Castillo. While several physicians in the Bay Area recommended surgery right away, Dr. Castillo took a more thoughtful and conservative approach. He started me on a regimen of vaginal hormones and laser treatment instead. Six years later, I am thrilled to report that I have been able to avoid surgery - an option that comes with a low success rate. I was fortunate to be referred to Dr. Castillo by a pelvic floor therapist who originally had been recommended by another urogynecologist. She told me that if surgery ever became necessary, Dr. Castillo would be the best person in the Bay Area to perform it, and strongly advised me to consult with him. As a Yale Law School graduate and a highly proactive medical advocate, I am meticulous about choosing my healthcare providers.  I am confident that my search for the best urogynelogist is over, and I am deeply grateful to be under Dr. Castillo’s care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cherie Garcia-Day","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLOJ6IeYpNXOp-zVK9lmdWEmEO-8Ggvd0Dn3Q6piTfdVynfHw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dear Dr Castillo,
I cannot begin to thank you enough for making me well.  I had been dealing with severe urinary incontinence and a difficult prolapse for several years before I came to you.  My life was challenging when it came to sports and quality of life.

Since I came to your office I have felt such compassion, kindness, and a genuine interest in improving my situation.  Over time you devised the best approach to solving my health issues starting with non-surgical options and then realizing surgery was the best path to take.

I was very anxious thinking about my upcoming surgery but all the medical staff were very understanding and reassured me I would be fine.  They answered all my questions and spent as much time as needed with me.  I am so grateful for your expertise and skill helping not only me but many other women.  It will be my pleasure to highly recommend you, Dr Castillo, to anyone who needs an outstanding surgeon.

Thank you for changing my life around and giving me hope for a much brighter future.

With gratitude,
Cherie Garcia-Day","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ruby Gillon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIUYLukdV8kivQqZParLBqnKOgXqjkQtW-n05Sv69Mc-FRE7g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am glad I crossed ways with dr Castillo. He has optimized my health. He takes his times, answers my questions and does not rush me. He is fully knowledgeable in his profession. When I need any services, I try to pick the best and for my health optimization, I chose Dr. Castillo","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deb Mariotti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJThEJDYaJe-UIZZsB25OwNQLQkrPLFnNSRCIpbqMaX_W5DZg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I first visited Dr. Castillo in February 2023.  I went in for a cosmetic procedure called the Diva laser.  During my exam for this procedure, Dr. Castillo determined I was a candidate for this laser treatment but he also discovered that I had a hernia and other gynecological issues that could only be addressed with surgery.  This was a bit of a shock! I regularly visit my gynecologist but I have never had such an in-depth exam before. I told my husband about this and him being a surgeon as well, he was a little skeptical.  So, I booked a follow up consultation and brought  him with me.  Once my husband met and listened to Dr. Castillo, he was convinced that this surgery was necessary and that Dr. Castillo was the doctor to do the surgery.  Because the surgery required a several week recovery, I put it on hold for about a year, so I could plan my life around it.

In the meantime, I did have 3 Diva laser treatments and the results from those treatments were fantastic!  I highly recommend the Diva for vaginal dryness.  The more I got to know Dr. Castillo and his staff, I decided I would like to start going to his practice for my hormone replacement therapy as well.  I had been getting pellets for hormone replacement for a couple years now with another doctor, but I really wanted to have one doctor who knew me well and understood the big picture regarding my hormonal and sexual health.  It was clear from my first pellet treatment with Dr. Castillo at just how incredibly knowledgeable he is in this area.  If you have been struggling with peri-menopause or menopausal symptoms and are a candidate for hormone replacement therapy, I can’t stress enough at what a game-changer this is.  HRT has transformed the way I feel in my 50’s!  I feel like I am in my 20’s in regards to energy, sleep and libido.  So worth the investment!

Finally, I did have the surgery with Dr. Castillo this past February.  I was pretty scared about the procedure, the recovery and how it would affect intimacy.  The recovery was so much easier than expected!  I was pleasantly surprised.  And after a couple months recovery, I am very pleased with the results and even my husband gives the results 5 stars 😂

I have recommended at least 20 women to Dr. Castillo, many of whom are now happy patients of his.  The care he and his staff give their patients is wonderful!  Highly recommend Swan Medical!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kim Chacon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGrqbvsVLts4o9oVsNohDpuJaFPflVZnbMTi-x5WH1LXj3Gg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Castillo is extremely talented and has improved my life dramatically. I cannot believe I waited more than ten years for post- birth repairs. I have regained both my function and confidence with Dr. Castillo's expertise. At the very least get a consult!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sylvia Bellinghausen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0JFLRUbTXvfzh8m33uRm4GROcn79nhQkoUD8pDfEl8VZGQFo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":""You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough."

My life and wellness has never been better and I'm grateful to have found Dr. Peter Castillo, Swan Medical.

Remy and Aditi are the most supportive and delightful people that have made my transition to hormone therapy so easy.

They are professionals and truly care about your wellness.

I want to thank them for being so knowledgeable and supportive.

Hormone therapy has changed my life and made me feel comfortable in my own skin.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cindy Schmidt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYmnFP_0Fq-oV94KtPuS4dHb0IY3NxcCXSJEh7WWOItQXLZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The HRT at Swan Medical is almost the Fountain of Youth for those of us that have gone through menopause. It really is astounding the improvement in sleep, energy, mood and many other things that result from taking this treatment. In addition, Dr. Castillo and his staff are outstanding. Dr. Castillo and Remy are such great listeners and are both so compassionate. You never feel like they are rushing you so they can get to the next patient. They take the time to listen and answer any questions or concerns you might have. The rest of the staff are equally outstanding: caring, compassionate and knowledgeable.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We had many questions for her, she listened contentedly and answered dozens and dozens of questions patiently. Although we interviewed several surgeons, we knew Dr. Costa was the right choice for the both of us.

Dr. Costa is a very skilled surgeon. She really reads the patient well, and works hard to temper any hesitations. Not all surgeons work with insurance, but Dr. Costa does, and Tina in the front office is amazing at dealing with all the red tape. She makes the process so much easier for the patient.
She's is friendly and so easy to work with.

My daughter and I scheduled our surgeries 6 weeks apart. We are both EXTREMELY happy with the results!!! At 58 years old, I can assure you if you are concerned that you may be too old to have this done, you are not! I'm so so happy I made the decision to finally have this surgery and feel good again, all thanks to Dr. Costa!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Victoria B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIK5_51zysxnhasqQaUBsBP7CX6pjpZtkGBodMDVVO4NshGHA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had a simple excision surgery with Dr. Costa. With cosmetic procedures in particular, some providers leave patients feeling like they're being oversold on services, and I've never once felt that from Dr. Costa. I've seen her for other treatments as well and she's been conservative AND effective - meaning I get my desired result with minimal treatment.

I wholeheartedly trust her professional opinion and care, and am grateful to have found a surgeon I can trust.

I highly recommend her and her practice.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Erin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUI490ndYMqXWeulxyIeO-8phVN3K0YmbjtkV0v-xroEluD1rk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After years of "twin skin" that exercise couldn't fix, I finally found Dr. Hwang. What sets her apart:

Honesty: She is meticulous and detailed. She won't "sugar-coat" the process; she ensures you have realistic expectations.

Personal Care: She is personally available during recovery and takes immense pride in her work (even my incision is remarkably neat).

The Outcome: My results are phenomenal. Even the nurse giving me lymphatic massages commented on how great everything looks. My sister and mom (both nurses) say it’s the most natural work they’ve seen.

I actually have better muscle definition now than I did before my kids. Dr. Hwang is the best of the best!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristin Romig","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhNkPBXs8ifUjfCC92bOZqSg4IW1gxZnE_STUujJtmNNVeTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience with Dr. Hwang. If you are looking for a doctor who truly takes the time to get to know you, knowledgeable, and caring, Dr. Hwang is for you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Monica Gallo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKO3Ay2hIwBb8CAR7TVCrgJeQYX1Z5zOeu1shpgbdZFelZnXw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m so happy I chose Dr. Hwang for my breast augmentation surgery! I would highly recommend going to Dr. Hwang for breast augmentation surgery!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Viridiana Escalante","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJyG2gitB0zqpFmf_Nzmrg-jdhuw12TISkU6uzo8z_q3-MqJA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I usually don’t review but after seeing Dr Lisa I been more than happy with my results I never had Botox in my life she did daxify on me and 6 mo the later I still have the results she is very good and patient .. she knows exactly what is needed for you and I am extremely happy with my results she brought confidence back to me and I’m 41 going to be 42 .. she is super clean and professional.. and is a great doctor and person to be around … I highly recommend her…","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERSEvJf0GROdkH8mvLivu0ZgKDSP7JtHZSHCtdh5XPnFa0IC7KowswU8hPNbNnJg44pDRb0C-x_OqdS3DaG1Efo1OfvGW2B_Hc2WPdRstnkOSv-Z3lEflxVQqERZjK-oltEcEZVjA38RW8g"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Ev Holst","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUqkSnoRUb3xppTdN7HZ5DpEC8kxrIHjSX3ufykBhANWSqBtbb=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible Experience with Dr. Hwang and Her Team - Highly Recommended!

From my very first call to Dr. Hwang's office, I felt like I was in good hands. Dr. Hwang herself answered the phone and was incredibly warm and inviting, making the entire process feel personal and comfortable right from the start. We scheduled a virtual consultation where we discussed my weight loss goals and the surgery plan in detail. Dr. Hwang was thorough, encouraging, and realistic about the BMI she was comfortable with, and she provided clear direction on how to achieve it. With her guidance, as well as the support of Dr. Belardo, I hit my weight and BMI target well before my scheduled surgery in September.

Surgery Day - A Calm, Comfortable Experience
I've had several surgeries in the past which include a hysterectomy and gallbladder removal, and I typically get anxiety leading up to the procedure. But for some reason, I felt completely calm and even excited for this surgery. I believe it was due to the level of care and comfort that Dr. Hwang and her team provided throughout the entire process. From the initial consultation to the day of surgery, I felt supported every step of the way. Even though I knew my recovery would be more challenging than my previous surgeries, I was still filled with anticipation--not just for the transformation, but because I trusted Dr. Hwang's expertise.

On surgery day, Dr. Hwang was incredibly precise and detail-oriented as she marked my body. Her attention to detail is unmatched, and she truly understands what women want in terms of body aesthetics. She made sure to listen to my goals and then executed them flawlessly. My tummy tuck results have been nothing short of amazing. The definition, the shape, even the belly button--everything is perfect. I had been following Dr. Hwang's work for some time and had seen the quality of her results firsthand. I can honestly say her work stands out compared to other local surgeons.

Post-Op Care - Exceptional Support
For the first few weeks post-surgery, I texted Dr. Hwang almost daily with questions ranging from recovery to working out. She was always quick to respond, providing thoughtful and thorough answers to every concern. I had a lot of questions, but Dr. Hwang was patient and reassuring throughout the entire process. Now, at almost 9 weeks post-op, I'm slowly getting back into my fitness routine, feeling better every day, and loving the results.

If you're considering any type of surgery or body transformation, I can't recommend Dr. Hwang enough. Her professionalism, expertise, and genuine care for her patients make all the difference. Thank you, Dr. Hwang and your amazing team, for giving me a transformation that exceeded all my expectations!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQkZwa6WB14XOdMufwLByG6oeJeOFxLXx0cNcrrMKwoQLJPZFMYAkPnuWQAiLGHi4MHPdwvK-aGWUEksYiKJzvr1e55gK-yx413ByOzWorujGfDhXoUt-FXRhj807776v_frC78"],"When":"2024-11-15"},{"Name":"Jess Bruno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaGt64Kd3L2Yoy0jgjdo4wYVG3rBasmDFTUXNllx6TzaEmTJs0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After meeting Dr. Lisa, I knew I had found the surgeon—but it still took me about a year to finally move forward with my surgery. When I did, I had zero doubts. From day one, Dr. Lisa was professional, compassionate, and incredibly thorough. Her bedside manner is unmatched, and you can truly feel how deeply she cares about her patients.

On the day of my tummy tuck, hernia repair, and lipo 360 (arms and legs!), I asked her last minute if she could also take some fat from my inner thighs. Not only did she say yes without hesitation, she also sculpted under my buttcheeks too. That’s the kind of above-and-beyond care you don’t see every day.

Dr. Lisa is not just a surgeon—she’s an artist and a perfectionist. Her attention to detail, especially when it comes to line work, is next level. My incisions are thin, clean, and beautifully placed. Even my post-op therapists at InHands Recovery have commented that it’s some of the best surgical work they’ve seen.

At just 5 weeks post-op, I’m already seeing incredible results—my waist is snatched, my healing is smooth, and I feel like a new version of myself.

Another thing that sets Dr. Lisa apart? Her accessibility and follow-up. She gives you her personal number after surgery, checks in regularly, and makes sure you’re never left with unanswered questions. That kind of care is rare, and it means everything during recovery.

I would recommend Dr. Lisa to absolutely anyone considering surgery. She’s brilliant, talented, and genuinely invested in your outcome—and it shows.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"brenda martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0oLIem8R36n897e0UK-nX3nyUqi4nW3HzvNPY5fW2tEIO6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wanna start off by saying thank you so much to Dr Lisa for making me look snatched ! I'm so in love with my results ! I remember going to my consult appt the first time & I let her know exactly what I wanted & she helped me achieve my goals , whenever I had questions or concerns she was a text or call away ! She made me feel SAFE & COMFORTABLE from the moment I spoke to her . This was the best experience ever ! I'm 6 months post op & everyday I receive compliments about my body ! 5 out of 5 ! with Dr Lisa your in the best hands !","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQTNnLzSh6seAfQUIyuRXip76bdknNv2kDTUglqFDSU3kpS_XThhUQ0C3b-p5EJAHeg5znzaMcuqLP6priWwQCtcCLQyo78CidCa548Z0OQmg5ErV82UVBslz8qZg5oo9Nng3Qr"],"When":"2022-4-7"},{"Name":"Lani Nakayama","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFrtNHKAl9A5zdXWeIrc7hUAdt9wLXk1Kq6WuaZKc1c6eTwA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a long overdue review. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Julie Saccento","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKnMr0jUVn5_JVFpWOAjUjeWH88aUh-NnMcMtXZJg0S6FXg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Last April, I brought my teenage daughter to MeMe after months of persistent acne that kept getting worse despite everything we tried — other estheticians, Proactiv, Norse Organics, dietary changes, and countless over-the-counter products.

Within minutes of meeting us, it was clear MeMe approaches skin very differently. She asked extremely detailed questions about every single product my daughter was using — and looked up each one to study the ingredient lists. What shocked me most was learning that some of the harsh scrubs and products previously recommended to us were actually damaging her skin barrier and making the acne worse. MeMe recognized that immediately.

My daughter had a facial and began a carefully selected regimen tailored specifically to her skin. The improvement started quickly, but what impressed me most was MeMe’s precision and follow-through. When my daughter’s skin wasn’t fully where she wanted it to be after about eight weeks, we went back. MeMe reassessed, adjusted the products, and refined the routine — and within weeks, the results were dramatic.

It’s now been 7–8 months of maintenance. My daughter still gets the occasional teenage breakout, but her skin is calm, clear, and healthy — and more importantly, she’s confident again. She understands how to care for her skin properly and doesn’t panic when something pops up because she knows what to do.

MeMe combines deep knowledge with a calm, reassuring presence. She made my daughter feel understood, hopeful, and supported at a time when her skin was affecting her confidence. We are so grateful we found her.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lindsey Munsell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJEZCKFMwV2X0vR4Notc5HDb2MfVjFcvWW0T1JYGlKYAQV8ueQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Saying I love MeMe doesn’t even come close. She’s truly the best! I’ve been fortunate to see her for over years, and even after moving out of state, I make it a priority to visit her whenever I’m in town. MeMe is a lifelong learner and an incredible teacher. The knowledge she’s shared about caring for my skin and managing flare-ups has been invaluable and I pass those tips along to others all the time. If you are on the fence, I'd suggest you hop it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bailey Giancola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAJEuTAM4ZJptStirlIojwTMhnhEbSLr5m5jubFNwa1K5ODgjV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been seeing Meme for 3+ months, and the transformation in my skin has been incredible. She helped get my hormonal acne under control faster than I ever expected, and the results speak for themselves.

What really sets Meme apart is that she’s not only amazing for acne—she’s exceptional for all things skin. Her depth of knowledge, her background in the industry, and her ability to tailor treatments to exactly what your skin needs make her truly stand out.

If you want someone who understands skin on a deeper level and delivers real, noticeable results, Meme is the one. I can’t recommend her enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hunter James","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWD7xa8AmWRJdkCnBInTnKu8lQJc7u1Xo4Unh8mBqssQK22f4ao8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend visiting MeMe if you struggle with your skin. I have been a client for 4 years, and she has always been able to tell what my skin needed. As someone who has dealt with severe cystic acne, rosacea, acne scarring, sensitive skin and clogged pores, finding treatment that works has always been a challenge. MeMe is an expert, and would take the time to explain her custom treatment plan each time and answer my many questions. She genuinely shows care for her clients’ journeys.

My skin really improved under her care, and I felt in control of my acne for the first time in years. I wish I could have started seeing her sooner!!

If you are questioning setting up your first appointment, don’t. It’s worth it!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abby Ventura","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXB0divhcAhEGJXNLOHJ7p5vUn2i4369tY_j9JP3E8F2bIgc7pB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Having acne as an adult is so embarrassing. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Valerie Rebesque","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaJX5kOl_8OZn2-6vb1kaF_2OS2ITOP2LuJSPJeijm4APRow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I feel lucky and extremely grateful to have found Dr Fattahi and his team through an extensive search for a reliable and experienced phlebologist in the bay area. When it comes to varicose veins, you do not want to go to the wrong clinic or vascular surgeon and end up worse than you were before treatment.
I would give Dr Fattahi and his team 6 stars if I could; Dr Fattahi has been treating vein diseases for over 35 years and is one of the best phlebology physicians in the world. He still demonstrates an impressive passion for his medical specialty and remains a leader in the field. Because he is a certified sonographer, he thoroughly diagnoses a patient's condition and provides a detailed and appropriate treatment plan from the first office visit. He is very patient and uses the latest technology to provide the best treatment and minimize discomfort during each procedure.
I had been neglecting a large varicose vein on one leg for many years and also had fairly pronounced spider veins on the other leg. After an hour of thorough examination, Dr Fattahi and his team gave me a detailed and accurate estimation for length and cost of treatment and worked with my insurance to get as much of it covered as possible. The doctor performed an initial -painless- laser ablation of the varicose vein and, after 5 weeks of follow-up treatments, I am pleased to report that all unsightly veins and varicosities have almost vanished from both legs. The occasional discomfort and swelling I suffered from before the treatment have also subsided. Thank you, Dr Fattahi and staff, for your kindness and professionalism.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arvin Eslami","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7AvwhwGsuJz-hkljtbLKuEJi6JuyYG1voBnI1rj_9as3efZWNdg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"See no other doctor than Dr. Fattahi if you have varicose veins.  I had suffered from painful varicose veins of right leg for many years.  before seeing Dr. Fattahi at Vein Specialty Medical Clinic in Campbell, I was unsuccessfully treated two other vascular surgeons.  But their treatments did not work, while wasted my time and money.  Dr. Fattahi's evaluation and treatments from the very beginning was different.  He spent an hour mapping sources of bad vein valves in my legs.  Then he explained his advanced treatment plans in detail.  My treatments were completed in one less treatment than was planned.  It is now 6 months after completion of my treatments and my varicose veins are 100% gone without any scars.  I returned to normal activities after each of the 2 treatment sessions.  I wish I had seen Dr. Fattahi from the beginning. When I was at his office, I spoke to another patient who had come from all the way from Texas, since local physicians in Texas could not treat her varicose veins.  She expressed total satisfaction with Dr. Fattahi's treatments and said it was worth the major trip.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nadia Gillette","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUegI1e7DurmgQpRbFiBiqiJutGhXMsgGGBRkqaL8Xb1knzh0cS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had been troubled with varicose  and spider veins  after an unsuccessful sclerotherapy procedure at Kaiser which made things worse. I was very hesitant to undergo another treatment until I was referred to Dr Fattahi  by a friend that was very happy with her results. After my first appointment with Dr Fattahi, I was sure I had made the right choice. He spent a good amount of time educating me about the procedures for my specific case and told me exactly what I should expect as far as how many treatments would be required . During my first visit, using ultrasound, he spent a good amount of time to pinpoint and map the defective valve in my leg , then laid out a  precise plan involving laser ablation and foam  sclerotherapy. The treatment was relatively pain free and I immediately saw results with minimal bruising.  Clearly the attention to detail and taking the time to identify the cause of the varicosity resulted in great results. I am finally able to dress as I like and  not be embarrassed by my leg veins. I only wish I had done it sooner!
Thank you Dr Fattahi and staff for your professionalism and excellent care.
Nadia Gillette","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Else Green","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKjR-HyRU6nsBfw4PU-TXCyUghg6Rfv4tt7K9G80bJRP72mFw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Fattahi and the staff at the clinic made this experience simple, informative, and effective. The initial consultation included thorough ultrasounds and diagraming of the procedures and made me feel at ease about the process. Each appointment reviewed what had been done and a plan for the next steps. I felt like I was in good hands and was delighted that I could return to work and regular activities immediately. I had several appointments, which allowed me to become familiar with the staff at the clinic, all of which were supportive and welcoming. They also have a teaching program at the clinic so I felt as if I was learning along the way. I highly recommend Dr. Fattahi. I am thrilled with the varicose vein removal results and am grateful I was in such caring hands through the whole process.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linda Schlamadinger McGrath","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUk-Jt4HihiXl3IqO6THuk6koty66VdG1VA48KvJd9YAcvSN8LG=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Do not waste your time anywhere else. I went to 3 other "specialists" in the area who either turned me away or treated me to no effect. My left shin stayed purple so I knew there was something wrong and I am so grateful I eventually found Dr Fattahi who was instantly able to assess and resolve the problem which was much higher up in the thigh. When it comes to veins, where you see it is not necessarily where it is, so you need someone with extensive experience and the patience to get to the root of it. Not only is Dr Fattahi an world-class expert in the field, but he has always gone out of his way to provide excellent care and education. All of his staff are top-notch as well. I return to him every year and hope he never retires.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elsie Wolfe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVT8r0IwzCX9vQbR4RIBt3ULmF5-RzNYCGrc7j887IVeMhW8p_6=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Khalil Fattahi is an amazing vein specialist doctor.  He has treated my varicose veins with several techniques (ELVeS procedure, ablation, foam washout, and sclerotherapy to name a few over the years) in which all have been successful.  I'm very happy with his work and professionalism.  I highly recommend him if you are dealing with unsightly and painful veins in your legs.  Thank you so much Dr. Fattahi!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Katerina Kandelaki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLVXWf8QTDlq8Orz5pqPm1AEF1-RSq_ScBWXPKjNmvigR0tBw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My sister referred me to this clinic so I can get varicose veins removed on both legs.
I have to say that I am truly impressed with the courtesy and professionalism provided by Dr. Khalil Fattahi and the staff at the Vein Specialty Medical Clinic.
I initially went to see Dr. Fattahi for a laser ablation treatment. A week later, I went for a sclerotherapy on the right leg. Given I can already see huge improvements, I know Dr. Fattahi did an excellent job!
Prior to the procedures, Dr. Fattahi was clear, honest and upfront about everything. He took time to explain the results and specifics of the procedures as well as walk me through the post-op recovery expectations.
He has knowledge of various procedures as well as the technologies required to perform them.
I definitely recommended others to visit this clinic!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Niki Dabir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0XhJ3uGA8mPhw-FxPTGjS2Jd3VDnK6Dfbqq3MCYMb1QXfYqAX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Fattahi and his team create such an inviting and warm environment that I always feel so comfortable in! Everyone in that office is so sweet and caring. I am someone who’s not the best with needles so I always go into most appointments feeling nervous, but that is NOT the case with Dr. Fattahi. He knows exactly what he’s doing and it shows in his work! He is so gentle with the way he injects, I really notice the difference compared to other doctors. Dr. Fattahi takes his time with his patients — making sure he answers all their questions and concerns. He is so knowledgeable and caring — I would definitely recommend Dr. Fattahi!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jiyoung Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhJytdr0T1FDVTxaBiTJZmZvQgR9aQTSmiKhr3O4H_4M2RuLbfPw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A truly relaxing and professional skincare experience at Tobetent!

I recently had a peptide skincare treatment with Sujin, the owner at Tobetent, and I can confidently say it was one of the most calming and rejuvenating experiences I’ve had in a long time. The moment you step into the studio, you’re greeted with a clean, elegant, and serene atmosphere. The entire space has a warm and welcoming energy, and the staff are incredibly kind—just walking in makes you feel like you’re already healing.

Sujin is not only a talented artist but also deeply intuitive and thoughtful in her care. She takes her time to understand your skin needs and ensures that each step of the treatment is customized for you. The peptide facial I received left my skin visibly more radiant and felt like it had truly helped with regeneration. Her hands are so gentle and precise, I actually fell asleep during the session—and when I woke up, I felt completely refreshed, both physically and mentally.

What also impressed me is how well-equipped the clinic is. They have a wide variety of high-end skincare machines and tools, so it really feels like you’re getting a top-level Korean skincare experience without ever needing to leave the Bay Area. From advanced facials to lash perms, makeup, and even treatments for hair loss, it’s clear that Tobetent offers a full range of services.

Sujin has that rare combination of artistic talent, professionalism, and genuine care for her clients. Whether you’re looking for a glow-up before a special occasion, need deep skin recovery, or simply want to treat yourself, I wholeheartedly recommend visiting Sujin at Tobetent. You’ll walk out feeling like your best self.

And one more thing—Tobetent also carries beautiful Korean accessories that are surprisingly affordable. I often find myself picking up a cute new piece—or even just browsing for fun—as a lovely little treat to end the visit.

Highly recommend visiting Sujin at Tobetent if you're looking for high-quality skincare in a peaceful, friendly setting!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETmriSnL8pghD9QqAwrNicqGNFJ3BRz7PdiNJ6pBZHq6Tvf7FrxCDEL-QOUqURr-5BfiCD09IDGnssn74gZI0KIscQxwygg-5O7pvjcY8_-8o_HhDBmGPq4oqqp5e3LqjPXDo62kIBYBl83","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERNl_TgJTBi0Q3CUeNna55HfqAG3Tp4ZSQw9CHJU6eTd7b4bDJ9n4GIc4ReLAsr0HHSJLbc36QH4ZYYWBEIBm_bXytqMIWRaxwqlIBqzVqgU0w58xMwgXDO11S8HuW2dqj79CdaqS8m_VQ","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQ4cRN5UDsn4t9roclzb6Bx7cBl2GktIDdkM2IGtVpIEAq4XbM_ABNokPpYUEJhlGUdIvpCYnm2jsMxwNfYl6j3N8HF2PymZs0czlmNRrsPR73wd3383pVB5pecnRaiLGmz4f4UCO_YRfuv","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lES7x4KXJ6WX4Cc_9leCbiaqPVqffDcJkQV10_qsj2PiuxxtliZmdlICD5UBCuFJKCGUEqemMm6tCdncTTuqZkcCGOcvDGWzAimNraw0PdOujd3AeVJ8u7v3_rSgxxc-f5OzdwmoRa8HUaAs","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERFHswDsSFgBwOcsA_UvsbL5L2FRHxFe_AuOG7kPGzkWGhcB_rRTEVJwI0ngdl7P3rDOHEICeOIOclVpWPOH4iwBQzAf9Evd5mksKXEpdWF4xpG7XHeHMjchqg-8O9nUddhXLCSJT4EXa4p","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lET7o5c-1B1mv23Lubbrpk1IYaSGAhOEErNQ_Z2LFHZwRWj6ZUfRopsxCmTHwkJsleHGAb7lvxmZRT4M1EcBINysHMhlEQ7sKYulaMPmvQFJ7NeqZ_r30ioPn--Jw14ZO6Y7Ljt1i1YRFkiF","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQwpR6Q4o1qsZXA8alIDSJGE11Y3C7qkxu8i-6emc8vWs3O6Q20LNbR52dmOqR1iDWwzQ5GKLwWtyM1J1atqeKv2p612IiH24PE_OHG3DgajbwvWDO0oa0j-blmKLHNxh8HoiXTmRGtUcs","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESa8Vcm1lw-efuLUPw9EA_JdR21XQBjqJGbaf6dkN1ar0L0jBgQtaFXVrkc-g9rHOooa7YS99SgMtf3hI7s7EeuM_LEvKrduxiAGXyNLwVX26NdmAZodi8TcOFbEza9jOsUAvPtTx5BjbU6","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESa_-zGB49oSkar13fZTqfEX0jPC-cE-o5cUKjImddw0dOElsXTiwKhQ2g-pypT6ZYjzTyVBL1RQhDQGe3crd-ORBMmuM0So3sZDic3pCkTh0V91HSKa7WU3rPnUwbal-MKmuDIv3QjbpRv","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESmNqKT93Jh4q6vh8-SAGZYP2RCx0MsVTrnDoHlrfOFG-sDFblGPvbkrBOotGrGwkOtUm3iBkq45NKxiXxqI5Ve6shfOuiJz8dUkz6WZwlkhHvuH5d6YFdf5r2WgNPVSDqmVxrhgJ_0s_5C","https://lh3.googleusercontent.c I’ve seen very noticeable results in 2 visits—my face is much less puffy, and my jawline looks more defined and sculpted.

Sujin specializes in Korean skincare, and she is absolutely lovely—warm, caring, and attentive. Even after my third visit, she surprised me with a travel-size skincare set for my Christmas trip, which was incredibly thoughtful.

Her spa is bright and modern with a beautiful French-inspired decor. They offer tea after each session, never rush you, and even have a powder room available for clients to use. Frances, the receptionist, is also very kind and courteous.
