Megan was instrumental in rescheduling and moving up my surgery date and ensured all the ducks were in a row. Need surgery? Get in here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rachel Tanner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIw7FQpktgFK0eo1abWSUYd_j_6nVJ9UuHbWZNkr9xHhtSVCA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a vertical sleeve gastrectomy with Dr. Zaré in November 2023 and it changed my life. He is not only an exceptional surgeon but also truly cares for his patients and guides them through the surgical weight loss journey with the tools they need to succeed long term. The process can be overwhelming and changing your lifestyle can seem impossible. Never once during my process did I have regrets or doubts, I felt so supported by him and his staff. They are always there to answer questions and give recommendations. I am sixteen months post op and have lost 114 pounds since my initial consultation. I have so much more confidence now, my relationship with food is healthy, and I have a drive to be more active and try new things. I reached out to my GP, Kevin Haggerty, who diagnosed my condition and referred me to the Zare Clinic. From the moment I made my appointment with Dr. Marc Zare, I knew I was in good hands. [{"Name":"Tiffany Oetinger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0ZucxFiO1EJlm1EYU8ISsHOj35DvDGGk5ssP1evW6FZK3VQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been a client of Camille Flemate for many years now and know that in such a competitive and saturated industry such as dermatology, she is truly one of a kind.  Her attention to detail, depth of knowledge and calm and warm demeanor make her one of a kind.  She has also seen both of my kids and there is no one I trust more to help them through their skin and acne journeys that her.  Grateful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mickey Mericle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWC3HKFbSVwXw9F220VrninkvMuyWuc3P5cBxt69FrVngzvhfz7aA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Upfront I want to address my 3 star.   Practitioners/estheticians/staff are a 10 out of 5.  Amanda for esthetics.  Julie Lam is incredible for sun damage/mole review.  I was so happy going there.   But the practice got bought by Forefront Dermatology - and prices jumped and their billing is awful.  I paid my bill and they kept sending me bills and they are unreachable to try and discuss.  I finally reach Kalia’s own business office to show them my paid/cashed check for the service.  The woman I spoke to agreed the Forefront billing was impossible to reach.   Another time I owed $5.46 and they sent a collections agency after me.  For $5!!!   Things that used to be included in the service are now billed separately.  Not surprisingly, Forefront is private equity owned.  Ironically my last 3 jobs have been in private equity and this PE firm is bringing every bad tactic to the businesses they buy.  Love Kalia but just be aware of their new ownership.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexandra Carter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4skYwFXuhDYfZjjRxEjJwdPJnl4z8EJVZRV3C-Uo5SM9BSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The entire staff and team of providers here at Kalia/Forefront is outstanding. I received a facial today from Danielle, and I actually cannot imagine having a better experience. It was so relaxing and the conversation was great. I highly recommend this clinic for anyone who is looking for beautiful results at a decent price.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hannah M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2sjpZ0R7CLvT7j0ng7-zLICGFL8nOmEDZFnUT097azQ5vtv4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"**Amazing experience - highly recommend!**

New to the area and my esthetician recommended Kalia, so I decided to try them for a stubborn wart that Kaiser couldn't help with. I saw Julie and she was fantastic!

Julie walked me through all my treatment options and gave me her honest recommendation. Since I was paying out of pocket, she really took that into account when creating my plan, which I appreciated. She answered all my questions and explained the whole process, including the prescription timeline.

The treatment worked great, but what really impressed me was how Julie actually listened and tailored everything to my specific situation instead of giving a cookie-cutter approach. You don't find that kind of personalized care often, and it really made me feel genuinely cared for.

I'm already super happy with the results and will definitely be back. If you want a dermatologist who takes time to understand your needs and creates a plan that works for your life, I highly recommend Julie at Kalia!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kelly Medina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2AxtDhDZCzmOmrUGwvony6HFZ7InLyZcjTO96Gin1cU5nK9K3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a major issue with insurance and this "maximzer hold" going on with a new pharmacy. I got scared of how late my injection be done since it's been a work in progress getting this situation figured out. I called the office and they were able to spare a injection to make sure i didnt miss it to due this mess. THANK YOU SO MUCH!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ishan Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYopAMCRADdylnFKv-DhbVbcILUciX393rCnHUGhw5UzXTH_i2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible health support. I got my checkup and never received my test reports. called multiple times, they never pick up and when they do they make lame excuses. Their timelines for test results are like as if we are living in 18th century.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gena phelps","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVbGhNK6dT7sDj9tLqy7f-IpAF-xhSJQsBt3987MrBesiqcYSA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough wonderful things about Camille at Kalia Dermatology! She is truly exceptional at what she does and has been instrumental in keeping me looking and feeling my best. Her expertise in cosmetic procedures like Botox and IPL is unmatched, and her advice is always spot-on.

Beyond her skill, she genuinely cares about her patients. During a routine skin check, she noticed a suspicious blemish that turned out to be basal cell carcinoma. Thanks to her keen eye and proactive approach, I was able to get treatment at a very early stage—something I will always be grateful for.

She is the reason I have stayed with Kalia Dermatology, and I wouldn’t trust anyone else with my face. If you’re looking for someone who is knowledgeable, meticulous, and truly invested in your well-being, look no further. I highly recommend her to anyone seeking top-tier cosmetic and dermatological care!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emily R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISf9mJlq2CGTEL_jaQbRcSnDfKX36Q1lcrOBdKpwwc1P0ifQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have had excellent experiences with Camille at Kalia.  From my very first visit she made me comfortable and answered all my questions.  The results have completely changed the way I feel about my skin and will keep my going back to Camille.","Images":null,"When":""}]

carla is seriously the best! i’ve had such great experiences with her that i personally request her every visit. she’s super kind, professional, and always makes the sessions feel comfortable and explains to me the level we're going to do that day and all of that.

highly recommend this place 🖤","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nooshin Gholami","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXw5GGQ_r9VF1R2QKLXuHWgYSE4RrZEY23xjrdWxqbJH8JqHK8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an absolutely wonderful experience getting laser treatment on my face at this office. I highly recommend this place to anyone considering laser treatments—you’ll be in amazing hands!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leilani Pearson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1mCEMKdJ_m7wNgsr3p8dEmchdbmvA3ISFwdC0oSCgIdac8gE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I purchased a 4 session package from Groupon. Would definitely recommend to anyone interested in services !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carmen Velasco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSeHF3E8906FBXQUdPCyFJQABPkSkobFy2o10kZUXLimsS6jEG=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had such great results from my laser hair removal at SEV! The whole experience is easy, quick, and worth it. Highly recommend SEV to anyone thinking about laser!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tatiana Smolin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbbfnTWuqraaH64ZF7ca0xYsVQap-hex0IL3Fpf8BXJjpI2ZND5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"UPDATE: I appreciated the manager calling me about the cleanliness concern, and by the time I went back, it had in fact been addressed—whatever it was (paint or dirt), the doors were clean.

That said, the results are what will keep me from returning.

I’ve been going to SEV Laser in San Diego for two years and have had amazing, consistent results. The laser strength was always adjusted so I could feel it, and I would go about four months with no hair growth between appointments.

At this location, the first visit I brushed it off as a one-time thing. But the second time confirmed the issue: my Brazilian area wasn’t even marked with the white pencil like they usually do, I could barely feel the laser, and I was told the strength was “correct.” A few weeks later, I had patchy hair regrowth, which clearly shows the area wasn’t treated properly. I’ve never had this issue at the San Diego location.

I’m willing to give SEV Laser another try at their new Sunnyvale location. If the experience and results are the same, I’ll unfortunately have to look elsewhere.

ORIGINAL REVIEW:
I think the doors, especially the ones leading to the treatment rooms, really need to be cleaned. They looked noticeably dirty, and honestly, it made me question the overall cleanliness and hygiene standards of the place.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER7qjnVreyI7k3tBka_epW1MzxuXiuM8dGWhn0J8yNZoRJn_JctO1v1anF8Gn-R_JlgVSe2-XUb8DSUEMsSknHdcBcyKfQw9i7H30YdB8qAI5KYgdpOZeFL2zMYitOt2XHMtemkTGL-mkAV"],"When":"2025-7-11"},{"Name":"Jacqueline Burgara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLLl4jfLwwe2NEZLk98EXOGMrbrRTr4LS75uVxYIXboKzpe-4A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I get the laser facials every two weeks since last year and my experience here has been amazing. To the nurses doing the procedure. Great communication as well!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eileen Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL-xJxtwfFH6n35jxn4JA5i7Ip4EvLHYpJjhAEJhgarSlvdhg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my first time getting laser hair removal, and Marissa was so professional and amazing! [{"Name":"Juanita Trujillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocId6Fb7HtvbmVWtJTlZ0I065uFfHPEDc03NLLNu4MR7KFH1Bg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After years of feeling self-conscious about sagging skin around my jawline and a persistent pocket of fat under my chin, I finally decided to explore a lower facelift and chin enhancement. I can confidently say—it was one of the best decisions I’ve ever made.
From the moment I walked into the clinic, I felt supported and informed. the entire staff is amazing!  My surgeon Daryl K. Hoffman, MD is World-class he took the time to understand my goals: a more defined jawline, smoother lower cheeks, and a rejuvenated neck profile. The procedure itself was surprisingly smooth, with minimal discomfort and downtime. I was back to light activities within a week, and the full results began to shine through after about 3–4 months.

What truly amazed me was how natural the results looked. My face didn’t appear “pulled” or artificial—instead, it was subtly lifted, refreshed, and refined. Friends and family kept asking if I’d been on vacation or changed my skincare routine. The transformation was that seamless.

The chin enhancement added the perfect finishing touch. It gave my lower face the structure and balance I’d always wanted, and the improvement in my neck contour was dramatic. I now feel confident in photos, and I’ve even started wearing my hair up more often to show off my new profile.
Highlights:

If you’re considering this procedure, my advice is simple: do it! The boost in confidence and the refreshed appearance are truly life-changing.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQUP0iUr_TRzhoDlAVUyGs7FZMqgVEHDquUKefMEzdtZ2DR9cpZM2c1tdGVMmhjVq82hVN3ld6UR_CnVqLDdmKDcMiYsTTK0wRtWfnrbESoGULk39Q2g-XUY0cIuJ7djvdI9u0r9LU5cmE"],"When":"2025-9-18"},{"Name":"Amy Olivetti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKRBs3qS7jCVZB3DJHUF3wdjJ6_gw_gCesLT8YC8xBcw8nj1g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best doctor EVER! Thank you, Dr. Hoffman!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tammy Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUEBL6VYQJTYmYlUNsj3shnJ5PAZU5n0fY3VhET4yw3wNKow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Dr. Hoffman is great! Lily helped me decide on services and gave me great advice. When I booked she was able to get me in when I wanted to and walked me through how the service will go. Thank you !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristy Camozzi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKkZ89NUpZxupSGSVwjBgvD2rkijuAeaojDI6iXSj786BuI3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I wanted to share my experience at Laser Away Los Gatos. (TLDR; it was really bad - they consistently messed up scheduling, the treatments weren’t effective, and they oversold their services).

The customer service was poor. My appointment times were frequently changed without asking if I was okay with it. I received text verification the day before, but my appointment time was different from what I made. I waited 20 minutes for the receptionist to call me back, but they told me my appointment wasn’t for another 20 minutes. They didn’t apologize or take responsibility for the time difference.

The results of the laser treatment were also disappointing. I was told I would be a good candidate for hair removal and that I should start seeing results after the 3rd or 4th treatment. I initially paid for 8 treatments. After my 6th treatment, I hadn’t seen any results and was recommended to buy a “maintenance package” (3 additional sessions) because I wasn’t seeing results and that this was very common.  After the 9th session, I still wasn’t noticing much progress so I spoke with the manager, who offered an additional complimentary session. After I was done with the extra 3 sessions I had to buy, I went to schedule my last complimentary session, but the receptionist told me they would no longer approve the complimentary session that had been promised and that the manager who gave it to me no longer worked there. I asked to speak to a manager, but the receptionist said there is no manager currently and I’d have to go through customer service. I asked for that number, but she said she doesn’t know it and has no way of finding it. I feel like I paid a lot of money for very minor results and it was not like the expectations promised.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We were given incorrect instructions, experienced weeks of delays, and received little to no communication. We were told records had to come directly from Kaiser, only to later be told emailing them ourselves was fine—completely contradictory and a waste of time.

We were even sent to the wrong location, and ultimately had to switch doctors because this office failed to complete the process. Worse, they did not transfer our records, forcing us to start over from scratch.

They also charged an undisclosed $100 “Outside Orders Review” fee, despite advertising transparent pricing.

Overall, this clinic wasted our time, mishandled our case, and failed to deliver the service we paid for. Avoid at all costs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Justyna Kowalczyk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkVMHt12Os74PNgQy1KuX7XAahvufOgzInPlxB46EwzEkFOZwH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you are considering this doctor for your immigration medical exam, please read this before paying anything.

My experience with this doctor and office was extremely unprofessional and upsetting. I paid $510 in cash upfront: $410 for the immigration medical exam process and $100 specifically for accepting my Kaiser lab results. After taking my money, they changed their story, said they would not accept outside lab results, and wanted to charge me even more for additional testing through their own office. They also never offered to return the $100 they took for accepting my Kaiser lab results.

Communication was very difficult, and my emails were ignored. Later, they told me they would not help me with my green card case after all. When I asked for a refund, I was told I could even be charged for time spent speaking with the receptionist, and I was intimidated with comments suggesting that if I asked for my money back, I would not be able to stay in the country.

The doctor also yelled at me and insulted me. She told me, “You are in America, so you have to speak English.” (The only time I spoke my own language was when I was explaining the situation to my husband.) I found that comment discriminatory, humiliating, and completely unacceptable. She also said that looking at my face made her feel sick.

When I later mentioned court, instead of responding professionally, she put her fingers in her ears and started saying that she could not hear me. After that, she refunded me only $310, not the full amount I had paid.

I do not recommend this doctor or this office to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Konstantinos Anastassakis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbyq_dHNBC2TWQLQoYFswjv91zQDtpAUUohoPljwF9G9DK7W-J=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"PROBABLY The BEST SMP experts in the USA, if not the world!
Goodbye Toppik forever!
Most natural rezsults I have seen in my career as a Hair Restoration surgeon myself (Konstantinos Anastassakis MD, PhD, Board Certified hair Restoration surgeon)
THIS IS WHY I TRUSTED THEM TO DO SMP ON MY OWN HEAD!
But let me explain why!
At the conclusion of the ISHRS World Congress in Hollywood, Dr. Sara Wasserbauer and faculty organized a comprehensive review and hands-on practice, OFFICIAL ISHRS Scalp Micropigmentation Workshop in Walnut Creek, California, USA.
ISHRS for those who do not know, is the International Society of Hair Restoration Surgery. I was one of the surgeons attending the workshop and I have attended 1 more in London some months ago and I am offering myself SMP in my hair restoration practice since 2017.
However, I have not decided to have it done on myself!
This changed in a matter of hours when I met the staff of Dr. Wasserbauer, and especially Bissan Debsi, one of the trainers! Seeing her work on different patients during the 2 day course, listening to her lecture, seeing the AMAZING results she was producing and understanding the depth of her knowledge and skill, I decided to have SMP done on myself!
It was a very fast session (half the time that would normally take to one of my experienced staff back home to cover all that area on my head!), painless and effective!
Just see the pics!
I have been using Toppik everyday for 12 years now.
since the SMP session, I have never used it again!
My hair looks full and so natural that I cannot stop looking myself in the mirror!
They are using the latest, innovative techniques in SMP, producing perfect results and I am SO happy that I took the right decision to finally have SMP in Dr. Sara Wasserbauer's clinic!
Don't even think about it!
Just go for it!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQuwdw37NdeL7dWfmGpqypK3ylwCbazHN9wrE3-PQnsdir9gE5eE4L3DMQjUsXs3hWaGqgopnzGwVcZIISgXJoS3VuAfsJj46m2_haqALh9HHy4Vjubx6DnxVKaYe29eD9pVU3OTQ","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQmqD9yzTlUG4qh5llJsTJVgdfgBhZ0hKzvC9FLOgjvmtHcvotnQV1nkS3h0V-HeM4_zzMm_GMA7cmluEFS2WrQ0UA3gC7Imr5ceIi8mII1BiFYlPWaC29KpZfFjO_BGhes1PIo","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQFitWzewgQNT_YE7HEyzoYmR3WvbaroRvEVI1P-ioUx6gvYPtSMMPktiRO0tFcLPIOo4SeCgZtFTQrQ6rXoem6LGaDLz-WA5YfD_W8XicrEJIbycMnj5Ke8u6hmZMkQ4YEnrXz"],"When":"2018-10-27"},{"Name":"Ali Yousefi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfkpM8gflC11ZEu9gHhnQJ6_3cKdFvhIdwGqVliMA8NfgiPvIx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Wasserbauer and her entire staff are absolutely phenomenal! I am highly satisfied with the comprehensive care I received on the day of the surgery, from the actual initial preparations, actual procedure, expertise of everyone involved, communications and friendliness. The price I paid is worth the lasting results of a successful surgery and the care I received before, during and after the hair transplant. Everything from the initial meeting to after the procedure, including her follow-up call was compassionately and professionally explained either verbally or in writing. I am very happy with my results. Thank you, Dr. Wasserbauer!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXX43nWGOEBQ5RJVHFlCNeJ2uGW5wB3-bMIJoOw7r34MsEfn65K=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I Chose Dr. Sara because she is warm, caring and understanding to the concerns I had. But Dr. Sara gave me feedback on the reasons why she would fill certain areas but let me make the final decision where I wanted to put the transplanted hair..
I highly recommend her for this very personal and most important decision.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Edward","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8-RUFDmtnTJ6UdDHTfOqJJOcOOwJdfsMZ3TDYdu5ZUGGz5A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a hair transplant from others before going to Dr. Wasserbauer so I am able to compare. Everyone is friendly and likeable, but most important is her results are superb.  She takes great care and  is able to perform the procedure painlessly (I had considerable pain from others).  She gets excellent and lasting results.   I will not require another procedure but if I did, I would not let anyone work on me but her.  I give Dr. Wasserbauer my highest recommendation for anyone desiring a hair transplant.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gurmit Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnsdDLmmJd23GqT6uW-OGf_gX3ZUPcFMP_jrxCKibfl5eZ3A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Before seeing Dr. Sara for consultation around May 2015, I've tried everything available over the counter to prevent hair loss but nothing worked. After  couple  months, I’ve noticed clear improvements in my body composition and sleep. Dr. Young and her team provide thoughtful, individualized care, and I highly recommend this clinic for anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Werdebaugh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeC77IDhD1-XCgGRPz-gnck9aeZa6gJcj09Pt3L52uvqxlC54yug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely love this office and all the services they are able to suggest, provide, and monitor to make certain you are satisfied all the way from start to finish. I’ve been to a lot of clinics in the South Bay, but my experience with Dr. Deol at Young Naturopathic Center for Wellness has been the best. I came in for prolozone injections for pain management, and was impressed by how thorough and professional everything was. After just a few weeks, I’ve noticed a big improvement in recovery after workouts and my pain is so much more manageable.  I have decided to use this clinic for hormone balancing and peptide protocols.  I was surprised that somewhere right
here in Los Gatos has so much to offer.  I really appreciated that they were up front about costs and testing needed to move forward with care.  I highly recommend this clinic to anyone looking for a functional medicine doctor.  I have been to some of the strip mall places and while they make big promises they underdeliver compared to this clinic! Amazing couldn’t thank them enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea Friese","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3nrQiZHjLMSLIT2zbeEGoADt0vJ4qc6KM0FZ54xkrM8PZpA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience with Dr. Renee Young at Young Naturopathic Center for Wellness has been hands-down the best of them all.
I originally came in for help with my hormones, expecting the usual “quick chat and good luck” routine. Instead, I was blown away by how thorough, professional, and genuinely caring the whole team was. They actually listened—like, took-notes-and-everything listened.
Fast-forward 3 months, and I’m noticing real changes: better body composition, a calmer mood, and sleep that doesn’t feel like I’m wrestling a bear all night. Honestly, I didn’t know feeling this good was an option.
Huge thanks to Dr. Young and her team. If I could give them 10 stars, I would.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ron Ricci","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKvNw1Yi_vV9kOPtpd8EWg_eWnnC2nyiNjV29ZR1m-PSbrtmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Young likely saved my life - at the very least she helped me avoid years of pain and suffering.  Her advanced blood tests identified something unusual in my results - and she presciently predicted that I had prostate cancer, even though my PSA was still in a normal range for my age.

She recommended a private MRI (Prenuvo), which identified a tumor in my prostate.  This is what is important about the private MRI:  without it, I would not have been eligible for an MRI in Medicare - because my PSA was still in the normal range.

As a result, I was able to qualify for an insurance-based MRI and a biopsy - which determined I had cancer with a Gleason score of 8, which is an aggressive form of the cancer.

Yesterday I had my prostate removed - to hopefully expel the cancer forever.

None of this would have been possible without the smarts, insights, kindness and experience of Dr. Renee Young - I am forever grateful to you and will never forget what you did for me.  ❤️❤️🩷","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kate Biagini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFISok1OI5Ln9EBf4R05q4ckw4AE5-tCUkmv82CJTqTgquRzQvOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have been working with Dr. Young for our son’s serious sports injuries. The orthopedic surgeon is amazed at the rate of bone growth and incision healing after our son’s sessions in the HBOT and the peptide injections that Dr Young recommended. The entire staff and support team here is knowledgeable, professional, kind, and never pushy. I whole heartedly recommend this facility.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Molly Boudreault","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhi0aWkxcAWLXvQ38ZQ3s7tL3RBWFApZjuAjWHu36pICYYPzk6aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been seeing Dr. Renee Young at Young Wellness for years, and she is truly the best. From wellness infusions to bioidentical hormones to food and genetic testing, she is the most thorough and thoughtful doctor I’ve ever worked with. She is brilliant, always up to date on the latest research, and takes the time to really listen and care.

As a cancer survivor, I can honestly say Dr. Young does more for me in terms of diagnostics and prevention than my oncologist. Her proactive, holistic approach gives me peace of mind and has been life-changing for my health. She’s not only cared for me, but also for my husband and my 10-year-old son and I recommend her to all of my friends and family.

If you’re looking for a doctor who combines deep medical knowledge with compassion and personalized care, I can’t recommend Dr. Young highly enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erika Weidner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAPibClIWqr0xrzrCO_loGeJmmzHB-LacA5fP8lIxIPVJEjSTmKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Wrote a review years ago and it has vanished. I think prospect clients should be aware of pitfalls of visiting an ND office such as this. There are enormous benefits but also drawbacks. This is a money making machine and you will be upsold on everything. I saw Dr. Young for years and then requested an annual blood draw one month after the one year mark. I made it clear I would make an in person appt after the blood draw. I was told I needed a full one hour visit (cha ching at over $400) to order the blood draw then another follow up. This was insane. And insulting since I was not a first time client. I quit. I found that every time I left there was a new plan, new trajectory and I was sold endless IVs and Supplements. Here is the thing. There is now an over abundance of information from doctors online on the healthspan trajectory. So so so much. And there are amazing telehealth companies and testing companies like Function that are extraordinary and much better priced. That is the route I took and I am happy. Medicine as a busy is tricky. It does not mean there is no value but you can't always tell what is being said and done to rope you back in ($$$). This is legit as it is a business. But there was a boundary crossed for me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah Jenan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPSQxbkeeawCMac5_O1iB5DI4kDnLYLV6TXjDXlV4MzGtZxEj5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a patient of Dr. Young for six years, I can attest to her exceptional skills and compassionate care. Dr. Young combines her expertise in gut health, the endocrine system, and musculoskeletal connections to effectively address my health concerns. Her empathetic approach builds trust and understanding, especially during my perimenopausal journey. I always feel supported and guided towards optimal health. Thank you, Dr. Young, I'm living my healthiest, strongest life because of you! 😊","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Sylvia Bellinghausen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0JFLRUbTXvfzh8m33uRm4GROcn79nhQkoUD8pDfEl8VZGQFo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Bates has been the most meaningful part of my self-improvement journey. From the very beginning, he saw me as an individual and understood my personal goals and concerns. Because of his care and expertise, my life has truly changed. For the first time, I feel empowered, confident, and completely at peace with my body.

The entire team made this experience even more special. Donna, Tammy, Yaya, and especially my nurse Maria treated me with such kindness and compassion. They made me feel safe, supported, and genuinely cared for every step of the way. I never once felt alone in this process.

The office is absolutely beautiful, with a warm and comforting atmosphere that instantly puts you at ease. I am beyond grateful for Dr. Bates and his incredible team. This experience has meant more to me than I can fully express.

2nd Review for Hollie

I don’t even know where to begin. For more than 10 years, I carried the weight of my scars and cratering — trying treatment after treatment, hoping for change, and feeling disappointed every time. It affected my confidence more than I ever admitted out loud. I had started to believe this was just something I would have to live with forever.
Then I met Hollie.
What she has done for my skin feels nothing short of life-changing. She saw hope where I had lost it. Her patience, precision, and incredible attention to detail made me feel like I truly mattered. She didn’t just treat my skin — she cared about my journey.
When I saw my results, I was honestly emotional. For the first time in over a decade, I feel comfortable in my own skin. I feel confident. I feel free.
Hollie, thank you for giving me back something I thought was gone forever. You have no idea how much this means to me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sophia D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJxTN0ozUKeCwcp7uu1_t2pO9lXHFnyC3i4VsMWn1-N1qnG5A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Bates is an incredibly skilled and humble surgeon. After interviewing several surgeons locally and out of state, he was the only one who truly listened and delivered on all my requests. He’s approachable, easy to talk to, and his work speaks for itself. In a single day, he performed a lower blepharoplasty, fat grafting to the face, chin liposuction, and a breast lift with a small reduction.

Natural, tasteful results are possible for younger patients like me approaching 40. The combination of procedures complemented each other beautifully, giving me a refreshed, balanced look without anyone being able to pinpoint exactly why.

If you want refined, natural results and a surgeon who truly cares about delivering on your goals, Dr. Bates is the one to trust. Make suer to ask him to show my before-and-after results in the office. His fees are also very reasonable for the Bay Area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan Kelly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfLAKeO4jt-PHV30QWpikvE_FM6UwtuVSWAB1z58fkFckAJtU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I want to extend my gratitude and appreciation to Dr. Bates and his staff for their work.  My daughter had a chin implant procedure done by Dr. Bates that looks and feels absolutely natural as possible. I did a lot of research and interviewed several plastic surgeons in the Bay Area and decided to go with Dr. Bates because of his excellent credentials, kindness and knowledge.  He explained the entire procedure in detail, including the appropriate chin size that would balance out my daughter’s entire face. My daughter felt comfortable with the procedure every step of the way.  We are absolutely thrilled with the results! Dr. Bates and his staff thoroughly exceeded our expectations.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Katrina Sherer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWevgEafUv266iBkxhuRU2erht2x5bqriJhMcXYJhHBGZOcXxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Bates is an extremely skilled plastic surgeon as well as a very kind and empathetic Doctor. I needed a lumpectomy (and a reduction on the other breast to match) and he did a truly amazing job. I now have slightly smaller breasts that look natural and well shaped .... I always feel like the result that he achieved turned my distressing experience with cancer from lemons into lemonade! I am deeply grateful to Dr Bates for both his great work and his kindness. He is a wonderful and very talented Doctor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chanel Rand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURcAdx2jF6Jby4ha1KClUFDgGWramhRNsRxCiP6mT-BvAK48h-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Bates is hands down the best. He explains everything with detail and answers any questions so you feel comfortable. I would recommend anyone planning on getting a breast augmentation to go to him. I have heard nothing but good things about this Dr.  Bates and the other doctors at this office. The staff and nurses are  knowledgeable and super nice and my  whole experience was awesome and since it was my first surgical experience and a really good one from the time I made the appointment till my last was a really good experience  I was always seen right away. I never sat waiting like at some other doctors offices I’ve been to before I I discovered Dr. Bates. Did I  Mention I love my results!!!! I got exactly what I wanted . I couldn’t be happier. Let them know you saw my review when you make your appointment!! You won’t be disappointed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lexi Stevens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWudU_pE4VrmGt7y36FWpVH6GeTwhWroNUakKkwjgRMriqXA4op=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I could not have made a better decision than choosing Dr. Bates as my plastic surgeon. I had been wanting a BBL on and off for years, as I had wanted to transform my athletic build to more feminine. When I consulted with Dr. Bates, I knew he envisioned everything exactly what I was hoping to accomplish with this surgery. The two most important things that stood out to me was his honesty about the results he could accomplish with one BBL surgery and the fact that he was not trying to sell himself. He really showed that he cares about his patients, which is why I chose to move forward with him, rather than various other surgeons in CA.

During my consultation, he was also very honest about the complications that can happen with getting a BBL, and gave plenty of pamphlets explaining everything one should know before surgery. I had already talked myself out of getting a BBL various times because I would go read the horror stories about women going to Miami or Mexico to get a less expensive procedure done, but then are faced with numerous complications, and unfortunately, sometimes death. With Dr. Bates, because he showed he cared about his patients and was being honest about everything, I felt extremely confident in him and his staff. Fast forward to two days later, I was in the OR getting a BBL by Dr. Bates!

Not to brag, but I had probably one of the best recoveries post BBL surgery. The day after my surgery, I had to stop myself from moving around too much. I felt amazing, only a little sore on my abdomen, back, and butt. A better word to describe the feeling was sensitive. I felt so good, and already happy with my new body, even though I had a lot of swelling. My 1-week post-op appointment with Dr. Bates made me feel like a million dollars, because I felt amazing and was healing very well. Of course, there are so many factors that play into recovery, but I can guarantee that a plastic surgeon who performed your surgery properly plays a large role.

If you are looking for a plastic surgeon, I highly recommend choosing Dr. Bates. He is not only a phenomenal surgeon, but he is also a very down to earth human being. I made the best decision for myself when choosing Dr. Bates as my plastic surgeon!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Annie Phan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5gnD7roKN2QogT3ETi4HvMUDiddLTeCnLrm8jybc-SSIw2Tju=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Doctor Bates is the best for breast augmentation. He is very sweet, details, and skills. I love his work and cannot thank you him enough.  I would highly recommend him to everyone. Thank you so much Dr, Bates and all the staffs at his office.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tandis Nowrouzi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoQQ6KEcWl8w-8EAdBZ60KWS05vJXibBQF6b3dF9QeLtZFqFj_dA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Bates delivered an amazing experience from start to finish. I met with him for a complimentary consultation for breast augmentation and lift for mild tuberous breasts. The first encounter was super pleasant! His bedside manner is superb! He was clear in explaining what would give me the best outcome and answered all my (many) questions. He knew I had done my research and was very transparent about everything that could be done. I saw him a second time because I had even more questions, and he was just as kind as the first time. I had 8 other consultations, but ended up going back to Dr Bates because he gave me the best information and scenario for my particular case. Every appointment with him was this way. I got my BA/BL a week ago, and he nailed it! Even though my case was slightly complicated, his work looks fantastic and I'm thrilled with the results so far. I highly recommend him for all your PS needs. I also got Botox for my TMJ with him, and one syringe of Voluma, and I'm pleased with both! Dr Bates rocks!!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Stacy Takahashi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBsRB8CX0Ul8yDvzNrMwg2dFVEonHotF3NZ1C9evKIF8UlAlf6mQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After a botched surgery by a previous surgeon in Laguna Beach, I had a lot of anxiety about finding someone to perform corrective surgery. A friend of mine, who is a nurse and had undergone procedures with Dr. Maser in the past, recommended him. I did extensive research before finally choosing Dr. Maser, and I’m so glad I did. From the initial consultation, Dr. Maser and his entire team treated me with professionalism, kindness, and genuine care.

He performed a BBL reduction, scar revision, and liposuction to my lateral flanks and back bra area—correcting the mistakes from my previous procedure and restoring both my confidence and my body to a more natural shape. I had felt incredibly self-conscious for years. I even worked with a trainer for a year to try and change my shape before finally deciding to seek surgical assistance. The results have exceeded my expectations. Dr. Maser is a safe, honest, and highly skilled surgeon. He did a great job managing my expectations and clearly outlining every step of the process.

His staff is equally amazing—supportive, knowledgeable, and always available to answer questions. Donna, the office manager, was wonderful, and the nurse who assisted me on the day of surgery, Mary, was incredibly kind and attentive. The front desk staff is cheerful and helpful too. The office is beautiful, modern, and clean, offering a full range of services, including injectables (fillers and toxins) and some of the most advanced lasers on the market. They also have GLP-1’s (weight loss shot)!

They participate in Alle, which helps you save money on treatments. I highly recommend signing up at Alle.com or asking the front desk for more information on the program and any available coupons. I promise this is not a paid for review…I work in the aesthetic industry so I have a keen eye when offices are on point.

I’ll update this post with my before and afters once I am finished healing.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESkEPRjxEdQeGlVFmtdF37XIj5Icr9hFshG1OO5io35WgOlseZiWJR9LbT78Snemb9bvvaO8yWdCbUBaIVVjQWvodV51e7O2qTTlCLCoyDWG7eQTC8V8quozkrTDIBs1PMWJBv45A"],"When":"2025-4-17"},{"Name":"Cindy Orosz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5vSZfbwctvo3E6_goqEvhpo5Xius42yAhRmcQOBLW_pYM-bzV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the privilege of undergoing a mommy makeover with Dr. Maser , and I couldn't be more thrilled with the results. I wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone considering mommy makeovers, including tummy tucks or breast augmentation. What sets Dr. Maser apart is his genuine care for his patients. From the very first consultation, he took the time to listen and understand my desires for my body. His ability to communicate and ensure that he understood my goals was truly exceptional.

Not only did Dr. Maser demonstrate a deep
understanding of what I wanted, but he also delivered outstanding results. My recovery process was remarkably smooth, with minimal scarring. Even other medical professionals have been astonished by the beauty of my results and the incredible healing I experienced.

If you are searching for a cosmetic surgeon, I urge you to consider Dr. Maser, His dedication to his patients, paired with his exceptional skills, make him the ideal choice. I am confident that, like me, you will be thrilled with the outcome. Don't hesitate to schedule a free consultation with Dr. Maser – he might just become your primary cosmetic surgeon of choice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Drew Whited","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqRo2U-rAOl48L6SNQH3NXzTJEzpbC2F68ybU3j9gbPgKmQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Maser is such an amazing surgeon!!! He is so easy to work with and truly cares about his patients. I felt so comfortable and confident with him. His work is absolute art!! I 110% recommended him!! His staff is lovely as well! They are extremely helpful and friendly! Surgery is never fun, but I look forward to working with him again soon!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"tracy rose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6SoPI1RU6PX3_fE5Js4MAdqGNuZR79m0VyvnLgFEn9iYlSA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had debated on a cosmetic surgery for 7 years and I saw some work on a couple people done by Dr. Maser and was very impressed. I met with him and was blown away, not just by his work, but by his compassion and care. Dr. Maser did a great job on my surgery and responded immediatley to any concerns or issues that I had. The surgery and recovery went great with no complications or issues. He follows up with phone calls to make sure that everything is going well and wont hesitate to see you if there is a concern. He cares about his patients and it's obvious by the way he cares for them. I would recommend anyone who is thinking about cosmetic surgery to consult with Dr. Maser. The office staff is just as amazing. They are all very nice and do a great job.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stacy M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1HoENpxz9r3Fj1wiOEbkaix7sCk_CBZScldTk62_JoH7CUA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Maser performed my breast reduction surgery this year in August. This is a surgery I had been contemplating for a long time.
I can't praise Dr. Maser highly enough. My consult was not rushed, was very thorough and all my questions and concerns were addressed.  At each visit I was encourage to ask any questions I may have.  He is easy to communicate with. The results of my surgery were as I had hoped they would be.  I an thrilled with the results.  I feel so much better physically in many ways and they look great too! My outcome was a success.
Dr. Maser's assistant Sabrina was wonderful. She is very kind, patient and caring.  If I had any questions or had any concerns, she responded to my requests quickly. She was very gentle when taking my drain tubes out. She was also patient and prompt with my paperwork needs.
The reception staff were also very nice and were helpful in scheduling me and taking my messages.
Altos Oaks surgery center is wonderful.  The facility is great and the nurses were awesome.  I felt well cared for when I had my surgery.
One reason I had been putting off this surgery is that I have a low pain threshold.  I was so pleased to find out that my post op experience was not bad.  I ended up using only Tylenol for  "pain" control.  I was not actually in any pain.  I could always sleep and move around without a problem.    I would do this again in a heartbeat.  If I ever needed any other surgery in Dr. Maser's department,  I would choose him and his wonderful staff again.  I can't thank them enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisa Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQ5mJGTnPI3xw9ojnCFF6dVK7jA_HGFj4y_6QP8mnvkhdc7w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you want the best, look no further! The BEST!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQTbwjJTIar1HHndGCrEqChzbfdc1_jXGnqcwzq7otsJnsc-ZM4xGugJoXDGcB0aH-a7bkwgpVCke5y5dIQYiLjzwk0srmXkeivg6gFoGxXVgF3KHaYD5TBndQLWg5lrpuzH1nQTdPwShU","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESg12rNp5FjZ34ihG0QuEqt2p_YtTcgoBGeQP5jljeiJFpLSVgsI26sH71nmfyXSd2mrBGPGp_W0PQdfjOdNnJ9Qd8XfbzOSxQl9wMeuFKxhotwXoV-WSy8lPtB_TBfLVZy4FkwB-qom7Zx"],"When":"2026-3-3"},{"Name":"H M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2lr3ZI6fm3ofMeBY5eBbTByDD3x7cjrKmb8wHZSyr82ExrfU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hello ladies,

I just want to give the biggest shout out to my injector, Allison, at Ardea Aesthetics! So far I have gone a total of 4 times to her medspa, 2 for botox, and 2 for follow up/touch ups. Each time I arrive, I'm greeted with her warm welcome. The spa is cozy, cute, and clean. I am new to botox, and a little late to the game, as I am in my early thirties, yet Allison delivered wonderful results. I know some of you girlies love hearing all the details, so bear with me, and I will spill the tea.

First off, I wanted my first time (and now I want every time) to treat my face as a whole unit, that means I get botox in my upper regions and lower regions of my face, a total of 75 to 80 units. I realize to some that is quite a lot, but hey, to each their own, and I wanted that. So I got my forehead, glabella, brow lift, crows feet, lip flip, and nefretiti done with botox only. And girlies, let me tell you, my skin is loving it!

It has been about 2 weeks and it has definitely kicked in by now, but I could feel that it was kicking in by like 3rd day (remember, we all metabolize botox at different rates), and this botox will stay for a good 3 months or so. Allison is thorough and gentle with her technique as well with her bedside manners while she explains why it does what it does, or why something just won't work as well as we thought it would. Ask questions, she makes time to answer them all honestly. She also has an artistic eye; my eyebrows have always been a bit uneven, and she was able to correct them with this last session, so I'm super happy about that.

Furthermore, I also wanted to mention their skincare products. Now I know getting botox and whatnot is already pretty pricey, so this might not be something else you want to add, but I gotta say, atleast give it a think over when it comes to her glow pads, hydra boost hyaluronic moisturizer, and hydratint all mineral sunscreen broad spectrum which has an spf of 36. I absolutely love these products and my skin loves them more! My skin is so sensitive and acne prone and yet these products have made my skin glow! My husband always says my skin looks young and so clean! The glow pads & hydra boost lasted me 3 months, I just purchased the hydratint the other day (bc I tried a sample of it before I made the plunge to purchase) and giiirl, I'm so happy I did because this will last me like 6 months it's a decent sized bottle and literally matches my skin, lightweight, not greasy and a little goes a long way; that's with all their skincare products.

So to make a short story long, again, I just wanted to 10/10 recommend my injector, Allison, at Ardea Aesthetics for anyone looking to get GREAT results from botox and medical grade skincare products. Stay beautiful, ladies; you already are, inside & out! ✨️ God Bless you all!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWb5s6EU_TAqvCDuzR5HJnVD34_GhrO7F2WNszFAEFVIE0mNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Allison is amazing! Took her time to make sure I ended up with the exact results I was looking for. She truly cares about how you look and feel with your results. So many friends have commented asking where I went and even have booked appointments. She is very professional, ensures everything is sterile and her office is very clean. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lindsay Kolterman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnlsOTahFKmzBY8Ed9BUfdF5hRAY6rBlEI1Em8Z4AlhtLIPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went for my first treatment today and was thoroughly impressed. THANK YOU FOR A WONDERFUL EXPERIENCE!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maja Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBc-Ez59ntqHoxgkbJZzMm9qnc69DpuXwzxKLSgVEu977_Fsg0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t say enough great things about Dr. Chernoff and his amazing team! Huge shout-out to Danni for always going above and beyond to make me feel super comfortable! I highly recommend this practice to anyone looking for natural, beautiful results with a team you can truly trust.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amanda Evans","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEj9szoHNZB5P-WmcYYPA5vtVLSetCEWD5fAHV7dscd8gXBupN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chernoff Cosmetic is such a great place! They really do care here and have one’s best interest in mind to help you achieve your goals.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan Kurada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVD--asnUXeONxdtsBqBByR4RmIguPfQ-VkCsTyjELJ_KpCnK0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have thoroughly enjoyed my services with Chernoff Cosmetics for the past three years. I highly recommend Jessica and Chernoff Cosmetics to anyone!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Tracy Ann Langley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3RPZ0XR3_tB4knxBiyyH3RhUecyrWgP3eUpRSntLKtp4_0pM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience with several skin treatments yesterday and I am very pleased with the results this morning. The microdermabrasion felt great, was completely painless, and left my complexion looking more even. The dermaplane was also very satisfying and gave my skin an incredibly smooth texture.

I then had a TSA/SAL peel that was finished with a retinoid. The retinoid had a bit of a kick at first, but quickly settled, and I experienced no discomfort afterward. I know that some people feel heat or stinging, but for me it was very manageable. In fact, I was able to go directly to Hardesters and Grocery Outlet afterward with no issues at all.

Jan Meier is extremely knowledgeable and skilled in her work. She is always available by phone or text, responds quickly, and is very accommodating when it comes to scheduling changes. She is thoughtful, kind, and takes the time to listen to my concerns. I truly appreciate her interest in trying new solutions for my ongoing skin concerns. Her expertise with HVL laser treatments and overall skin care has made a noticeable difference for me.

This morning, my skin feels refreshed, smooth, and healthy. I feel very positive about the results and confident in Jan's care and competency.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQxt7ugQut4zuTIefuYtDfJRHhZ0NtneLcS5wyJTBwHX0llreI5VlQomFm4fPT7JrKcG8au6YZwgExjFz53KDhWw4jGws6El4pqWRedXjf-gQLf5Dqo3zRmatfyniZj8DznJaJyxJ-E_vlB","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQJ_kEJpdnBRcQUiW9Ne8cAw2-wfYvjnrHTMTSdYwhcsxmNh-CLWMB7VYEZobBfJ8_kvo3TpREYVXH00IJB1tSFe9yAeY6U9CdrT-xZOhV4gqior20xDfDZ3rQDOei7uiNbbRxOnXWa5-XA"],"When":"2025-8-27"},{"Name":"Cindy Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUm4eun0eajAX0ziHMvKrFcZUSN5cxZ_0QX-YBJUmRKE8OC-RVAcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great skincare in Lake County! I just got off the phone with Lucy who went above and beyond to help me. I was unfamiliar with the opus laser. Lucy went above and beyond in, sharing her experience, downtime, pros and cons and recommendations of the procedure. As an aesthetic nurse myself, I am familiar with most procedures and laser downtimes, but, I was very unfamiliar with this one.
Lucy explained everything in detail,  such as medication  I may need , what I should stop using topically, and how her experience had greatly improved her skin. She did not rush or make me feel stupid!
I just want to say I have never had someone take such time with detailed patience and love to explain the procedure.

It’s important to point people like this out. She makes this Med Spa a better place! Thank you so much Lucy for your kindness. ♥️♥️♥️ Elise","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jessica chavers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8hkiHkjPzP2lP-R9OXMFBYEcuuI9-nXSPnBTeJuYE4Z_nYg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot recommend nurse Katie at Amour Medical Aesthetics enough. She is absolutely incredible, so knowledgeable, gentle, and comforting. From the very beginning, she made me feel at ease and was so reassuring, always willing to answer every single question or concern I had, even the “crazy” ones.

Katie is very experienced and takes her time to make sure you are completely comfortable before starting. She made sure I was fully numb before my procedures, and I experienced no pain at all. The best part is I woke up the next day with no bruising, which is almost unheard of with fillers, but just goes to show how skilled she is.

I had lip, chin, and jaw filler done, and I have never felt happier or more confident in my own skin. Katie truly changed my life and made me feel so good about myself. On top of her talent, the office itself is beautiful, welcoming, and professional. Everyone there makes you feel comfortable from the moment you walk in.

Their pricing is also very reasonable compared to other places I called, which makes the experience even better. Katie is truly the best at what she does, and I would recommend her and Amour Medical Aesthetics to anyone considering fillers or aesthetics treatments.

Katie is a gem, I would not go anywhere else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Samantha Rae","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUk4rpFOGOOqlstWoxrgY3jH0nOsb6gtyja56tHuh7idFojQYYu=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"if i could give more stars i would. i went in to get a round of botox and expressed to her that the last injector i went to didn’t really listen or explain the procedure to me (im new to botox) katie explained the process from start to finish and explained why she put the botox where she did. really took her time to make sure i was comfortable and really just made the experience so much better. i will be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bella Shoop","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrO-H4MkD1vj67NtPhDVqHUktClom3RL1CKsL_RU0WR0czEWuS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Katie was absolutely wonderful! [{"Name":"Nicholle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6mM77mxOGz4yodUALFa04jPLFpcr-2lpQUW6DlfmMoe6f280=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Why in the world would anyone leave a review for a plastic surgeon’s office about the receptionist? If you look at the reviews, the only bad ones are from someone’s experience with a front member of the staff that probably doesn’t even work there anymore. Kevin Myers is a fantastic surgeon, I’ve had nothing but a fantastic experience with my procedure and the staff. Highly recommend, and super affordable as far as cosmetic surgery is concerned.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"B L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLH4qAuJYZBErpJZGaynkGo4JUUGJeZGW7az__eaWMqqhh69w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I just walked out before establishing care because the receptionist was cold and frankly rude, and the vibe was so off I got a feeling of dread like I was going to make a mistake by continuing to be there. When I called to make the appointment, whoever I spoke to was polite, and asked for my notes from my derm and insurance information to be sent over. I did this same day. Today when I went in for my appointment the receptionist didnt even look me in the face when greeting me with the most perfunctory "hello do you have an appointment" which immediately made me feel queasy. She then asked for a copy of my driver's license. I asked why? She said to make sure you are who you say you are. I said I wasnt comfortable with that. If they wanted to just see it, sure I suppose? Though I have never had that request at a medical office before. But why do you need a copy on file?? Then she asks for my insurance cards to which I said, per your establishments request I already had that information sent over... She just looked at me then gave me the paperwork. When I sat down to start filling it out it was dead quiet and I just felt like something was so off. I sat my unfilled paperwork on the counter and walked out. Maybe some people are ok with that level of interaction but I wasn't and chose to go with my gut. If the reception is like that I didn't want to find out what the dr was like and be in a closed room where I might feel trapped. I left a review on this page and Dr Meyers has a listing under his own name for some reason.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicholle Haber","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5tKOqmd76NjsWVCbRehr7a7q-1B7nunYyaT9Vd8AFjyWlz-1F=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s a bummer to see the bad reviews or mostly just a receptionist when it’s a plastic surgery center. I don’t know about others, but I’m more concerned with the work rather than how the receptionist treats me. Although in my experience, I’ve had nothing but wonderful encounters with all of the staff. I’ve gone to Dr. Myers for anything cosmetic surgery related since 2013 and recently had extensive Facelift work.
There are not a ton of before and after pics On the website, so please don’t judge that. I can tell you firsthand that I am beyond impressed with my experience and my surgery outcome. For frame of reference, I had a facelift, brow lift, and a lip lift.  Highly recommend","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Danielle Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAAkcxR_uyiG01pkusEDPqlyj0tE0H5MLFTsnz5J4Awb30TjqN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have used dr. Kevin Myers for several cosmetic procedures and have had a wonderful experience with not only the staff but the outcome of the procedures as well. There are not a lot of wonderful before and after pictures so I wanted to come here and leave a review. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Terri Morey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuoi4I9n2woCufSXHyHG4QhPH5JAKZJHrT8wgdUyVq85kKqw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am 35 and was going through a lot of hard emotional decisions when I was looking for a plastic surgeon to get a double mastectomy.
When I met The staff and nurses at north state I was treated so well and so pleased. After my first appointment meeting Dr. Hartmann I was so comforted and felt like she was very invested in me and my journey. Fast forward now through two surgeries and many many office visits and I am beyond thankful I chose her as my doctor. She is so  professional and her knowledge, compassion, confidence and humility exceeds any doctor I have ever met or could of ever dreamed of. I would choose her as my doctor a million times over if I had to make that choice again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer Olivares","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXas8IbdXpYy7FYRgzgq8rdbHdmUxHXQFqEsHlAkqBQywpI3_VL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I saw some of the bad reviews for Northstate Plastic Surgery and debated whether I should go to my appointment. Although it was a gut feeling it proved true. I wasn’t going to say anything but to prevent others from receiving horrible treatment, I will.
For the most part her ratings look great, educational background looks good, and as a mother seems like someone who understands. However, Dr. Emily C. Hartmann is extremely unprofessional, and although looks/ acts caring, was unfortunately not. I went to my appointment after scheduling it months in advance and even confirmed the day of, but as soon as I arrived they sent someone to tell me she no longer does the procedure. (That’s on the official website and something she told me herself is what “she loves to do”) What kind of doctor makes someone travel far and tells them that they no longer do a procedure without even an explanation?! I would have been content to see the doctor at least so she could tell me to my face, but when she didn’t I realized how cold and truly unprofessional she is. I am glad I got away while I still could, please save yourself the hassle of dealing with unprofessional surgeons and look elsewhere.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maggie Pena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnq8TzxexuJaBvAtJZnOHrnkaDfevVl3-Gs_FqTrVMv69L5A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Staff is quite snippy and ironically impatient with patients. Asked the receptionist several reasonable questions to be informed about what my options look like and she sat in silence for 3-5 seconds with every question and then gave half assed answers. Extremely disappointing and honestly embarrassed by the tone and lack of customer service training these girls have.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shana Kong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8jR1Qca2EawpqYG4jWmYPkNl8zaZVG3xLXRrCKBc-OensOMQP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Emily Hartman performed my surgery. I had a lipoma removed on the anterior side of my body on the shoulder/chest area. She did an amazing job! The scar is small and has been healing well- it was been 2 months since my surgery. She is such a genuinely kind and caring person. She always gives me hugs which is so sweet of her. She let me text her after my surgery in case I had any questions and boy did I have a lot (I'm a worry wart). She replied quickly every time and answered my questions and concerns. I highly recommend Dr. Hartman.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I called to let them know and asked if they wanted me to reschedule. The office was happy to make it work. I have been dealing with acne and ready to get some help. Thank you to your staff for making an experience so positive when in todays world, most people wouldn’t.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Claire Costner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWZ3nPIkh2IE2jz87sjcObYOyhAV0HPMWR7eGc88DlU_iyLkwNhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This was my first visit with a dermatologist, and I walked in hoping for reassurance. I recently had a precancerous spot cryoed, and with both my mom and grandma having had skin cancer, I was understandably nervous.
The doctor, however, felt very standoffish from the start. He didn’t sit down during the appointment, which made it feel rushed and gave the impression he wasn’t fully present or engaged with what I was saying. When I pointed out the cryoed spot and shared my concerns, he showed little interest and simply told me to “come back in a year.” For someone with my family history and skin mileage, a full year between checks feels like a long time.
My advice to the clinic would be to offer more patient-centered communication — especially for first-time dermatology visits. Taking a moment to sit, listen, and explain things clearly would go a long way. A little reassurance and education can make a huge difference for patients who are coming in anxious about potential skin cancer.
I’m glad I went, but I left feeling dismissed rather than supported. I’ll be looking for a dermatologist who takes the time to connect, communicate, and truly address concerns.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"George","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXoKoVkb3xmngzR6mzKuTELp0zm5yBjSd1N1Nv0g3brTJwRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"PA who removed my sutures was 1st rate. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Rachael Draper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVLB0-G0vyzkowFM-qY2cqs0IRh8EoPv0hc17F4BHnrexWaA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I saw Colleen in the spring of 2023, but withheld my review until now because I wasn’t sure at the time how to process what happened because I was fairly new to receiving electrolysis treatments.

While Colleen was outwardly friendly and personable in person, after a botched treatment she was unsympathetic and unhelpful. I have received electrolysis treatments on my chin/jaw from one previous practitioner for only two treatments before she had a health crisis and stepped back from seeing clients…so I sought out Colleen, very early in my journey.

Colleen only treated one concentrated area on my chin, very intensely. It caused the entire side of my face to swell, turn red, and dimple. The reaction lasted well over a week. When I contacted her about it, she told me it must have been something that I did to make that happen. I was confused at the time because I didn’t do anything different than I had my previous practitioner, whom I never had a reaction from. But I thought maybe she was right because I was new to these treatments.

Nevertheless, I chose not to go back to someone who was flippant and rude to me about my concerns. I found someone in Roseville and have had 15+ successful sessions, on my chin/jaw, without adverse reactions with my new practitioner.

I now know Colleen should have been using a “thin the herd” method to prevent adverse reactions and limit the possibility of damage to the skin that causes orange peel-like texture issues that could require laser treatments to correct. So beware of Colleen’s technique for electrolysis, it can be damaging and harmful.

And it was honestly very hurtful how rude she was towards me after messing up my face. She was also very hard to schedule with and gave the impression she didn’t even want to have a new client. All very strange for a woman who played Christian music through our whole session.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deb Sioux","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWD8GTzG8HtNc7XItVHPDFAClYEAyy2MdtyXspRCIQmPdrHBUGIvw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing, delightful, personable, caring, professional and a perfectionist.  I can't say enough about Colleen Pembroke's services and who she is. I just finished my touch up eyeliner appointment.  I'm confident after the initial work that I will be just as pleased after the normal swelling goes down. I just had her put in some brown on top of the beautiful black subtle lines from a month ago.  I've had so many compliments and now 2 of my friends will soon have her do their eyeliner.  Colleen is the best!
Oh, someone mentioned her Christian music?  I just asked her for my favorite, NPR, and she happily changed it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Patricia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQwD79526SeVWN02COMb0ZC1na1UzywFzJIa2lG4zrZa7Zbg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Past experience with Coleen's work. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Danielle M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3jLwTeU46LFyRi3uAE2_smbH7K_eFcVVkGdU7ivEyVU2UFqWFww=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"First, know that his hands are unsteady. They are visibly shakey. Whether it is neurological or a symptom of something else, I do not know. I reiterate what other reviewers have said about Dr. Meyers' sloppy, uneven work and profound scarring. What's worse, he denies the obvious unless you are persistent and the damage severe. A second opinion and revision was necessary in my case. He is under investigation by the medical board of California. Look elsewhere.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"B L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLH4qAuJYZBErpJZGaynkGo4JUUGJeZGW7az__eaWMqqhh69w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I just walked out before establishing care because the receptionist was cold and frankly rude, and the vibe was so off I got a feeling of dread like I was going to make a mistake by continuing to be there. When I called to make the appointment, whoever I spoke to was polite, and asked for my notes from my derm and insurance information to be sent over. I did this same day. Today when I went in for my appointment the receptionist didnt even look me in the face when greeting me with the most perfunctory \"hello do you have an appointment\" which immediately made me feel queasy. She then asked for a copy of my driver's license. I asked why? She said to make sure you are who you say you are. I said I wasnt comfortable with that. If they wanted to just see it, sure I suppose? Though I have never had that request at a medical office before. But why do you need a copy on file?? Then she asks for my insurance cards to which I said, per your establishments request I already had that information sent over... She just looked at me then gave me the paperwork. When I sat down to start filling it out it was dead quiet and I just felt like something was so off. I sat my unfilled paperwork on the counter and walked out. Maybe some people are ok with that level of interaction but I wasn't and chose to go with my gut. If the reception is like that I didn't want to find out what the dr was like and be in a closed room where I might feel trapped.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"mara hale","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPRv4zSfYHpuq2q_MVcef6E9iBkRRe2sC4evfBsLN_z22Gaw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"One of my saline implants was shrinking and Dr Meyers and I decided to change them both out with silicone implants because they about 20 years old and I so regret it.  Not only did they come out uneven in size they aren't positioned the same either.  I can't even wear snug clothes anymore because it is noticable.  The first day out of surgery I complained that there was something hung up on my right breast he said they just need to heal.  The next three visits the same and finally he agreed that the right one is a little smaller and has a pouch at the bottom.  He then wanted to charge me more than the original amount to fix both.  I honestly can't even trust him to do anymore work on me.  Every day I have to look at my body and it makes me so angry.  He should of tried to fix it for free.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janet C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJArnelT4ixjsb9r6JV5BwjqVM3uznKASm9kCOIIFLwfKM96A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a breast reduction a few years ago and waited to do a review, hoping some of the scars would’ve gone away. I started with hair removal on my upper lip and eventually had my chin done after discovering I was morphing into a wizard after the birth of my third son. I had botox starting in my late twenties to stop stress induced furrowing that was causing headaches. It has helped me age gracefully and also stopped the headaches. As I got older I eventually had my lips filled. I love that Elan keeps the aesthetic natural and only fills to replenish what is naturally lost over time. I never looked like a freaky fish. Laxity in my mid face started to set in right around forty and Dysport was used to refill the volume that was lost on my cheeks. The results were immediate and totally mind blowing. I have also had sculptra injections to help restore lost collagen in areas that are thinning out, particularly around the mouth and shin where some sagging was setting in. Elan is an incredibly talented artist and brilliant medical professional. I have always felt totally safe and heard during our consultations and appointments and she has always sent me out looking better than I could ever anticipate. Renee offers impeccable customer service  and I always enjoy our great conversations. She is prompt with responding to appointment requests and working with my busy schedule. The spa is immaculate and very well decorated. The overall experience is truly luxurious from the time you enter the door. This is the only place to which I will ever trust my face!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Skyla Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmxvXq1RD_f80waxEYNfZ_79JnhAiBHfRMRkhM3K11K-_TEwNH=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent staff \u0026 experience for laser hair removal! During a time that can feel overwhelming and uncertain, they provided real peace of mind. That kind of support matters more than I can put into words.

The surgical care itself has been just as impressive. I felt informed, respected, and genuinely cared for throughout the entire process. It’s rare to find a medical team that combines professionalism with such warmth and attentiveness.

I’m also very happy to say that I am now cancer-free. As I continue healing, I plan to return to this office for some facial filler or whatever they recommend, as I’ve lost quite a bit of weight in my face during treatment. I trust their judgment completely and wouldn’t go anywhere else.

Prices are reasonable compared to other prices. I don’t mind driving in one hour to come to this place I definitely recommend it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Leon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7T4gAsVMVM3rz5pkYGeqkfx4gsi6OuwtBfOm3O7clTriJsA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of experiencing the Botox services at this clinic, and I am truly impressed by the exceptional level of customer service, attention, and professionalism that I encountered throughout the entire process.

From the moment I walked in, I was greeted by a warm and friendly receptionist who made me feel instantly welcome. The atmosphere of the clinic was soothing and inviting, creating an environment that eased any nerves I had about the procedure.

The attention to detail and personalized care I received were truly outstanding. The medical staff took the time to sit down with me, thoroughly discuss my goals, and address any concerns I had. Their willingness to listen and provide expert advice put me at ease and assured me that I was in capable hands.

What truly sets this clinic apart is their unwavering commitment to professionalism. The medical professionals were not only highly skilled but also incredibly knowledgeable about the Botox treatment and its effects. They took the time to educate me about the procedure, ensuring that I had a clear understanding of what to expect.

Throughout the procedure itself, I was consistently impressed by the gentle touch and precision of the practitioner. The emphasis on my comfort and well-being was evident, making the experience virtually painless and comfortable. The attention to detail in administering the Botox injections was evident, as the results were exactly as I had hoped for.

The post-procedure follow-up was another testament to the clinic's dedication to their clients. The staff reached out to check on my progress and were available to answer any questions I had as I noticed the effects of the treatment settling in.

Overall, my experience with the Botox services at this clinic was exceptional. The combination of their customer service, attention to individual needs, and professionalism left me with not only fantastic results but also a sense of confidence in their services. I can wholeheartedly recommend this clinic to anyone seeking Botox treatments, as they truly go above and beyond to ensure a positive and rewarding experience.","Images":null,"When":""}]
