I felt rushed when the staff member presented the 3 options/prices. The actual consult was rather brief as well, albeit all my questions were answered. I have learned that I need to do much more research to better understand the intricacies of laser treatment options in order to ask pertinent questions and obtain the most information possible during a consultation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tamara Cohen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8iBtKMggs6KdZLwoKzzP49JnVxkiG8iRu-fjznz5vhKXlWTR7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"BEWARE.  $200 consult fee that they do not advise new cosmetic patients on when booking over the phone rather the fee is hidden in their digital consent forms. However, I notified the front desk and multiple assistants that I had bid on a Sofwave package at an auction and that was what I was consulting for.  Two employees  looked at the certificate itself.  I did the consult and assumed I was good to go.   Nope - upon reaching their back desk area I found out that the consult I just drove 25 minutes to was a completely different procedure than the one I thought - one was Pure Impact by Sofwave and one was just Sofwave. (something I would have most certainly considered), and said too bad, here is your $200 consult charge and farewell. She always does my laser and I love my results. She is extremely knowledgable and very detail oriented. Highly recommend !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Midnight Moon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV35oEGj1Q9Iv0Nz9LzpDl4gQHDqWR6jk6-zOwnNNztdWzDPb-8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I was very disappointed in this place. They called me earlier in the day to ask if I could move up my appointment since there were open slots before me. I declined because I am from out of town and had to work. Travel time was much less than anticipated, so when I arrived, I called and asked if they still had open slots, thinking it would be easy; instead, the girl was put-out; if she didn't want to move me up she should have said so instead of treating me that way. When I went in, all paperwork was sent to my phone without asking me if that was ok (and when I left, a link for payment for a possible prescription was sent to my phone). When Fitzgerald entered the room and saw me, I could tell by her face that she immediately dismissed me; I know I don't have horrible skin issues, but this place also deals with cosmetic issues; I should not have been a surprise. Fitzgerald was rude, curt, and dismissive the whole (short) consultation. She explained only one option, and when I asked probing questions about it, she was visibly irritated. She not-so-subtly told me to do my own research, as if asking the professional who would do the treatment wasn't part of that. If I decide to do treatments here, it will definitely not be with her. The only good thing about the experience was the aide, who was courteous, helpful, and friendly; she happily answered any questions I had for her, gave her opinion when sought after, and brought me pamphlets she thought I should have.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kiyoko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw5Bhf8Ot-O-borL8nsG6TOuDz4dBGQIFl8lpemmqhKNL8BmyX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Chozten is great. I can go literal years without seeing her, and she will still remember me, including my medical history with the clinic. Additionally, she was the reason that I finally went to a doctor for a tumor I had in my face. One day, I came in to get dermal fillers, and she noticed a tumor in my face. I hate going to the doctor's, so I was dismissive of the tumor. Dr. Chozten told me that it was important that I went to the doctor and got it checked out. I took her advice, and it turned out that my attending surgeon said it had a 10% chance of being cancer. Luckily, I had it removed, and everything turned out fine. However, I'll always credit Dr. Chozten for identifying a possibly cancerous tumor in my face.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Meghan Christian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9g4YuEAsKhg40toYM3_SPBHTs0eKZBlrdPJnhoprgD1sqYh99=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Ronan is, quite simply, an exceptional plastic surgeon. What makes him stand apart is not merely technical expertise, although that is clearly formidable, but his ability to conduct a consultation that feels almost like an intelligent architectural symposium on the human face and form.

Most patients arrive believing they need a very specific adjustment. Under Dr. Ronan’s careful guidance, however, the conversation expands. With the calm authority that comes only from many years of experience, he gently reveals possibilities and refinements one would never have had the knowledge to request. The result is not simply a procedure, it is a coherent aesthetic strategy, thoughtfully designed and beautifully created.

Equally impressive is his bedside manner. Dr. Ronan possesses that rare combination of professional gravitas that immediately places patients at ease. You feel listened to, respected, and confident that you are in extraordinarily capable hands.

Dr. Ronan's recommendations for procedures and facial care are consistently modern, well-researched, and technologically current, reflecting a physician who remains intellectually engaged with the latest developments in his field. And the excellence extends well beyond the operating room. His team I personally met with, Adam, Sarah, Brette, and Monique, all operate with remarkable competence and kindness. The office runs with the quiet efficiency of a finely tuned orchestra, and every interaction feels thoughtful and professional.

A final note that speaks volumes about character: Dr. Ronan is a lover of English and Labradoodles. In my view, any surgeon who appreciates a good dog already demonstrates excellent judgment.

If I had the leisure, this review could easily become a small monograph of praise, but the conclusion is straightforward: if you are searching for a plastic surgeon of intelligence, integrity, and remarkable aesthetic insight, do not hesitate. Dr. Ronan and his team are outstanding.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEShvg9wkziYLcSPLhdimBKreC2h-7QUEhWO82i6PUEgGlaUdZ5EkoB4gjlQPwkk9ivnd9KmUlTHEj372vgZCRie9MQZoeLLAxRa9mKrAdFXevOm4cjW1tKjZ12xtsFGmfcAjFHZ8vK2yyY"],"When":"2026-3-5"},{"Name":"sara reedy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHIMKZODPd_7LtPx77ZVW5_dYNB3QEEYJY-KpEYnwBsGNeG5wL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Blackhawk Med Spa is one of a kind amazing and skilled clinic with a very high standard services and procedures!

From the first consultation to the step by step, up to post follow ups, they are meticulous in making sure your experience is top quality and safe.

We were lucky to be assigned to Jennie for my daughter three sessions Avi Clear Laser and her experience was amazing. [{"Name":"Linda Haddad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDl3LlxwyEgBR4BTYJIlDpYRRFlWHN7_kBjKzFWgky4y699IpS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Steven Williams is truly exceptional and without a doubt the best of the best in his field. I am beyond happy with my experience and would recommend Dr. Steven Williams without hesitation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Neysa Renita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvqZDiw3fv5NnZvxtfOjFHv7S-gxIV4ki_jHAC2P2fCk9y8bGO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had my surgery with Dr. Philip Wasicek on February 2nd and honestly I’m just relieved he didn’t charge me extra for my 'nervous personality.' This was my first surgery ever and my first time under general anesthesia. Calling me a bit of a wreck would be a massive understatement.

He was incredible and made me feel completely at ease throughout the entire process. He has a very calm, supportive energy and a rock-solid steady demeanor that really helped with my pre-surgery nerves (a miracle). It’s a rare find to meet a double board-certified surgeon who is completely devoid of an ego which made the whole experience feel far less clinical and a lot more human.

I haven't had the big ‘reveal’ yet so I’m currently at that mysterious stage where I’m about 90% bandages and 10% suspense. The level of care I’ve received so far has been nothing short of elite.

A resounding 11 out of 10. If the medical board gave out awards for 'Staying Chill While the Patient Is Spiraling,' he’d have a trophy case. Absolute legend.

Also, a huge shout-out to his office staff and the OR team. They are the gold standard for kindness and made the whole experience seamless.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jade Alejandro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLAHo8FvGYMOhPrGZcPYk5ffAMLa1YIWgfsNmutiBi_ltzhaA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Williams did an AMAZING job on my breast augmentation. Highly, highly recommend Dr. Williams and his team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Holly Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6_nCi9x5SN6TcLCgajxC9yME9S27csnt7LrTqwcwTPR-0dA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience with Tri Valley Plastic Surgery has been outstanding. Last November, I chose Dr. Williams for a tummy tuck and liposuction to address abdominal muscle separation from two C-sections. I was seeking a major transformation, and that is exactly what I received.

The entire experience, from scheduling the consultation to my follow-up care, has been wonderful. Dr. Williams and his entire team have been nothing short of exceptionally kind, professional, and genuinely caring.

I couldn't be happier with my new body; Dr. Williams is a gifted surgeon. I wholeheartedly recommend him! If you are considering surgery, stop searching—Dr. Williams is your guy. This team deserves far more than five stars. Thank you, Dr. Williams, Hekili, and the entire staff for your outstanding service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah McCauley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSsX_F_nKceDAYan9Ji4WiHQF75gA8VYp8Za1Wsylq6bcDGR72=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My journey with Tri Valley Plastic Surgery has been pleasantly surprising.

I found TVPS through a  Google search. I emailed them and someone promptly followed up.

I was skewed as to what to expect.

Would they overcharge me?
Would I be presented with strong sells tactics?

Long story short - nothing like that happened!
Instead I was met with great positivity.

- TVPS accepting my insurance.
- No pushy sell tactics.
- I receive notifications about their promos, specials and parties occasionally by SMS and email, but it’s not to much.

Dr. Wascik has an attention to detail and trusted bedside manner.

The surgery I had here was same day. And the results have been much better than anticipated.

I highly recommend this business for their integrity to patients and ingenuity towards plastic surgery.Thank you all for a great experience in this!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Farima Bojanovich","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXP7PR6xzgtAo8zyWk-Xlhj0BWIszUkEJIX6qzVHAJ6AUVKlJy8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot speak highly enough about Dr. Williams and his incredible team. From the very first consultation to the final follow-up, the entire experience was nothing short of exceptional. Dr. Williams is not only a highly skilled plastic surgeon, but also someone who genuinely cares about his patients. He took the time to listen to my goals, answer all my questions thoroughly, and made me feel completely comfortable and confident every step of the way.
His team is equally amazing—professional, warm, and attentive. They made the entire process seamless and stress-free. The results exceeded my expectations, and I truly feel more confident and comfortable in my own skin thanks to Dr. Williams’ expertise.
If you're looking for a talented, compassionate, and trustworthy plastic surgeon, I wholeheartedly recommend Dr. Williams and his team. They are simply the best! Thank you so much Dr.Williams and team!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Happily this is an exceptional one! Everything about my experience with Pasadena Cosmetic Surgery (PCS) deserves acknowledgement and praise:

-  Sarah was delightful to work with - she took care of all the challenges I presented - and they were tricky ones….billing, scheduling;

-  The consultation with Dr. Martin O’Toole gave me confidence, not only in his knowledge and skill, but professional integrity. He did not try to talk me into anything, but in fact talked me OUT of a procedure that I thought would be beneficial. What made this stand out further was having had a previous consultation with  a “renowned” (all over YouTube) surgeon that was purely a sales pitch…nothing was about my personal needs - everything was about selling me every possible procedure.

- Dr. O’Toole listened to everything I asked, and delivered - masterfully! I am three months out from an abdominoplasty; the results have exceeded my expectations. I took one pain pill after the procedure (not even Tylenol following); I had zero bruising, and my incision is clean, straight, and perfectly placed.

I highly recommend PCS, and I hope Dr. O’Toole never retires…!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rachel B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUKrnrEKXtpIM3c9dvcHBWlYGa3LBIRoF7i18Z6-B0v94JpVX1=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the very first visit, I knew that Dr. Martin O'Toole would be my surgeon.  I had interviewed 4 other doctors, and none of the other offices gave me the sense of expertise and care that Martin O'Tooles office did.  Sarah, and all of the nursing staff were excellent as well.

The whole process was very straight forward, and provided detailed information at the very beginning in considering such a major procedure.  I felt seen and heard as if I was an individual and not just one of many.  I am about 6 weeks post-op and I absolutely love my results!!  I had a large hernia and a lot of skin to remove as well, which he took care of expertly. My scars are clean and precise due to his very experience hand, and my breast lift provided such a beautiful and natural looking shape which I was hopeful for.  Even my belly button is cute and and looking really natural.  10 out of 10 would do again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana Ortega","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0MbxdiOx_p5_oCmUJxLC5sbZ7mjtMb-rdM4M-0XPJIQz4lZE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience exceeded my expectations. I am absolutely grateful for everything they did for me!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicole Prigge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8-xdmehaNwfLT3IkHd6ecSV4H9KU_fX37hjF3JrIrXMUw-w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I saw Dr. O’Toole for two procedures and am incredibly happy with the results. [{"Name":"Mischka Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVW_5Bk68uHYVSpjr8n4_SVarIbYpc8Z5VQ86-pLVYbHj9H1i0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience at Destination Aesthetics is always absolutely top-notch. The clinic itself is beautiful and professional, and the results consistently exceed my expectations.

My injector, Brianna, is truly exceptional. I came in with significant wrinkling under my eyes and hooded lids, and she completely transformed my eye area — brighter, smoother, and more youthful, while still looking natural. I walked out feeling confident and refreshed, and honestly years younger.

Yes, it’s a premium experience, but it is 100% worth it. The expertise, care, and results speak for themselves. I can’t recommend Destination Aesthetics — and especially Brianna — highly enough.

Brianna will be on maternity leave from April through August 2026, so you may need to see another injector during that time, but if you have the opportunity to book with her, do it. She’s truly aces","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lee Jer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSQirWgYb0dxl9v_ytd1z9ZI5ZKNd2rIvuMnvTcMAlSdSYPg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I do not want to haggle with the person injecting a needle into my face. I used to love this place. I felt safe here since 2019. They recently changed their business model over to a "subscription bank" And now it just feels scammy. They wanted me to pay $1300 for a single session of Botox when 3 months ago it was $980.
"All of our discounts have been discontinued and are now in this subscription plan. $350 a month." I walked out.

When I stood up to leave, the injector began to haggle. Her offer to "match my previous price" at the eleventh hour was a major insult. It proved that the initial price was arbitrary, a test of what I would tolerate. It made me deeply uncomfortable. I emailed the owner and never received a response. Can't wait to see how they try to spin it here. If you’re not willing to hand them $350 a month, they literally do not care about your business.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUN2SC6rh69D10jEBbuM5nN1h9TqAIhjICJ7APh8iDeWIcDQmw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had a great experience so far from the first phone call and texts, to the actual visit to get my first Botox treatment for jaw clenching. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"taylore214","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwuETnFlw4zPm-aSVxcg1AjEpdIGK6nXQeAJtnBoCcrFYkG8Kb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Skin Spirit Beverly Hills is such a cute, calm & clean environment, and the girls at the front desk are so sweet!

I truly cannot say enough amazing things about my aesthetic experiences with Allison Bronstien. She has such a calm, confident presence that instantly makes you feel safe, which is huge for me because I am terrified of needles and lasers.

Her knowledge is next level. She will listen to you and take the time to explain everything in detail and you can tell she genuinely understands anatomy, product choices, and facial balancing on a deep level. Nothing is overdone, nothing ever looks "filled", or even detectable. She enhances your natural features in the most subtle, refined way.

My Botox is always perfectly placed and my filler results are incredible. She has an amazing eye for symmetry and proportion. I always leave her chair looking like a refreshed, elevated version of myself- never overdone or unnatural.

If you're nervous about needles, or new aesthetic treatments, trust me you're in the best hands. She checks in constantly, moves with intention, and somehow makes the whole process feel easy and controlled.

She is absolute artist and true professional. I wouldn't trust my face to anyone else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karen Daniela Castellanos Vásquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUlsrJHLeQwK2WoudsjQF6jLBzDJzKQn-2qqF1-PfAJ_B1jVezYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I want to leave a review because I’m super happy with my results. I got sculptra and botox, I was scared because it was a big step but it’s the best decision I’ve made. My face used to be dry and I went with Anna Gunn, she explained to me everything with a lot patience, she answered all my questions and she was so sweet and genuine! It made me feel in good hands. She made my sculptra and Botox journey start in the most amazing way! Also, she recommended me a skin care routine and I have seen so much improvement in my face, I feel happy with it. I went to my follow up and everything is perfect. Also, the staff is 5 stars they are so nice and they make you feel welcomed!
I truly recommend it to anyone who wants to get any kind of touches on your face, this is the place to go.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kalen Aradia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVooEcBzsSM7R4h0TLxC9_TIL6ouf4jYkr61UP-X4gTD5bkfv8zRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"UPDATE: Angela transitioned to a different facility so I decided to go with Laura for additional treatments. She is also phenomenal. She is honest/straightforward, highly knowledgable, and I feel safe with her. I think the truth is that it is clear SkinSpirit hires excellent practitioners.

Angela is absolutely fantastic! She is patient, thorough, and willing to educate patients! We spent quite awhile together today as we developed a foundational/structural approach to treatment. I trust her explicitly!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sol Soils","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXR90q01dGb7OBW19bE4hVWGfU7dEE8uapCEq_YwjeEZkLMoVuf=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wasn’t sure what to expect when I booked my appointment, but the photos looked nice and a friend recommended it to me. The moment I arrived I was blown away! The front desk staff was very friendly and relatable. The space is gorgeous. The little cottage or French/Italian-villa style building is super cute. And my NP Laura was so approachable and not salesy or pushy in any way. I’ve never gotten Botox anywhere in the country this comfortable and I hate needles. I didn’t feel half of them thanks to a super strong lidocaine she was nice enough to apply beforehand. I’ll never shop Botox prices anywhere else as long as I live within driving distance of one across the country. Everyone at the front desk are so friendly..","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Melanie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxcP8YUcUgtuy0KRWbsehuE50gC90aF9wzzaswPzbT5iokcg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I just moved to San Diego and was excited to find a new med spa- this one had great reviews, so I booked 3 treatments over email for the same day. I received confirmations for everything as seen in attached.

When I arrived, the front desk person acted like my presence was an inconvenience and simply said, "We don't have anyone here who can do that."  I showed her the emails and she agreed I should've had appointments... but that was it.

I explained I was leaving town the next day and asked if they could squeeze in just one quick treatment (less than 15 minutes). She checked, came back, and said, "Okay...I'm sorry, I don't know what to tell you." I asked if the provider could fit me in and she replied, "Oh no, she won't."

At that point, I just can't.  The issue wasn't the scheduling mistake as things happen ...it was the complete lack of care in how it was handled. No alternative options, no apology beyond a flat "sorry," and no incentive offered to return Anne's make up for the huge inconvenience.

Silver lining: I called SkinSpirit down the street and they were AMAZING -- warm, helpful, and got me in last minute. [{"Name":"Karen Doiguchi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXlov5w8CYXPLV5hs_KjXTFDH0eYYuWLQWDDmbSSmb8wBnpg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Reason for visit:  I’m 75 with forehead wrinkles,
deeper wrinkles above eyebrows and
crowfeet smile lines.

Past procedure:  Had a derm MD use Dysport on my forehead. The forehead results were fabulous, but injections above the brows resulted in Spock lift.  Yes, Star Trek Vulcan eye lift!  Took weeks to relax. After 9mos thought I’d give it try again, but wanted to find another doctor.  After researching, found Dr. Lee.

Dr Lee’s office ambiance is beautiful, very spa like cleanliness and very friendly staff reception. The rooms are modern with quality procedure chairs.
Dr Lee spared no expense with first impressions.

Meeting Dr Lee:  Initially he seems reserved as a professional, but someone who listens and in time I felt at ease and trusting of his abilities. I told him my past procedure concerns and what I wanted to achieve.  I also asked about my sagging jowls and expressed being 75 I didn’t want an outcome of looking 25 with an unnatural ultra smooth,  frozen look.  I also wanted to be cautious and conservative, this being my first experience with Dr Lee.

Results:  Dr Lee uses Botox, Dysport but offered another product,, Korean Juveaux.  I’m a huge fan
of Korean products. He explained Juveaux is no different than the other products, but works slightly faster.  With Dysport my forehead experienced tightness within 7 days.
With Juveaux I had no tightness, no “Spock” eyebrows.  My forehead is beautiful, crows feet are
barely visible and the injections in my jowls gave me tightening/lifting. I’m extremely happy with the results with a natural look with taking years off!!
Dr Lee I know is the best injector for my needs.
I look into the mirror and he gave me exactly what I wanted without a facelift.
Thank you Dr Lee!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"paula barbosa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7ewqrYZpZdg0dtMdDaVdN5_YIs2olEPhEHAqyVavFrQpQGIkc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’m very disappointed with my experience at this clinic. I paid for nearly 90 units, yet far fewer were used. Worse, different products were injected in the areas I wanted without any explanation, instead of what I requested.

There was no transparency or communication at any point. They also quoted one price initially, but then told me a different amount later, and I have screenshots of all our conversations showing these contradictions.

I did not feel respected, informed, or safe. For anyone considering this clinic, make sure you know exactly what they are doing and confirm everything in writing. Unfortunately, I cannot recommend this clinic.

Taking this matter to the authorities
And also for my community gals that was waiting for a good place to go.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Enjoli Enriquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaMvrNoRe1hDdAcIvSEyZSV50qoisKe8qUaxBgpK3nMfESVNk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a wonderful experience with Dr. Lee and his staff! From the moment I walked in, everyone was so friendly and welcoming—the office itself is beautiful and creates such a calm atmosphere. Dr. Lee has an incredibly gentle touch, and my Tox treatment was completely pain-free. He truly listens, is very honest with his professional opinion, and takes the time to explain everything clearly. I especially appreciate his eye for facial balancing—his work is subtle yet transformative. I left feeling confident, refreshed, and very well cared for. I can’t recommend Dr. Lee and his team enough—they are the best of the best!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aliyah Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJeRSTkEHHIGSgXwyrT5Rr3lyL3bHPBgwSyqJmO7cbyCNVj_A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Using a false name so I don’t receive any backlash, but I’m coming here with a honest heart. I’ve been here twice for botox, and both times have been treated by Dr. Lee. The treatment was fine, but the hospitality was not at all. I don’t know if I caught him on a bad day (both visits) but I literally felt like I was burdening him by existing and waiting for treatment. Mind you I waited about 45 minutes in the procedure room for the Dr. AFTER waiting 10-15 min. in the lobby, I arrived on time, maybe 5 minutes before the appointment time each visit. I do want to mention that the front desk was super friendly and helpful!! but the actual treatment was so disappointing. On both occasions , the doctor came in, didn’t look up from his phone or say A WORD for I swear a minute straight of silence. I was smiling each time I thought he was about to look up at me also, I was trying to be friendly.  It was just awkward and unpleasant and made me feel really bad honestly. I love their prices and the front staff, and still might come back due to having no issues with the botox and appreciating the pricing, but I just had to make this review to say please treat each patient with love as we’re the reason you’re in business.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"fancyming","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0dZEVZHMoH6M5TP8wpZQDi3UUmnkNFbvxfV9pQGTIwClXtmI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is my follow-up appointment with Dr. Lee.  I received 36 units of Jeuveau that he recommended for my forehead, 11 wrinkles and minor eye brows lift.  I'm happy with the results as it looks very natural.  Thanks, Dr. Lee.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"luvdevonie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ05lLOeBrnfCVQ9Q-SLHhq2Vn5CQoR0XoBkDwlHbv4q59TaQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Lee is the best in the area! He has a beautiful office his staff and himself are very kind. I wouldn’t go anywhere else!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETDsEKt1RrawUE5dJJSvfivZkbb61EZ5klgkDH00grkCo9AK7VSCg9j9oI7_ritWLtOkE00m7fM8QE8SSUJFOALpeoY1SsNtS_is0NkKgVmXMWYjp7lUvr6yr2GOExrs3ze_izONy0YoY0P"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Lauren McGhee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKO3nnE68Nt0iCsqoXoqg1l6FWWEW3_O3nEByhSgo_WAvYiKg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Recently had a Botox party with Dr Lee and his staff went above and beyond! Not only were they super flexible with our schedule but they even decorated the room for us providing snacks and drinks! Everyone who attended was so impressed with Dr Lee and will definitely be returning clients. Thanks for the great party!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQlrWzCTI2z-F-2CYSDXBGXE-bBAnXKr8iRlu-1F-SDWaPs3fNrmbCMqMqTn5B86JfUqGJYA0mwqB6dJA2-ZjILBQ2mzS-mNrlWIAJ7-A_EwBJ6CjTynfI_wnsI7zgE-NZzM2h51g"],"When":"2024-5-28"},{"Name":"Armeda Gaspar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrC6txmoQE60u8rj8swFgdeH77vfG1whLHyG0xfMtxypUL6kCY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have to share my incredible experience with Dr. Lee and his amazing staff—they are, without a doubt, the best in Sacramento! From the moment I stepped into the clinic, I felt a wave of comfort wash over me, especially since I was dealing with TMJ and chronic migraines. Dr. Lee's warm and caring bedside manner instantly put me at ease.

The young lady who checked me in was wonderfully attentive and genuinely compassionate—a stark contrast to a previous, disappointing experience I had elsewhere. Now, I happily drive almost an hour to receive this outstanding level of care—and trust me, it's worth every minute!

Don't even think about wasting your time at other places! Make your appointment with Dr. Lee and his fantastic team; I promise you’ll leave smiling and feeling fantastic!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Suzanne Dunning","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6yhCc-jvULZ143_TdQvQ3cLifyj6aCCrlg-bcanaUt3AW0HyvQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a retired surgical technician with years of experience in Plastic Surgery, I can confidently say my experience at Granite Bay Cosmetics with Dr Haley Bray was truly outstanding.
I recently underwent a face lift, upper and lower Blepharoplasty, and CO2 laser resurfacing.  From consultation to post-op care, every step was handled with professionalism, and genuine care.  Dr Bray’s surgical skills and eye for detail far exceeded my expectations.  My results are natural, refreshed and was exactly what I hoped for.
Equally impressive was the staff.  From the front office to the surgical team, everyone was warm, knowledgeable and attentive.
I highly recommend Dr Bray and the Granite Bay Cosmetics team to anyone seeking cosmetic surgery. I’m incredibly happy with my experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julia Lacerda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVmjWHuGAbK8qz1Cr8Vazp-izCfV8QXON_TwK1Kl7E9S4dMpfGJg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Bray did my upper blepharoplasty under local and I couldn’t be happier! I feel refreshed, rested, and confident and I love doing my eye makeup now. She is so skilled, kind, and welcoming, truly a master at creating beautiful eyes. Dr. Bray also did a CO2 laser treatment for me and it improved my skin’s tightness and texture. I’m so glad I did this for myself and the recovery was very smooth and quick. Thank you Dr. Bray !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Cook","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDpsKzouXVN3SJLtNa2cBjEtIi0Vyg1AV4Db4wxrfCzP-HNA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t say enough about Granite Bay Cosmetic Surgery. I have seen Dr.  Clark for 2 beautiful surgeries but recently saw Cate for filler and Botox. What a great experience. She has a way of making you feel at ease while you sit in her chair. She’s knowledgeable, talented and has a soft and steady touch. She’s  explains as she goes. She consistently makes sure you’re doing ok during the entire procedure.
She followed up with me the night of, day after and weeks after.
I feel beautiful inside and out because of her skills and sincere kind heart
I would absolutely book with Cate for any med spa needs. I can not thank Cate enough!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Suzette Campbell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXCkdV7pt2wz4N6k5jYN8MwRhYa3OXb78nxpr5Z2YpsY5KTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As promised; I have the cutest belly button! I had a mommy-makeover with Dr. Crista Clark 5 months ago. I am so pleased with my  results. Her surgical technique is excellent, my scars are thin and flat. It is evident that she really took her time with semmetry and the final results in mind. My husband is a Physician who has recommended Dr. Clark to many of his patients. I feel so fortunate to have been in her capable hands. Her staff is kind and caring. Her Surgical center is beautiful. If you're reading this, you are likely looking for a surgeon. Dr. Clark is the best. I highly recommend her!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"cindy janik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwaiVDBTwhRwxoBcAFP6JTaQrOeJjPcCc0Uws3LtHMXs3yc8pe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Truly I do not even know where to begin. I want to be as transparent as possible and I hope this review comes off as genuine as possible. I hope it’s as if you’re getting a text from your best friend raving about their wonderful experience because every bit of this process felt that way. I am actually writing this on the day of my surgery and I am a few hours post op. I wanted to translate every bit of my experience the best I can while it’s all still fresh in my mind.  I initially came in for a consult for a mini neck lift and met with Dr. Bray. I loved her approach and transparency with her plan for me. She suggested that at my age she advised a “less is more” approach and we went for submental liposuction (chin lipo). My initial impression of her was that she has a good heart and wants the best outcomes for her patients. You could sense her confidence and passion for what she does and I felt at ease in my decision to proceed with surgery. On the day of surgery I felt optimistic and excited. I had their media team Emily interview me about my experience for their social media page. I was excited to share my journey even during a very vulnerable time (who wants to publicly admit their insecurities, right?) Dr. Bray came in and made her markings, even asking me what kind of music I wanted in the operating room. I loved how much it felt as if I was talking to one of my best friends, so much so I even opted out of taking any anti-anxiety medication. This is huge for me because I am generally an anxious person!! During the procedure the operating room felt less stressful than I initially pictured, considering I’ve been placed under general anesthesia previously. I loved that I could be awake during this procedure and that I could have a conversation with the team during. The operating room with radiating good energy and the team kept me at ease even when I had a bit of dizziness/uneasy medical feelings during the procedure. Dr. Bray made me feel safe and reassured my safety throughout the procedure. Deanna was also wonderful and checked in on me despite being busy with her own schedule for the day. This team truly cares about creating a genuine experience. It was the most judgement free zone I’ve ever felt in a plastic surgery / beauty clinic. I shared many laughs and some tears in my vulnerability but never once felt any less in the end. Thank you for not only restoring my confidence but also giving me such a wholesome experience. If you’re still debating to have surgery here, please reread this comment again. I assure you, you are in wonderful hands!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rob Meador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqDDT2q-MAskwEcpPOfktoUJmg3jY_1qoLm3K5uertwocCPg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came in for Botox with Cate!

The location was perfect for me. The facility is surrounded by oak trees and the entrance has a really lovely fountain that helped to calm and relax me before my appointment.

Upon entrance you're greeted by the friendly staff. The lobby is stunning, tall ceilings with a modern aesthetic.

This was my first time with Cate, and I couldn't be happier. I was cleared for Botox with the doctor who was so informative and friendly.

Cate made sure to treat all of my problem areas. Typically get anxiety while receiving Botox because I'm not a fan of needles. She made it pain free and very relieving for me.

I am so happy with the results and I am so excited I found my Botox home! I can't wait to try some of the other amazing treatments they have, like hair restoration, etc.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ali Bertolina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXEy-8C5PqEQpCqYkXjSa-aSGhABor8DVj9PqzOo_Is-EMe7zKrA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't believe how lucky I am to have found Cate and the team at Granite Bay Cosmetic! From the moment I walked in years ago, I was greeted with such warmth and kindness by Kristin at the front desk. She has always greeted me by name and just makes me feel so special! Cate's expertise in laser hair removal is unmatched - I've seen incredible results that have truly changed my life. Bye bye leg hair, hello summer 😎 I also had the most amazing hydrafacial I have ever had by April. I am now hooked (even after having them done before at other places) and plan on buying a package of them.

Cate and the staff make you feel like family from day one. Their genuine care and attention to detail go above and beyond. They're not just there to do a job; they're there to make sure you feel comfortable, supported, and confident every step of the way.

I am excited to now start my “acne journey” and thanks to Cate's guidance and personalized approach, I am already seeing so much improvement in just 1 week! I trust her fully and can’t wait to see how my skin transforms over the next few months!

Going to Granite Bay Cosmetic isn't just a treatment; it's an experience I look forward to every time. I can't recommend Cate and the entire team enough. If you're looking for top-notch care, a welcoming atmosphere, and life-changing results, look no further than Granite Bay Cosmetic. They've changed my life, and I know they'll change yours too!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Katie Crumpton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqPeQ_T6tGc6OdSE1DZvcedrcvDnjIyjZZd52t_cuv8Il9SY4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of experiencing laser hair removal at Granite Bay Cosmetic Surgery Center, and I must say, it was truly exceptional. The standout feature of this center is undoubtedly the amazing staff.

From the moment I stepped in, the team welcomed me with warm smiles and genuine care. They took the time to listen to my concerns and provided personalized advice, making me feel completely at ease throughout the process. Their knowledge and expertise in laser hair removal were apparent, and they patiently answered all my questions with utmost professionalism.

Not only were they highly skilled, but their compassion and friendliness added a special touch to the whole experience. It's evident that they genuinely care about their patients and go above and beyond to ensure their comfort and satisfaction.

The procedure itself was efficient and effective, and I was pleasantly surprised by how quick it was. The staff's skillful hands made the entire process virtually painless. Their attention to detail and commitment to providing the best possible results truly set them apart.

Moreover, the facility's cleanliness and hygiene were impeccable, contributing to an overall sense of tranquility and well-being.

I cannot speak highly enough of the staff at Granite Bay Cosmetic Surgery Center. If you are considering laser hair removal or any cosmetic procedure, I wholeheartedly recommend this center.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Outstanding work.

A+++++","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Demet Koca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV982KDAEhqD1xHRG0X_Cv5p_SllaVwBzq11qwhCl-QcS5obXsX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"“I had Sculptra done at this clinic last year. The procedure was quite painful, and afterwards I developed a noticeable nodule on my face. When I mentioned it to the clinic, I was told there was no nodule, it is ok give a time which felt dismissive, even though it was clearly there. At the time I didn’t pursue it further because I was traveling to Turkey. Later, I consulted doctors in Turkey who explained that the Sculptra solution should be mixed with fluid at least 1–2 hours in advance to ensure proper homogenization. It seems this step was not done correctly, and as a result the nodule is still there and has not gone away. Unfortunately, this has been a disappointing experience for me both aesthetically and emotionally.”","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Annie Teng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ5MIv8w-TcQpsjD3tQ2UnSEb2m7jQEKB94bWryjtRqq9cests=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came across Dr. Safoora Zaka on Tiktok while researching regenerative skin treatments and aesthetic procedures. I decided to make an appointment to see Dr. Zaka as she had just launched the skin booster, Rejuran Healer.

Let me tell you, Dr. Zaka is even more beautiful in person than in her videos; she is very professional and talented with a knowledge of her specialty that surpassed my expectations. I told her my goal for a youthful, refreshed, yet natural look and she took that into consideration very well.

She took the time to go over the procedure prior to manually performing the Rejuran injections on my face. I am not a big fan of needles but prefer the injections manually, opposed to the microneedling approach, as I feel manual injections allow for more targeted application and are ideal for specific areas like the under-eye or the nasolabial folds.

It was a great experience, my skin looks softer, brighter and so hydrated! I also noticed a smoother skin texture.
Dr. Zaka even reached out to me the very next day, checking up on me to see how I was doing and my healing process. She truly cares for her patients.
The entire staff are also very sweet and welcoming, and their office is gorgeous.

I already look forward to my next appointment!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Nina Vafaie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLevYDGBNDBLWoL_tQg4al7WwE4GcelXYMMuTwm_TkOxTF3TA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was referred to Dr. Lisa Jewel at South Bay Plastic Surgeons for reconstruction after a mastectomy. The office is welcoming and the office staff is friendly, professional and helpful. I am always seen at my appointment time. Dr. Jewel is absolutely incredible. She took the time to understand where I was in my treatment process, and how cancer treatment affected my body and what reconstruction was available to me. I considered both DIEP Flap surgery and reconstruction using implants. She thoroughly explained what results I could expect. She understood my concerns regarding healing time and was sensitive to the fact that I am active, athletic, and that I surf. I felt completely seen and heard, and confident that her surgical options took into consideration who I am and what I still wanted to be able to do. I opted for the DIEP Flap surgery. I felt supported throughout the entire process; surgery, post-surgical appointments, and revision. And my breasts look amazing; even better than I expected. And I am surfing again. I heal well, but also attribute my excellent post-surgical results to Dr. Jewel's protocols regarding meds, scar treatment, surgical garments and clear and helpful instructions. I am so happy and grateful to have Dr. Jewel as my plastic surgeon. I highly recommend her, and love her staff as well. And again, my breasts look fantastic.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jessica black","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWD4uGncA8hDRBv0SnhLmU8dSfl5kp8lHozRna-RfLKFWEFeqdZ4g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After five previous surgeries related to breast cancer, my right breast was never properly reconstructed — physically or emotionally. I had honestly given up hope that things could ever look or feel right again. Then I met Dr. Lisa Jewel, and everything changed.

From our very first appointment, she truly listened to me. She understood not only what I wanted aesthetically, but what this journey had meant to me personally. Her compassion, attention to detail, and confidence immediately put me at ease - something I hadn't felt with any previous surgeon.

Six months later, the results are beyond anything I could have imagined. Everything looks incredible, and more importantly, my confidence has been completely restored. I finally feel like myself again.

Every single person in her office
deserves praise as well - from scheduling to billing to the clinical staff, everyone treated me with kindness, patience, and genuine care. They listened to my needs and made the entire process seamless and supportive.

Finding Dr. Jewel was truly life-changing. This experience has been priceless, and I am endlessly grateful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Taya DiCarlo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUC3Ya0MQ8lYjESHWVd6T4r_BNdN37hnDgCMUK0OlSDQzgDUIFH=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough incredible things about Dr. Jewell, her staff & my entire experience from start to finish.

I spent years considering a breast augmentation & met with several plastic surgeons in Beverly Hills & Santa Monica before meeting Dr. Jewell. I did extensive research & was extremely cautious—especially since several close friends (including my mom) had implants removed due to Breast Implant Illness. Safety was non-negotiable for me.

I breastfed both of my boys (now 9 & 11) & honestly loved my body before & after kids. I never felt like I needed a BA & would’ve been happy forever with the body God gave me. The only reason I reconsidered was after learning about low-profile Motiva Ergonomix implants—their natural look/feel, impressive safety stats, <1% capsular contracture rate, & implant warranty. After educating myself on all risks, I felt genuinely safe moving forward.

Paired with Dr. Jewell’s reputation for conservative, natural results, everything clicked. I didn’t need a lift—just wanted to restore lost volume & go up one modest cup size. My goal was simple: results so natural people would wonder… “did she or didn’t she?”

From the first consult, I was blown away. Dr. Jewell is warm, patient & incredibly thorough. She answered all my questions (I had a lot), never rushed or pressured me, & made me feel confident in my decision. Between the handwritten note, friendly front desk staff, clear communication & thoughtful follow-up, the experience truly felt white-glove.

My surgery was Dec 16 & recovery was unbelievably smooth. My mom—a nurse of 50+ years—was blown away by how minimal my pain was. Just days later I was Christmas shopping with her (no carrying bags 😂). Dr. Jewell & her staff even sent me flowers on Christmas—so classy & thoughtful.

Now 6 weeks post-op, I have full sensation (including nipples) & my breasts look & feel INCREDIBLE. Friends literally say, “I can’t believe these aren’t your real boobs!” 😂 And honestly, they are real to me—soft, natural & beautiful.

I chose low-profile Motiva Ergonomix implants, over the muscle, 275ccs—a very modest upgrade from my 34B. I work out a lot & wanted to avoid animation deformity; this option was perfect for me.

I never thought I’d be the woman showing everyone her boobs (or PUBLICLY writing a review)… yet here we are 😂 I am OBSESSED with my results.

If you want a surgeon who is meticulous, experienced, has a 10/10 bedside manner & truly goes above & beyond, I will insist you consider Dr. Jewell. She is world-class.

My only regret is not doing this sooner. I feel & look like me—just naturally enhanced.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERjhKZQFqwqjSVFZ5O89Mrl-Q16TxD480cw3n77DXOsBNNIMLVGDgvUJdK-4h0jW6VI-s6xoa68YzpcX7Z6vPquOV9HbB25MxDx2fvqBlqt2yKS3AdhpcS8wbpDpX0nFPU04RgnQShzHFIf"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Sheila M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMz2W3s7NnKZ5oPZxd8RscBmdgtciyXyl2AZRYUJkr5zZpdfBlsg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've had 2 surgeries with Dr. Liang, liposuction and a tummy tuck. Dr. Liang is a wizard. I love my results. Most of all I appreciate his honesty and his integrity. The staff are professional and my nurse Martha was the most empathetic and kind person and I am so happy that she was the one to look after me after the surgery. I highly recommend SBPS to anyone looking to have some work done. They take wonderful care of their patients","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Gohari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImeASrLnooE8c88t2Eo_t-qbysXA-JNsJLN7fAKFnkWGwEmrMi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had breast surgery with Dr. Lisa Jewell, and I couldn’t be more pleased. She is kind, patient, and exceptionally knowledgeable. The surgery went smoothly, the results look natural and beautiful, and her attention to detail is outstanding. Her team was also professional, caring, and supportive throughout the entire process. I highly recommend Dr. Jewell to anyone considering breast surgery.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan Fukazawa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVM5BAELvw5GsOMrKq7JSlK-BiS0F2CEIYg4QIJzsEkbBUYIpuG=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had surgery with Dr. Liang last November for a non-cosmetic procedure. I have a company sponsored insurance plan so I wanted to make sure that this surgery is covered so I don’t end up with high medical bills. I even coordinated with my insurance company to make sure they accepted my insurance before I was seen for a consultation. I spoke with Jennifer (Jenny) Berman who is the Director of Surgery Scheduling twice to verify that other costs associated with the surgery (i.e. hospital facilities and anesthesiologist etc) were covered. She assured me that there was no cost since everything is in-network and I’ve met my out of pocket max for the year. That made sense to me because i knew i had met my in-network out of pocket max for this year. My mistake was that i didn’t get anything in writing. Now I’m stuck with thousands of dollars in bills because the hospital and anesthesiologist was not in-network. I wasn’t even given an option to select or go anywhere else because I was told everything was covered during my consultation. When I emailed Jenny Berman after I received those bills for clarification on what happened, she ignored me until I sent a follow up email a week later. She responded to me by saying they are not responsible for hospital bills. I know that already. That wasn’t what I was asking her.
I regret trusting her when I scheduled my surgery. I’m surprised that they have someone so unprofessional and incompetent as their Director of Surgery Scheduling. This is why people are so frustrated with healthcare in this country.
I will say that Dr. Liang and everyone at the reception desk was super kind and helpful but I will NOT go back to this place because of Jennifer Berman.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yumi Ogawa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0GNNd2cCypXLU1sGtBQC2uV42qvvDZiD1qXfyhw4M_Ha6xQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Jewell has performed two procedures on me. I was very satisfied with her work the first time, and by the second time I fully trusted her.

The Surgery Scheduling Director, Jennifer Berman, was also incredibly helpful with my second surgery request. She worked very closely with me and helped make the impossible possible, providing clear timelines to follow.

Dr. Jewell’s team is the best, and I will definitely return for future cosmetic work!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alyssa Nambiar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8a-aFItPItTEpDMuiwllcZ8P2tC9BpP7omYB-BCThFAdx0w-iPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If I could give one million stars to Dr. Lisa Jewell and her team at SBPS, I would! In August I had a consultation with Dr. Jewell for a breast reduction and immediately knew she was the surgeon I wanted to trust with this life-altering surgery. She was kind, informative, upfront about limitations and goals, and detailed in her care.

Dr. Jewell was also compassionate and realistic rather than judgmental when it came to my weight. Many surgeons turn away candidates for being overweight, or ask them to lose a certain amount of weight before they'll take them on for a reduction. Dr. Jewell was upfront that, as long as you're a healthy candidate in terms of labs/pre-op numbers/overall wellness, she does not see being overweight as an immediate "no" for a reduction. She told me I only needed to lose weight if *I* wanted to, and even sent me a handwritten note after our consult saying that I'd be an excellent candidate for surgery. This thoughtful gesture and her compassion really sealed the deal for me in terms of selecting a surgeon.

This first consultation was also where I met Stephanie Perez, the absolutely AMAZING Patient Care Coordinator at SBPS. Stephanie herself deserves a million stars for her willingness to go the extra mile for every patient who walks through the doors of SBPS. She has done it all - digging into exact grams of tissue to remove to have my procedure covered by insurance, tracking down post-surgical bras when the ones I had didn't fit, explaining self-pay options when insurance didn't work out, moving other appointments around to squeeze me into appointment times that would work, and more. She even reached out to me right after my procedure just to see how I was doing and wish me well on the healing journey. I truly think that if every medical practice had their own Stephanie, we would be driving flying cars and there would be no war. I know that may sound dramatic, but in the past, my family and I have had our care compromised at other medical facilities when things like scheduling, follow up, and coordination slip through the cracks. Stephanie's dedication was a HUGE part of what made my overall experience so smooth and stress-free!

Back to the procedure itself. Although I had my consult with Dr. Jewell in August, my surgery wasn't until December 11th. Something small to note if you're considering a reduction with SBPS: they perform surgeries both at their in-house surgical suite and at Torrance Memorial Hospital. They actually had openings a little earlier at their surgical suite, but you have to be below a certain BMI to have your surgery done at the surgical suite. If you do need to get your surgery done at Torrance Memorial, you may have to wait a little longer like I did, so I'd recommend scheduling your consultation ASAP :)

I can't say enough good things about the surgery itself and Dr. Jewell's work. I am now five days post-op and healing beautifully thanks to Dr. Jewell's amazing precision and detailed post-op care instructions. I brought a cheap t-shirt bra in my goal size to my last pre-op appointment with her to give her an estimate of goal volume, and she exceeded my expectations with her final result. I was worried that I would need a FNG - I wanted to go down 7 cup sizes, which is a huge change - but Dr. Jewell was able to achieve this result without a FNG and without any loss of sensation. She removed 3 lbs of tissue and I almost cried the second I woke up from surgery, as all my back, shoulder, and neck pain was completely gone. Thanks to her detailed post-op plan, I've been able to manage post-op pain using OTC Advil and Tylenol alone, and am getting stronger every day.

I truly can't explain how life-changing this surgery has been for me. I've immediately been able to breathe better, sleep better, and finally no longer have constant back/neck pain, all thanks to Dr. Jewell and her team's amazing care. If you're in the South Bay area and considering a breast reduction, I would highly highly recommend Dr. Lisa Jewell and the entire team at SBPS!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

They are very kind and welcoming at the clinic and are always wanting to help any way they can!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nikki Guerrero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVy6uJB07bqOY-4tg4pYtHWhRdFXME5acmrRzPGVjknuOWqr9k=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Zulekha was amazing. I’ve been seeing her for my tattoo removal and she is very gentle and sweet! My tattoo has been having so much progress after a couple sessions!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Velvet Blek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-9EHeXwe1jadu-yNEVVyjsiBSMDE9PHhfbzmXrg_iH1MPHvV7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a very disappointing experience with this company and would not recommend them. I purchased two tattoo removal vouchers on Groupon, but when I called to schedule, I was told I could only use one even though the system allowed me to buy two. Instead of honoring what I paid for, I was told I could just pay the same price directly to them, which felt misleading and inconvenient to try and obtain a refund which it was too late to do.

I was also instructed to go to Walgreens and purchase lidocaine to apply myself before the appointment. I found this very unusual and concerning. Something I've never experienced at any legitimate medical or professional office.

After waiting almost, a month for my appointment, I arrived to find no one greeting me. The staff member continued a phone call without looking up without acknowledging me and then appeared unprepared and disorganized with the paperwork. She asked if I had applied the lidocaine, and when I explained I hadn't (because I wasn't sure which tattoo I wanted treated), she insisted my tattoo was "too large" and tried to downgrade the service I had purchased.

I've had Botox and Xeomin several times in the past and was always underwhelmed by the results, until I went to MedbeautyLA.
She actually knows what she's doing: the right technique, the right amount, and results that look natural and flawless. On top of that, she takes the time to listen, gives honest advice, and really cares about your skin concerns. Hands down the best experience I've had with injectables.

Edit after my 2nd appointment :
I recently had Botox done with Danielle at MedbeautyLA and I’m honestly blown away by the results. I’ve had Botox at several other places before, but the technique she used felt completely different. She was incredibly precise and really took the time to assess my face instead of using a standard injection pattern.

What amazed me the most is how quickly it started setting in. I was already seeing results the next day, which has never happened to me before. The result looks so smooth and natural while still keeping my expressions.

I’ve also seen Dr. Aliksanian before and both of them truly have amazing techniques. You can tell they really understand what they’re doing and care about getting the best, most natural results possible.

MedbeautyLA has easily become my go-to place for injectables and I couldn’t recommend Danielle and Dr. Aliksanian more.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"beth nelson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIP4amjgbicy97hmI6nqkS5rKok8hTh8GyFnLS4KYAhcGoV3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love Med Beauty LA they are kind professional and supportive. I feel so taken care of at this spa.
I opted for the diamond glow facial that
Exfoliates skin to reveal a brighter, smoother complexion; Extracts debris and congestion to unclog pores; Infuses skin with nourishing serums for skin rejuvenation. My skin is so clean and bright now. Moisturized too… I can’t wait as long now in between appointments my skin feels so wonderful. Try Med Beauty LA you will love this place too…","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matt Stasi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCdR_prVbzaBOoXRzrnkHwlx6tNRAsVRziKNp8zf_PSDlmtIwY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best IPL treatment in LA! The staff at MEDBEAUTYLA explained skin resurfacing and had me follow up with a Salt Facial.  They really care about problems skin like mine and I’m noticing significant improvement. Two thumbs way up!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caroline B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGaztKwcfLt0YP51YxG1duhm1jDrSXM0_mP0y11CZbgacAJEPR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I came in for a little bit of hylenex, a product I've gotten many times before. I expressed concern to the doctor several times about injecting without ultrasound (I came to her specifically because she offered it) and she assured me we didn't "need" it, which was disappointing because it can only improve the treatment.

After the consultation, she went straight into injecting, and there was a lot of product left in the vial when she was finished... but I was charged for 6cc's (4 vials) of product. This seemed like a mistake considering that she told me we were going light with the treatment. The receptionists had a difficult time even figuring out the unit of measurement I was even charged in.

I was shocked by the $510 price, and the receptionist told me "I should know what prices are before I come in or stop the appointment if I would like to know", which was disappointing knowing I didn't have 4 syringes of product injected, there are no hylenex prices on their website, and that what you want going in is often different than what you land on in the consultation. I do not believe I was charged the correct amount for the amount of product that was used, and I don't like the explanation I received. This was a disappointing experience.

Update-- It's been some time and no one has attempted to reach out to remedy this. I also haven't noticed any improvement since my treatment. I feel like I just threw $500 away.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Very minimal pain and love love love the results. Definitely recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"heidi kinney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeaE1IDuAxfrb5FyDlRwJNG46eplHSpCp6-roj4YipGHVtvgXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I do not recommend this medical spa for any services. Over the last few weeks, I have watched my face go from beautiful to deformed due to improper injection techniques and not diluting my Hyperdilute Radiesse enough. The provider stated they used a 1:2 ratio in my neck when it should be 1:4, which is why I have lumps all over it. I found out just how many calcified lumps I had when I had to get a CT scan with contrast and found out the hard way they show up on a scan, unbelievable (I could have let the doctor know before they did it if I had known, but I had to get a second scan to rule anything out).

My primary provider does a 1:4, and it is on almost all information that a 1:4 ratio is the way to do the treatment properly (For treating neck laxity, a higher dilution (like 1:4) is often preferred as it allows for more even distribution of the product across the area). But they did a 1:2, so I have a lumpy neck now (not very attractive).

For the under-eye filler, which I was reassured Rachel knew how to perform better than anyone (her words), both eyes looked different. The right side had an odd sack of filler under the right eye, and the left side stayed bruised for a very long time and was lumpy and uneven (both sides were not only different; they made my face look horrible, and it aged me).

To make matters worse, I had a Hyperdilute Radiesse treatment done under my chin; I now have a heavy pocket filled with calcium (again, because it is not being diluted enough).

I gave the provider a chance to refund the under-eye filler (which I paid $900 to dissolve, which she assured me she would take care of when we met, but she did not. So, I paid $1,200 for a treatment that deformed my face and $900 to have it all dissolved so I could look normal again. This means I am $2,100 out of pocket and will need to return to my primary provider to get things looking good again, so yes, more money.

Even after meeting with the owner to discuss my issues, which she apologized for and agreed that my treatments were no good, she still only provided me with the last two Hyperdilute Radiesse treatments that I never received. Still, even that was not the right amount (it should have been $1,600, not $1,500).  I took time out of my day to meet with the owner on a Saturday, who took pictures of my face and wrote a note to my main provider about how to reduce the LUMPS on my neck from the improper injection technique by Rachel.

It pains me to put this on a review, but I have allowed enough time to give this Medical Spa the time to make it right (not to mention my own time).

I knew something was wrong, so I emailed on November 8, 2024, at 8:43 a.m. The office staff ignored my first email, so I had to call to explain how bad my face looked. She said to wait another week (which had already been three) to see what happens.

Wait another week; I'm sorry. It's my face, for crying out loud. I am beside myself in explaining why they would not do the right thing. Please know you need to be careful here! Avoid this place if you can. They say they can do something but overpromise and underdeliver. What they did to my face was unacceptable, and I had to tell others what happened.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETkDh032IMBiSMBs0wO96V2fy2FVn0b3g0esG6opJfxfQ7I7QygNvd3dPj-ZrSmbawYiY2n79oocr9l7NIKueEhyiEBev1CLZSLD68iqCzp6HGD9Qk-4HxNkdFlwxC-mG1GqQ8D","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESfBIu3PyHEGy0kX1fiMfaH-5bDsWXbaboxp7GSa-RufJJNcQdQlv4nvZBbnP2m0YomYADwGWETIs96zszxy1kkPJwnjkkbnDuREhtuw5oc9MbKamNPclhTm6WXm3PT6D3PhVSn","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEToYkrFOrPTLI4D_ua3vx_g-f-udg-R_1Z09lWXBXLC5flHpyyDIV2obIdXurlE_HIxE8q1wzKcVIQOaXmRLl-Bq2afvLQmN3p7UNVY0qb-WfQsjnUQX4kOz4dzufgWPJ5Vf08EVg","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQzLMzg_V-y51oEonZxyKi06OOffuhpmeGqp206q41pkilqYdqzSOAS4mH3D0khSyAA78CdETvvJ04mgz8BLiHVC1Wdqi1_TQZ1QklYFwN511KC7trvbfnXqYWg2aLr7rCJC-w","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERQmlXsAnsjdk6-udpcqI8cOo6fLdf1IUHMEKtiWJ53ZLypKVE_Jn38-YbSL0OO-rGtEvVCo73x4aVVR4B_W6PUqITozKuRVmMpkT33RlWvBiKpqIHystz644d6JBEJ-YAL1SnfMw","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER-fx1HoEd1LrV1Sp4iFGLhV6TiCA65ssT1dmXzdt7AY2RJhDTsmO1syHoOjFM6rZClNDv_36Sp0G500JVMC3C5RUMqd3Rg_wcAkHfS3OcbKaRskcbXvee3OMCKFGO8q_ABOSJU"],"When":"2024-12-2"},{"Name":"bri sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIi79BIBxNdBsBAiMD593WoN68y8U762ol7jbK8-Ez3g0lGaQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such an amazing experience! Kira, Sarah, and Samantha, thank you again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenai Daifuku","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVE4WrULKzbBlfSf6CPSDCxpPfV9Nz9gUsboAnKQYja4Dp1AO-j=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been going to South Coast MedSpa (their Brentwood, LA location) for a few years now. I first went back during covid, but had briefly relocated to the Bay Area before moving back to LA again. While in the Bay Area I went to a different laser hair removal place, but didn’t love them as much as I did at South Coast MedSpa. When I moved back to LA, I was thrilled to be going back to them again.

When I first went I got my underarms and Brazilian done. Most recently I’ve included my upper lip and full legs. Not having to shave and have smooth skin has been a huge time saver! I also have a skin condition that makes me itch in certain areas that I have hair so getting laser hair removal wasn’t only for cosmetic reasons. Since I’ve started getting the sessions I itch a whole lot less and my skin is more consistent in color and smooth. Having better skin has given me confidence that I didn’t have before.

I usually see Cheryl for appointments and she’s absolutely wonderful! So easy to chat with during the sessions. And she has little tricks she can use if the pain is feeling “spicy” as we like to say. They do offer numbing cream if needed or ice packs can be used if you’d like to save money. The ladies at the front desk are also always so polite and kind. I’ve honestly have never had a bad interaction with anyone working there and they are usually on time. Would highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brenda's Blends","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJpil4IpzZ7XLYV79Nc3RIAGALrmLcjaYHKlZBdBsmWBgatuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Let me just state clearly and from every rooftop, if you’re considering a procedure, don’t delay, just book it! Dr. Ting was, as always, professional, pleasant, and efficient. He reviewed treatment options clearly, and his assistant did a good job explaining additional details. The experience from check-in through the consultation met my expectations.

One area for improvement was at the medication checkout. The staff member assisting me did not seem fully familiar with the prescribed products or the correct order of application and initially provided incorrect guidance, which was later corrected by another team member. Because of this, I did not feel fully confident purchasing all the recommended items at that time.  Given the cost of the products (I dropped two products,  and still paid nearly $400), having knowledgeable staff available to answer questions in real time would be very helpful, rather than relying solely on the after-visit summary which I have to request the next day.

[{"Name":"Anonymous User 13","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJW-UnltlbCJTxXfA7eWWPsc_6zeFH6n31VOR-YA32febsl_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a great experience at Elite MD. From my initial consult to now being six weeks post-op, I have felt completely supported every step of the way.

What really stood out to me was their level of expertise combined with a truly integrative, whole-body approach. They don’t just focus on the procedure itself — they focus on setting you up for success in every aspect of healing. From nutrition guidance and proper rest to self-care and recovery support, they provide multiple tools so you feel empowered and prepared.

Dr. Bansal is incredibly knowledgeable and thorough. He explained everything in detail, answered all of my questions (more than once), and never made me feel rushed or pressured. I felt fully informed and confident in every decision I made. His expertise and calm demeanor made me feel completely comfortable throughout the entire process.

The staff is equally impressive. Tony, Morgan, Trish, and the entire team are attentive, organized, and genuinely caring. From scheduling to post-op care, everything has been comprehensive and seamless. At no point did I feel like I couldn’t reach someone or that I wasn’t being supported.

Overall, I would absolutely recommend Elite MD to family, friends, or anyone considering a procedure. It’s a welcoming environment with a highly skilled team that truly prioritizes patient education, comfort, and long-term success.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"sara marie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_heFCKSFvplph1cmtgjhfG9J2A8Cqz8Me5DMDV1V1TjPfcYRD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an excellent experience.
