I have consistently been highly satisfied with their services.

Over the past few years, I have noticed a significant change in my face, likely attributed to my advancing age, genetics, and active outdoor lifestyle. Deep wrinkles have developed primarily in my lower face, impacting my desire to attend social events like parties and family gatherings.

As an emergency physician, I am constantly wearing a mask so my professional colleagues, nursing staff and support staff have not seen my face since 2020, when the COVID-19 pandemic began. I kept my face covered because it was part of my job, but also I was hiding behind the mask. The severity of my wrinkles prompted me to seek a surgical intervention.

I initially consulted with my aesthetician, Linda Aragon, who is not only an exceptional professional but also my cousin. I trust her implicitly. She recommended booking a consultation with Dr. David Hendricks, a plastic surgeon who joined Dr. Vivek Bansal’s practice a few years ago. Initially, I was hesitant to undergo a facelift, but after meeting with Dr. Hendricks and discussing the matter with Dr. Bansal, I realized this was the appropriate course of action.

During our consultation, Dr. Hendricks provided a comprehensive overview of the procedure. A few days later, I underwent the deep plane facelift, and I am immensely pleased with the outcome. It exceeded my expectations.

As a physician, I can attest to Dr. Hendricks’ exceptional bedside manner, expertise, artistry and the exceptional aftercare and front office services provided by Elite MD. They offered me a direct phone number for any questions or concerns on the first day of post-operative care.

I have already had three follow-up appointments, not due to any issues or concerns, but as part of their patient-centered approach. My recovery has been surprisingly smooth. Linda Aragon personally takes care of post-operative patients, demonstrating her expertise in scar prevention, reduction, and care.

As a result of this experience, I no longer dread attending social events. I can now do so without wearing a mask, which is a significant improvement.  I highly recommend Elite MD, Dr Hendricks and Dr Bansal and do so without reservation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kianna Monroe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKTCQQVq0q4Qbi-2dLJHWnEe_3XYp40RfKG5sJTl800nCbt_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had my fat transfer done at Elite MD with Dr. Vivek Bansal and I honestly could not have asked for a better experience.

From the very beginning I felt heard. Dr. Bansal really took the time to understand what I wanted and what would look natural on my body. Nothing felt rushed. Nothing felt salesy. I felt safe and confident in my decision before I even stepped into surgery day.

I also have to shout out the absolute dream team. Trish, Tony, Maricel, and Roxanna were all incredible. Every single one of them went above and beyond both before and after my procedure. They checked on me, answered every question, and made me feel genuinely cared for. I am two weeks post op and they are still following up and staying in touch. That alone says everything about the level of care here.

I am already loving my results and I know I am still early in the healing process. The results truly reflect the conversations we had beforehand. I feel like Dr. Bansal listened and delivered exactly what we discussed.

I will definitely come back and update with photos once I am further along in recovery. But I can confidently say Elite MD is highly recommended. Special shoutout again to everyone I mentioned. You all made this experience something I will always be grateful for.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea Hennen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXM1QKVnYQAFGoCVG5BseC2xbgbKwGWi8dbTBxwmYxf1xIBO3Vi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First and foremost, I want to express how much I appreciate Dr. Bansal’s honesty and integrity, it’s truly something I’ve never experienced. I was a patient about 15 years ago and had a breast augmentation, followed shortly after by a belly button reconstruction.

If I thought my breast procedure gave me confidence, having Dr. B reconstruct my belly button gave me even more. My results were amazing, natural, beautiful, and with zero complications. Even after 15 years, everything has held up wonderfully.

That’s why I’m coming back. The level of experience, honesty, and genuine care from Dr. Bansal and the entire team is truly next level. You don’t just feel like a patient, you feel supported and valued.

I’m looking forward to my next procedure, a mommy makeover, and I wouldn’t trust anyone else with this journey.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"steelyblues","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhpkgQy6j9XHXZohJTvcwaeEW4M9-JEIek7VTIgo5WVuRMzg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Bansal has consistently provided excellent care and aftercare for all of my treatments at Elite MD to ensure fast healing with excellent results. Dr. Bansal takes the time to listen to your treatment goals, then creates a plan which he executes always with the highest level of medical standards. Additionally, Dr. Bansal has the expertise, knowledge and resources which he provides to facilitate a fast recovery with the best possible results. Dr. Bansal’s medical facilities are second to none and everyone at Elite MD makes you feel welcome and your wellness is their top priority. I would highly recommend Dr. Bansal and Elite MD if you are looking for the best in class medical treatment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Constance Chu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX78N1HEEsXFPHVke-0tHPHR0L11-szr_hF2AEHP-afyFdbbCRv=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For almost 20 years, I have struggled with my mommy pooch. After I had my first child who was nine pounds and four ounces, I never had the confidence to put on a bikini again. After much consideration, I decided to inquire about a tummy tuck or vaser liposuction. One of my biggest fears was being scammed into what I would consider a plastic surgery mill. Finding Dr. Bansal and his team truly quelled my fears. They took the time to understand my background, my medical needs, and to motivate me to not just get procedures done but to become healthier as a whole. Because my body had a ton of inflammation due to medical reasons, great care was taken to significantly reduce that through additional means including diet, lymphatic massage and self-care. I felt so well taken care of. They are knowledgeable about the best post-surgery care I needed as well as special garments and creams. Their general approach is to do what is best even if it requires more work or discipline. That really vibes with me. Remember, it’s a process!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Martha Nita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5IZJcewWyZjLkOQYYeOwLcVbAppuQ-xj3BbeVe-tuqu75ZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Extraordinary Elite MD Doctor/Surgeon, who provide excellent care. The appointments, easy communications and texts were in timely manners. This is my second procedure with Elite MD with excellent results from the star to finish.
Dr. Hendrick is kind, gentle, experienced and excellent surgeon. He listened carefully my questions, concerns and expectations. I didn’t feel that he was rushing the appointment. Dr. Hendrick performed the revision to my previous facelift I’ve done with another doctor. He generously gave me plenty of time to discuss the pros and cons of my procedure since he is doing the revision. He explained it to me what would be appropriate and best for me in this specific circumstances. I did accept what he suggested. It’s being 6 months since the surgery. It looks amazing, refresh!! It just getting better and better. I look 15 years younger. I’m so grateful. I couldn’t be so happier!!!
Thank you, Dr. Hendrick, and thank you Dr. Bansal","Images":null,"When":""}]

I’m so happy I found her!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Meral Atik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJ_cjqPWjBW4Ro5qYO6J8Rol3tD_IBpRRMA_BanPaZM_Hc7qs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After some disappointing experiences in the past with pushy, inexperienced providers, I was hesitant to get back into Dysport or lip fillers. Lucy is incredibly knowledgeable, honest, and compassionate. Her office is clean, calm, and welcoming. She never pushes treatments or encourages more than you're comfortable with — which was a huge concern for me. She takes the time to listen, educate, and always respects my conservative approach.

I've consistently seen amazing results from my Dysport treatments, and just recently, I trusted her with lip filler — something I hadn’t been happy with for nearly two decades. She absolutely nailed it! The results are natural, flattering, and exactly what I wanted.

If you're hesitant or nervous like I was, don't wait any longer — speak with Lucy. Her expertise and integrity are unmatched. And one piece of advice: don’t bargain shop for your face. You’re not just paying for a product; you’re paying for skill, safety, and results — and Lucy delivers all three with care and excellence.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicole Jaramillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWufSdtIpEhXqYMYo7BPAmyN0qN3T6tLWTG8j4yl9quOAL3QOoV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lucy is a very knowledgeable practitioner. Even though I was nervous, he and his amazing anesthesiologist were always confident and have had several years of surgery experience. My recovery was strong- no pain or nausea, a couple of days of minor bleeding, managed with just mild medication. I also managed to sleep. And Dr. Mehta’s post - op support has been incredible. I am Truly grateful to have met a gifted and a talented surgeon in Dr.Mehta!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rocio Navarro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKID0U3mfMBUkdOQEAKDHSEXMVZiylnQ6e983UMuTiBeihhhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t say enough good things about my experience with Dr. Mehta and his staff. The entire team (Jill, Sydney, etc.) is just as wonderful: kind, professional, and genuinely caring. Every visit was smooth and stress-free, and I always felt like I was in the best hands possible. I’m so grateful for the amazing care I received and would recommend Dr. Mehta and his staff to anyone without hesitation!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jordan Jenab","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLscJMylYt0bPC-JHQ9BXFX353gOUL000Ws8XqT0Mbto7Nejw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the pleasure of working with Dr. Mehta and his team for a nose procedure in October, and I cannot speak highly enough about the entire experience. From the initial consultation through surgery and recovery, Dr. Mehta demonstrated exceptional skill, professionalism, and care. The procedure went seamlessly, and my recovery process was smooth, thanks to his clear guidance and attentive follow-ups. Dr. Mehta is not only a highly skilled surgeon but also a genuinely caring doctor who makes you feel confident and comfortable every step of the way. His practice is extremely well-run, with a friendly and supportive staff that always made me feel taken care of. I am beyond pleased with my results and grateful to have been under Dr. Mehta’s care. I would highly recommend him and his practice to anyone considering this type of procedure.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ruheene Jaura","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeHNX6Ral7zbkrLKVMxwZSbVET4353M1VM1ghPBstoZWLfCU8Uig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t say enough about Dr Mehta and his amazing team. I got my septo-rhinoplasty done in Tijuana a couple of weeks ago and sadly my family doctor here in the Bay Area passed away while I was gone. Unfortunately, this also meant that I suddenly had nobody here to take out my sutures or to monitor my healing when I got back- and I was completely overwhelmed.

Thankfully I found Dr Mehta and made an appointment, and I’m so, so glad I did. He immediately noticed I had a bad infection before he removed my sutures, and likely ended up saving the work that had been done on my nose in the process. He treated me for it right away and I was perfectly ok in under 48 hours.

Not only was Dr Mehta willing to help me out even though I wasn’t originally his patient, he was also available and responsive to me later that night via email and phone. Plus the ladies in his office are the BEST! The lovely girl at the front desk is proof of his work (she has the perfect nose), and I would go to Dr Mehta if I had to do it all again.

Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtXywuXHlFU5ntW536FfuKSlGz0WnoEMsc2oxKALkg659BKaGuZg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a septoplasty from Dr. Mehta a few weeks ago. I don’t want to have another septoplasty, but if I did, I would see him again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tarini Sahay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIecmzx2hEUvjSs5IhcjxB1RxjaebZSBdf_1zVDLQ97WG11ykc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had my rhinoplasty and septoplasty exactly a year ago. Dr. Mehta was very realistic with expectations and accessible whenever I had questions in between appointments. I really appreciated the regular check ins with Dr. Mehta, as it helped me understand the healing process much better. Jill helped out with the coordination, ensuring a smooth process from pre to post op, helped take care of insurance costs, and did my post op facial, which was a nice perk. The front desk staff is very kind and welcoming, and it’s always a pleasure speaking with them. I’m very grateful I picked Mehta Plastic Surgery and would recommend them!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Nurse Practitioner Gwen is fabulous. I mentioned all my trouble areas, which include forehead, crows feet bunny lines, and lip flip. NP Gwen gave me a good consultation before injecting me. She’s definitely experienced. I noticed  she used a few different techniques to inject, which made me feel good about my finally results. Looking forward to Botox taking full effect and feeling beautiful.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERD0HdGRLXuAsezz3gleNyhMWLKk6pbaEteEH08VTpUzV6g1dO4Rcy5tR4x2aft1u3BTTQMNSnNEWzMS1TaHIE_zCPlPSg1qvbyZ1KQ2uUSug8sUrY8cFExmVTS3TV6K7u0fyVZ"],"When":"2022-6-16"},{"Name":"Ron Dijcks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8X5PWhMcYZgboDMElDmsPOAF8CFWHnkFxGNJd5RBMJzAPXC6Gdg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After spending a great deal of time researching online, I recommended Dr. Farzaneh to my girlfriend for her breast enhancement (enlargement) surgery.
Part of my research included reading patient reviews.  The favorable reviews were a big part of our  decision to have Dr. Farzaneh do the aforementioned surgery.

It's important that patients feel comfortable with their doctor, AND feel cared-for and satisfied after the procedure as well.
Dr. Farzaneh exhibits a true and sincere concern for the safety and comfort of his patients.
The pre-surgery consultations are done directly with the doctor (not an assistant or "front-salesperson").    He truly looks to develop a trusting friendship and treats patients as such throughout the entire process.
Shortly after the surgery, Dr. Farzaneh visited us at home on 3 occasions to assure comfort and proper healing.   In our case, the surgery went very well, but there was some unexpected bruising that ended up healing just fine!  The amount of follow up he spent and concern he showed in making sure it healed properly was incredible, and once again everything turned out great!

It would be an understatement to say that Dr. Farzaneh goes the extra mile for his patients, and I can, without hesitation recommend him to anyone reading this review.  You CANNOT find a more attentive and caring doctor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicole Duron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKRapjoIu1gOJVW-BkDDBVABR9SHGQooUK1wlKAHQ1oQRK0Cw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Where do I begin?  I am truly grateful for the level of care given by Dr. Farzaneh and his entire staff. They were very compassionate, professional and kind.
I am unbelievably happy with my post surgery results, Dr. Farzaneh is not only an amazing, skilled, surgeon but an extraordinary and compassionate human being.  Dr. Farzaneh and his team are far beyond exceptional!
When he sat down to discuss my surgery he brought a comforting and reassuring presence with him. I want to thank him for his dedication, compassion and care that he administers to each of his patients. I highly recommend him!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Salvante Siblings","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9W9D4A7-Sl14Fpz61m1fN13aMVv8hcvlCuDoOJTXZ_BVwU9lx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First, let me start with how friendly and welcoming all the staff is at TrueCare. It was my first visit and everyone working made me feel so comfortable. Before having my tattoo laser procedure done, Dr Farzaneh walked me through step by step what to expect, that it could take 1-2 additional sessions to see full results, after care....very detailed. He truly cares about your after process and proper care. I will definitely be returning for a second treatment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdmlMzwL8nvpLQZ6NJbNkKbcs5uFG8uV9t_zgY1Q72A4519-vDsw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Three months ago I had a mommy makeover, and hands down Dr. Farzaneh treated me like if I was his family member. Not once did I feel unsure about having two procedures done at once. He gave me the piece of mind I need from the beginning. His staff is amazing and super friendly. He’s a very dedicated doctor who truely cares for his patients. He gave me his cell phone in case I needed any questions answered at any time at the time of my consultation. After my surgery, he came to see me at night at a nearby hotel and the following morning and night. How many doctors do that?I highly recommend Dr. Farzaneh and his staff for any procedure! They are amazing!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matt Sauers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdko6taTHmjflJEB7LnNe9Vc13iihWtFljHImy-o02URMjWC8I=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am writing this review with my wife 2 months post op of her abdominoplasty with Dr. Farzaneh.  We decided to write our review as one because the entire process not only resulted in a life changing experience for my wife, but myself as her support system.  First and foremost - we would like to thank Dr. Farzaneh and his staff for all of their support.  You will learn through the entire process that Dr. Farzaneh and his staff care more about you then you do for your own self.  Dr. Farzaneh is a rare breed--he is not in it for the money!  He truly is there to make people's dreams comes true and to attain a body that not only delivers lasting physical results, but mind and soul as well.  The entire experience has created a bond between us that will be life long, the kind where Dr. Farzaneh will be at our kids wedding's!  During one of the post op visits Dr. Farzaneh pointed out a mole that my wife had that he recommended she remove since it was in a bad spot and he said not to risk it being that it could be cancerous.  He said we could go to our primary care and get a referral or that even he could it, Free of charge!  We elected to go with Dr. Farzaneh, not just because he would remove it at no expense, but because we trust him.

My wife had an initial consultation on her own, followed by a consult where we were both present. We both knew after the second visit he was the physician to complete this very complex and serious surgery.  We say serious because it really is just that, you do not want just anyone doing a surgery of this magnitude without knowing they can provide the desired results, and care for you as you would your own family.  Dr. Farzaneh stressed 2 things before even committing to the surgery- 1) ensure you speak with someone who has had the surgery to understand exactly what you are getting in to 2) ensure you have a strong support system around you that can help care for you not just physically, but mentally.  But again, Dr. Farzaneh and his staff were there every step of the way if we had any questions that needed to be answered.  One thing that really stood out to my wife and I was that Dr. Farzaneh was very clear, if he felt he could not get the results that were not only good for the patient, but also that he would be happy with, he wouldn't do the surgery.  That really sold us, because how many times have you heard or experienced a doctor, or a housing contractor for example, say they could do something that they really knew they couldn't.  When they were done, you couldn't believe you allowed them to touch you or your property!

Fast forward to month two of recovery and we are in such a good place.  The results are fantastic, and will only get better.  In the end, all of the preparation and insight Dr. Farzaneh, his staff, and former patient provided made all of this successful.  Through all of this Dr. Farzaneh at times would be very serious about patient care.  Making sure that we were following his, and his staff instructions accordingly.  There were always times that we had great fun laughing and joking, but when it came time to be serious we all were.  We had great personal conversations about everyday life, sometimes 30 minutes in length.  You really get to know someone when they take that time.  The times when the doctor was serious, some people might mistake this as him being abrasive or curt.  I took it as the doctor really wanting the surgery to be a success.  That is what we like most of all, the doctor wasn't going to sugar coat anything.  He is the nicest, caring, most straight forward doctor I have ever met.  We are truly honored to have him as our personal physician.  Thank you again Dr. Farzaneh and True Care , our entire family appreciates everything that you have done for us.  We could not have done this without you.  You are not part of our family forever.  This is an honest, unbiased review from the heart.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cindy Luu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwcFbhkLqCVx-V8fDcLSY2eEQnXfb3IxWCPalipMUHBmUVOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"To all future patients, Dr. Farzaneh is the one for you.

After contemplating a Breast Augmentation for over 10 years, I decided to do some research and checked out some doctors.  I had set up several meetings with potential doctors.  One doctor rushed through the consultation as though his time was too valuable to be wasted on me.  The other doctor treated me like a number and I would be his 3153rd case which I did not appreciate.

With Dr. Farzaneh, he spent 1 1/2 hours at the initial consultation.  He went through the pros and cons of the procedure.  He answered all my questions.  I was very comfortable with him and knew that he would be the doctor for me.

Finally, the big Friday arrived.  I was very nervous and excited at the same time.  The nurses had me ready and suddenly found out that I had a mild temperature.  Instead of moving forward with the procedure, Dr. Farzaneh suggested that it should be postponed and see how I felt over the weekend.  He didn't want to take any chances with the fever that could lead to other complications.  The temperature did go away over the weekend and the procedure was done the following Monday which was also New Year's Eve.

Dr. Farzaneh called me that afternoon after the surgery and asked how I was doing.   He came by the house and checked to make sure I was fine.  Over the two weeks period, the doctor made two house calls and saw me ten times for follow-ups.  How many doctors do you know would show so much care and dedication to ensure your full recovery?

My result is amazing!  I'm very happy and glad I went through with it.  Dr. Farzaneh has become my favorite doctor.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ray Klepper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK687EUlplvEHBiEOVu3-G68Ipe0p7ikd44sXKOCFXRpWVGWw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot recommend Dr. Malotky enough! I went into my breast augmentation consultation feeling very self-conscious—I was extremely flat-chested with almost no breast tissue at all, and it had affected my confidence for years.

From the very first appointment, Dr. Malotky listened carefully, answered every question patiently, and helped me choose an implant size and shape that would fit my frame. He never pushed me toward anything too big or dramatic; instead, he focused on creating a result that would feel authentic to me.

The surgery and recovery went far smoother than I ever expected. His team was professional, kind, attentive, and always available when I had questions during the healing process. The incisions healed beautifully with minimal scarring.

I went from having virtually no breasts to now being full, feminine, and proportionate in a way that feels 100% like me. My clothes fit better, I feel confident in everything from swimsuits to fitted tops, and most importantly, I finally feel comfortable in my own body.

If you’re considering breast augmentation and want a surgeon who combines technical skill, an excellent aesthetic eye, genuine care, and outstanding follow-up, Dr. Malotky and his Team are it! This was truly life-changing for me in the best possible way. Thank you!

-Amber Klepper","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQiS0jW2SAi1Ew3ehpgsUE8moflvFvUcjggXfDVOMp3t-wHGWIn9hBPaKfmo0A5Fg12f4bHFGIonRMDvAKxg-G0YTuJTZeidytWSMydsrYWD5JfTMxzciZNdCcwsRtP7QCY708yPKi0whpc"],"When":"2026-3-8"},{"Name":"Charlotte Frese","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIVxVMGBvyKQnF6I7rbaSkVVRh_id_-g7W-MsaRc82fat1gQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After 40 years with breast implants that were hard and encapsulated, I decided to have them removed and go back to my natural breasts.  In my search for a plastic surgeon I found Dr. Malotky’s website Summit Plastic Surgery.  I was very impressed by all of the 5 stars and great reviews.  After my initial consultation, I decided he was the doctor for me.  Dr. Malotky and his staff are so kind and informative which gave me the confidence that I would have the outcome I wanted.  They were right!  Dr. Malotky removed my implants and capsules surrounding my implants, along with a breast lift to create my new natural breasts.  I am so happy with my results and can’t thank him enough.  I highly recommend Dr. Malotky, Summit Plastic Surgery.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Krystle Marino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVo0IYTkYEDFlNaik62bLpRR2Hi44ZwXbWx34hapdL6mj7Hu4Um0A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Malotky and his entire staff were nothing short of amazing! From the first consultation I knew that Dr. Malotky was the surgeon for me. He is so enthusiastic about what he does and his confidence made me relax immediately. I was coming in with a ruptured implant and breasts that were too large for my 5'0" 105lb frame. I had a breast augmentation 7 years earlier by another surgeon that did not communicate well with me. I expressed my hesitation about a second surgery after not being completely happy with the first one and Dr. Malotky listened intently and communicated eveything clearly from start to finish. I now have the breasts I had prior to having children and they fit my body beautifully. Dr. Malotky gave me my confidence back! I would recommend him a thousand times.
His entire staff treated me with such kindness and respect from day one.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lori Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHRxgqVLTQ8mC5VP6YIfIHuGwWSHyPKCx1WWa15kiLtOxxOn0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Malotky & All Staff are very professional and love what they do in the medical field. All of my concerns and questions were answered, I felt very confident that this is who and where I wanted my procedure done with.
I followed all after care instructions and my results were more than what I planned on it being. I would definitely recommend The Summit Plastic Surgery Team to anyone. Thank you again Dr. M & Team ❣️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erin Castro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIomARfMFYUFiGCy3HA2yEnC4kjLDrzmisxGG0cGw21eU8xbM78=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cannot recommend Dr. Malotky enough!! I recently had a breast augmentation and I never expected to have the great experience I did! I would do this procedure 10 times over with Max! From my first visit to my last, he was always so kind and took his time to explain everything to me and made sure to answer any questions I had. I was fully expecting to have a painful recovery, but it was honestly such a breeze! If I ever had a question or concern, I could call the office and his staff would listen and assure me, and if needed Dr. Malotky would call me personally to discuss my concern. A huge thank you to both Max and his team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kathleen Stephens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcmv4ro_AElUIiDYQHagOndrG_bEbO03oUSDEhnkMfLqvEphmf=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As someone who has struggled with body image and trust issues for as long as I can remember, after giving birth to 4 children (one being a twin pregnancy) I found myself constantly wanting to shed the extra skin I had lingering on my lower abdominal area. After several consultations from the bay area, up towards the Oregon border, I finally settled on Dr. Malotky. Not only did he and his entire staff make me feel comfortable, welcome and safe in their care, they provided a high-quality level of service from the moment I called to make a consultation appointment, to my last post-operation appointment and even now if I bug them with a question here and there.
I am now just over 5 months post operation from my tummy tuck with muscle repair. I finally feel comfortable and confident in my own skin and receive compliments on a very regular basis. Only thing I would change, is having done the procedure sooner. I will never stop recommending Dr. Malotky and his staff!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETJ_GfneIdQjIuw8hjaNtM3e2uIuZsHKun-yIVWCOqYj6xtCml5yb3jl9hHhFR2DGyvVFhOL0qHMbvgtiUWVl_ONcjGSlXFsKyEO5GA_7KvldxEs7yXcJxIkRfu5vlZ1QNLoLyIjOsBb5K5","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETDkADJ33KWK68dYzu-Yz2lYdnRH_9HCBcuicPfCktCfhKp35mIH-chaJVAMgfe_5jCr0-_tc3qY82S5GGQApbln5mGrE_MhxyCSyfE6sua6JzFgSSgkGPXDaGoJyJi2veXeLQ11V3GnoVH","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lES2QCwufiyoriH1xnNBAI53w7MmMBF6JPoJFVFVaK0FRlkXtQIw6tOjxRzaNM5OICkXgqqADD5vgPcjfeWzsYZcenU50uMudm4QVNZz3iQbAN4pEetKvREZGsPx5jDTZ0FYamqoh5mVo3j-","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESL4_Xb-fClVNVJ3kF10_gtD4enOsZp93ZohHL5h_r6saLfc4k1d1cnJ6_qGKtb5LkvUjyugBN2h_H_y90Ubz2_3fTP5dratp7-O9NQfoQg6nI8OocI8cHBiWMgWxZKGo1gpH6M_NVNXNmr","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQJotm4rHs1Q86n-Ew8IcjnLxjZaN6JtuzyL1qGF00Ev84liiYdAjbw6Lgt9JdEyOaWZN1a0Is7nvMY2bIIrq9qeD7OxwajBR8Nioy7dAyKSXcsDIlQ2mU45-YBcVjTFW4EGEOZGheU06mi","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETqSJHrhpsgHs9eqH_jLDELaW_-9pnrTpLrE_QzhPINnplxsiIgjuJHeOb8i6D3je10jVvgNzuI99NNPUNXJU4ibngYxuzWAiIO4XUlYo4H--B8wf5z_pHICuLAQunJ_JVuPU3cDSziBcP_"],"When":"2025-11-13"},{"Name":"Krysten","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxES61CAzg7ZmPzwbgjwHFjT8Ing9If3rSDfdxWElcYUubj60kkg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went in wanting an improvement…was not expecting literal perfection as results! My mind is blown from my transformation. I came across Dr. Malotky’s work on social media and loved the before and after pictures I saw. Drove from a large city I live near and headed to the mountains, even with all the options nearby, to specifically meet him and see what he would say about my breast augmentation revision. I knew right away when I met the staff and met him, I was going to have my surgery performed by him. It’s like he read my mind and told me what to do based on the results I wanted and I am so glad I listened! I wanted a certain look, he knew exactly what to do, by far exceeding any expectations imaginable. Highly recommend him to anyone. Very personable and amazing team from front to back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Monica Trevino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfcj_7qkJr60c928yIdrPvSo7tEIeDvOayJOa9WXjqCFhXSZ31=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Imagine walking full of trepidation into an office for a first-time procedure consultation and you’re greeted by rainbows and butterflies (Sara) and your nerves instantly vanish.  You’re then called back to confide your medical history and cosmetic desires (shameful, confusing)  but you’re met with giggles, comfort and charisma (Christy). Finally, the SURGEON comes waltzing in with jokes, knowledge, passion, and confidence (Dr. Malotky)  and next thing you know you’re scheduling an appointment to have a major operation because you instantly trust these people with your life… literally! I’m about 8 weeks post-op and give Dr. Malotky and his crew a big and shiny gold star, A+.
Aside from the incredible bedside manner and comforting crew, the results of my breast mastopexy/ augmentation are beyond my expectations. My confidence has been restored as well as my faith in humanity just by my encounters with his staff. THANK YOU ALL at Summit Plastic Surgery :’)","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Marilyn Suttle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3lGPY86KM9fPk4nwA6M6cvRa5ubN4o8WaTbjWGXZOCD_zPpI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"my husband has been seeing Jeff nurse practitioner for over a year now and I just changed my provider to Jeff and had my first appointment yesterday, first time in 77 years that I actually had a good time at a doctors appointment. Jeff spent over an hour with me, being a retired nurse. He cut to the Chase and talk to me in the language that I understand., He didn’t just listen, or control the conversation like most doctors do, he interjected when he needed to help me to decide about my own, And what my needs were.. Some of my family members have asked me why I wanted to see a nurse practitioner and not a real doctor., Well in my 50 years of nursing, I’ve seen a lot of real doctors and a lot of them are very good, I’ll take Jeff over all of them. Thanks, Jeff you make a difference.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Casey Payton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJ8zbNovyWBk7PShNG5Bid1rlSbu1juSHAUziYx_Y5Qe_OVw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We always have had good great experiences with Jeff and Dr. Fort. Dunsmuir is now the place where anyone can receive the best dental care available anywhere! Update.
My daughter had an urgent medical need while she was visiting. In addition she had to get on the road home the following morning.  Shasta Cascade staff work together to ensure she saw someone that day. They went above and beyond
Very grateful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tanya Hutton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOHqrQ7YmRr6PDYD20hnFvCWVfMlF1Kif4vMzh4jght9d7ZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a wonderful experience seeing Dr. Rohani at the McCloud Dental Center today. Amazing staff you have at the McCloud dental center, its great to walk into a place that has such a relaxing vibe going on as soon as you walk in the door. Highly recommend McCloud Dental Center, I just hope this Dentists stays with the Shasta Cascade Health Centers for awhile. The whole team is amazing, and I’m so happy with my results","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Cecilia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkxO8xv9s9J0s8e1qoMG74LZtbpIoMRejtKEv2ma-bqRRReg4A2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My experience at this aesthetic center, specifically with the injector Kelly, has been disappointing and frustrating from the very beginning. I went in with high expectations, but what I received was a lack of professionalism, disorganization, and a treatment that did not deliver the expected results.

From the first appointment, I noticed they were unclear about the purpose of my visit. Kelly showed no interest in what I was explaining, and she even had to consult with the reception about other treatments I mentioned. When the procedure was finally done on October 11th, it was quick and lacked attention to detail. She didn’t show me the injections, nor did she provide any aftercare instructions. I had to search for all the information on Google when I got home, which is unacceptable.

Days went by, and I noticed no changes in my face. I called the center, and they told me to wait two weeks. I insisted on booking an appointment (because they don’t consider follow-up necessary) and had to adjust my schedule to attend. During this consultation, Kelly insisted that the Botox “would continue working” and that the results would improve over time. However, the days passed, and the movement on my forehead increased, clearly indicating that the expected result was not achieved. I sent photos and videos via email, and at all times, it felt like they didn’t take my concerns seriously.

In subsequent communications, Kely justified the poor result by saying that Botox cannot erase pre-existing lines, but my main complaint was always the movement on my forehead, which should have been nonexistent according to the treatment I requested. The response from the center was to offer more Botox, but at an additional cost, which I refused because I had already paid a high price and had lost confidence in them. When I asked if they thought the work was done well, they only defended Kelly’s experience without offering any solutions.

Eventually, I requested a refund, and they told me they wouldn’t give it to me, suggesting I find another place for treatment. This only deepens my distrust about the quality of the product they used and the actual amount of units applied, as external professionals I consulted concluded that the treatment was poorly done.

Additionally, we after researching the center, I found other reviews from patients with similar experiences. This, coupled with the fact that the cost is significantly higher than other places, makes me feel completely scammed.

I hope this review serves as a warning for anyone considering this center. I will post photos of the before, during, and after to clearly show the result of this procedure. I do not recommend this place at all, and I deeply regret having to go through this experience!.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lET9R7rXWHyjdAnPNh5o30GFNUCl4iKVfBcUxD2k8YnjNscW8yxuQDURHWB1Ift9MhPvU9wpOTDQpYCYQ8jtP60IFEpsGQ2DZAZot3gU4Bieg-HKyY6BL3u9ayUgCue11_QfbsE","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERONwCv8yp6nYs5FRVrNQLq8QAOZNPAvks4z7ceg0nQjK4I8JUF_2f9eZ6QNxySvZehrflDd0WY8AswVXZ1TZwyRC8g3Aex_Bnt1vIzvpGik8EbECVd4-JI_7cvCQFQCEWYkHU-QA","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER8cj1RYH1Kw3Sa_05ICWkcBw_q0JKQM6vAgUE13v8CV5jbRw_nvkVbviGoT1CKoLHCm_8U0OG8qMyFi77ZslijN6SV5z2Ke5tYjOB9Q0WAMx4uaGlu4aKzbYYZO-pSLRMB-EAt"],"When":"2024-11-24"},{"Name":"Christy Shaw","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKl-VPKnSq6ciW76NjZwMUqfOp_pdCCt2CXuD8bCqpOytbstw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was treated by Cate Borrego and had a wonderful experience! [{"Name":"preetika singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcHVdU761jXQ2g1gEgY7EoMZYvCwOD7c5OK_4oL3FbctYiwwM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had a closed dorsal rhinoplasty and I couldn’t be happier with my experience! From my very first consultation to my surgery day and follow-ups, the entire team has been absolutely amazing. The doctor is not only incredibly skilled, but also kind, patient, and attentive. He took the time to understand what I wanted, gave his opinions, and made me feel completely comfortable and confident in my decision.

The staff has been just as wonderful, super professional, caring, and always available to answer my questions. While I am still very much in my healing phase, my nose already looks beautiful and so natural.

I’m so grateful for Dr.Mabourakh and the whole team for such a smooth experience. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"River City Nat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwwKysvzvUXLb1ZfGjMnh5-mR_4hx_K1eYePrzuOlzUDuC2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve always been self-conscious about my nose, and it had a lasting impact on my self-esteem…In my 30s, I finally decided to stop just wanting to get my nose done and actually make it happen. A colleague of mine had septoplasty-rhinoplasty with Dr. Mabourakh and the results were excellent, which gave me the confidence to move forward. I’m thrilled I did!

From the very first consultation to my postoperative appointments, Dr. Mabourakh made me feel heard and understood. Before my surgery, I emphasized that I wanted to maintain my natural look, just refined and balanced. Not only did he deliver subtle and beautiful results, but also exceeded my expectations! I was amazed at how little pain I had after the surgery and it was a remarkably smooth recovery (definitely abide by their preoperative instructions). Sometimes I wish I had done this sooner, but Dr. Mabourakh was undoubtedly worth the wait.

One of the most important things I’ve learned throughout this process is the importance of patience and trust in the journey! I cannot stress this enough. The first couple of months after surgery can be a bit challenging as your nose settles into its final shape, and it’s easy to get anxious. Trust me, the results just get better with time! After three months, I am blown away by how amazing my nose looks; it is even more beautiful than I had hoped! Also, while the 3D renderings are helpful, I’d take them with a grain of salt. The actual results are even better.

What further made this experience special was the team. Dr. Mabourakh’s staff, especially Amy, Michaela, and Brenna, are absolutely wonderful! They provided (and still provide) unwavering support, understanding, and professionalism. It’s so important to have a compassionate, supportive team when undergoing surgery, and they are just that. They made me feel comfortable and never judged me for wanting to make a change to my appearance. Their kindness and Dr. Mabourakh’s exceptional skills and attention to detail made a world of difference in my recovery and overall experience.

I cannot thank Dr. Mabourakh and his incredible staff enough. She’s truly the best! 💕","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maikel Faragalla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXt2RLLzUDAOcjq1qNSOpfN2U1mxJp36JpdhChaOPIpcDoDLr48=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They don't have experience in otoplasty. Avoid this place. I'm very disappointed with the surgery. Lots of scars, completely asymmetrical. Going to another doctor to revise. Doctor Philip offered to correct the result, but after the disappointing result I don't feel comfortable going under the knife again with them. I'm sure they are good at other types of cosmetic surgeries but Otoplasty is for sure NOT one of them. I asked initially for before and after pictures, and they had very minimal photos to show. It's my mistake not listening to my gut feeling and going somewhere else. Now I have asymmetrical ears with multiple visible scars etc. other doctor's office will charge me double what I already paid to correct the diformities. Don't go to this place for Otoplasty I can't stress this enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Britt M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIuimFHiEHzYLzp-NVmyAFuRzw_s1nAFkd-CW3pSSjAwOIvRg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ive always been skeptical and fearful of cosmetic surgery. I’ve never had anything cosmetic done, so I was nervous. After seeing all the great reviews from this place, I got the courage to finally go. I was torn between chin lipo or needing something more drastic because I’ve always hated under my chin. It’s genetic, so I figured I’d finally do something about it to make me feel more confident and happy with my appearance. I went for consultation and asked the doctors opinion on what I am a good candidate for. He told me I am a good candidate for chin lipo and my skin has great elasticity. He went over how the process would work and turn out and I was super excited after hearing how optimistic he was about my future results. I talked to them about pricing, $5,000 was definitely out of my budget, but ultimately I felt confident in the doctor’s assessment and decided to go through with the procedure. The doctor did tell me it will take a few months to start to even see results. After the first two months and nothing changed I had mentioned it to him at a follow up appointment, and he said he was super confident that I’m just still swollen and it will go down. At the 3 month post op check I told him I see no changes. He actually agreed and told me I looked the same. The only difference is I have a lump under my chin on one side so it is now lopsided. I also have a scar, which I knew I would have. He said that the lump should go away. (I’m now 6 months post op writing this review, with the same lumpy lopsided under chin, and no improvement or change in my appearance.) He told me since my surgery wasn’t a success and there was no improvement, he recommends a deep neck lift to try to fix it. Being someone who wasn’t comfortable with surgery to begin with, I now am traumatized. I feel like my trust was already broken. He said all I would have to do is cover the anesthesiologist. That was super nice of him, but I’m too scared to even go through with it. I’m out 5,000 dollars, I feel like I look worse than before, and if I even felt confident enough to go through with more surgery, I’d have to pay another 3,000 dollars for the anesthesiologist to POSSIBLY see a change. How can I trust his second recommendation when he was so confident in the first one that put me in this situation in the first place? Not to mention more healing and scarring. This ruined cosmetic surgery for me and had definitely left me feeling defeated over the whole thing. Im still paying on a surgery that left me looking worse than before I went in there.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marcia McVey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdbDRTHVaPG3bhqGLMckGDMzoWnmV0crT4koWhj0gWflR5kTdj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you're looking for a plastic surgeon who really listens to your goals, explains the process clearly, and is the utmost professional, I can’t recommend Dr. Esther Yoonah Kim enough. She is a gifted and talented surgeon — a true standout in her field.

Let me back up and explain how I found her. I’m a 65-year-old woman who was ready for a big transformation — not to look like someone else, but to feel like myself again. I started by interviewing several surgeons because I was planning to have a lot done and I wanted it to look natural. Many had great reviews and seemed capable, but Dr. Kim stood out from the very beginning. She was thoughtful, thorough, and so knowledgeable. My first consult with her lasted about an hour, and the second one went for two full hours. She took tons of notes on everything I said. I remember walking out thinking, She’s the one.

So, what did I have done? Quite a bit! I had a face, neck, and brow lift; fat grafting (used as filler in my facial area); lower eyelid blepharoplasty; and perioral dermabrasion on my upper lip. I was under anesthesia for around 8.5 hours. From pre-op to post-op, the process was easy to follow and honestly kind of seamless. I’ve had zero complications — none.

Now I’m two months out, and I feel fabulous. I think I look refreshed and natural — not overdone at all. My scars are already fading, and I’d say I look 10 to 15 years younger. My neck was my biggest issue going in, and now it’s one of my favorite results — absolutely perfect. An unexpected perk? The fat grafting has improved my skin quality. My complexion is much clearer now, and the age spots I used to have are barely visible.

Dr. Kim also has such great bedside manner. She’s professional and focused but also warm and easy to talk to. And her staff — from Alejandra to Erica to Maria (and I know I’m forgetting others!) — they are all so kind, personable, and supportive. I always felt like I was in good hands.

Before surgery, I felt like my outer appearance just didn’t match how I felt inside. I’m active, healthy, and full of energy — but I looked in the mirror and saw tired eyes, sagging skin, and that neck I couldn’t stop noticing.

Now, just a couple months later, I feel confident again. I still look like me — just a better, fresher version. It truly was one of the best decisions I’ve made.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERXgvXIE2tvR7DENUSI2HN6TMxBa4AJAF1xYu6DAt6-87NIZhY0RnBmjusorWGVhC2SVst-orPgP8789bkN-TS0hmgd5ktwWJDbKq4xgIgIsRYYLsLseiv7pEHOHUAnOxOiGnrIcwkUfC1s","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETMuFbL7vcIc1IDUNXbDbp20yM46KbJ6aG5BqmChIwledA3wLOix4ZS0-lmZX9B8PQXoSuEaW1CzmB1Ho93GQTizBfTb3v2HxiQtVNNekjxDM6ok-4Zig39ODhDGgKb3p1NEEv8bs_bMECX"],"When":"2025-8-29"},{"Name":"Sabrina Wilson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKYF-WPExCH1Jh4-34iz-E_vdcJHsvACZN7cZQS7O4HS5sGTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was referred to Dr. Hardesty by 5 different people for a breast augmentation. From the very first consultation appointment I knew I was making the right choice by going with him. Throughout the whole process he has been very informative and has answered any questions I have had. His staff is AMAZING, especially Narcel and Bianca. They are the sweetest! Dr. Hardesty’s post operative care couldn’t be any better. He sees you every week for the first 3 weeks just to ensure everything is okay and healing the way it should. Along with that his staff calls to check in on you. Talk about a great Dr and staff that actually care about the patient. I am so happy I went with Dr Hardesty and am in love with my results! He understood what I wanted and I couldn’t be any happier with my results!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Melinda Anderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEMHHy9ipPiHY_gzebqdKo1rD54fC685PrFAaZ8Vx-UvqbOvip=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came to Dr. Almonte a year ago after deciding I really wanted to do something about my jowls and saggy neck. I had done a video consultation with a SoCal Dr. who was known to have done a star or two but was discouraged about traveling and spending a few weeks away from home in a hotel and adding significantly to the cost of the procedure.  That afternoon through the magic of Google I came across Dr. Almonte!  I was in his office the next day having a consultation with him.  His office is warm and inviting, his Staff are next level professional and Dr. Almonte himself couldn’t have been any more personable, professional and in tune with my needs and completely understood the assignment.  It was January 2025 and I was the Mother of the Bride for a May 2025 wedding out of the Country.  Dr. Almonte was very realistic in setting expectations for surgery and recovery; he gave me options to consider.  We scheduled the first available surgery date mid March for his signature A-Lift.  There were several reasons I chose Dr. Almonte; First of all he is Board Certified, Specializing in Faces only and lastly he performs his procedures under “Local” vs. “GA”.  Being age 67 this was very appealing to me.  Fast forward to 2026 I have lost weight since my procedure last year and Dr. Almonte offers a very reasonable option for a phase 2 procedure should you need your results tweaked after that first procedure. I’m currently almost 3 weeks post op and couldn’t be happier with my results. The level of care given by Dr. Almonte in the post op phase is unparalleled to anything I’ve ever experienced. This has been an extremely positive journey all because of Dr. Almonte and his staff.  If you’re on the fence about doing facial plastic surgery I urge you to consider Dr. Almonte.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lETl8vqMkEPagGh9dl8Qb4rEY_rXUR5TVxBG183IBsPrqBWmlGmryxU1fdnKukGPafmKLXzhClV7LBdhJj6Ig8J5TsqCfA6KwvxTVwBJ8YcqcuQdH-7VhW1Zf0-D9vZQR9Mxm4Dhp8pWuCgB"],"When":"2026-2-12"},{"Name":"Centrum pod Platanem","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzvb98cP5b_-d3LqLIW3UpZgYVcJK_gP9xtD121x4NRK88TA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dear Dr. Almonte,

[{"Name":"Sophie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIo3E7Ngr8mMAKbjIrY7Uw0Faiht_rkzPqVPodiirviV6VHuw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I truly don’t even know where to begin, because words almost don’t feel big enough to describe how grateful I am for Dr. Robert Shumway, Kathy, and the entire team.

This surgery was something I had thought about for so long. It was my biggest insecurity, something that affected how I saw myself, how confident I felt in my body, how clothes fit, and honestly how comfortable I felt just being me. Trusting someone with something so personal and emotional is not easy, but from the very first consultation, Dr. Shumway made me feel completely safe, understood, and confident in my decision.

Dr. Shumway is not just a surgeon, he is a true artist and craftsman. His attention to detail is unreal. He genuinely cares about symmetry, balance, proportion, and creating results that look beautiful, natural, and perfectly tailored to your body. He took the time to explain everything to me thoroughly, answered every question with patience, and never once made me feel rushed or brushed off. I felt heard every step of the way.

The day of my breast augmentation, the care I received was exceptional. The entire team was so attentive, calming, kind, and supportive. They treated me like family. Kathy and the staff checked on me constantly, made sure I was comfortable, reassured me, and truly went above and beyond to make sure I felt safe and taken care of, not just physically, but emotionally too.

And then… the results.

I am honestly still in awe. My results are perfect. Dr. Shumway completely transformed my confidence and how I feel in my own body. For the first time, I look in the mirror and feel aligned with how I’ve always envisioned myself. My posture is different. The way I walk is different. The way I dress is different. I feel feminine, confident, empowered, and finally at home in my body.

The work is stunning, beautifully done, proportionate, and clearly the result of someone who truly loves what they do. You can tell Dr. Shumway puts his heart into his craft. This wasn’t just a procedure, it was life-changing.

What makes this clinic even more special is that the excellence extends beyond surgery. Dr. Shumway and his team also took incredible care of my family member who came in for filler and Botox. The experience was just as thoughtful, professional, and meticulous, and the results were flawless. It speaks volumes about the consistency and integrity of this practice.

Dr. Shumway is without a doubt my surgeon for life. I would trust him with anything. I recommend him and his clinic wholeheartedly and enthusiastically to anyone considering cosmetic surgery or aesthetic treatments. If you are looking for a surgeon who is not only incredibly skilled, but also deeply compassionate, patient, and passionate about delivering the best possible results, this is the place.

I am beyond grateful. Forever thankful. And forever confident thanks to Dr. Robert Shumway and his amazing team. ❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"VN RD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2LopSj0Hhh15jr7hj5XO_q3tmNWurjpRCJPlEORexn73Y2AvBOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am someone who loves to read reviews before I commit to anything, so for that reason I need to leave a review for anyone that is like me. The team at Dr. Shumway’s office are amazing. Everyone is so caring and make you feel like they have known you forever. I first spoke with Kat & she was so kind & has continues to be very kind and caring through the whole process. The process has been great, the Dr is amazing & his team are just the best. I am so glad I chose Dr.Shumway for my surgery. We don’t even mind driving 2.5 hours. So worth it!","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQA-TSZ8NdNT8Mg64Ye6JB-NkZIuQIb31qu07zWlwqZRrByvCWYFFhf2PhGDIZ2LYFnwK_kIJW_WHT9VcqkkfKhWZKzfpLWYWz7kKUXtUthLPnphfww9lfTH7QT5cpK8iYOVwd7eA"],"When":"2024-8-20"},{"Name":"Jennifer Eigner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVkovOaELRTNpBrkngghk6yLXPplo382wB9ycDlYCr9La1oA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my 3rd time going to Dr. Shumway and it was just as pleasant as all the others. I've had TUBA breast augmentation, liposuction on multiple areas including flanks, back, chin & jawline, back of arms and mons pubis area. The whole team is incredible, friendly and care deeply about what the patient desires while giving realistic results. Best cosmetic surgery practice in the business ! Thank you Dr. Shumway & Team","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marissa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMDSlJUix5YW6Ah4GXuwgWtZrZKJvXvsCRxQOP1jpJeDVuRKrTFw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My mom came here for a treatment and all the staff are amazing! We love Dr. Shumway is so kind. He explains everything in detail and is extremely helpful. The rest of the staff is so friendly and welcoming. I would recommend this team to anyone!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zahraa Hameed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsBQAd_ZaXnqgN7D-PX9WyQIZRZmhMnUq4pEQwPVtJzFrvJPk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely amazing experience with Dr. Shumway and his incredible team!

I recently had a TUBA breast augmentation with Dr. Shumway, and I truly can’t say enough good things about the entire journey. From the very first consultation to post-op care, every step was handled with so much professionalism, care, and compassion.

Dr. Shumway took the time to thoroughly explain the TUBA method (transumbilical breast augmentation), which I had honestly never heard much about before. He made sure I understood everything, answered every question with patience, and helped me feel completely confident in my decision. His calm, experienced energy made all the difference. The results are already amazing, and I’m only a few days post-op — I can’t wait to see how they continue to settle. For anyone wondering, TUBA is such a great option — no scars on the breasts at all, and the recovery so far has been smoother than I imagined.

A huge thank you to Cathy, the nurse who cared for me with so much kindness. She went over everything multiple times just to make sure I felt safe and supported. I was nervous the day of surgery, but her warm and attentive energy completely calmed me down. Truly a gem.

And a special shoutout to Jessie, who handled my IV sedation. I was so nervous about that part, but he was unbelievably gentle, professional, and made the whole process feel safe and easy. I don’t even remember falling asleep — it was that seamless!

This whole team works like a well-oiled machine, but with heart. They made me feel like more than just a patient. If you’re considering breast augmentation — especially TUBA — this is the place to go. I couldn’t be happier, and I’m so grateful I found them. Thank you all for taking such good care of me 💖","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dre Alvarez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwU5jCguYPGHTXHXnZdjRDnM6okQubGbq_CPCQkTJLx7bLD07e=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got breast implants with Dr Shumway late June 2024, the staff is wonderful! I absolutely love how everything turned out, even more than I imagined. I feel so much more confident and comfortable with my new look, and I couldn’t be happier with my decision.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"SHARON HUGHES","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMJho-BYLJO-EtdvECIDHrIUlm4RVj8c6f-MeJfiyO2IMW3g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I accompanied my sister to Dr Sadati's office for her pre-op appointment. At that
visit, she introduced me. I learned about
the deep plane facial and neck preservation. I was amazed at what he do for myself. The decision was easy to make after seeing his knowledge and extensive experience with this procedure.
I underwent deep plane face and neck preservation with lip lift and CO2
laser skin resurfacing. Now 3 weeks post recovery, my surgery outcome turned out better than I could have imagined! I am beyond happy.
I totally had a smooth experience largely due Dr Sadati's staff, especially Rhonda, Ida and Arian. I was very relaxed knowing I was in good hands on surgery morning and with my appointments to follow. I can't praise Dr Sadati's enough for my new lease on life.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D E","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZJFuAYCCKdYmoBp3stVaeKAkNKgP49D03pAcCFBH0C1Ix8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In July 2025, I underwent a facelift, neck lift, and fat transfer with Dr. Kevin Sadati, and I am beyond thrilled with the outcome. From the initial consultation to my most recent follow-up, Dr. Sadati and his team provided me with exceptional care, professionalism, and warmth.

During my initial consultations, Dr. Sadati took the time to understand my goals and explained each procedure in detail, helping me feel confident and informed every step of the way. The combination of the facelift and neck lift gave me a beautifully refreshed and natural look—no tightness, just a more youthful version of myself. The fat transfer added subtle volume in all the right places, restoring softness and balance to my features.

What truly impressed me was Dr. Sadati’s commitment to a smooth recovery. The addition of hyperbaric oxygenation and yellow light therapy to my post‑operative care made a remarkable difference in easing discomfort, reducing swelling, and accelerating my healing.

What truly sets Dr. Sadati apart is his artistry and eye for detail. The results are beautiful yet understated—friends and family have commented on how great I look without realizing I had surgery, which is exactly what I hoped for.

If you're considering facial rejuvenation, I wholeheartedly recommend Dr. Sadati. His skill, compassion, and dedication to natural-looking results are unmatched.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"stacey szabo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsObR-Nbj2z0C8livmR_qGP8oSnZXHf3VAJHaVsshOnKmfOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an exceptional experience with Dr. Kevin Sadati, as well as his amazing staff, and I could not be happier with my results. I underwent a lower blepharoplasty, temporal brow lift, and facial fractional CO₂ laser. The recovery experience and outcome exceeded my expectations!

Dr. Sadati is truly masterful at his craft. From the very first consultation, he took the time to listen carefully to my concerns, thoroughly evaluate my facial structure, and thoughtfully explain all of my options. I never felt rushed or pressured—only informed and confident in my decisions.

His attention to detail, artistry, and precision are remarkable, and the results look incredibly natural and refreshed. I feel like the best version of myself. The entire experience, from consultation through recovery, was professional, reassuring, and personalized.

If you are considering facial procedures and want a surgeon who combines technical excellence with genuine care, I highly recommend Dr. Kevin Sadati. He is simply outstanding.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Terri V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHPypopnFudufBhu2A38Ou90Euny2SqIR8d48omf-3ZhQwuA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience with Dr. Sadati and his staff has been great! He listened closely to what I wanted to achieve and explained in detail what he could do to accomplish my desired results.  During and after the surgery I experienced little to no pain at all. Dr. Sadati’s work is exceptional. I am extremely pleased with my results. He is truly an artist, and in my opinion, God endowed Dr. Sadati with remarkable artistic talent.

[{"Name":"Claudia Banegas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjpXEjvOpfY-7aCTKIXFz-55-awuHy1TBKXoyqRClD9RQtH7_pUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing experience at BG Medical Aesthetics for my XERF treatment. The treatment itself was quick and easy, and I was impressed with how smooth the whole process was. I’ve already noticed my skin looking more firm, refreshed, and youthful, and the results look very natural. I’m so happy with my experience and I’ll definitely be coming back for future treatments!

Melody, the owner, is wonderful at making honest, thoughtful recommendations based on what you truly need, never pushing unnecessary treatments. Moon, the aesthetician, is exceptional — she is extremely attentive, gentle, and thorough, taking the time to understand your skin. You can really tell she cares about results and client comfort. Technician Xuan is superb — I’ve done Morpheus 8 twice with her and the results have been amazing. Nina, the consultant, is extremely helpful and very knowledgeable, especially when it comes to aftercare. The entire experience has been excellent from start to finish. I cannot recommend Beautiful Glow Spa enough!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Kleier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjWzzIRazN58Zm_WywZLDGgetl01LMyxMWAVwpub4SMCiiefiA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On a recent business trip, I stayed at the Hilton-San Gabriel location and learned about the Beautiful Glow wellness spa that was located at the hotel. I was primarily looking for a massage but also learned of the other services they provided. So, in addition to getting a massage I opted to try out the HydraFacial treatment. I was somewhat hesitant about the facial (being a man) but had always wanted to try this out since I have an oily skin complexion and wanted to see the effects on my skin. I am pleased to report a very positive experience. All the staff from the consultants to the technicians were very informative and welcoming and put me at total ease.

I travel once a month on business to the area and each time I get a massage (with Jean) and HydraFacial (with Amy). They are both outstanding, very professional, and nice too.

I highly recommend this spa to anyone (including guys) for a great spa experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Regina Ly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuV_DRBJ0BsI3zh6cH3LCR-8JU1NksHbr3ll-94bjou8aFDQep=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The first thing they do when you walk in is analyze your face to see what you might need. [{"Name":"Kaisha Meadows Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxUlyFNjxU5BR5hJhMUOe249iEXzj4IYFj38hTRJV6gggfwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Kerendian is amazing, he’s a caring and a wonderful cosmetic surgeon. My surgery was very complicated and he tackled it head on with no complication. My tummy tuck is a big self esteem and confidence booster. I just want to say thank you from the bottom of my heart.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQFnqlv7B8GV-TyWs8Z0-xvUw41vvHyy9O1Cmg2qLEuKzzpbKIxzlYylAOI6JwXmp18trLpELLYzi0a4xcALSZfx5aMid_O9D2BNL1WIQRyLQiHkubYhtNH7zcz33uljJ22jFc"],"When":"2022-6-24"},{"Name":"Emily Carnal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3YbfBzq9nb9QJJOg_Au6cfkQ6gHl1dxnAUNnXyI1GgAjOdYIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My experience with Desired Beauty and Dr. Farzin Kerendian was very frustrating and completely unethical. During my consultation, Dr. Kerendian specifically recommended a combination of CO2 laser, subcision, and filler. These were the only treatments he proposed, and the original quote was $3,250. I negotiated the total down to $2,500, and they confirmed in writing that all three procedures would be included at that price.
However, on the day of the procedure, after I had already paid in full and in good faith, Dr. Kerendian suddenly decided I didn’t “need” the subcision or filler anymore. These were his own recommendations in the first place. When I questioned this and asked for a refund for the services I wasn’t receiving, he told me to wait until the two-week follow-up to reassess. But at that follow-up, he never brought it up again.
When I contacted the office to request a refund, they falsely claimed the lower price reflected the removal of the filler and subcision, which is a blatant lie, and I have written proof showing the $2,500 was for all three treatments. They later sent me a form attempting to show I agreed to this change, but the signature section was blank, clear evidence I never saw or approved it.
They took my money for services I never received and then refused to issue a refund, despite the documentation I provided. This kind of behavior is not just unprofessional, it's deceptive and unethical. I strongly urge others to avoid Desired Beauty and find a provider who operates with honesty and integrity. Don’t make the same mistake I did.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shelly McMillen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkfQWDjGCfKm8dLKoCHl7zUB8k5uW1mb41VcLedMbgi36R1p2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Kerendian is the most knowledgeable doctor when it comes to any kind of procedure you need to better yourself.  He helps you understand and is there for you through your journey.  He is kind, caring, personable and his nurse is just as amazing.  I am so grateful for him and his entire staff.  It is not easy when you need to have reconstructve surgery.  But he guides you through the entire process and makes it at simple as possible.  I highly recommend him and his team if you want to be the best you can be.  I wouldn't go to anyone else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexis Barrios","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTIdtRyOQAqG0RGmEPnlGJie_4caDR-KzxjcBt6qPBgjgdtjk3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Kerendian and his staff are amazing. I went to see him for a breast augmentation procedure; I was looking to regain the volume I lost after nursing three children. He not only restored my confidence by making sure that my breasts appeared proportional to my body type, but he also repaired an umbilical hernia that was causing me pain and discomfort.

Since my first consultation, I felt cared for, respected, and listened to. He is a true master of his craft and genuinely cares about the safety, well-being, and happiness of his clients. [{"Name":"Angelina Richmond","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXt7_o7qHOKSO6rN8HFpLCTjuB2ZD0DkuheI-QEdH-WVVY2bEl3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Update: Initially I gave a 1 star review for my experience with customer service. But I am now changing my review to a 5 star. I went to my rescheduled appointment. The office staff was very polite, two women were at the front desk they were very polite. The office is clean and refreshments are offered. The Dr I saw was very straight forward and into his work which is a good thing. The assistant was great, overall I was pleased with my visit, the customer service was actually great in office.

This review isn’t based on any type of treatment, it’s more so based on customer service as a new client. I am a new client and I had an appointment but my gps got me lost. I drove all the way from Pleasanton to Danville I called and asked for help to find the right location and it was literally one minute from where I was, once I input the correct address. The person on the phone told me I needed to reschedule my appointment she said the grace period was only 5 minutes which I was never told when I scheduled the appointment. Most places allow a 10 -15 minute grace period. I was literally 8 minutes late and was 1 minute away which is under 10 minutes. I consulted this surgeon for lipedema treatment in my lower legs and was told my calves could not be treated — only my ankles and inner knees.

On the day of surgery, the surgeon suddenly asked if I wanted to add my calves, which completely contradicted the consultation. I was already anxious and felt flustered by this last-minute change. When I asked the manager, she strongly advised against it, saying it would be far too painful with local anesthesia.

After surgery, I was told that maybe they should have treated the calves because they didn’t actually know if it would have been tolerable. That was incredibly frustrating to hear.

I paid $12,000 and am now left with untreated calf lipedema and unevenness from the surgery. I now have to spend more money with another surgeon to correct what should have been handled properly the first time.
